games.name: Knights Province
games.summary:
Become medieval lord. Build and defend your town. Train your army. Conquer the enemies.

Knights Province is intended to be an old-school RTS game. Unlike many modern RTS games, which are fast-paced and often are more about tactics, KP planned to emphasize on “strategy” component. Slower-paced gameplay, base-building, resources collection and processing, in-depth strategic choices, variety of resources and units, attention to details.

games.name: Beautiful Light
games.summary: Beautiful Light is a PvPvP(vE) tactical first-person extraction shooter where 6 squads of 3 operators are tasked with entering, securing, and extracting an artifact in a hostile, horrific environment. Face other operators and player-controlled anomalies, but beware: mistakes can risk your life and gear.

games.name: Former Dawn
games.summary:
After a failed terraforming mission on an exoplanet light years from Earth, humanity dies out but leaves behind a child species(called the “Formers”) that forgets its own origin. You play a common hunter who rediscovers the truth and struggles against the faceless Organization which will stop at nothing to defeat you. Along the way, you recruit a motley crew of brave Formers who are willing to risk everything for Justice.

Former Dawn is, in a nutshell, a story of discovery, resistance to evil, and exploration of the human condition. The world is rich, the plot complex, and the characters dynamic and multi-dimensional.

games.name: Former Dawn
games.summary: An upcoming port of Former Dawn for the PC

games.name: Rise of Fati
games.summary: Step into the mythical world of "Rise of Fati," an epic adventure game where ancient African folklore and legends come to life. Embark on a journey with Fati, a young and brave warrior destined to restore peace and harmony to her homeland. Explore rich landscapes, solve intricate puzzles, and battle formidable foes as you uncover the secrets of your heritage.

games.name: SweetCanvas
games.summary: An untimely transfer. An unexpected encounter. A chance meeting between two students sets in motion a chain of events that will fundamentally change both of their lives... Or, perhaps, just their love life!

games.name: Chronal Chain
games.summary: "TIME CONTROL" bullet hell action. Overcome impossible odds by slowing, stopping and rewinding time!

games.name: Legal Beagll: Justice is Argued
games.summary: Legal Beagll: Justice is Argued is a courtroom simulation RPG where every trial is a battle of wits. You’ll take on the role of Harold Beagll, a golden retriever attorney navigating a legal system filled with sharp-tongued rivals, eccentric clients, and unpredictable witnesses.

games.name: Merry Crisis
games.summary: Three loves. One week. Zero chill. Merry Crisis is an intimate, character-driven romance visual novel about love, loss, and belonging—is home what you left behind, or where you’re headed?

games.name: Cats Hidden in Advent Calendar
games.summary: Sweeten the countdown to Christmas with this fabulous advents calendar full of hidden cats for you to find in this cute HOG by Travellin Cats - the original viral hidden cats game creator!

games.name: Squadron 42
games.summary: Take the role of a rookie UEE Navy combat pilot in a cinematic single-player epic adventure set in the Star Citizen universe. Battle in the stars and face-to-face as you seamlessly transition between dogfighting and ground combat. Serve aboard a massive Navy capital ship as your custom character interacts and builds relationships with a living, breathing crew. Cutting-edge performance capture brings unprecedented emotion and life to some of your favorite actors. Powered by Lumberyard, Squadron 42 pushes gaming graphics and fidelity to the next level.

games.name: Little Ghost
games.summary: 2D Metroidvania focused on platforming rather than combat. Explore a surreal paper world using a unique horizontal float mechanic. Chill-yet-Challenging, Little Ghost has tons of music, a sizeable interconnected map to unlock, & lots of hidden items.

games.name: Infinitesimals
games.summary: Infinitesimals is a story-driven, 3rd person action adventure where you play as tiny aliens who stand only 1mm tall. Though a diminutive species, they are technologically advanced and space faring.

games.name: Witchbrook
games.summary: Experience the thrills and pitfalls of school-life in Witchbrook! Discover a spellbinding isometric pixel art world full of charm and intrigue in this richly detailed magical school and town life simulator.

games.name: Fable
games.summary: Become the Hero you want to be in an immersive open-world action-RPG where each choice shapes your journey, reputation is everything, and fairytale endings are never guaranteed.

games.name: Forsaken Realms: Vahrin's Call
games.summary: Adventure awaits in this narrative driven fantasy action-RPG. The war-torn city of Vahrin stands before you on the brink of collapse and in desperate need of aid. As a mercenary in search of your next…opportunity, will you answer Vahrin’s Call?

games.name: The Way of Wrath
games.summary: The Way of Wrath is a story-driven turn-based tactical RPG set in an ancient world governed by shamanistic laws. You explore the beautifully handcrafted landscape, rebuild defences of an old fort, take on quests and unite war torn people against the imminent wrath of enemy forces. Will you lead with an iron fist, diplomacy or trickery is up to you, but with every choice you make be prepared to face the consequences.

games.name: Last Moon
games.summary: The Moon is falling, malicious creatures appear, the world falls in chaos! Last Moon is an Action-RPG greatly inspired by the mythical titles from the 90s! Explore a mesmerizing, vast and ruined world riddled with dangers, face tainted creatures and upgrade your abilities in a classic hand-drawn 2D style.

games.name: Rune Fencer Illyia
games.summary: Rune Fencer Illyia is an intense, atmospheric action-platformer with a heavy focus on exploration and combat. Traverse an enormous and dangerous world, meet strange allies, and outfight your numerous foes with fast-paced swordplay and stolen runic magic.

games.name: The Lewd Knight
games.summary: Help the girl - a superhero in the fight against evil

games.name: HyperCore: Rhythm Bullet Hell
games.summary: HyperCore is a “Rhythm Bullet Hell”, mixing the frenetic action of classic bullet hell Shoot'em Up with semi-procedurally generated encounters based on the music. As PRISS, survive the action-packed levels in sync with the music and protect what is left of Humanity.

games.name: Divinum
games.summary: Divinum is an action-adventure that blends stylish, expressive combat with rewarding exploration. Master devastating combos and craft unique builds to fight back mysterious invaders and uncover your island’s hidden truth.

games.name: Lost Viking: Kingdom of Women
games.summary: While traveling to the East the Vikings fall into a trap. Ragnald is saved by the accompanying wolf and must find his loved ones. The Viking and his companion are forced not only to survive, but properly manage time, space and energy to achieve the goal.

games.name: Carnival Hunt
games.summary: Carnival Hunt is a Multiplayer Social Horror Game where you can either fight against the cannibalism corrupting the world or embrace it. Will you be the first one to commit cannibalism for survival or test your instinct at trust?

games.name: Neverlooted Dungeon
games.summary: Venture deep into the Neverlooted Dungeon and face its treacherous, deadly traps. Armed with your creativity, trusty weapon and magical items, find your own ways to outsmart the dangers in a highly immersive world. Be careful, become paranoid, be the first to loot!

games.name: Sin: Reloaded
games.summary: Nightdive Studios and 3D Realms have joined forces to bring you SiN: Reloaded, a completely remastered experience of the classic 1998 shooter from Ritual Entertainment. SiN was a groundbreaking story driven FPS brimming with memorable characters, horrific enemies and a devastating arsenal that pushed the Quake II Engine to its limits. Now in 2020 SiN has been Reloaded!

games.name: The Pope: Power & Sin
games.summary: Take on the role of the Pope, strengthen the authority of the Church State, fight for spiritual and political independence from pagans and the renewal of church structures. The rule of Pope is a torrent of numerous scandals, excesses and signs of moral corruption in the authorities of the Church.

games.name: RevenBlade
games.summary: RevenBlade is team-based third-person hero shooter with MOBA elements and a focus on melee combat with fast-paced action and mechanical outplays.

games.name: The Cabbage Effect
games.summary: A cartoon-pop-surrealistic twin-stick shooter on procedurally generated stages that takes place in an apocalyptic narrative.

games.name: Nonuple Nine: Asymptote
games.summary: "NONUPLE NINE: Asymptote" is a side-scrolling, narrative Sci-fi adventure game. Control the subject girl and solve the mystery of the building where the same floor loops. With vast scientific insights, can you find the answer for the "meaning of humanity" during this deadly journey?

games.name: Skyclimbers
games.summary: Build your kingdom, choose your class, and tame monsters in this Multiplayer City-Building/Open-World Action RPG that takes place in a procedurally generated anime-themed metaverse.

games.name: Divided Land
games.summary: Join the fight for survival in a vast medieval open world. Explore, hunt, craft powerful gear, raid and plunder enemy villages, or forge your own path. As darkness falls, the dead awaken—prepare your defenses or seek shelter. Join allies in co-op PvE or test your skills in savage PvP.

games.name: Your World
games.summary: Create beautiful multiplayer worlds, games, simulators, and theme parks with this easy-to-use sandbox title.

games.name: Akatori
games.summary: Help young Mako to save the world, while gracefully switching between two parallel dimensions in this fascinating metroidvania/slasher platformer! Explore the worlds full of magic and secrets, find friends and allies and try not to let the ancient God awake!

games.name: Tukoni: Forest Keepers
games.summary: Tukoni: Forest Keepers is a cute and cozy puzzle adventure, based on a series of award-winning books by the Ukrainian artist Oksana Bula. Play as the forest spirit Tukoni as you meet unique characters, solve captivating puzzles, brew fragrant tea and explore a magical world filled with kindness. Play our free prologue now!

games.name: Heart of Muriet
games.summary: Unique voxel fantasy real-time strategy. Experience the land of Muriet and reunite your family in this epic real-time strategy game! It's a game for people who love RTS games, but intense micromanagement stops them from playing.

games.name: Treasure Islands
games.summary: Help Nick and Pippa find a selection of new artefacts and exhibits for the Grand Museum in an exciting adventure across a number of islands, each with their own quirks, characters and strange events!

games.name: Disc Creatures World
games.summary: Embark on a grand adventure through a world full of mysteries, uncovering ‘Discs’ to collect your own party of creatures! Engage in strategic battles, enjoy an assortment of collectables, and meet unique characters along the way. A monster taming RPG with a blend of nostalgia and novelty!

games.name: Pocket Wheels
games.summary: Pocket Wheels isn't just a racing game, it's an objective-based 3D platformer. Take a seat in various toy cars with special abilities and explore a house full of themed rooms filled with collectibles, objectives and race tracks!

games.name: Gravity Blasters
games.summary: Gravity Blasters is a fast, fun and addictive multiplayer artillery action game that is recreating the classic artillery style of aiming and shooting by adjusting the angle and power.

games.name: Eternity Guards
games.summary: The main idea of the game is a fantasy alternative to Valhalla. Scandinavian mythology is a thematic focus - the same style, ornaments and atmosphere where heroes fight for a place in eternity, there will be only one.

games.name: Meteora
games.summary: Be a meteor in a constant race for survival in a young and chaotic universe by dodging, chasing & taking down other meteors in Meteora. Power up, strategize and put your skills to the test in our spectacular arcade combat racer!

games.name: Eden.schemata();
games.summary: EDEN.schemata(); is a multi-ending sci-fi mystery adventure game, featuring headless corpses, a sealed laboratory, a limbless android suspect/heroine, and an amnesiac protagonist. The game design and gradually UI change in reflection of your actions.

games.name: Honeycomb: The World Beyond
games.summary: Honeycomb: The World Beyond is a survival-sandbox game set on an exuberant planet – Sota7. Explore its vast world and face challenges on your bioengineering journey. Crossbreed plants or animals, gather resources, craft items, and conduct experiments in order to develop new species.

games.name: SacriFire
games.summary: A modern JRPG-inspired game with a unique battle system, rich story, fantastic visuals and music by Motoi Sakuraba.

games.name: Building Relationships
games.summary: Roll, jump, and dash around as a house on a date in this silly adventure game. Meet eccentric structures, romance eligible bachelorx pads, and uncover the meaning of life... or you could go fishing instead (though we replaced the fish with cars to make more sense).

games.name: They Are Here: Alien Abduction Horror
games.summary: They Are Here is a first-person horror story about a journalist who witnessed an alien abduction at the Grayswood farm. Explore the area armed with a flashlight. Take photos of evidence of aliens presence and get to the bottom of the horrifying truth.

games.name: Espiocracy
games.summary: Espiocracy is grand strategy game with unique take on the Cold War. Play as an intelligence service (CIA, KGB, Stasi, Mossad, and many more): launch proxy wars, stage coups, steal war plans, assassinate enemies, and tilt world history in your favor.

games.name: HeartLinks: A Puzzle Called Love
games.summary: Solve puzzles with the power of friendship! Each student you befriend gives you a unique item that lets you unlock new areas and explore a wacky anime school! To deliver a confession to your crush, can you clear every obstacle? Can you overcome your feelings? Can you solve the puzzle called love?

games.name: Yuha's Nightmares
games.summary: This is a simulation game about the nightmares that our main character Yuha suffers from. You will explore the surrealistic world that is full of unexpected events. The deeper part of Yuha's consciousness is depicted through the flip side of the 3D world.

games.name: Midnight Laundry
games.summary: Midnight Laundry is a short first-person horror game where a long night at the laundromat takes an unexpected turn.

games.name: Imperial Grace
games.summary: Imperial Grace is a unique mix of romance, medieval intrigue, and strategy. Play as the new Empress of Calidya through a visual novel rife with ambition and deceit. Make choices that will change your fate and that of your nation, rule wisely to make your Empire prosper, and find love along the way!

games.name: Jury Trial
games.summary: In this law simulation RPG you join a group of innocence lawyers. Set in a fictional country deeply divided by racial profiling, prejudice and social injustice it’s your job to find a jury who’s willing to listen. Study case material, discover new evidence and convince the jury in the court of law.

games.name: Explory Story
games.summary: Play as a world famous detective who is stuck inside one of his own works! Be careful and watch your step. The words on the page can come to life.

games.name: Super/Human Identity
games.summary: An RPG/Visual Novel hybrid where your choices affect both your own fate and the fates of your companions. Dynamic relationship system, romances (LGBTQIA+ or straight), and Quick Time Event superhero action.

games.name: Rules of Alchemy
games.summary: Defy fate as you blast your way through a procedural open world, in this spell combo roguelike with thousands of items and hundreds of spells.

games.name: Wandering Wolf
games.summary: Survival-Action experience in a dead world destroyed by civil war. You have to complete your own story, fighting for survival with monsters and nature.

games.name: Determinant
games.summary: Post-apocalyptic physics-based open-world survival adventure game. Planned to include combat, base building, crafting, puzzles, survival and a compelling story to drive it. Building will be a core gameplay mechanic where you build structures to overcome challenges and solve puzzles in the world.

games.name: Sondro Gomez: A Sunova Story
games.summary: "Sondro Gomez: A Sunova Story" is an action-adventure platformer following the story of a failing musician named Sondro, who must seek and recover the wish-granting Mystic Orbs to repay his debt to the mysterious Masked Man. Can he find them before the many rogues of Sunova beat him to the punch?

games.name: Island of Winds
games.summary:
Island of Winds takes you to 17th century Iceland, plunging them into a magical world teeming with trolls, giant spiders, and mythical creatures. Experience all of this through the eyes of the magic-wielding Brynhild, a member of the Balance Keepers who draws her magical power from the natural world.

Brynhild's journey has her on a quest to find her mentor, Hrymja, that will take her through nine incredible landscapes that draw on Iceland's stunning natural beauty. These locations range from the fiery Lava of Skjól to the treacherous Jökla lagoon and gleaming Obsidian Shore. Brynhild will face legendary creatures on her journey, such as the powerful and majestic Bear King, Hafgúfa - Guardian of the Sea and the majestic elven lady Vör of the Oasis.

games.name: Potata: Foxy Tale
games.summary: Potata: Foxy Tale is a fairy tale themed platformer adventure game in a beautiful world of dark forests. Your goal is to restore the balance and assemble the fragments of the Woodland Spirit.

games.name: Fragile Existence
games.summary: Take command of the last surviving fleet of humankind in Fragile Existence, a sci-fi RTS with fully 3D planet surfaces and vast solar systems to explore. Dispatch expeditions to find resources, build settlements, construct vital parts and supplies, and evolve your technology to meet new threats.

games.name: The Inspector
games.summary: The Inspector is a short-form first-person adventure about exploring the human mind. As an Inspector, you have the delicate task of investigating the human mind in search of those elements that will bring our loved ones back to life

games.name: Townseek
games.summary:
Townseek is a relaxing exploration-trading game where you embark on a journey across the world of Explora and discover the lost legacy of Sir Reginald Sharkingston! Discover exotic landmarks, trade with faraway towns, fish, mine, and farm as you complete your journal and make a name for yourself!

The whole world is your sea now, so be sure to see all that it has to offer!

games.name: Zeta Wolf Chronicles
games.summary: "Date" one of four girls on the path to enlightenment. Prom awaits. Will you be led astray by an old crush? The realistic dating-sim that "teaches" through its gameplay. Follow Rayen, a young disillusioned teen as he attempts to romance girls based on e-book tutorials. Will desperation win out in this desire for love, or will knowledge, patience, and logic pave the way to success?

games.name: Recursor
games.summary: An action roguelite inspired by platform fighters

games.name: A Sister's Journey
games.summary: Explore a charmingly beautiful, hand-crafted pixel art world and help Violet on her journey searching for her sister. Uncover its mysteries, face its threatening foes, and run 'n gun your way through this challenging action-metroidvania - which will put your true platforming skills to the test.

games.name: Showa American Story
games.summary: Showa American Story is a brand new RPG and an enthusiastic love letter to the 80s' pop culture that features a strong taste of B-Movies. Follow Choko's journey of truth and revenge across North America as she grows stronger.

games.name: Our Life: Now & Forever
games.summary: A paper airplane, two new neighbors, four autumns, and a one of a kind life. Create an experience that’s all your own in this near-fully customizable, choice-heavy story where you grow from childhood to adulthood.

games.name: Killbot General
games.summary: Satisfying real-time tactics packed in 5-minute battles. Create a customized cause and lead it to glory as its hero Killbot General in the crazy, dynamic story campaign for single-player or co-op. Simple yet deep, controller-friendly, with emphasis on strategy, not micromanagement.

games.name: Ardenfall
games.summary: Ardenfall is a first-person RPG set in a world of intricate politics and ancient cultures. Explore rain-drenched wetlands and forgotten dungeons full of danger. Meet countless interesting characters with unique dialog and quests, and leave your mark on this mysterious world.

games.name: Dagada's Story
games.summary:
Dive into the depths of a snowy world in this adventure game. Explore a mountain where a tribe of strange creatures, the Daoudaounes, lives among ancient ruins, while seeking answers to the mysteries that surround you.

Dagada's Story is a Puzzle-platformer game inspired by Super Nintendo-era games. This adventure emphasizes the balance between exploration, platforming, and puzzle-solving, with responsive controls and beautiful storytelling.

Particular attention has been given to the creation of the universe and each of its graphical, sound, and game design elements. The animation aims to be smooth and lively, reminiscent of pixel art from such game as Yoshi's island or the Super Mario bros series ...

games.name: Droid Escape
games.summary: In this adventure, help Droid 07 to overcome challenges, discover mysteries and free your friend from the miniaigas.

games.name: Candela
games.summary: Manipulate colors and conquer challenging puzzles in this mysterious 2D platformer set in a post-apocalyptic world. Explore the overworld, uncover hidden secrets, and bring light to this dark, desolate land

games.name: Christine
games.summary: Christine is a young orphan who works at the Paris Opera, with an unexplored talent for singing. If history sometimes repeats itself, will an Angel of Music help her to achieve her dreams?

games.name: Obscurity: Unknown Threat
games.summary: Obscurity: Unknown Threat is a horror shooter game where a team of soldiers must survive against a hidden foe. The game contains both conventional symmetrical FPS game modes as well as asymmetrical battles vs the Obscurity.

games.name: The Bornless
games.summary:
The Bornless is an FPS action shooter packed with a variety of gameplay modes. Dive into last-man-standing co-op gameplay or try the thrilling demon versus disciple mode, all within a terror-filled world. Players pair up and form teams, conjure demons to aid in combat, and utilize strategic planning and resource management to survive. Whether you choose an aggressive playstyle or prefer a more cautious approach, the choice is yours.

Join or create a Faction and amass various resources to upgrade and enhance your Safehouse or personalize your gear to give a new look to your arsenal as you go to war with other Factions.

You will also experience deep lore and storyline involving all the characters within The Bornless universe, which will be revealed as facts are discovered by players.

games.name: Solarpunk
games.summary:
Solarpunk is a survival game in a technically advanced world of floating islands. Alone or together with your friends, you can construct buildings, grow food, craft gadgets and explore distant islands with your own airship.

Use sunlight, wind and water to create an energy system and automate your processes like gathering ressoureces, watering your plants or catching fish.

games.name: Eternal Remnant: The First Chapter
games.summary: Dive into the unforgettable tale of two siblings on the run in this emotional RPG journey. With only their wits and a cursed power too dangerous to control, they must fight, explore and scavenge to survive in an unfamiliar world. Will their bond be strong enough to endure the road ahead?

games.name: Underling Uprising
games.summary: Play as the Underlings, a group of experiments created by evil mad science, as you seek revenge on your previous captor, the maniacal Dr. Baldrick! On their journey, the Underlings will need to fight across the globe, overcome the demons of their pasts, and accept help from unexpected places.

games.name: Mirai #167
games.summary: MIRAI #167 is a 2D pixel-art runner where you control two characters at once, rewinding time and jumping through portals. Embark on a frantic adventure to save humanity in a world where AI surpasses human control - upgrade your characters, break records and rewrite history before it’s too late!

games.name: Critias Empire
games.summary: Turn-based strategy game with 4x elements. Build your empire while surviving frequent disasters rained down by the ancient Gods.

games.name: Hero Chest
games.summary: The perfect combination of Roguelike, Hack Slash and Card Game! In Hero Chest you are an angry chest that got tired of being looted and decided to finish them all! With powers and special cards create the dungeon and strategize to reach your goal. An adventure full of combat and gold!

games.name: Astrolander
games.summary: Astrolander is a revolutionary action-packed reimagining of platformers. Embark on a thrilling adventure featuring innovative 2.5D fused with 3D environments and gameplay, unique mechanics, and breathtaking worlds. Take control of a curious robot on a roll named Feedback and an adventurous rocket powered sidekick named Haptic on a quest to save the Most Valuable Programs (MVPs)!

games.name: Mira: The Legend of the Djinns
games.summary: An epic 2D pixel art style Metroidvania, inspired by Moroccan culture and spiritual traditions. Wield powerful ancient weapons and forge your way through unrelenting deserts, crumbling necropoli, floating islands and dangerous mountains as you try to uncover the secret of the last Djinn.

games.name: Multi Idle
games.summary: Multi Idle is an idle game that features Exploring, Adventuring, Hero's, Dungeons, Raids and many more in its own kind of idling way. Get stuck in an endless loop of trying new things every time you play!

games.name: Cursed Dungeon Raider
games.summary: Embark on an exploration adventure with spooky and horror elements, tasked with recovering real historical artifacts from excavation sites around the world. Beware of local traps and monsters inspired by the mythology of each region.

games.name: Death Ring
games.summary: Death Ring is a casual action roguelike in which you will have to force your way through hordes of undead in search of the human world’s main artefact. Numerous scenarios of each character’s development based on random dropping items will make your runs unique.

games.name: The Backworld
games.summary: Experience a non-linear turn-based horror RPG. Navigate through eerie corridors and surreal dimensions, while battling and evading terrifying monsters. Grow stronger by exploring every corner, not grinding battles. Forge your own path to find new colorful worlds, and decide the fate of the universe.

games.name: Deer & Boy
games.summary: A Cinematic Platformer who you follow the journey of a boy who, during his flight will meet an unexpected companion. Together they will overcome many obstacles that will change their lives forever.

games.name: Nivalis
games.summary: Grow your business, manage restaurants and nightclubs, make friends and enemies, buy and decorate apartments, go fishing and maybe even find love in Nivalis, the city that stretches from the ocean to the clouds.

games.name: Tales of the Death
games.summary: Join a comic adventure in a hand-drawn book with a life of its own. Rearrange the panels of an animated comic to reveal the stories of the world of The Death.

games.name: Good Heavens!
games.summary: Good Heavens! is a procedurally generated open world crafting RPG for 1-8 players. Be a farmer, hunter, trader or warrior and explore the promised lands full of different races and cultures. Lead the heavens to salvation or who cares, find the best werewolf tavern and get drunk.

games.name: Phonopolis
games.summary: The story of Phonopolis tackles relatable, real-world themes and topics, focusing on manipulation and individualism, but still keeping the overall experience playful and light-hearted. Players will take on the role of Felix, a thoughtful young man who, along with his fellow citizens, faces the imminent threat of falling under the control of the city’s authoritarian Leader once and for all, effectively losing their humanity. Accidentally becoming the only person who consciously recognizes the threat, young Felix must try to stop the Leader from playing the Absolute tone...

games.name: Alice is Dead: Hearts and Diamonds
games.summary: A complete remake of the classic Flash game trilogy, Alice is Dead. Hearts and Diamonds includes all new art, added puzzles, expanded lore, and plenty of secrets for old and new fans alike.

games.name: Derelikt
games.summary: DERELIKT is a short narrative FPS inspired by Alien Resurrection (PS1, 2000) and Doom 3 (PC, 2004), with a dash of cosmic horror. It aims to recreate the PS1 aesthetic as faithfully as possible.

games.name: Deep Alchemy Dungeon
games.summary: D.A.D. is a dungeon crawling game were alchemy skills play crucial role. Young witch ominous plans were destroyed when she was put in a jail. But she founds ancient laboratory full of secrets and new shining perspectives behind the broken wall.

games.name: Abyss Fantasia
games.summary: The city "Cynthia" on the edge of the abyss, the "missing" girl who didn't know where she came from began to step into the abyss. Experience the complex emotional, mysterious biological environment under the Abyss. Finally face the deepest darkness of the abyss.

games.name: Magnetic Bonds
games.summary: Magnetic Bonds is a fusion of the visual novel and turn-based RPG genres inspired by shonen manga where players explore a vast galaxy, befriending characters and building relationships as they progress through the story and take down enemies and bosses.

games.name: Almost My Floor: Duality
games.summary: Almost My Floor: Duality - a noir detective horror-adventure game about the internal struggle with depression and the impending darkness in a provincial town. The gameplay is based on decision-making mechanics and a branching storyline.

games.name: Paws and Leaves: A Last Tale
games.summary: Life flashes before your eyes when you die. Help Me Fox by finding his memories beyond life and experiencing a touching, cute, and scary tale.

games.name: Dimakerus
games.summary: Disguise as anyone. Mimic their ways. Ambush your friends. Discover cursed Roman relics in ever-chanading catacombs and wield their might to obliterate those who stand in your way.

games.name: Dungeons of the Amber Griffin
games.summary: Play as a group of daredevils who explore the world of dark fantasy in search of fame, amber and gold. Experience the classic mechanics of the iconic ‘90s Dungeon Crawlers with a new twist. Solve the mystery of the ghost that haunted the ruins and discover a bestiary based on Kashubian beliefs.

games.name: Name of the Will
games.summary: You are informed to be a resident of Hope, a suspiciously harmonious community. Dodge the secretive governors, establish a rapport with your neighbors who monitor you, and solve puzzles to find out how you got here. Are you willing to sacrifice for the truth? Or, are you choosing a life of oblivion?

games.name: K-Pop Idol Stories: Road to Debut
games.summary: A love letter to the thrilling world of K-pop! In this life simulator, you're the manager responsible for scouting talent, organising schedules, creating budgets, planning social media, choosing music, and styling your idols. Your goal? To debut the next big K-pop idol group!

games.name: Order Automatica
games.summary: A turn-based auto battler secret society. Draft your grid of allies, arrange them in synergistic formations, equip items to gain power, and survive against a gauntlet of enemy grids. Perform the rites and ascend with a variety of different team builds to unlock new allies and powerups!

games.name: Bloody Hell Hotel
games.summary: In Bloody Hell Hotel, you embody a vampire. You wake up from a coma that has lasted for centuries, only to find your once-grand estate is now in ruins. It's time to turn it into a prosperous hotel! It's no easy task, though, as times are tough and resources are scarce. There are shortages of food, supplies, and workforce. Being a blood-thirsty monster doesn't help with customer satisfaction either. Luckily, underneath the estate lies a crypt and a system of caves. By foraging, farming, crafting, and fighting your way through the monster-infested dungeons, you'll find the resources you need to restore greatness to your mansion and turn it into a thriving hotel business.

games.name: Luna Abyss
games.summary: Luna Abyss is a single player story driven action-adventure with fluid platforming and bullet hell combat. Follow the journey of Fawkes, a prisoner of Luna caught between a cryptic prophecy and their prison sentence.

games.name: Lou's Lagoon
games.summary: A cosy open world adventure about running a seaplane delivery service. Customize your character, discover new islands, harvest goods, solve a family mystery, and work to keep an adorable island community afloat.

games.name: 34Everlast
games.summary: This is a super-concentrated action entertainment for busy working adults. The game is an action puzzle game where your discoveries and actions unravel a complex and intertwined world of breathless action in a dying world.

games.name: Marvel 1943: Rise of Hydra
games.summary:
This narrative-driven ensemble game stars Captain America Steve Rogers, Black Panther Azzuri (T'Challa's grandfather), U.S. soldier and member of the Howling Commandos Gabriel Jones, and leader of the fledgling Wakandan Spy Network, Nanali.

All four characters will be playable at different parts of the story. According to Skydance, players can look forward to "intuitive controls and exhilarating second-to-second gameplay that captures the action and excitement of Marvel, inspired by landmark comics, television, and films, as they navigate this all-new glob-trotting adventure."

games.name: Kvlt
games.summary: Fight your way through armies of Nazi occultists, religious zealots, and unspeakable cosmic horrors to unveil the Eldritch secrets behind the war theatre in this 2000s-era-inspired grimdark singleplayer FPS where WW2 meets Cthulhu Mythos.

games.name: Wonderland Quest
games.summary: Wonderland Quest is a casual point & click adventure game. Travel across Wonderland teeming with colorful challenges, surprises and creatures, brought to life with beautiful artwork.

games.name: Farm Renovator
games.summary: Buy a ruined farm and give it its full glory back. Clean, repair, restore, improve. Repair machines, manage the work on your farm, take care of your animals, and choose your development strategy. We're sure you'll have many satisfied customers.

games.name: Tenebris Somnia
games.summary:
Tenebris Somnia is a horror adventure in the same vein as survival horror classics like Silent Hill or Resident Evil, but transferred to a retro 2D environment more typical of the N.E.S. or Famicom.

You will struggle to survive by solving puzzles and fighting horrible creatures.

The secret ingredient of the game is its cinematics. When you reach certain key points you will see sequences with a completely different aesthetic, made in live action with real actors and created by a professional film crew.

games.name: Virtueror: The Virtual Conqueror
games.summary: Virtueror is an RTS with 4x and RPG elements. Your mission is to conquer new worlds and to extend your domain over the whole galaxy. Build your base, command your units, gather resources, set up defenses and crush anyone challenging you. Have no mercy and the universe will be yours!

games.name: Orc Warchief: Strategy City Builder
games.summary: Become an Orc warchief and fight for survival of your race. Rebuild your village and train your warriors. Gather resources and craft your weapons. Raise your warbanner and gather The Horde.

games.name: Kitsune: The Journey of Adashino
games.summary: "Where will their light lead them?" Kitsune is a fox girl who finds herself on Adashino Island and starts travelling with her Frog friend. Neon signs give light and color to the island with a Japanese-inspired atmosphere. Something is lurking in the shadows, inching ever closer...

games.name: Feudums
games.summary: Feudums is a medieval strategy simulation with a detailed player-to-player vassalage system, full modding support and community-driven narrative. Balance diplomatic, economic, and military aspects while making your play for the throne. Is it your destiny to rule?

games.name: Kaiju Catastrophe
games.summary: Crush, smash, and eat thousands of enemies showing humanity what the meaning of destruction is! Kaiju Catastrophe is an arcade game with roguelite mechanics. Mutate devastating weapons, unlock permanent evolutions, and wreak havoc with a variety of monsters to tear humanity apart! Wishlist today!

games.name: Bunker Builder Simulator
games.summary: Plan your work, dig a hole and build a bunker, that will survive anything! Manage safety, needs and moods of your clients, so you can become the best architect and earn a fortune. Will you be able to meet the expectations?

games.name: ChaseTag
games.summary: Come participate at ChaseTag ! A tag competition where athletes are candy ! Face your friends in intense Player-versus-Player matches, that will make you sweat !

games.name: Littlelands
games.summary: The Littlelands region is brimming with strange characters and magical landscapes to discover if you know where to look, for a big-headed little youngster like you every moment exploring, growing berries, searching for buried treasures or walking through these lands can be an epic adventure.

games.name: RunMan Turbo
games.summary: The indie legend returns, now in a 2D platformer where you speedrun randomly generated levels. Bounce, slide, jump, and run fast as heck. Easy to play and challenging to master, with an awesome soundtrack and a style that will make you go, "Oh snap!"

games.name: Salvus: Aries
games.summary: A mature slice of death and adventure fantasy otome visual novel that begins at the bad ending.

games.name: Play Rough
games.summary: Play Rough is a roleplaying game set in the surreal, post-apocalyptic wasteland of what was once California. It's a place where humans live side-by-side with living cartoons, twisted abominations of ink and flesh, and... Clowns...?

games.name: Astromeda
games.summary: Astromeda is an adventure RPG, featuring unique fast-paced and turn-based battles in a mysterious, charming world. You are a human who returns to an Earth inhabited by intelligent Bacteria. Explore a rich world, befriend or fight quirky characters, and uncover the mysteries of the Bacteria race. The game is inspired by Undertale, H

games.name: Silent Hill: Townfall
games.summary: Returning to an island town to ‘put things right’, Simon Ordell descends into a world of tense evasion, explosive confrontations, and mind-bending puzzles that slowly surface the truth of St. Amelia.

games.name: Sincognito
games.summary: Sincognito, is a 5-15 players SOCIAL DEDUCTION, horror, stealth game in which players, split between two distinct teams - Humans & Sins - must use communication with proximity voice chat, teamwork to complete tasks, skills for combat, betrayal, and ultimately mind games to defeat the opposite team.

games.name: Thick as Thieves
games.summary: Set in an alternate history Edinburgh, Thick as Thieves throws you into a world of supernatural intrigue. Society’s elite amass wealth and power, while the lower classes struggle to simply survive. It’s time to even the score. Team up with your fellow thieves and relieve the rich of their ill-gotten hoards. You’ll need your wits, a skillful crew and no small amount of luck to pull off daring heists. And if you get filthy rich in the process… who could hold that against you?

games.name: Red Rebellion
games.summary: A sapphic fairy tale mashup as Robin Hood teams up with Red Riding Hood to save their town set in a historically accurate medieval England.

games.name: Total World Liberation
games.summary: Open World Survival Automation Crafting Building Turn-Based game, yup that's a huge mix of genres and it works!

games.name: Hyper Drill
games.summary: Hyper Drill is a speedrunning runner game, where you fly at supersonic speed and destroy everything in your path. Drill through any obstacle, jump between different galaxies, and uncover the mysteries of the universe.

games.name: Twin Jet Racer
games.summary: Two jets. Two triggers. That’s all you need to swerve, drift, corkscrew, loop or even fly to reach the next checkpoint and top the leaderboard. Master the controls and the physics to progress to the next class of racer and unlock greater challenges. Compete against friends or against the clock.

games.name: Murder on the Stella
games.summary: It's a murder mystery. It's an adventure. It's a cruise vacation simulator. It's different each time you play.

games.name: R-Type Tactics I & II Cosmos
games.summary:
Outsmart and outgun your opponent in R-Type Tactics I • II Cosmos, the ultimate turn-based sci-fi strategy collection!

This two-game combination of the classic R-Type Tactics titles arrives on modern consoles for the first time, equipped with an armada of unique units to deploy across dozens of levels.

Multiple campaigns allow you to take on the Bydo Empire or even play as them yourself, while competitive online play lets you square off against others.

games.name: In Stone
games.summary: In the late 19th century, a sculpture is confined in a monastery asylum. It's in your hands to follow the blue vision to explore the monastery's deeper secrets, or to escape the stone prison by gathering clues inside the hospital.

games.name: Tsurugihime
games.summary: Tsurugihime is a side-scrolling action RPG. The last battle is in 100 days. It is up to the player to decide how to live until the day. Battle, ikusei, exploration, story, and even sister. "Craft" everything. An RPG that "crafts" fate.

games.name: Vocaless
games.summary: Vocaless is a unique platformer game with rhythm elements, you must perform all of your actions to the beat! Not only that, but everything in the game, from enemies to obstacles, follows the beat of the music.

games.name: Nuclear Sub
games.summary: A realistic nuclear submarine simulator will allow you to take command of your crew and battle your fiercest enemies. Arm yourself with missiles, dive into the ocean and fight for your country.

games.name: Bad Pixels
games.summary:
Have you ever wondered what a FPS game would look like in 8-bit? It's gotta look bad, right?

Introducing Bad Pixels. A first person shooter set in the old west, using computer graphics from about the same era!

games.name: LumenTale: Memories of Trey
games.summary: LumenTale: Memories of Trey is a Monster Collector RPG set in the wonderful land of Talea. Trey, who has mysteriously lost his memories, decides to set on a journey after a particular event. His only guiding light will be a mysterious desire... but will that be true?

games.name: Xanniban
games.summary: Evil has been unleashed. Don the Trespasser's suit as you dash across facilities, manage resources, and confine hostile machines to change the fate of humanity. Lure your foes into containment as a grim epidemic festers beneath the surface...

games.name: Death By Misstep
games.summary: Death By Misstep is an upcoming First-Person Rhythm, Stealth and Horror game set on a party cruise where a massive massacre by robots is happening.

games.name: Space Scavenger 2
games.summary: Space Scavenger 2 is an Action-Roguelike where you scavenge for modules to build a hodgepodge spaceship. Upgrade and customize your ship on-the-fly to make the best of a terrible situation. Playful and colorful - who said you can't smack aliens with a huge hammer in space?

games.name: Captain Disaster and the Two Worlds of Riskara
games.summary: A new Captain Disaster adventure; this time he is more of a hero than a disaster! ... Or is he? A point and click adventure game with cartoony graphics, epic storyline and more bad jokes than you can possibly imagine. Buy this game. It is your destiny...

games.name: Dawn One
games.summary: Fight to survive till Dawn One in the most accessible hardest top-down action game ever (Self proclaimed). Mouse only.

games.name: Timeless Heart VR
games.summary: Timeless heart VR is an action VR roguelike game, As the second work of Timeless Stories series, this work further simplifies and enriches the unique sword skill system of the series. Advancing in the unknown labyrinth with Lycanea, and break through this blockade from fate!

games.name: Unwound
games.summary: Lose yourself in a surreal candyland adventure about transformation and escapism. Descend into a land of weirdos and forgotten memories as you assemble a new you from whatever you find.

games.name: Imperial Ambitions
games.summary: Discover and colonize the world, Allocate your labor force, Monopolize markets, Fight tactical battles, Survive the age of imperialism as the world turns into a war zone.

games.name: Zwaard
games.summary: Explore a world where you try to preserve the still existing life forms. Technology has taken over and will try it's best to stop you in your adventure. Whilst those technologies try to stop you they could also be the only reason you're still alive.

games.name: Quadremor
games.summary: A first person shooter where you take a role of one of the last human mercenaries, who has to take his revenge for annihilation of humanity. A deep dive into a dark and unforgiving realm, which will stay in your consciousness for ages.

games.name: Rina to Akumu no Kan
games.summary: One day, the unlucky girl "Runa Ichiya" wakes up in a haunted house.

games.name: Valley of the Old Masters
games.summary: The World has been in the midst of the winds of change. As a wandering artist, you end up in a mystical valley on your journey. Do you find inspiration for your art there?

games.name: KaiJu Girls
games.summary: Kaiju Girls is a Visual Novel full of Monster Girls. The protagonist lost his memory in an accident and became a KaijuTamer, with the Kaiju girls in the Kaiju world full of danger adventure! In the wonderful and exciting adventure journey in the protagonist will slowly recall his memories.

games.name: Gilded Destiny
games.summary: Gilded Destiny is a grand strategy game depicting the transformative era of the Industrial Revolution. You will take the helm of the country of your choice and transform it from a backward agrarian society to an industrial powerhouse.

games.name: DecaPolice
games.summary:
DecaPolice, a crime-suspense RPG from Level-5, developers of the Layton series, will be released on Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5 and Steam in 2026!

The main character, a rookie detective named Harvard, hunts down criminals in a huge open-world crime-ridden city, traveling back and forth between physical and virtual reality.

games.name: Professor Layton and the New World of Steam
games.summary:
Professor Layton and the New World of Steam depicts the world one year after the events of "Professor Layton and the Unwound Future".

Due to a mysterious incident in Steam Bison, a new adventure for Layton and Luke begins!

games.name: Omen Exitio: Hunger
games.summary: Forces beyond human comprehension draw a macabre veil over the icy NY of 1927. A child has disappeared and you, a reporter with an unhappy past as an artist, become entangled in the drama. In this story, inspired by true events, you will investigate between reality, dreams and Lovecraftian horrors.

games.name: Inanima
games.summary: Inanima Be part of something that will change the future of humanity.

games.name: Four Hundred Catapults
games.summary: City builder & Survival. When the dead get close enough, they can use the deadly fog to take control of your settlements. Build a strong economy to supply your warriors with long-range weapons and massive fortifications. This is the only chance to survive.

games.name: Tails of Fate
games.summary: Fulfill this tale, as darkness swarms the fantasy lands of Fauna. Venture epic kingdoms and treacherous dungeons in a 2D action plaformer, with Metroidvania elements in a hand-crafted pixel art world filled with souls-like boss fights, dungeon platforming, and difficult dynamic enemy combat design.

games.name: HexLands
games.summary: HexLands is a turn-based, roguelike city builder set on procedural medieval islands. Grow your empire and adapt to harsh environments! Customize your deck, manage your resources, complete quests, and synergize perks! How far will your empire reach?

games.name: Moki: The Escape
games.summary: Moki wakes up in a strange environment. The only memory: the own name. A peaceful world... or is it?! Join Moki in a challenging 2.5D jump & run platformer with many puzzles. Meet lovable and sometimes oddball characters and experience a occasionally emotional story.

games.name: EbiTapes
games.summary: Go on an adventure to meet fun new friends, help them out, and create delicious beats along the way! Record the sounds of the world and make your own cool music.

games.name: Beyond These Stars
games.summary: Journey on the back of the space whale Kewa, building a city for your people as you travel across the galaxy seeking purpose and answers, and developing deep relationships with the universe around you.

games.name: 99 Fails
games.summary: 99 Fails is an impossibly difficult platformer set in Zeebo's surreal nightmare with bizarre monsters, set to music by legendary David Wise.

games.name: Bloody Horror Plant
games.summary: Bloody Horror Plant – probably the bloodiest casual point and click adventure game ever! Help Horror Plant solve interesting and funny point and click puzzles, kill evil dwarfs, save the forest and its creatures!

games.name: Goblin's Journey
games.summary: Goblin's Journey is a humorous adventure game with a stupid plot and even more idiotic characters. You play as a greedy bastard goblin named Alastar. You are about to save you king's life - in exchange for gold of course! An adventure full of gold, mischief and innapropriate content.

games.name: Legends of Castile
games.summary: Legends of Castile is a comic fantasy point-and-click adventure set in the historic Castile region of Spain in the 19th century. It tells the story of a village girl who must investigate the myths and legends of Castile to fulfill her dream of becoming a nun. Advance the story by solving puzzles and riddles, meeting all kinds of characters, defeating fantastic creatures with your wit, and exploring places all around Castile.

games.name: Touchstarved
games.summary: You were born cursed, with hands that twist the mind of any human you touch. Desperation leads you to the shadowy city of Eridia, where your fate intertwines with 5 monstrous strangers. Each can offer you salvation or damnation. Find a cure for your curse in Touchstarved, a gothic horror romance visual novel.

games.name: Dr. Emmerson's Nocturnes
games.summary: Dive into the worlds of the best classic weird fiction and cosmic horror writers. Try out our original approach to bringing literature into the interactive medium. Relax and let Dr. Emmerson guide you through all colors of dread.

games.name: Laws of Nadragia
games.summary: Become a prosecutor in the totalitarian state of Nadragia. Study the laws, use the court facts to convict the guilty or unwanted by the government... Can you keep your conscience?

games.name: Forgotten House
games.summary: Try to escape from the old grandfather from his decrepit house by solving riddles. The game is inspired by Gnarled hag

games.name: Cosmic Holidays
games.summary: Help Cibo find his way in an unknown world. Through gorgeous flora and fauna, Cibo can glide in the wind, bounce, propel or block, absorb impacts or roll, using his power to inflate his head. Learn from hostile nature to make it your ally. Earn Cibo's trust until he reaches his vacation resort!

games.name: Starship Colony
games.summary: A deep starship colony sim. Build your starship, manage air, water, food, fuel, energy, temperature and psychology to keep your crew alive across vast distances. Closed-loop system in space. Mining, wiring, plumbing, in-ship factory, (alien?) radio signals & translation, diplomacy, combat, and more.

games.name: Back to the Collis
games.summary: Back to the Collis is a story-rich, fully hand-drawn 2D Point & Click adventure puzzle. Embark on a journey alongside the main character, Benjamin, to solve lots of engaging puzzles and explore the town of Collis, outstanding by its memorable populace.

games.name: Folk Emerging
games.summary: Lead nomadic families through the Stone Age in this turn-based 4X strategy game with in-depth characters, cultures, and ecosystems. Explore the wilderness, hunt megafauna, outsmart competitors in trade & autobattler combat. Discover fire, agriculture, politics... and survive to tell the tale.

games.name: VICCP 2 Core
games.summary: The Very Important Central Control Panel is back. Keeping the mysterious atmosphere and with even more mysteries. Control the omnipotence remote, experiment, and find many endings. Brainstorming in retro sci-fi style / Puzzle / Quest / Point Click.

games.name: 3 Last Chances
games.summary: 3 Last Chances is an Action RPG game with challenging combat and progression system that allows to create your own unique playstyle. You get 3 chances to replay a year, complete quests and find just the right method of weakening and overcoming the seemingly unbeatable final boss.

games.name: Corr
games.summary: Corr is a difficult Souls-lite Boss Rush Action RPG where you Run-n-Gun & Hack-n-Slash your way through challenging boss encounters. To endure the strange, dark and whacky world of Corr, level up and customize your warrior build with berserk powers, tonics, talismans and more.

games.name: 5 Star Fishy
games.summary: Explore, bite, talk, and swim to the bottom of this semi-linear aquatic metriodvania! The world isn't particularly happy with a tiny pink fishy trying to nuke them, and they may try to kill you, so stay sharp and don't bite off more than you can chew.

games.name: Bogdan's Cross
games.summary: Embark on a journey of redemption as Bogdan, a fallen Templar seeking to make amends for his past sins. Explore a stunning world filled with ancient mysteries, uncover hidden secrets, and battle fierce enemies in this immersive action-adventure game.

games.name: Portabellows
games.summary: Explore a whimsical island to find… pie recipes?! Bake them by gathering or growing ingredients, which may be the key to helping out your new found quirky friends leave the island! In this wholesome 3D platformer collectathon, you can enjoy discovering the world freely at your own pace.

games.name: Rich Dad Simulator
games.summary: Run your own chain of markets. Start from a small shop to the biggest business in town. Manage staff, control inventory, set prices, and keep customers happy. Build new locations and expand your retail empire. Can you succeed and become the king of retail?

games.name: Alien Boom Boom
games.summary: Join the fight against an alien invasion in this fast-paced, old-school FPS. Battle in your hometown, around the world, and even in space. Take on unique enemies and wield powerful weapons, all with a touch of classic fps sensibility. Can you save humanity from the brink of destruction? Boom boom.

games.name: Danger is Near
games.summary: Danger is Near - sessional hardcore multiplayer shooter that includes several genres: FPS, survival, weapon and combat simulator, RPG with MMO phenomena. The game will immerse you in a realistic gaming environment imbued with a gloomy post-apocalyptic atmosphere...

games.name: Squid Grid
games.summary: Welcome to Squid Grid! A free puzzle challenge about a squid on a grid. Unique sokoban mechanics, cute art, and hand-crafted levels will give you a puzzle experience you won't forget. Get Squid Griddin'!

games.name: Elder's Grace: Rise of the Mobley
games.summary:
Join this epic battle to take back a magical homeland. Help Mobley heroes explore, build, raid and defend in an effort to regain & hold what's rightfully theirs.

Build and protect customized strongholds while creating specialized teams to explore and plunder others.

games.name: Forest of Deceit
games.summary: Forest of Deceit is a 4-8 player social deduction game where you use your phones to play!

games.name: VISK
games.summary: Face your fears in VISK, an open-world online co-op horror game for 1-2 players. Escape from a strange village, uncover the dark secrets of this place and solve puzzles to discover new areas. But beware, deadly creatures are after you and your friend!

games.name: Hayaku! Island of Darkness
games.summary: Explore a mysterious island full of dangers and uncover the secrets behind the anomalous creatures that inhabit it in this retro-style metroidvania.

games.name: Enlightened
games.summary: Enlightened is a survival horror game with strong focus on puzzle solving. Explore the hotel in which you woke up, find clues about what happened, solve puzzles and find a way out, while surviving horrors that awaits you there.

games.name: R-Type Tactics I & II Cosmos: Deluxe Edition
games.summary: Includes R-Type Tactics I・II Cosmos: Standard Edition, Digital Soundtrack and a Poster

games.name: Tako no Himitsu: Ocean of Secrets
games.summary: Tako no Himitsu: Ocean of Secrets is an indie Action RPG made as a tribute to the Game Boy Advance era of gaming. A spiritual successor to Save me Mr Tako, play in a world where Octopuses were erased from history.

games.name: Haruka: Beyond the Stars
games.summary: Haruka: Beyond the Stars is a juvenile sci-fi RPG about the intergalactic adventures of the protagonist, Yuuki, and a mysterious girl named Miiya. Set out on a spaceship and explore unique planets. Enjoy a thrilling adventure in the latest 3D anime art style.

games.name: Dead Detective: Zombie Conspiracy
games.summary: Take on the role of Margh, undead private detective, in this humorous and wacky graphic adventure that combines point-and-click mechanics with an elaborate “deaduction” system. Use your brain (or what's left of it) and solve bizarre and unconventional mysteries in a world ruled by zombies.

games.name: April '86
games.summary: April ‘86 - is a mystical first-person thriller which has our protagonist journeying to the abandoned city of Pripyat, to confront the secrets of the past.

games.name: Telluria: Forebodings
games.summary: A 3D graphic adventure with parallel realities, ancient vestiges and dark omens. Play in two worlds and through two ages. Discover the past to shape the future. The fate of Telluria will rest on you.

games.name: Ebola 4
games.summary: You open your eyes, it's dark all around. Are you in an underground bunker, alone with your thoughts... or are you not alone there? Fear, apocalypse, darkness swallowed the world, most people are infected. You are at the epicenter... And can you change something?

games.name: Light Odyssey
games.summary: Light Odyssey is a soulslike boss rush where every battle is a test of mastery. Play as Bandi and fight to restore light to a world consumed by shadows. Face off against towering colossi in three deadly phases that demand precision, patience, and adaptation.

games.name: Toxic Crusaders
games.summary: The Toxic Crusaders return for an all-new, all-action beat 'em up for one to four players! Grab your mop, tutu and attitude, and get ready to clean up the mean streets of Tromaville, one radioactive goon at a time!

games.name: Gunmetal Gothic
games.summary: A co-op shooter-RPG with a retro-3D aesthetic. Customize and upgrade your character as you take back the city of Vestige from demonic machines!

games.name: Surviving Deponia
games.summary: Explore, craft, build and fight your way through the harsh landscape of Deponia. Meet allies and make enemies while surviving the perils of the junk planet. It might be garbage - but it’s your garbage!

games.name: Dread Pilots
games.summary: Dread Pilots is a space survival game where you explore a mysterious and hostile pocket universe called the Dread. Scavenge resources, upgrade your ship, make friends, and fight monsters as you try to carve out a little piece of the Dread for yourself.

games.name: Mearcair/System Pulse
games.summary: Dive into System Pulse, a rhythm-fueled roguelike bullet heaven where you must outmaneuver swarms of robots moving while attacking to the beat. Unleash your reflexes, survive rhythmic encounters, and master the symphony of chaos in this electrifying action game.

games.name: A Simple Expurriment
games.summary: A cartoony, combat-free metroidvania with puzzles, stealth and genetically modified kittens. Help a cat mom rescue her abducted children by doing typical, not-so-typical and definitely atypical cat things: run walls up and down, turn to liquid and rearrange parts of the alien ship like pieces of a puzzle.

games.name: Specters of the Sun
games.summary: Specters of the Sun is a challenging 2D action platformer with action-packed levels. Take on the role of an elusive specter to reclaim your old corpse, now possessed at the heights of your former kingdom.

games.name: Death the Guitar
games.summary: "Death the Guitar" is a pop and violent 2D Platformer action game. The player is a killer electric guitar whose owner was murdered, and the goal is to take revenge on the humans by manipulating "sound" and "electricity".

games.name: Time To Wake Up
games.summary: Time To Wake Up is an atmospheric psychological thriller where one night you find yourself stuck in a dream. No worries, though. You are not alone. You hear a voice, in need of your eyes and willing to help you out.

games.name: Exodus: Sunflower on the Horizon
games.summary: You're given a chance to find out what really makes the earth turn... But will you like what you see? Exodus is the ultimate sci-fi RPG experience about love, friendship, and deadly monsters.

games.name: Rebirth of Arcadia
games.summary: Rebirth of Arcadia is a turn-based tactics game with roguelike elements and contemplative story. Experience the journey of two groups of people working together to escape from the Abyss. Explore, defeat monsters, wield and modify the power of runestones to uncover the secrets of the Abyss.

games.name: Nimbit Frontier
games.summary: Embark on daring adventures into wild biomes to uncover fragments of long-lost creatures. Bring them back to life by hatching their young. Build them habitats, and release them into the wild. Become the star Nimbiteer you dream of surrounded by lovely folks in a small cozy town.

games.name: The One Who Stands Behind
games.summary: Survive hordes of monsters in a deck builder with a tactical grid while engaging in existential conversations with your avatar.

games.name: Little Monster
games.summary: Little Monster is a — fast paced and fun — beat 'em up game. You play as little monster whose goal is to prevent nightmare spirits from entering our minds while sleeping.

games.name: AI Kills All Humans
games.summary: AI Kills All Humans is a Tactical RTS game in which you play as an AI sending robots to kill all humans. You however don't have direct control of your robots, but robots independently decide how to execute your commands, like a general telling troops to attack, but troops themselves decide how.

games.name: Cyber Paradise
games.summary: Revive Mini the Dog digitally through 2D roguelite actions; craft her cyber paradise with beloved moments, like sniffing dog butts XD. Uncover a deeper dystopian narrative and strengthen friendships in cafe chats—a frenetic yet cozy journey.

games.name: System Purge: Hollow Point
games.summary: Faced with a horrifying tragedy, you must delve into a flowering realm of memories and nightmares to save your dead lover. SYSTEM PURGE - Hollow Point is a massive expansion which adds a surreal new campaign, challenging new gamemodes, and more.

games.name: Hunter From Hell
games.summary: With your friends, form a team of paranormal experts to unravel the mysteries of the most terrifying places. Armed with sophisticated gadgets like EMF detectors, infrared cameras, and incantation books, your mission is simple: gather evidence of the beyond and survive chilling encounters.

games.name: Pozionista
games.summary: Travel through a world surrounded by nature, collect plants and use them to create potions, invent new recipes, sell potions in stores and explore the world.

games.name: M.E.M.O
games.summary: Rely on nothing but your own wits. A first-person cryptographic adventure game that play with paper and pen. As you wander through the maze of memories, can you find the key to saving the future?

games.name: The Carcass
games.summary: A deep roguelike colony RPG inside a dead god's corpse. Procedurally generated events, branching narratives, species with unique traits, and meaningful choices that shape your colony's fate. Every playthrough tells a different story of survival and evolution.

games.name: Grand Theft Auto VI
games.summary: Grand Theft Auto VI heads to the state of Leonida, home to the neon-soaked streets of Vice City and beyond in the biggest, most immersive evolution of the Grand Theft Auto series yet.

games.name: Dungeon of Departure
games.summary: an independently developed, pixel art, visual novel set in an original universe which follows the silent, player protagonist and three companion characters as they struggle to find a way out of an increasingly puzzling, underground world.

games.name: Build a Bot
games.summary: A top-down shooter rogue-like that sees its player take control of a mechanized weapons platform designed for one thing and one thing only: “Take down the corporation, by any means necessary. . .”

games.name: Radiant Starlets
games.summary: Radiant Starlets is a HD2D action platformer in the vein of classic action platformers but you can date all the bosses. Select your boss order and make your way through 8 challenging stages. Try every order and uncover the mysteries of this world.

games.name: Mystic Land: The search for Maphaldo
games.summary: An old-school RPG game inspired by Wizardry 7, Might and Magic and Eye of the Beholder series. 2d grid-based movement, strategic turn-based combat and lots of places to visit and puzzles to solve.

games.name: Crescent County
games.summary: Crash headfirst into this witch-tech open world, drifting and driving on the back of your new motorbroom. Make deliveries, trick out your broom, and race your new friends (and crushes) as the sun sets. Decorate your flat, sort your life out, and discover what it means to find home.

games.name: Ominous Recall
games.summary: Ominous Recall: A chilling survival horror game set in a photorealistic Middle East. Confront a terrifying Jinn possessing Stephen and unravel its dark power in this intense psychological thriller.

games.name: Decksplorers: Into the Shell
games.summary: Dive into the world of Decksplorers: Into the Shell, where deckbuilding card combat meets real-time action in a thrilling roguelite adventure! Master the art of strategic card play, swift reflexes, and exploration as you venture into the mysterious ever-changing caves of "The shell"

games.name: Eternal Haunt
games.summary: Eternal Haunt is a first-person atmospheric survival horror game. Explore the claustrophobic labyrinth of Yuki-Onna's home. Solve dynamic puzzles, scavenge for items, experience haunting scares that shift and evolve. Can you endure the relentless cold and escape the chilling embrace of death?

games.name: Fiefdom
games.summary: Change the world, one battle at a time in FIEFDOM: a multiplayer action melee game set in a playerbase-driven story. Clash swords, cast spells, rain down arrows & more in in battles of up to 100 players both at land & at sea. Dive into a world where your victories define the outcome of entire wars. Who will you be fighting for?

games.name: Bobo and the Chest of Nightmares
games.summary: Jump, glide, and outsmart traps in this whimsical 3D platformer! Smash, fend off mischievous spirits, grind rails, and solve puzzles as you uncover the secrets of the Nightmare Chest. Collect hidden treasures and restore joy to a world shrouded in darkness!

games.name: Steel Ark
games.summary: A first-person survival sandbox game where you explore a post-apocalyptic world, scavenge resources, craft production chains, and keep your train base running against all odds.

games.name: Corinne
games.summary: Navigate Corinne through a realm of pixel horrors, surrounded by neighbors that are turning into bloodthirsty monsters. Discover the secrets of this twisted dimension before it's too late for Corinne and her friends.

games.name: Occult Hand of the Blood Lily
games.summary: A Gothic-Punk yuri visual novel about a magician on the run and her mysterious vampiric guardian. Journey by airship across a war-torn Europe and search for a legendary flower with the power to destroy nations.

games.name: Hollow Faces
games.summary: Hollow Faces is an atmospheric narrative horror where you step into the role of creators documenting paranormal phenomena. The game blends an intense walking simulator with environmental observation, careful listening, and reacting to threats.

games.name: Anomalous Cleaning Detail
games.summary: A first-person cleaning simulator where you scrub, vacuum, and restore a troubled town plagued by supernatural disturbances. Complete contracts and use environmental clues to prepare for the exorcism, because when the mess is paranormal, a standard clean won't be enough.

games.name: Spline: Part One
games.summary: A narrative-driven psychological horror game in which a man searching for his missing wife becomes trapped within a distorted reality known as the Spline, navigating hostile environments, persistent threats, and fragmented clues that reveal the nature of the world around him.

games.name: Grimmlins Tale
games.summary: Grimmlins Tale is an action adventure monster tamer where you catch, train, and bond with all fairy tale inspired monsters. Fight alongside your monster friends in deep, real-time strategic combat, and hop on their backs to explore in the whimsical world of Never Everland.

games.name: Death Rabbit
games.summary: The city that never sleeps has taken a sinister turn, and the dark tunnels of the MTA have become the epicenter of a horrifying outbreak. As Alisa, you must navigate through a labyrinthine underground world fraught with danger, where unspeakable horrors lurk around every corner.

games.name: The House in the Hollow
games.summary: With stunning graphics, inspired by the 1920's Art Deco period, and a chilling soundtrack, the "House In The Hollow" will take you on a journey like no other. A journey filled with mystery, horror, and magic, where you are the master of your own fate.

games.name: True Love For Her
games.summary: True Love For Her (TLFH) is a Yandere game inspired by Yandere Simulator and Life Is Strange that doesn’t compete with the original games. This game involves murder and other methods of killing, so it is not suitable for kids. We are not responsible for any actions taken by kids replicating activities from TLFH in real life.

games.name: FAFO Executive Order Simulator
games.summary: F around and find out! A ruthless no F's given dark comedy where you play the president of the United States of America, abuse executive power, crank up the FAFO meter, deal with robot overlords, alien invasions, drain swamps, flip off allies, crush protests, and destroy all that oppose you!

games.name: The False Alice: Retold Tale
games.summary: A visual novel based on the Itsuwari no Alice gacha game. It will features a new scenario and new CGs, backgrounds, BGM, character facial expressions and pose differences.

games.name: Lepidarium
games.summary: Relax and collect unique butterflies and moths. Witness the real-time lifecycle from Larva to Pupa to Butterfly. Customize lush greenhouses and discover rare species in this cozy idle game. Let your sanctuary flutter in the background while you work or study!

games.name: Oathwood Realms
games.summary: Oathwood Realms is a dark fantasy strategy card game focused on careful planning, tactical decisions, and calculated risk. Luck plays a role, but victory favors players who read the board and commit to their choices.

games.name: Bravery
games.summary: BRAVERY is a third-person 3D adventure game in which players guide a fragile matchstick character through vast, detailed environments that appear enormous in scale. Gameplay focuses on exploration, tense chase sequences, and interactive fire mechanics that allow objects to be ignited. Throughout the journey, players discover hidden areas and capture enigmatic orbs that are sealed within restored magical mirrors, shaping progression through the world.

games.name: Creep
games.summary: Experimental dark platform game that takes place inside a struggled man's inner world represented as the worm world. You control the worm form of this man as he shows why this world exists and how it's like to live there. You also visit past memories/analogies and gain new abilities.

games.name: Woodo
games.summary: Woodo is a 3D puzzle game. The player immerses in a calm and peaceful world where time stopped at the happy moment. With imaginary friend Woodo, player build bit by bit this tiny world. Woodo tells the player stories and makes the player feel not lonely while playing. The game looks like a wooden kit from childhood.

games.name: There's no way that tsundere girl I met in the infirmary will be my girlfriend
games.summary: "B-baka! Who said you could get in!? I'm not prepared yet!" "Oh well... since you're already here, why not stay for a while?" "D-don't misunderstand, okay? It's not like I asked you to stay because I like you or anything..."

games.name: Mion and the Cursed Killer Hamster
games.summary: The Magnificent Mion is a warrior queen from Wharevarland. She battles a malignant verse-making kraken, tries to win the love of Count De Loboda, studies at an ordinary magical school, and she's also... crazy! Absurdism. Ridiculousness. Idiocy.

games.name: Elation for the Wonder Box 6000
games.summary: Elation For The Wonder Box 6000 is a first-person, claymation adventure game about going into the city to try and find a game from your youth that no one else remembers.

games.name: Snap Quest
games.summary: A Photo Collection Adventure Game. Complete your research notebook, solve creature puzzles, earn research grant money. Buy upgrades for your camera, rebuild the town, bond with the locals, and reveal the paranormal mystery of Star Island.

games.name: Industrix
games.summary: Step into the world of industrial production and become a master in factory-building! Create efficient production lines and manage your resources. As you progress through the game, you'll need to complete challenges for a certain company in order to rank up and unlock new technologies!

games.name: Grave Seasons
games.summary: Grave Seasons is a supernatural murder-mystery farming simulator. Play as the new farmer in Ashenridge as you harvest crops, fish and mine, meet and romance townsfolk, build up the community... and maybe stop the murders.

games.name: No Stone Unturned
games.summary: Why did the chicken cross the road? Hunt for clues, interrogate suspects and solve cases! No Stone Unturned is a dark-comedy noir detective game featuring multiple endings and choices that truly matter!

games.name: Veredilia: The Sacred Forest
games.summary: Veredilia: The Sacred Forest is a 2D platforming game that takes inspiration from classic platformers such as Sonic, and fighting games like Mortal Kombat. The game aims to be a combination of classic 2D platforming with 1v1 fighting whilst also exploring the large forest of Veredilia across various locales with a wide range of characters, technical movesets, and flashy combos. You can take control of one of 3 characters, each with their own special moves, combos, and super moves. Solve puzzles, uncover secrets, and kick, punch, and slash your way to victory, before it's too late. Do you have what it takes?

games.name: EVE Vanguard
games.summary: EVE Vanguard is an upcoming sci-fi sandbox FPS where every deployment onto a hostile planet is high stakes. You fight, scavenge, and adapt in brutal warzones - and every choice leaves its mark on a player-driven universe at war.

games.name: Weefager
games.summary: Guide this pink being with the power of the ether in a metroidvania where nothing is as it seems. Infuse souls into objects, create minions to help you, and explore vibrant landscapes with a great soundtrack. Shape your destiny on this captivating journey.

games.name: Mithra
games.summary: A cryptic puzzle/adventure game that blurs the line between fiction and reality. A tale of cultish affairs that sweeps through the nighttime streets of London, weaves through the back alleys of Beijing and beyond. Come with us.

games.name: Dungeon Settlers
games.summary: A colony sim based dungeon crawler where you manage your clan to build a settlement in barren land, provide food and shelter for your people, lead them deep into the merciless dungeon, overcome challenging combat by your strategy.

games.name: Outward 2
games.summary: Outward 2 is a challenging action RPG with survival elements focusing on a believable and relatable experience. There is no hand holding, no leveled encounters, no divine gift making you tower over your enemies. Eat your meal, check your map, grab your backpack: a fulfilling adventure awaits.

games.name: Countryballs: The Heist
games.summary: Countryballs: The Heist is PWA's comedic stealth adventure where you become a master thief for eccentric clients. Customise your Countryball's disguise to explore maze-like countries. Plan, sabotage, hide and trick to outwit guards and traps - or create your own thrilling heists for the community.

games.name: Alpha Nomos
games.summary: It’s time to wield the beat! Play as Cello and slice through an army of rogue puppets in a vibrant, melody-twisted world. Combat pulses to the soundtrack - time your moves to the beat to unleash show-stopping combos and perfectly choreographed chaos!

games.name: Port of Jumanah
games.summary: 'Port of Jumanah’ is a retro pixel-style underwater adventure with rogue-lite elements. Meet quirky characters, explore unique places, and encounter unusual sea life. Treasures and troubles await in these seas! Are you ready to dive into the unknown? Lovely mermaids and menacing sharks await!

games.name: Shadows of Chroma Tower
games.summary: An immersive first-person Dungeon Crawler RPG with heavy roguelite elements and huge bosses in an Extraction setting.
