Level up, learn skills on a vast talent tree, develop your profession as a harvester or crafter, discover new recipes, loot and craft your way to becoming an unstoppable fighter.

games.name: Acts of Blood
games.summary: Acts of Blood is a Beat ‘em up, Action, 3rd person game which focuses on fast-paced, brutal hand-to-hand combat. Set in dystopian city of Bandung, Indonesia.

games.name: The Bucketlist Tourist
games.summary: The Bucketlist Tourist is a physics-based multiplayer party game where players complete tasks and capture them photographically. In the battle for the best snapshot, they share only a single camera.

games.name: PVKK: Planetenverteidigungskanonenkommandant
games.summary: Operate your planetary defense cannon to fend off an interplanetary invasion from the comfort of your cozy bunker. You’re here to stay, so obey your superiors, press the right buttons, and sip your daily tea ration - it's good for you.

games.name: Lifted
games.summary:
Step into the Anytime Elevator and get LIFTED — a cinematic single-player 2.5D puzzle-platform adventure from a former Disney ride designer.

Slacker Ari Buktu only pokes his head into Professor Raventhorpe’s lab for extra credit; seconds later he’s hurtling through history on a reckless mission to steal a legendary tiara and fix the professor’s love-life. Each stop opens a new era, a bigger puzzle, and the shadow of a rival tomb-raider who’s always one jump behind…

games.name: Tower Lab
games.summary: Roguelite tower defense where enemies can’t be killed, knock them off with physics instead! Build devastating contraptions that push, pull, and launch enemies. Unlock towers, discover broken synergies, and dominate through creative combinations.

games.name: Sick Samurai
games.summary: Sick Samurai is a blindingly fast and bloody action game based on instant-death combat. Immerse yourself in lofi hip hop and retro anime aesthetics as you slash and dash your way to becoming the greatest fighter on the island.

games.name: Sagas of Lumin
games.summary: Sagas of Lumin is a single-player action RPG featuring dragon flight that feels alive with full movement and combat control. Switch between aerial battles and ground combat using melee weapons, spells, and firearms. Your choices shape a deep, branching world.

games.name: Reality Drift
games.summary: Reality Drift is a roguelike racing game where your choices matter. Race through a series of strange worlds, choose upgrades for your car and decide which track will be next - your decisions are just as important as how you drive!

games.name: Capy Castaway
games.summary: Embark on a whimsical adventure with a capybara pup and a clever crow as they set off to find their way home! Sniff, dig, and fly as you explore a vibrant world brimming with wonder, challenges, and heartwarming friendships at every turn.

games.name: Toem 2
games.summary: Step back into the shoes of a curious photographer and set off on a brand new adventure all about uncovering hidden details, helping friends along the way, and documenting the world’s little wonders in TOEM 2, the sequel to the acclaimed TOEM.

games.name: Medix
games.summary: How much can a person endure, and what is the true value of human life? In this minimalist real-time strategy game about war medics, you fight for your own survival and that of others while the army is under constant pressure, retreating from a superior enemy. A narrative campaign, accompanied by hand-drawn illustrations, takes you through the story of physicians pushed to their breaking point in their fight for a sliver of hope.

games.name: A Forest Tale: Porasy
games.summary:
Embark on a journey through a new mythological realm as Porasy, an Indigenous warrior. Explore uncharted landscapes, unleash the power of Muiraquitãs, unravel your story, and vanquish the Seven Legendary Beasts to carve your own legend. Are you ready to dive into this epic adventure?

Porasy is an indie platformer that combines the thrill of classic 2D action with the rich, untold stories of the Tupi-Guarani mythology. Inspired by childhood favorites like Sonic and MegaMan, Porasy brings a fresh challenge to the platforming genre, immersing players in a dangerous, atmospheric world of Brazilian folklore.

games.name: Collapsed Horizon
games.summary: Travel between galaxies, dig planets, collect ores, sell them, upgrade your equipment, and earn your ticket back to Earth.

games.name: 100 Caliber Dash
games.summary: A high-speed run-and-gun shooter with roguelite deckbuilding upgrades.

games.name: Forsworn
games.summary: Step into a realm torn by divine conflict where every defeat is just another beginning in this rogue lite, turn-based tactics adventure where no hero fights alone. Build powerful synergies to overcome unforgiving battles and defy fate in a world controlled by the gods.

games.name: Aspiel: Edge of Chaos
games.summary: Aspiel: Edge of Chaos is a third-person fantasy Action-RPG. Explore numerous locations ravaged by the dark power of Death, face various creatures consumed by Chaos, and harness the power of Life to save the continent of Aspiel.

games.name: Penguin Festival
games.summary: You are a penguin! Lend a helping flipper to your community as it prepares for an annual festival. Complete some last-minute festival to-dos during the day while you explore the vibrant penguin town. When night falls, join everyone and enjoy the festivities with games and music!

games.name: Ember & Blade
games.summary:
Become the immortal hunter and stand against the archdemon Asmodeus. Cut through bullet-hell swarms, clash with Souls-like bosses, and harness celestial blessings that
reshape your powers each run. The demons are rising—raise your sword.

games.name: Take Them Down
games.summary: TAKE THEM DOWN is a fast-paced violent action game where you combine unique weapons and abilities to take down necromancers, demons, and betrayers while avoiding getting crushed and cleaved by traps, mines, and blades sprawled across nightmarish, macabre worlds. TAKE THEM DOWN.

games.name: Fading Echo
games.summary: In Fading Echo, you rise as a young Legend to confront the Paradox before it consumes your world. Dive into this fast-paced action-adventure where you’ll travel across realities, battle fierce enemies, transform into a living water ball, and unleash devastating combos.

games.name: Iona's Island
games.summary: Restore a vibrant island paradise atop a giant sea turtle! As the Leshen Iona, wield ancient spells to heal the land and befriend islanders and help them with their quests. Create your own enchanting sandbox style sanctuary. Uncover secrets and reshape a world with accompanied by cozy, lofi vibes.

games.name: Spinning My Wheel
games.summary: Build a physics‑powered hamster‑wheel, master rocket‑boosted moves, to lead a brain chipped enhanced hamster through puzzles, mining, and laboratory‑runner mayhem.

games.name: GTL Schedule
games.summary: In a post-apocalyptic world where food has become contraband and hope is on the brink of extinction, you quietly ignite a revolution to warm the world with a spatula and love.

games.name: Archon Soul
games.summary: Roll the dice but make your own luck in this 2D dicebuilding roguelike. Customize your dice using swappable faces, runes, and bodies with unique effects. ​Draft spells, create powerful synergies, defeat challenging enemies, and conquer the Archon's palace.

games.name: Terrible Life Expectancy
games.summary: Terrible Life Expectancy is a roguelite top-down shooter with Survivors elements, where you fight absurd hordes of mutants for the amusement of an unseen bloodthirsty audience. You only inherit all your upgrades as long as someone in your family is still breathing… or at least twitching.

games.name: Exofactory
games.summary: Awaken as a forgotten AI on an alien world, your every choice reshapes your technology, environment, and identity. Automate deeply transformative factories in a chill open world, where the story evolves uniquely around you.

games.name: DungeonBox
games.summary: A new Dungeons & Dragons Party Game! Let our Dungeon Master take you and up to 8 players on an adventure, where you control the next move by answering and voting from your phones

games.name: Arcaneering: Beyond Automation
games.summary: Build spell-powered factories, reclaim ancient territories filled with magical secrets, and discover game-changing technology hidden across procedurally generated worlds. Master both engineering and magic in this cozy fusion of factory automation and RPG progression.

games.name: Sketchy Driver
games.summary: An arcade, roguelike endless racer where you dodge traffic, jump ramps, perform tricks, earn points, and level up to make the run more entertaining, aiming for the best score. No story. No brakes. No problem.

games.name: Pigeon Guild
games.summary: Pigeon Guild is a non-combat, single-player action RPG where you play as Jules Corso, a rookie cadet in Cassandria's most prestigious airborne postal service. Navigate your flying cargo boat through a world of floating islands, where every delivery tells a story.

games.name: Project Octavia
games.summary: A stylized third-person spy action game with infiltration, gunplay, Close Quarter Combat (CQC) and innovative and dynamic sabotage gadget crafting with brand new science-fiction based stealth action multiplayer gameplay!

games.name: Economic Miracle
games.summary: Build your own state in the most detailed economic simulator! Playing for the government of any country in the world, you will have to conduct domestic and foreign policy, pass laws, carry out economic reforms and fight. Try a real simulator of modern times!

games.name: FrogSpin
games.summary: A wind-up frogventure bursting with colorful platforming and roguelike surprises. Spin the slots, master precision jumps, and rack up points. Ready to leap into action?

games.name: Agecraft
games.summary: Agecraft is a historical strategy and city-building game where players guide a civilization from the Stone Age to the space age. The game combines settlement building, resource management, and technological progression. Players construct cities, manage the economy, provide for their people, and expand across different eras, unlocking new buildings, production chains, and methods of transportation as history advances.

games.name: Leafy Corner
games.summary: Run a cute little plant shop in this cozy shop management game. Grow, sell, and care for a variety of real-life plants, help customers find their dream plants, complete orders, and customize your cozy shop just the way you like!

games.name: Rat Game
games.summary: Asymmetrical horror comedy co-op for up to 8 players. Play either a pack of Rats trying to sabotage a restaurant, or the Chef determined to stop them.

games.name: Micro Titans Wrestling
games.summary: Micro Titans Wrestling is a nostalgia fuelled roguelike deck builder themed on the golden age of professional wrestling. Prepare to step into the ring with a roster of era defining characters and take it to the mat with a unique card battle system.

games.name: Astra Bestiary
games.summary: Raise Beasts from eggs into powerful Champions in this 2D monster-raising/taming RPG. Feed, train and evolve your partners to explore a perilous, non-linear world. Master fast-paced, tactical battles, uncover the secrets of a fading world and pass on the Beasts' legacy across generations.

games.name: Souls Alive: Origins
games.summary: Souls Alive: Origins is a Lovecraftian survival horror game set in a dark sci-fi future. Explore a world where reality bends, ancient cults return, and Cthulhu stirs once more. With a strong focus on story, atmosphere, and visual detail.

games.name: Potions of Veldenkeep
games.summary: Run your own alchemist shop in the fantasy City of Adventurers! Grow plants, brew potions, set prices, and serve curious villagers. Earn gold, build reputation, and expand your craft in this cozy first-person herbalist simulator.

games.name: Appa
games.summary: Appa is a narrative driven simultaneous card game about two siblings dealing with the death of their father. You play as Varun witnessing surreal nightmares and manifestations of his deceased father and playing a card game with him.

games.name: Swarmdustry
games.summary: Build a living factory and automate the Swarm. Harvest resources, build mega factories and evolve organic industry. Balance growth, efficiency, creep spread, and survival in a world that fights back. Or doesn't. Up to you really.

games.name: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 - The Flower & the Flame
games.summary:
Her art skirts the boundaries of life, of undeath, of Blood, and of the social mores of Kindred society. But she still burns for that glorious moment of transcendence, when her mastery will shape a work that echoes through eternity.

For this, she will become a legend. However, every masterpiece needs a canvas, and there is much work to be done.

Experience Ysabella's dark artistic journey as she seeks to create her magnum opus in this Story Pack.

Contains new playable story content, combat mechanics, and Phyre outfit.

games.name: Blackwood
games.summary: By day, you run a DVD store in 2012 New York. By night, you’re a ruthless assassin. BLACKWOOD is a cinematic third-person shooter with grounded melee combat, brutal takedowns, responsive gunplay, and a double life to manage.

games.name: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game
games.summary: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game is a fast-paced 1v1 fighter where you battle as your favorite characters from the Avatar franchise. Featuring hand-drawn 2D animation true to the series’ roots, proprietary rollback netcode, and full cross-play for smooth, competitive gameplay.

games.name: Armada Pet Wars
games.summary: Armada Pet Wars is a 4X-lite asynchronous turn based space-themed strategy game... with pets. Design Starships, make or break alliances, setup your fleets for victory in this strategic, space-themed, auto-battler.

games.name: My Eerie Lair
games.summary: A dark cozy ‘Romantasy’ furnishing game where a vampire kidnaps his beloved and tries to win her heart by turning his eerie castle into their dream home.

games.name: Another's Memories
games.summary: Another's Memories is a first-person psychological horror video game located in Argentina. Explore a sinister country house, solve puzzles, and survive ruthless enemies in an immersive experience where every shadow hides a disturbing story.

games.name: Tales of Terrarum
games.summary: 《Tales of Terrarum》is a management adventure sim game. On the new land of Terrarum, you will inherit a territory as a descendant of the Francz family, and become the town mayor to settle the craftsmen and adventurers who come to the town. You'll live in and expand the town together.

games.name: Dear Poe
games.summary:
You have received a mysterious email! After the death of an underworld citizen caused by a strange letter, Poe and Arthur are called in to investigate the case and prevent further tragedies. But what appears to be a simple crime soon reveals something much bigger, involving wandering demons and a much more complex dark plot.

Dear Poe is a spin-off of Dark Light, set 6 months before the main events of the game.

games.name: Solaria
games.summary: Collect various androids known as "Pvas" on the futuristic colony planet named "Solaria", deploy them for battles, construction, farming, crafting; pilot your own mobile base to explore the vast world. This is a brand-new, single player open-world survival and crafting game.

games.name: Magical Blush
games.summary: Magical Blush is a top-down action-adventure where fast-paced elemental combat meets Metroidvania-style exploration. Chain spell combos, exploit elemental weaknesses, rescue survivors, and team up in local co-op as you battle the powerful Elemental Lords and explore the wondrous world of Wyn.

games.name: Diffusion
games.summary: Build defenses to protect your mining sites from the hostile native alien species. Explore the planet and discover the true reasons you've been sent here for. A true old school pixel-art experience.

games.name: Total War: Warhammer III - Lords of the End Times
Starlet Voice
games.summary:
STARLET☆VOICE is a narrative talent-show survival sim set inside a 100-day televised competition. Train skills, build your persona, manage pressure, and form relationships as you navigate weekly episodes shaped by your choices. Public opinion, fan reactions, and on-air risks determine whether you rise in the rankings or fall into the elimination zone.
Featuring five heroines with unique storylines, multiple endings, and a blend of performance, strategy, and visual-novel drama.

games.name: R.I.P.
games.summary: A co-op horror game where you manipulate your own gravity to traverse a procedurally generated 3D maze filled with supernatural threats. Work alone or with your team to rescue kidnapped victims.

games.name: Orbitals
games.summary: Team up as Maki and Omura, two inseparable explorers with a whole lot more determination than experience. You’ll brave the perils of space in search of help for their crumbling station home, now trapped within a supernatural cosmic storm.

games.name: Sister Other Paranoia
games.summary: A dark visual novel created by the team behind NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE. Overly sensitive to other people's emotions, the protagonist—a light novel writer—develops the ability to read minds, only to be driven even deeper into isolation. His sole remaining comfort is his younger sister, gifted yet lonely.

games.name: Dreadnought Tartarus
games.summary: Dreadnought Tartarus is a semi-automated strategic simulation game centered around a single, colossal battleship. Take control of the massive warship Tartarus and destroy everything in your path as the battlefield continuously advances！

games.name: Wrongly Accused
games.summary: Explore historical locations, find and analyse evidence. Unmask the real perpetrator so that justice can be served and the Wrongly Accused can be found innocent. Use problem solving, deduction and critical thinking skills to uncover the truth and maybe even expose a conspiracy in your own time.

games.name: City Party
games.summary: City Party is an 8-player simultaneous turn-based party game. All players act at once—no waiting! Roll dice on beautifully crafted global city maps, use skills, control special tiles, play combo cards, challenge opponents, and collect legendary treasures. Win this urban adventure your way!

games.name: Sovereign Tower
games.summary: Play as the Sovereign of a magical tower in this story-rich, Round Table management RPG. Recruit eccentric Knights, assign quests and balance egos whilst carving out your kingdom's destiny. If destiny doesn’t go your way, keep turning back time, uncover secrets and rewrite fate again and again.

games.name: Moorestech
games.summary: Factory automation meets anime-style RPG. Harness gears and shafts to power machines and conveyors, building an automated factory. Produce items and research tech, evolving from windmills to fusion as you trace humanity’s tech evolution, then launch a rocket home to uncover the truth of your exile.

games.name: Demra: Rifts of War
games.summary: Use powerful light magic to fight back the invading demon hordes in this lite-RPG/ RTS mix. Build a base, gather resources, research and command your army.

games.name: Make The Dead Dead Again
games.summary: In this third-person action-adventure, use Lux’s gun skills and enhanced DNA abilities to clear out enemies as she searches for her missing mother. Along the way, level up and acquire loot to equip her - and her home base - with an insane variety of customisation options.

games.name: Codex Arcana: Grimoire of Monsters
games.summary: Summon an army of Monster Girls to face your enemies in strategic battles! Defeat the Dark Lord's minions and expand your collection with cool, fierce and cute Monster Girls of all variety in this "Capsule Monsters" inspired game!

games.name: Pepper the Giant Purple Dog
games.summary: In this twist on a harmless pet simulator, take care of Pepper, who happens to be a giant purple dog. But when things go awry, you will have to decide: how many lives is one good boy worth?

games.name: Worming from Home
games.summary: Be the Worm of Wall Street in this silly simulation game about working a remote finance job. Throw your spineless body around the keyboard to invest in the stock market and earn obscene amounts of money. Buy upgrades, train skills, and worm your way up to the promotion you've always dreamed of!

games.name: AGX GP
games.summary: AGX is a heart thumpingly fast, Anti-Gravity racing game. It's lightning‑fast action and Xtreme ability‑based gameplay, will push your reactions and skills to the limit! Welcome To AGX!

games.name: InterViolence
games.summary: Wander through a secret lair. Help a young supervillain move out of his lifelong home. Think about your past, and his uncertain future. The third entry in the Violence series.

games.name: Vapor Strange
games.summary: Explore bizarre procedural generated psychedelic worlds, encounter surreal creatures, experience shifting rulesets, retro aesthetics, and altered music for a wild and truly strange experience.

games.name: Eye of Syn
games.summary: Summon and combine demons to battle against zombie hordes in Eye of Syn, a lane based tower defense game where you must protect two dimensions at once. Uncover dark secrets and powerful demon synergies as you try to save Earth from an eldritch apocalypse.

games.name: Hellcard II
games.summary: Hellcard II is a cooperative roguelike deckbuilder that can be played solo or with a team of up to four players. The game takes place in the paper dungeons known from Hellcard and Book of Demons, expanding into new biomes and storylines.

games.name: Another Eden Begins
games.summary: Embark on a time-traveling RPG adventure featuring command battles presented by Masato Kato, creator of numerous RPG classics. With New Game+, embark on a new adventure with your upgraded characters and discover more than 10 different endings.

games.name: Roadhouse Simulator
games.summary:
Roadhouse is the prelude to Gas Station Simulator where you take on the role of the uncle and explore his humble beginnings. Start as a bouncer at a roadhouse on Route 66 and work your way up to running the entire business.

In this 1st person view simulator game you deal with a multitude of customers and various biker gangs, manage the roadhouse, tend to the bar, master the grill, stock the right supplies and acquire more territories to widen your influence.

games.name: Beyond The Cupola: ISS Simulator
games.summary: You are the ISS crew, where the station's fate depends on everyone. Oxygen leaks, system failures, meteorite threats — repair with your own hands and make real-time decisions. Complete missions, perform spacewalks. Experience life in orbit: in space, nothing goes according to plan.

games.name: Local Zombies
games.summary: Death is just a career change. Shape unique characters in this turn-based life sim, then resurrect them as zombie companions. Transform their past talents into tactical advantages to take over the city.

games.name: Tunnel Escape Fates Entwined
games.summary: Fight through a zombie-ravaged city as Olivenia, a daring cop on an escort mission in this rogue-lite RPG/ADV. Use various weapons and upgrade your gear to survive brutal gunplay and deadly encounters where every choice counts. Fail, and very bad things might happen to you…

games.name: Kubika
games.summary: Guide charming cubes through a dreamlike world in Kubika, a Sokoban-inspired 3D puzzle adventure. Manipulate gravity to your will to solve thoughtful, elegant three-dimensional puzzles. Bring your vision to life with the built-in Level Editor, and share your creations with the Community.

games.name: WomboCombo
games.summary: Fight through hordes of mobs in a roguelike-style challenge by hitting the correct key sequence. Test your reflexes, build your character, and survive the chaos as each stage ramps up. Rack up massive combos and push your limits with every run.

games.name: Barefort
games.summary: "The fewer defenses you have, the more you become yourself." On the board, the score spreads over time, and corruption erodes. Stack units to create chain effects and turn the tide with minimal placement. Placing too many units will destroy you, while placing too few will prevent you from defending.

games.name: Freelance Dead
games.summary: A roguelite top‑down twin‑stick shooter. Rain, shine, or zombie outbreak—nothing stops a Courier on a deadline. Shoot, loot, and scoot through hordes of undead with ridiculous item synergies. Earn cash, unlock weapons, and grow from broke gig worker to a walking apocalypse.

games.name: Ludus Magnatus: Gladiator Manager Simulator
games.summary: Ludus Magnatus: Gladiator Manager Simulator is a classic management experience set in an alternate Ancient Rome. Start in Division VII with one of sixteen clubs, recruit fighters, equip them from the market, and climb the ladder through fully simulated seasons and matches.

games.name: Purrfect Tanks: The Yarnpocalypse
games.summary: Command adorable cats in chaotic cardboard tanks and battle for the last yarn on Earth! Explosions, lasers, catnip-fueled madness — and lots of cardboard.

games.name: Flipper on Recoil
games.summary: Flipper on Recoil is a fast-paced 3D platformer where a fish with legs and a shotgun takes on gravity. Use recoil, power-ups, and absurd tricks to blast through handcrafted levels and chase your best times.

games.name: Shell of the Coward
games.summary: Shell of the Coward is a turn-based roguelike/RPG where you must escort the Anathema you've sworn to protect through a perilous dungeon without ever looking back.

games.name: Wrecked
games.summary: 失败作 Wrecked is a visual novel game developed and published by ShanProject. Players advance the story by clicking key points on the screen. Featuring multiple routes and rich narratives. The game is music-themed, telling a fateful journey full of unforeseen twists.

games.name: Dreamy Golden Snow
games.summary: Dreamy Golden Snow is a fantasy mystery-themed visual novel that tells a story among high school girls. The story appears in an ordinary high school. After the incident, the protagonist is also affected, and players will guide her through numerous choices to uncover the truth.

games.name: Interdimensional Vending Machine
games.summary: Inspired by SCP-261, you play as a homeless girl struggling to survive in a distorted city using a vending machine that should not exist. Every coin dispenses impossible food that defies biology and logic, and every meal reshapes your fate. How long can you survive before you stop being human?

games.name: Cat Squeeze
games.summary: Cat Squeeze is a cozy, brain-teasing cat puzzle game. Playing as an explosive kitten, use the extrusion of the pipeline, and navigate a maze to collect fish treats! Solve puzzles with precise blasts to escape, or get trapped by the soft maze.

games.name: Good Catch!
games.summary: Good Catch! is a relaxing fishing game about cozy fishing spots, rare catches, small quests and friendly characters you unlock along the way.

games.name: Factomancer
games.summary: The Order sends you on a mission. Armed with technology powered by magic, build production chains, plan, transform, optimize, and prepare for the unexpected. In this automation roguelite, the Eye of the Order watches your moves: failure is only a step toward perfection.

games.name: Skills & Raids
games.summary: A party-based RPG with real-time, ability driven combat. Manage cooldowns and react to enemy mechanics. Loot and extract resources to complete quests and craft powerful gear. The world has fallen into the grasp of a corruption spreading creature. Combine skills to create unique builds.

games.name: Bait Soul
games.summary: Bait Soul is a top-down Dungeon Crawler Roguelike. It blends dungeon exploration with Survivors-style auto-attacks. Accessible yet deep, it retains the thrill of looting, with unique, game-changing mechanics hidden everywhere.

games.name: Author Sim
games.summary: Have you ever dreamed of becoming a world-renowned author? Now's your chance! Study masterpieces from other authors, craft breathtaking stories, and maintain a public profile in pursuit of your dream.

games.name: Radiotext
games.summary: Radiotext is an interactive story set in the near future, where communication without intrusion requires radio-waves. Dive into a cryptographic radio-net in this text-based rpg, where you need to think carefully before typing your answers.

games.name: Rules: Motel Horizon
games.summary: Start your job as a night administrator at the mysterious Horizon Motel, where visitors from another world try to pass as ordinary people, and the rules have the highest priority — breaking them leads to… undesirable consequences.

games.name: Villain: Path of the Necromancer
games.summary: You are an Osteurgo, a lesser necromancer risen from the ashes of the Dark Lord. Raise your empire among desolate mountains, subjugate savage tribes, and spread corruption. Build, conquer, withstand enemy hordes, and claim the empty throne of evil.

games.name: Scrappy Craft
games.summary: Scrappy Craft is a shopkeeping game where you run a small forge. Scavenge trash and combine it to craft over 10000 absurd weapons like banana swords or Frisbee shields, buy upgrades, unlock new recipes and sell your bizarre creations to quirky customers like tie-wearing otters or spaghetti monsters.

games.name: Heave Ho 2
games.summary: Get a grip, it’s Heave Ho 2! The insane 2-4 player party game sequel takes the couch co-op mayhem online for the first time. Grab what you can and swing to win!

games.name: Silberheim Evolving Card Game
games.summary: Silberheim ECG (Evolving Card Game) is a fantasy trading card game. Cards—called Fragments—can evolve based on a player’s actions and playstyle, creating a personalized experience within the expanding world and lore of Silberheim.

games.name: King's Bet
games.summary:
King's Bet is a dark, steampunk-themed roguelite deckbuilder where players use high-stakes poker logic to power industrial machine combat.

After a kingdom falls into ruin due to a gambling plague, the King casts the most notorious gamblers into The Well; a deep, industrial pit filled with rusted machinery and failed experiments. To earn your freedom, you must salvage derelict weapons and "fuel" them using your gambling skills. This time, you aren't playing for money; you are playing for your life.

games.name: Unwell
games.summary: You regain consciousness. Beside you lies a broken and rusted ladder, and in front of you stretches a dark, damp-smelling corridor. In the distance, you hear the sound of falling water. You have no idea where you are. All you know is that you must go deeper.

games.name: Reel Talk
games.summary: Cast your line, catch some fish, and make real connections. REEL TALK is a cozy multiplayer fishing game where you hang out, customize your character with pride, and chat with friends old and new. No pressure, no competition-just good vibes by the water.

games.name: Gobble
games.summary: Gobble is a 2D action platformer with eating as its central theme. Venture out into the world searching for your missing family, armed with a “sickle” that devours monsters to get stronger.

games.name: Welcome to Mars 9
games.summary: Welcome to Mars 9: The Tale of River is an old-school graphic adventure about a person adrift in space, rescued by a luxurious space station orbiting Mars. Playing as River, you will be drawn into a world of comfort and pleasure, only to soon discover that the station hides a dark secret.

games.name: Vertex
games.summary: Coming end 2026!

games.name: Hyperwired
games.summary: Pilot a ship with a charger hanging. Explore an ever-changing space an plug to recharge your energy while surviving the enemy breach in this cable-like space shooter with roguelike elements and plugged resource management.

games.name: TIC-TAC: Twelve o'clock
games.summary: TIC-TAC: Twelve o'clock is a survival horror game. Monitor corridors and rooms through surveillance cameras to counter vengeful ghosts. Keep the lights on, the generator charged, and fuses replaced… and don’t get caught!

games.name: Huni Kuin: Beya Xinã Bena
games.summary: A 2D platform game about the ancient stories of the Huni Kuin indigenous people, who live in the Brazilian Amazon. The entire game was produced in collaboration with the Huni Kuin communities of the Jordão river, in Acre.

games.name: Mariachi Legends
games.summary: Mariachi Legends is an action-packed mystery Metroidvania game. In Mariachi Legends, Join fantastical festivities at the Day of the Dead carnival alongside Detective Pablo Cruz, currently masquerading as a mariachi player to investigate an evil curse looming over the serene town of Santa Mascota.

games.name: Lootbound
games.summary: Lootbound is a tactical loot management roguelike where you start solo and assemble your party as you go. Choose routes, risks, rewards, equip heroes and companions, and create a build to challenge the final boss. Turn-based combat, calculated risk, equipment synergies, and honest difficulty.

games.name: Servant of the Lake
games.summary: Servant of the Lake is the new premium point-and-click adventure in the Rusty Lake series from the creators of the Cube Escape series, The Past Within and Underground Blossom.

games.name: Skinwalker: First Blood
games.summary: Skinwalker is a hack n’ slash action platformer where you swear allegiance to a formidable beast to save your daughter from a terminal illness. Shapeshift into the creature’s monstrous form and wield untamed wrath in exchange for its freedom and the promise of a cure.

games.name: Calx
games.summary: Calx is an atmospheric 3D action adventure inspired by visionary sci-fi art. Explore planet Syro - vast landscapes filled with crystal structures and ancient technology. Find out what the WARP did to the Quoths civilization. The environment guides you, revealing secrets through exploration.

games.name: Forza Horizon 6
games.summary: Discover the breathtaking landscapes of Japan in over 550 real-world cars and become a racing Legend at the Horizon Festival. Start your journey as a tourist and explore a world full of hit music and Japanese culture. Build a Valley Estate, acquire awe-inspiring homes, and display your prized car collection in fully Customizable Garages. Cruise the roads with your friends and join Car Meets around Japan, unleash your imagination with EventLab and build together in Horizon CoLab.

games.name: Pokémon Champions
games.summary: Get ready to experience everything you love about Pokémon battles all in one place—in Pokémon Champions. This new, battle-focused game will feature familiar mechanics such as Pokémon types, Abilities, and moves, creating an environment conducive to rich and varied strategies for new and experienced Trainers alike. It’s not just familiar mechanics—you’ll be able to bring in classic Pokémon from Pokémon HOME, too! Look forward to cross-platform battles alongside your favorite Pokémon on Nintendo Switch and mobile, with a variety of different modes available for your desired experience.

games.name: Drowning Song of the Stagnant Sea
games.summary: A dark fairy tale set in the deep sea. The fated encounter between a sea monster and a human forever changes their lives in this yuri visual novel.

games.name: Nekopara Sekai Connect
games.summary: Welcome to a new cats paradise where all kinds of nekos over the world will gather around you.

games.name: Last Flag
games.summary: Hide your flag. Find the enemy flag. Run it back, then defend for a minute to win it. Welcome to Last Flag: a fast-paced 5v5 shooter with showstopping contestants, set in a televised competition where strategy, teamwork, and chaos blend in the ultimate game of Capture the Flag.

games.name: Sigma Star Saga DX
games.summary: An updated re-release of Sigma Star Saga, which adds an improved map, decreased random encounter rate, rebalanced EXP system, updated script, various bug fixes, and other enhancements.

games.name: Mike Goes on Hike
games.summary: Become a real tourist in Mike Goes on Hike! Amazing wild landscapes, inexpressible atmosphere of hiking and important vital lessons are waiting for you. Go all the way to the end to fulfill the request of your beloved grandfather.

games.name: Elementallis
games.summary: Top-down action adventure with elemental magic gameplay. Guilt pushes you on a journey to restore the elements in a pre-apocalyptic world. Use and combine your elemental powers to fight and solve puzzles across the temples.

games.name: Dewdrop Dynasty
games.summary: Run, dash, and crawl your way through a fast, Metroidvania. Battle with giant bosses, find new guns and abilities, meet quirky characters, and most importantly find your way home.

games.name: Parkour Bot
games.summary: Parkour Bot is a fast paced, rhythm based, physics platform game, with an unique movement set of main character. Show your skills and get a lot of achievements in 100 dynamic levels.

games.name: Dono's Tale
games.summary: Relive the glory days of the 16 and 32-bit era in Dono's Tale. A super cute and colorful platformer about a hungry little dragon! Jump, dash, climb, and shoot your way through detailed and colorful worlds in order to get back your precious fruit!

games.name: The Swordfish: Knight of the Deep
games.summary: Embark on an epic adventure as a sword-wielding fish and restore order to the kingdom's depths. Explore an ocean world full of adorable characters, menacing foes, and hidden wonders.

games.name: Smipat and the Lost Bones
games.summary: In Smipat and the Lost Bones you follow the life of Smipat, a necromancer's pet with a will of it's own. Smipat has lost some of it's bones and is going on an adventure to find them. Each bone has it's own unique ability that makes it possible to overcome the challenges ahead.

games.name: The Wolf Is Dead
games.summary: Detective work is never easy. When the body of Alexander Wolff is found face down in the pool at a party for the film about his life, there's only one man (well, Fox) for the job. Interrogate suspects, investigate the scene of the crime and reach back in time with your partner, Maxwell Mirror.

games.name: Concerto on White
games.summary: Rhythm Action? No, this is MUSICIAN SIMULATION! Concerto on White is a musician simulation game featuring classical music. Unlike any typical rhythm games, players are required to actually play the main melody. In the main story, you will experience adventurous campus life in the academy.

games.name: High Elo Girls
games.summary: High Elo Girls is a Visual Novel set in the esports scene where you play as the latest recruit for a new all-girls team. Can you help your squad achieve their true potential, or will you only squander your own?

games.name: Demon Spore
games.summary: Blast your way out of tentacle hell as a failed lab experiment gives birth to a rapidly growing viral horror in this intense action rogue-lite inspired by 80s Monster movies. Use the lab to your advantage and improvise an escape plan before this constantly evolving life form spreads out of control.

games.name: Breadskate
games.summary: BRDSKT (BREADSKATE) is a freeroam skating game but you play as bread and ducks with guns have invaded your world. Simply give your newly baken bread loafs some wheels and watch them go skating and exploring the world. Truly the miracle of life of bread!

games.name: SUMBR
games.summary:
A 2-8 Player Arena Shooter filled with chaos.

Ascend into a 300 year intergalactic war between the 7 factions of humanity. Fight against all fronts and reunite the First Kingdom, as a Bellator of The King's Guard. Discover high tech weaponry, bionic augments and artifacts of a Pinnacle Era in the sci-fi Co-op, PvP, PvE world of SUMBR.

Venture into war-torn faction territories of the solar system, clear Heroic missions, and battle against other players in a variety of PvP modes, either solo or with friends.

games.name: Dino Tales
games.summary:
Dino Tales is a colourful adventure game where players explore a world of dinosaurs and interactive stories.

Create your own story from your adventures, discover prehistoric creatures, and unlock new tales as you explore exciting environments filled with puzzles, characters, and surprises.

Perfect for younger players and families, Dino Tales combines exploration, storytelling, and playful discovery in a friendly prehistoric world.

games.name: Interwoven
games.summary: Welcome to Interwoven - a compact, but dynamic adventure inspired by traditional turn-based JRPGs! Follow an unlikely trio on their journey up to defeat the Obsidian Drake atop Anvite Mountain. Use the unique Augment Battle System to create all sorts of interesting strategies.

games.name: Flesh Everest
games.summary: Explore a randomized facility built within a massive living mountain of flesh. Flesh Everest mixes a rogue-like survival experience with shooting mechanics inspired by Silent Hill and Resident Evil. Death is permanent and ammo is limited.

games.name: Glaciered
games.summary: Glaciered is an action-adventure indie game that takes place on a glacier-covered Earth 65 million years in the future. Play as a Tuai, a species evolved from birds, to soar through the seas and fight against the threats to this new golden age of life.

games.name: King's Reign
games.summary: Become a King of the mystical and mysterious land of Thalendaar. Rule a magical Kingdom by indirectly influencing your people's actions. Expand your cities, gather resources, and protect your citizens from mystical monsters in this lighthearted strategy game.

games.name: Bangkok Story: A Stray Dog
games.summary: A top-down 2D story-driven adventure game inspired by real-life events. Traverse and experience the life of a formerly homeless man through an interview of how he regained his sense of self by telling his past to a stray dog. Set in Bangkok, Thailand 2017.

games.name: Eagle Knight Paradox
games.summary: Eagle knight paradox takes you (the player) into a doble experience, one of them is the role of a powerful mecha trying to protect a space city from space fanatics. On the other hand, the game sets you as the role of Ian (the pilot) building relationships around the city or whats left of it.

games.name: Epsylon
games.summary: A private eye mystery game where you decide how to solve the case. Use your detective skills to solve the case or rely on the abilities of your little dragon partner to see things from a new angle.

games.name: Witches Tavern
games.summary: Witch Tavern is a simulated business game that integrates tavern management, cosplay, love development and other elements. As the new boss of the witch tavern, you will meet all kinds of friends in this magical city of Venesia and start a full and extraordinary life.

games.name: NecroTactics
games.summary: An auto-battler roguelite with tower defense and horde survival elements. Draft and position your army, develop your graveyard, equip units with powerful items, cast spells, and place turrets to annihilate your opponent's army in seconds!

games.name: Anomalistic Revolution
games.summary: You stand before a pit at the city's heart, then your gaze drifts to a deeper void, one you fear even more. Wield your invention to unravel mysteries, reclaim lost memories, strengthen your skills, and battle nightmare-born horrors in this multi-ending RPG.

games.name: Slipgate
games.summary: Explore a gloomy rooms of damned sci-fi base as a doomed marine, only survivor of the portal experiment. Save humanity like in 90's with your trusty shotgun, paving a way through ominous corridors inhabited by the shadows of sinners and evil spirits.

games.name: Solaro
games.summary: Solaro is a handcrafted open-world game set in the remote outskirts of an ancient galaxy. Follow a lone traveller on an interstellar journey, solving puzzles, probing planets, and recovering lost fragments of the past.

games.name: One Card One Shot: Mafia
games.summary: Enter the world of the mafia, with an agile and dynamic Card Game that will challenge you in your free moments or addict you for hours! Choose a mission and hit the target in seconds! What awaits you with each card turned over? Will you become the legend feared by all or will you fall into oblivion?

games.name: TouHou: Legend of Fairy Souls
games.summary: “TouHou: Legend of Fairy Souls” is a TouHou fan game.In the game, because of someone's conspiracy, Reimu turned into Kedama and caused her power to weaken.Reimu then had to embark on an adventure to recover herself and finally uncover who was behind the scenes.

games.name: Montaro 2
games.summary: Montaro, master of stealth, sneakily infiltrating a convenience store with nobody being none the wiser. A stealth puzzle game where you manipulate objects and NPCs to complete objectives, "stealing pantsu".

games.name: It Consumes
games.summary: It Consumes is a roguelite arena-FPS in the dark. See by beating your heart and kill demons shrouded in shadows. Upgrade your abilities, unlock new weapons, and conquer what lurks in the darkness.

games.name: Whispers of the Luminaries
games.summary:
Whispers of the Luminaries is an idol-themed murder mystery visual novel where you balance social life with detective work.

Investigate, obtain clues and deduce the killer.

games.name: Breathedge 2
games.summary: Sent on a reckless mission, you find yourself in outer space filled with numerous dangers and things to explore. Build, craft, manage your crew, look after the chicken, and defeat the evil space corporation in this new breathtaking survival game.

games.name: The Ripe Blood Anthology: This World Is Just for the Two of Us
games.summary: Take on the role of Derek — the police chief in a small town. Make decisions that will change the course of the story. Unravel the mystery behind the peculiar behavior of Derek's boyfriend, Chris, and his younger sister. The graphic style is inspired by bara-manga and colorful line art.

games.name: Monke Simulator
games.summary: Peel banan, escape containment and shower your oppressors in stench. Top the scoreboards, be the fastest ape and liquefy your neurons in this stink infused parkour shooter.

games.name: Sylvana's Chronicles
games.summary: A turn-based strategy game with roguelike and deck-building elements. Explore a dark and magical world full of forgotten lands, monsters, and secrets. Build your own deck of cards to fight your way through the dungeons. Upgrade your cards, unlock new items, and discover ancient artifacts.

games.name: Frame of Mind: A game of Thoughts
games.summary: Frame of Mind is a brief and cozy narrative game that lets you discover a character trough thoughts and mementos they find while moving out of their parents home. It's an introspective game, meant to share some experiences a peer-group of neurodivergent queers, including the developer, had growing up.

games.name: Memento Dawn
games.summary: A colorful puzzle game that follows a lost child on a journey to search for her memories and helps her through the darkness by controlling light and shadow.

games.name: KnockedDown
games.summary: Race as a cop, take down criminals in this thrilling low-poly game. Fast action, challenging obstacles. Join the chase!

games.name: Oni Hunters
games.summary: Journey through Gironia's lands, where monsters roam and secrets await. Battle, fuse creatures, and decide your fate in the grand Monster Jubilee. Ready for the adventure?

games.name: The Chronos Event
games.summary: The Chronos Event is a fast-paced third-person shooter that emphasizes the tactics of time travel and fast, aggressive play. Players rewind time, battling alongside their younger selves against overwhelming opposition.

games.name: KilaFlow
games.summary: Play as the mascot of a blazing fast (for it's time) antivirus software to clear out corruptions and viruses from various devices around a town.

games.name: House 2
games.summary:
As a terrible storm approaches, two young girls spend a fateful night watching TV and playing games…

House 2 is the sequel to the hit indie horror game, House. In House 2, you play as Tabby & Melody, finally free from their cursed home, in the next chapter of the House saga.

games.name: Roll The Bones
games.summary: Select spell-dice for your loadout, roll them and wreak absolute havoc! This high-paced pixelart roguelite will let you build unique loadouts with extremely interactable spells. Let's roll some bones!

games.name: Flow of War
games.summary: A classic RTS game that features auto-micro workers and warriors, freeing you to focus on your base defense strategy with a variety of towers and walls. Craft an army with MOBA-like heroes and units to counter your enemies' strengths and secure victory on stunning procedurally generated maps.

games.name: Vangaro Tactics
games.summary: Command colorful troops into tactical turn-based battles in Vangaro Tactics! Infiltrate enemy outposts on the Stealth Missions: mine, recruit, move wisely, and you'll stand a chance. Know your commanders and exclusive units to make the most of each faction.

games.name: Teacher Seduction
games.summary: Math is such a boring thing... Unless you have a hot teacher! In this case, even her angry boyfriend might not be a big problem.

games.name: Sp(l/r)ite
games.summary: When you wake up, you are in a different space. "Sp(l/r)ite" is an adventure game in which you must cooperate with your neighbors and a vivacious goddess, separated by walls, to escape from a room floating in a different space, while solving riddles. Which door will you choose when you get there?

games.name: Ooga
games.summary: Help Ooga to retrieve his stolen food stockpile in this fast-paced, spear-based parkour platformer. Play the first world and a half in the free demo, secrets included!

games.name: The Last Winter Knight
games.summary: Haunt a suit of armour. Explore an abandoned castle. Recover your memories... and bring the ghosts of the past to rest in this melancholy visual novel about love, family and regret.

games.name: Bloody Shrine
games.summary: Complete the ritual and defend the shrine in this top-down arena shooter roguelite. Unlock new demons, discover new weapons and choose the right spells and items. Create hell-breaking synergies that will unleash pain and suffering on all ghoulies, elites and bosses.

games.name: isekizima: Ruins and Tails Journey
games.summary: This is an action game where you explore ruins buried in the forest with Ethnic BGM. Kijino, a cat-eared adventurer with two tails (Nekomata), goes on a journey around the ISEKIZIMA (Ruins Island of dreams and romance : as it was written in the tourist brochure).

games.name: Wildlife Rescue Simulator
games.summary: Get to the chopper and fly to isolated places to rescue terrified animals from man made disasters. Take photos of your adventures and share it with your loyal supporters to get donations. Upgrade your equipment in order to rescue even more animals.

games.name: Dead Weight
games.summary: Challenge the Ancient Gods! Set the sails of your flying pirate ship and embark on the adventure in the steampunk world of Dead Weight. Explore floating islands in search for loot. Choose a class or create your own and enjoy turn-based tactical combat on tiny battlefields where every step matters.

games.name: Endurance Motorsport Series
games.summary: Manage the race from the stands, drive legendary cars and enjoy a genuine endurance race experience. As both driver and engineer, in this unique simulation victory can only come through teamwork.

games.name: Endless Tactics
games.summary: Endless Tactics is a turn-based roguelite game. Play as the commander of a high-risk planetary mining operation, defend your base from alien creatures while trying not to get overrun. Use resources to upgrade your starship, unlock new technologies, powerups, and deadly new worlds to harvest.

games.name: Synapse
games.summary: 「Synapse」is a game based on cooperative play with horror and thrills. Players must cooperate in a dark space to avoid robots, hack into facilities, and escape. The only thing players are given is a sense of helplessness and fear of death.

games.name: Eko And The Bewitched Lands
games.summary: "Eko and the Bewitched Lands" is a roguelite action RPG game. Help Eko on his mission to save the bewitched lands filled with enemies. Acquire and upgrade weapons of all kinds to combat and discover all the secrets that awaits for you.

games.name: Deflectorium
games.summary: Deflectorium: 2D sci-fi rogue-lite singleplayer. Deflect deadly shots back at your enemies to become unstoppable. With unique deflection system, you'll dominate battles while upgrading your skills and stats. Prepare for adrenaline experience where defense isn't just a tactic but an art.

games.name: Cheap Car Repair
games.summary: Cheap Car Repair - go back in time to Poland of the 90's. Run your own Cheap Car Repair shop. Look for savings wherever you can. Make lots of money and avoid angry customers!

games.name: Rune Defender
games.summary: Rune Defender is a grid based tower defense game. You build towers during the day and defend against the undead during the night.

games.name: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time
games.summary: The Remake of the End of the Greatest RPG of All Time is the last hour of a lost (nonexistent) JRPG, "remade” in 3D pixel art complete with director’s commentary, the digital manual, and archival footage.

games.name: A Ruthless World
games.summary: Embark on an adventure through a ruthless, 80s-inspired platformer world.

games.name: Jumpers' Mountain
games.summary: Join our little friends on this adventure, jumping between platforms to uncover the paths of 'Jumper's Mountain'. However, beware, as there are many secrets to reach the top, and a miscalculated jump can be quite costly.

games.name: Money Simulator
games.summary: Become a mogul in this thrilling simulation game! Buy, sell, and customize cars, trade in cryptocurrencies, and expand your empire with your very own shop. Take risks, make deals, and watch your business flourish in this dynamic world.

games.name: Codex: Eternal Eclipse
games.summary: Embark on a quirky adventure with four unique main characters as they seek their truth, battling gods, colossal corporations, and bizarre foes along the way. Unravel the mystery of the Eternal Eclipse and uncover the ancient secrets of the world!

games.name: PsychexFuse
games.summary: A lovingly hand-drawn adventure into esoteric worlds filled with threats, puzzles and horror. Help, save and clash with past versions of yourself, and unravel the mystery behind two and a half gods at war.

games.name: Scad
games.summary: Scad is an action packed roguelite apocalypse adventure. Fight against zombie hordes, craft & upgrade new weapons and prepare for new missions.

games.name: Effective Immediately
games.summary: All intergalactic travel passes through the orbital relay checkpoint. Verify ID discrepancies, repair vehicle systems and struggle against ethical dilemmas as you negotiate a shifting political landscape. Report for duty, effective immediately.

games.name: Nocturnal II
games.summary: Nocturnal 2 is an action-adventure game that lets you explore and rekindle the dark depths and towering heights of the city of Ytash.

games.name: Sauna Simulator
games.summary: Run your own sauna: buy a room, equip it with an oven and start earning money from it. Hire employees, ensure safety and, of course, have fun!

games.name: Whispers of The Shadow
games.summary: Detective Grace Lawson sets out immediately upon receiving a tip about her missing stepsister Amy, and when she gets there, she suddenly finds herself trapped inside the house. Now, Grace has only one goal: to find her missing sister and escape this nightmare.

games.name: ABYA: Paint Ball
games.summary: ABYA: Paint Ball is a challenging 2D platform action-shooter game. The robot ABYA awakens from a dormant pod, following the guidance of AI, wielding a specialized water gun to explore the complex and hazardous underworld for resources, enhance equipment, and open the central elevator.

games.name: Possible One: Lunar Industries
games.summary: Possible One is the ultimate colony management game set in space, and the only space-related RTS game based on proven or very feasible technologies, avoiding sci-fi.

games.name: Mörk Borg Heresy Supreme
games.summary: Mörk Borg Heresy Supreme is a doom-metal action RPG set in the world of Mörk Borg. Wretched antiheroes explore a side-scrolling, semi-procedural grimdark fantasy world, searching for a way to prevent the apocalypse or make the suffering worse.

games.name: Codebreakers VR
games.summary: Codebreakers is a chaotic VR Action Shooter that takes place in a dystopian future where various organizations are fighting for control of the world order.As a breaker, you will have to infiltrate, defeat enemies and avoid security systems to extract data.

games.name: Voice of Belldona
games.summary: Voice of Belldona weaves a story of swords, magic, and sci-fi! The game features roguelike decks, turn-based combat, JRPG elements, and customizable builds. Choose a character and combat style, explore randomly generated maps, power up your team, crush your enemies and... interact with a cute loli?

games.name: Exil
games.summary: A Mystical Anime-Inspired Metroidvania. Embark on an adventure through a mystical world full of magical creatures.

games.name: Söldner-X Complete Collection
games.summary: The Söldner-X Complete Collection is a compilation of two critically acclaimed shoot'em up games in one collection.

games.name: Pao Pao
games.summary: Pao Pao is a wild mix of culinary diving and animal madness—where you become the ultimate restaurant boss and management guru! Gather ingredients, go fishing, and expand your spot solo or with friends. Every order turns into an epic adventure… Jump in and experience it for yourself!

games.name: Moonsigil Atlas
games.summary: The deckbuilding roguelike with no energy – play cards using physical space! Slot cards together, manipulate the shape of your cards, and create overpowered combos to break the game!

games.name: Operatives: Revolve
games.summary: A cinematic roguelike deckbuilder where your cards are physically activated "Machines". Enemies can strike, pierce, or bomb them to pieces. Install multiple components to modify your cards, and set off cascading chain reactions to destroy your enemies.

games.name: Smash It Wild
games.summary: Smash It Wild is a tactical turn-based game combining volleyball and dodgeball in a fantasy universe. Upgrade your players and defeat your opponents in an intense roguelike competition!

games.name: Panzer Strike
games.summary: Authentic RTS gameplay straight out of the 2000s. Command your troops, develop strategies, and win World War II battles. Huge maps, thousands of units, long-range firepower, and no building mechanics!

games.name: Adventurers Guild Inc.
games.summary: Adventurers Guild Inc. is a turn-based management game where you run the business behind the heroics! Hire staff, post quests, and fulfill adventurers' needs (while taking a cut). Manage your budget, grow your reputation, watch adventurers scramble and build the greatest guild of all!

games.name: Workaholic Simulator: Leaving the Dream
games.summary: NOT your typical simulator! Is it your dream job or are you just working in your dream? Work fast, or face the consequences. Workaholic Simulator: Leaving the Dream is a surreal and dark descent into human psyche, burnout and the horror of the working culture.

games.name: Net Raiders
games.summary: Net Raiders is a single-player game that combines RPG, deck-building, and roguelike elements. In order to survive the dangers of the ruined virtual world, you must synthesize the cards in your hand to find the best move and defeat the enemies you encounter!

games.name: Abashed
games.summary: Abashed is a 2.5D narrative-driven side-scrolling game that lets you explore the life of Issac, a man living with psychosis. One day waking up all alone, he sets out to find the truth behind his missing partner. On the way he finds himself needing to confront his deepest fears and the darkest secrets. Join Issac in this story of love, loss, fear, and acceptance. Reality is not what it seems.

games.name: Indoor Baseball
games.summary:
The highly anticipated follow up to Indoor Kickball!

Indoor Baseball is BIGGER, better, and even more destructive!

Indoor Baseball is a 1v1 baseball game played in the rooms of your house! Play in a goofy story mode to work your way up to make the school baseball team. Play a 14 game randomly generated season mode, or quick play 1v1 in a local multiplayer match against a friend or CPU.

games.name: Retro Game Store Simulator
games.summary: Build your own Video Game Store in 1984. Everyday until the end of 1989 gives you the opportunity to stock shelves, cycle your inventory, manage your prices, analyze historical trends to make your game store profitable. Use era-relevant technology and systems to prove that gaming has a future!

games.name: Festered
games.summary: Brave the terrors of a contaminated research facility, where every step could be your last. PSX style survival horror game.

games.name: Grex
games.summary: Play as a Swarm in GREX, a fast-paced incremental auto-shooter. Our body is our weapon. We die to evolve. We evolve to become The Monolith. WE ARE ONE. WE INVADE. THEY DIE.

games.name: Baptiste
games.summary:
Submerge yourself in a first-hand experience that will make you feel each chill as if it were real. The line between the game and reality blurs further with each step you take.

Explore a mansion where horror awaits in every shadow. The masterful dubbing and sound track will drag you to the depths of a nightmare. Darkness will become your most feared enemy, putting your bravery to the test in each corner.

Play as Tom, a young man still suffering from the tragedy. After the loss of his father, he accompanies his mother Sara on what ought to be a new beginning. However, the ghosts of the past threaten to consume him. Can you keep control against the siege of his inner demons?

Disentangle the gruesome secrets that impregnate each floorboard and each crack on the walls. Each discovery will reveal a story of pain and horror that beggars belief.

Submerge yourself into a world where beauty and terror coexist in a macabre dance. The visual design will transport you to a kingdom where the grotesque is fascinating.

Each objective, each note and each whisper contribute towards weaving the plot. Your perseverance in the face of fear will be rewarded with chilling revelations that will keep you on edge until the very end.

games.name: The Pet Squad
games.summary:
The Pet Squad is a 2D strategy and puzzle game with pixel art aesthetics, mainly inspired by Lemmings, that puts you in the role of a support operator.

The game is set in the not-too-distant future, where humans have managed to artificially evolve animals. The pet squad S.L.U. is an organization responsible for maintaining order between humans and the evolved animals, known as Animanos.

As an operator, you will have to support your squad at all times, guide them along the correct path, and protect them from enemies or themselves. To achieve this, you will have access to the most advanced technology, allowing you to teleport objects and even slow down time.

games.name: Last Drop
games.summary: Last Drop is a story you need to experience. Welcome to Nykylä Finland 1994. Seppo Sahtivaara and friends are waiting for you. This is an openworld action game with a story that has an impact. We bring back old good games and action from the best movies from that era. We want you to enjoy!

games.name: Intermundia: Dungeons, Polygons & Magic
games.summary: Intermundia: Dungeons, Polygons & Magic is an RPG with a deep turn-based combat system and a story filled with multiple choices and endings. Let yourself be carried away by this epic adventure: plan your moves, choose your destiny and be prepared to face the consequences!

games.name: Ahapika: Heroic Agency
games.summary: Gather brave heroes and open the most heroic agency in Ancient Greece! Help people, argue with the gods, but remember: a mistake can be fatal.

games.name: Gemmy's Adventure
games.summary: Simple but not easy! Gemmy's Adventure is a casual action game. All you need to do is move a mouse to reach the finish line without touching any traps, objects and walls. Levels get harder, requiring strategy to pass.

games.name: TouHou Koishi's Enchanted Woods
games.summary: 「TouHou Koishi's Enchanted Woods」 is a Touhou fangame.This is a "reverse-construction" action rogue-lite.Koishi vs. Kokoro! But as the playable character, Koishi uses various enhancement cards to continuously strengthen Kokoro. Can she ultimately defeat the Kokoro she has built up herself?

games.name: Settler's Domain
games.summary: Settler's Domain is a settlement-building game with citizen and resource management elements. Build structures, recruit settlers, gather resources, and explore your surroundings.

games.name: Hats and Guns
games.summary: Become a cardslinger in this roguelike deckbuilder with tactical elements. Fight, gather weapons and items, face unexpected events and upgrade your cards for hundreds of possibilities. Every run is unique and so are you, the best shot of the Far West looking for your upcoming revenge.

games.name: Exoshock
games.summary: Exoshock is a cooperative sci-fi PvE shooter that redefines VR combat with intense firefights, squad tactics, and dynamic battlefields.

games.name: Kingdom Loop
games.summary: Kingdom Loop is a strategic roguelike autobattler focused on building your army and kingdom. Explore many tile combinations, items, and units in search of the perfect setup to beat the Ancient Kings!

games.name: Ghost Sector
games.summary: Ghost Sector is a survival horror game where you play as M-07, a prototype machine trapped in a cybernetic facility during lockdown. Outwit the automated defenses, search for answers to your origin uncovering secrets, solving puzzles, and upgrade your abilities while preserving your finite energy.

games.name: Ramen Shop Simulator
games.summary: Take control of your very own Ramen Shop! Transform a cozy, worn-out Japanese alley back into a vibrant hotspot. From scrubbing floors to cooking the perfect bowl of ramen. Decorate every corner, upgrade everything, and create your unique restaurant. The aroma of success is just a bowl away!

games.name: AstroScaper
games.summary: A minimalist puzzle city-builder where every placement counts. Build colonies on asteroids using strategic proximity-based mechanics and minimal resource management. Relax in freebuild mode or chase high scores in challenge mode – all against a serene cosmic backdrop.

games.name: Dwarf Legacy
games.summary: A challenging bullet-hell precision platformer. Climb up vertical dungeons of The Mountainhome, battling relentless swarms of enemies and navigating perilous traps. Uncover the secret of your lost legacy hidden atop the highest peak and secure the future of your village.

games.name: Wizard Hand
games.summary: A magical deckbuilder game where solitaire meets roguelike. Uncover dazzling combos and accumulate points with the help of enchantments, crafting, and a collection of powerful artifacts.

games.name: Fantasy World Manager
games.summary: Build a massive-scale MMO-themed fantasy world where you design all creatures, objects, quests, events and dungeons. Watch the inhabitants of your world embark on their adventures.

games.name: Scavland
games.summary: Scavland is a hardcore, top-down pixel art survival game set in a Post-Apocalyptic Soviet Era. Explore a world ravaged by war and the deadly Mist, scavenging for resources, taking risky jobs, and seeking refuge in harsh settlements. The wasteland is relentless—everything is out to kill you.

games.name: Prize Denied
games.summary: Prize Denied! Manage a claw machine arcade in this cozy management sim. Build challenging claw machines and play surprising cards to stop players from getting a prize! Earn money to unlock new arcades, collect cards, upgrade machines, and become the best arcade in the...UNIVERSE!

games.name: Cybervoid
games.summary: Cybervoid is a sci-fi story-rich choice-driven adventure. Sent on a mysterious mission, will you follow orders or forge your own path? Manage your time and energy wisely exploring a city on the edge of salvation or ruin and in doing so, ultimately discover your connection to this city and its fate.

games.name: Ludaro
games.summary:
Ludaro is a Roguelike Deck-building dice game with a unique twist on Ludo!

Plan your moves, manipulate dice rolls, and unleash powerful Spirit Cards to beat the score. Upgrade tiles, collect quirky pets and stack wild combos as you battle in epic boss fights with game-changing modifiers.

games.name: Plentiful
games.summary: Stack stones to shape the world. A relaxing game about harnessing nature.

games.name: Eternal Palace Sakura
games.summary: "Eternal Palace Sakura" is a rogue-lite 3D action game where you power up your character and take on thrilling dungeon challenges packed with flashy combat. Step into the shoes of Retla, a brown-skinned, cat-eared dual-wielder, and explore the ever-shifting dream labyrinth!

games.name: Clawed
games.summary: Embark on a covert mission to the dinosaur theme park Prehistoria, where you must explore the park's grounds to scavenge resources, solve puzzles, and fight your way through diverse biomes, underground tunnels and deadly enclosures. But beware, you are not the apex predator here.

games.name: Severed Love
games.summary: You have lost both your legs and arms and you can’t remember anything... The Limb-Severing Devil's Confinement and Devotion. Your only way to survive...

games.name: The Blue Cut Hook
games.summary: The Blue Cut Hook blends cozy tavern management with subtle adventure. You're no hero, just a humble tavern keeper, but your food, gear, and advice quietly shape the adventurers who pass through. They make the choices, take the glory, and face the danger, but your influence might keeps them alive.

games.name: Noir Total: Deadly Party
games.summary: Noir Total is a 2D local multiplayer PvP shooter set in darkened arenas. Sneak through total darkness using your controller's vibrations, track down your enemies, collect bonuses and set traps to stay one step ahead of your opponents in fast-paced, competitive matches for up to 4 players.

games.name: Luminescence
games.summary: Illuminate the path in this Parkour experience across the constellations of Space

games.name: LeMrosh in the Lazy Kingdom
games.summary:
LeMrosh in the Lazy Kingdom is a funny point-and-click adventure game set in a medieval kingdom where nothing is as it seems. What starts out as a simple quest quickly turns into a tangle of puzzles, strange items and quirky characters. Explore, combine, question - just don't get more involved than necessary!

Get ready for hours of fun, unexpected twists and turns... and a little love story.

games.name: Chained Beasts
games.summary: Chained Beasts is a 1-4 player co-op gladiator roguelite. Fight chaotic battles in the Colosseum while chained to your friends. Brave physical and mental injuries that change how you play. Entertain the blood-thirsty crowd by unleashing your inner beast.

games.name: Bushcraft Survival
games.summary: Bushcraft Survival is an open-world, procedural survival game where you are pitted against the brutalities of nature. It features rogue-lite elements, with permanent skill tree progression. Use your tools and your knowledge to survive in Canada's unforgiving northern wilderness!

games.name: Kungfu 2
games.summary: This is a fast-paced survivor game. Players will play as martial artists with special skills, and challenge 30 levels in a 30-second violent battle. Each character has its own characteristics, and with a variety of martial arts and props, activate the power of bondage and challenge the final BOSS!

games.name: Ashes of Morgravia
games.summary: Ashes of Morgravia is a dark fantasy tactical deckbuilder where you move, strike, and adapt using dual decks to survive against necrotic horrors. Uncover lost divine secrets and fight for survival in a world swallowed by eternal night.

games.name: Papercraft Tactics
games.summary: In Papercraft Tactics, your backpack is your lifeline. Navigate branching paths, battle fierce foes, and collect powerful items to craft the ultimate loadout. With a dark, hand-drawn style, every choice matters in this thrilling roguelite adventure. Will you survive?

games.name: Astro Combat
games.summary: This is an "Arcade-style Beat 'em Up" with "Real-time Tactics" and "Action RPG" elements. Choose to engage in a rampage or opt for stealth. After the main story, explore regions, collect items, battle foes, and develop your team.

games.name: Cloudy with a Chance of Kittens
games.summary: Cloudy with a Chance of Kittens is a cozy, Suika-inspired, puzzle game where adorable, dessert-shaped cats fall from the clouds. Unlock power-ups, set up satisfying chains and combos, brave obstacles and cheeky weather twists. Play to relax or compete to leave your pawprint on our leaderboards.

games.name: Snake Party Extreme
games.summary: The best Snake game ever made. A chaotic, unforgettable, laugh-out-loud 4-player couch battle. An intense test of your arcade gaming skills. Snake Party Extreme is all of these...and so, so much more!

games.name: King's Guard
games.summary: In this turn-based strategy roguelike your job is to keep an ungrateful king alive. As the royal guard's manager you unlock upgrades, assign badges for special skills and try to keep morale and supplies from collapsing faster than the monarchy.

games.name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Empire City
games.summary: A brotherhood in the shadows. A city on the brink. In the vacuum left by Shredder's demise, the Foot Clan's grip tightens on the streets you once called home. In the first-ever TMNT first-person action adventure VR game - forge your own chapter, solo or in co-op with up to three friends. Coming 2026

games.name: Swarm Hunter
games.summary:
1985. An Alternate Universe. A Forgotten World Calls for Help.

The International Space Agency (ISA) has just intercepted a desperate, system-wide distress signal from the long-isolated inhabitants of Pluto. In a race against time, the nearby vessel Empress of Discovery is dispatched to respond…but moments after making orbit, the ship’s final transmission crackles through the void: a garbled, static-soaked mayday… then silence.

Now, all eyes turn to you.

Assume the role of Master Commander Lance Johnson, captain of the legendary Gilded Seeker.

Your mission: investigate the Plutonian distress call, uncover the fate of the Empress and its crew, and confront whatever terror has awakened on the planet’s surface. Can you stop the unknown menace before it spreads beyond Pluto’s orbit?

games.name: Mailbound
games.summary: The dead linger in the CRT glow, their wails rippling through the screen like disembodied echoes. And now… you’re drifting with them...

games.name: Yokai Art 2: Tales of the Nine-Tails
games.summary: After defeating Fujin and Raijin, Hiro and his allies found peace at his grandfather’s house. One day, Sanbi sensed a distant summon. After tracing the energy, they discovered it came from her true form—the nine-tailed fox. Determined to help, Hiro and his friends set off on a new journey.

games.name: Akuma's Bloodrain
games.summary: Blow up hordes of akumas/yokais that are attacking this small japanese village. Shoot, slash, dash, and climb your way through the end of this battle!

games.name: Under Kingdom: Scam Centre Simulator
games.summary: Run your own scam centre and pay off your debt. Expand your business by recruiting workers through shady means. Bribe the police, trade with others, and use every strategy to survive in this city. Will you rise to power or fall under the pressure? The choice is yours.

games.name: Beatdown City Survivors
games.summary: Punch a car so hard it EXPLODES! Dash through flaming gas to create a fire trail burning everything. Destroy a hydrant to douse out the fire. Beatdown City Survivors is an immersive sandbox meets survive-em-up with dynamic environments & outrageous lite weapon crafting & team building.

games.name: U-Boot: The Board Game - Digital Edition
games.summary: A digital version of the iconic U-BOOT The Board Game. Manage the crew of a powerful warship during World War II. Explore enemy territory, win battles using the strength of a steel giant and reliable tactics, and most importantly - overcome the blue abyss.

games.name: Transpawt Train
games.summary: Real-time strategy simulation where you become the first railroad designer in the Paw-City! Draw railroad lines between towns and start running your trains. Design railroads for your cute animal residents and grow your Paw_City with efficient routes.

games.name: Alchemist: Journey of the Soul
games.summary: First-person adventure game, playable solo or co-op with up to 4 people. Travel through unique areas, uncover memories and use them to craft powerful potions. Unlock special abilities and solve puzzles in a mysterious world. Will your soul survive this journey?

games.name: Backframes: Escape Together
games.summary: Backframes: Escape Together is a cooperative horror game for 1–4 players. Explore dark levels, solve dangerous puzzles, and escape from sinister entities. Use your voice to interact with objects, uncovering unexpected paths to survival.

games.name: Kick and Hide
games.summary: A nostalgic multiplayer action game inspired by children's outdoors game, kick the can.

games.name: Game
games.summary: A journey through the life of a champion player of a cryptic and bizarre sport. The dialogue choices you make will determine the path your life takes, and the ultimate conclusion to your story.

games.name: Survivesmith
games.summary: Reverse bullet-hell game with a crafting twist. Shoot hails of bullets, missiles, nails, lasers and whatever is at your disposal at your enemies and make tactical choices to overcome all obstacles. You are here to find and extract the 'Life Essence', and you're not leaving without it!

games.name: Doomclock
games.summary: Doomclock is a roguelite, top-down arena shooter with deckbuilding elements. Bathe in blood of the damned, unlock new cards, and craft your deck of heavenly and hellish powers to survive the apocalypse. Be quick or be dead — there’s no time to rest.

games.name: Deeper You Go
games.summary: You control a camera that goes down into a deep hole. More horrors you'll face, the deeper you go.

games.name: Lustra: Lachea’s Tale
games.summary:
LUSTRA: Lachea’s Tale is a story-rich RPG that combines real-time spellcasting, exploration, and settlement building, set in a fractured floating island realm where ancient magic and mystery intertwine.

Play as Lachea, a young mage shaped by the world around her, learning to lead, grow, and take control of her path in a land suspended between ruin and renewal.
