Lustra invites players to see the world through multiple perspectives, to reflect on morality, empathy, and responsibility, and to shape not just the outcome of a magical world, but the kind of person Lachea becomes along the way.

games.name: Shock
games.summary: In SHOCK, you play as a disabled war veteran, hunted by a cybernetic creature. With only a wheelchair for mobility, use stealth, solve puzzles, and crawl into tight spaces to escape. Survive the horror and uncover the truth behind this nightmare.

games.name: Together in Forgotten Lands
games.summary: Two souls, one destiny. Embark on a co-op adventure through a forgotten land, where teamwork and wit are the only way to navigate the wonders and dangers of a magical cave.

games.name: Legion Was Here
games.summary: You are Legion, a secret agent who can change his appearance at will. Use your investigative and chameleon skills to infiltrate enemy ranks!

games.name: Deep Pixel Melancholy
games.summary: Deep Pixel Melancholy is a visual novel about being stuck in a time loop inside a gray, soulless city. Unravel the mystery, and decide whether escaping is really worth it.

games.name: Five Heads
games.summary: Five prisoners each have a visible-to-others card on their forehead. Across three rounds, they logically deduce and rank their cards from lowest to highest. On the final round, each guesses their exact card, using every prior guess as a clue. A single mistake can doom them—can you solve it?

games.name: PayGame
games.summary: 《PayGame》is a black-and-white hand-drawn dungeon exploration game.You must race against time through randomly generated rooms, combining items and bills to pay massive amounts of money in order to stay alive.Each run offers a brand-new challenge and a completely different experience

games.name: Inferno Pathways
games.summary: Descend into the abandoned metro in Inferno Pathways, a first-person psychological horror game. Navigate dark tunnels, solve puzzles, and uncover sinister secrets. Confront your deepest fears and piece together the haunting story of Mike Collins. Can you escape the darkness?

games.name: Dracs After Dusk
games.summary: "Dracs After Dusk" is an arcade, top-down shooter. Blast through bloodsuckers as the sharp shootin’ sheriff of a wild west town. Battle the deadliest bosses, claim weapons from the Armory to fuel your leaderboard topping run. It's an old school quarter muncher but luckily you have unlimited credits!

games.name: My Lil Afterlife
games.summary: Become the new ruler of the afterlife. Summon spooky friends to reside in your unearthly realm and decorate it however you like with items you can craft, buy and find. Unravel the mysteries of the afterlife by taking on the reapers tower using spine-tingling spells to smite your enemies.

games.name: Sandloop
games.summary: Help Hura save her village from invaders by exploring the intricate lands of Iman and gaining ancient skills that will enhance her mobility!

games.name: PhiloDeka
games.summary: In a serene, immersive world, strategically craft your path to turn every multiple of 10 into a rewarding harvest. Unlock the powerful interplay of numbers and strategy, and savor the satisfaction of perfect alignment and numerical zen.

games.name: Falling Thingies
games.summary: Gameplay you simply won't be able to put down! The thingies keep fallin' and the thangies keep callin'. Uncover limitless difficulty scaling and tons of variety!

games.name: Sea of Souls
games.summary: Discover the secrets of the cycle of reincarnation in Sea of Souls! A Turn-Based RPG with various Metroidvania elements to help you explore the world.

games.name: Hello Space
games.summary: Dive into a 2D action game where you control a spaceship, defeat enemies and overcome deadly traps. Extend your arsenal by collecting new weapons and technologies for your ship that you will need to conquer four different dungeon-like worlds, all connected by an open space full of surprises.

games.name: Dawn Break
games.summary: In 2039, tsunamis of varying degrees occurred all over the world, and multiple small black holes inexplicably appeared in the sky, ruthlessly devouring the world. At first, scientists believed that this phenomenon was a common natural disaster, until one day, a test report shocked the world.

games.name: The Wondrous Wedding of Ivan the Bard
games.summary: A romantic fairy tale set in a fantasy medieval Rus'. Play as Ivan, a young bard with a gusli in hand, on a quest to win the love of the elusive Novgorod princess. Learn tunes, make choices!

games.name: Lecture Me Later
games.summary: Just having a pleasant chat with one of the most popular guys in the University. Nothing weird about that, right? So why is he kinda... different than you've imagined?

games.name: Ghouls & Guardians
games.summary: Ghouls & Guardians is a tower defense and strategy game with roguelite elements. Build and manage your defenses, gather resources, and fend off relentless night creatures. Each playthrough encourages creative tactics and offers a fresh, challenging experience.

games.name: Farewell, We See Each Other for the Last Time.....
games.summary: A dramatic visual novel about the search for the meaning of life.

games.name: Cubic Blitz
games.summary: Cubic Blitz is an isometric puzzle game where you control a cube and solve loads of hand-crafted levels. With the power of paint, sponges, and much more, your task is simple: PAINT THE WORLD.

games.name: Bosslife Office Manager
games.summary: Set up your own office. Expand your office as you wish. Transform from a small office to a large company.Don't forget to make your employees happy too.

games.name: No More Grudges
games.summary: Step into a shattered world where every bullet tells a story. No More Grudges is a visceral 3D top-down shooter that marries razor-sharp gunplay with a gripping, shadow-soaked narrative.

games.name: Cameraman: The Pilot Episode
games.summary: Cameraman: The Pilot Episode is a psychological horror game. Manipulate time and gravity to solve puzzles in ever-changing, twisted spaces. With only a VHS camcorder, uncover dark secrets, face unseen anomalies, and navigate an uncharted dimension where reality unravels.

games.name: Capybara Hot Tub
games.summary: Become an internet star in Capybara Hot Tub by playing as a cute, fluffy streamer! Soak in a hot bath, groom your fur, and set up your studio around the capybara to gain fame!

games.name: Sunberry Care Center
games.summary: An analog horror adventure where you work as a staff member at the uncanny facility named Sunberry Care Center, which is dedicated to the treatment of a mysterious disease called Sunberry Syndrome.

games.name: Mushroom Hunter Simulator
games.summary: A relaxing mushroom-foraging simulator. Explore the forest, discover rare mushrooms, appraise their worth, then dry or pickle your finds. Enjoy enchanting nature and relax far from the bustle of the city.

games.name: Wandering Souls
games.summary: "Wandering Souls" is a visual novel game set in modern China. It tells a touching story about love, sacrifice, and repentance. Through delicate narrative and profound character creation, it brings players an immersive audio-visual experience.

games.name: Corbaci: A Cozy Cinematic Horror
games.summary: Run a cozy little soup shop haunted by unsettling stories. In Corbaci: A Cozy Cinematic Horror, uncover hidden mysteries and unlock every secret recipe. Serve the right soup from the Super Soup 2000.

games.name: Ravenridge
games.summary: You are being watched. Tested. In RAVENRIDGE, uncover the truth behind a forgotten prison as detective Ethan Ward. What begins as an investigation soon leads deep into your own mind. Are you in control, or just another subject?

games.name: Black Paradox Reloaded
games.summary: Experience chaos in this remastered, hyper-stylized roguelite. As bounty hunter Black Paradox, travel through space to defeat the Hellraisers – now with enhanced pixel art, rebalanced gameplay, new synthwave tracks, and an intense boss rush mode.

games.name: Navinosuke: The Yo-kai Buster
games.summary:
A long-lost 2D pixel art RPG returns across time.
Originally completed two decades ago but never released, this hidden gem is now being faithfully rebuilt by KOHACHI STUDIO for Nintendo Switch.
Set in ancient Japan, you play as Navinosuke, a young onmyoji-in-training, meeting and battling over 150 unique yokai.
Plan your tactics using turn-based auto battles and a shikigami system, and explore a whimsical, strategy-driven Japanese fantasy world.

games.name: Wasteland Bites
games.summary: Wasteland Bites is a horror-based food truck sim. Cooking up questionable cuisine in your post-apocalyptic food truck is tough. Fending off mutants, UFOs, rabid dogs, and things lurking in the dark? That's the real challenge. A chaotic mix of cooking and survival in a long gone world.

games.name: Magician Impossible
games.summary: A first-person, spell-casting, adventure about a second rate, self taught magician who's on an impossible mission. Draw shapes with your wand to cast spells, solve puzzles, swing over chasms, and steal anything that isn't nailed down!

games.name: Voodoo Fishin'
games.summary: Voodoo Fishin is an online co-op horror game featuring fishing, proximity voice, and scary monsters. You and up to 3 friends can venture into the swamp to find the best fishing spots holding the rarest fish. BEWARE: Die along the way, and you will lose your catch!

games.name: InOut
games.summary: A minimalist puzzle platformer where each level is more than they seem. Change your perspective on levels to discover new areas. Explore the world to unearth its hidden secrets.

games.name: Order: The New Dawn
games.summary: Order: The New Dawn is a colony sim with space adventure. As a legendary captain from the United Stellar, build a base on the desert planet New Terra and face the perils of the Wastespace—how will you shape the destiny of the stars?

games.name: Nezori
games.summary: Embark on a cute action RPG adventure as a fox girl searching for the legendary hot springs in a land of fox and wolf girls!

games.name: Dicey Hacker 1999
games.summary: 《Dice Hacker 1999》 blends idle gameplay with dice strategy in a cyberpunk roguelite. As a hacker in a post-1999 parallel world, gather resources, hack programs, manipulate probabilities via bizarre devices. Each dice rewrites reality's code, every roll destabilizes the digital abyss.

games.name: Packed Lair
games.summary: Villainous base-builder mixed with inventory management auto-battler roguelike! Draft buildings, pack them carefully into your cramped lair to create powerful synergies and send your army of minions to deal with the endless hero problem. Why won’t they just leave you alone?

games.name: Cry Pic.
games.summary: This is a 2D action shooting game that focuses on fighting large enemies (bosses).

games.name: Hookah Simulator
games.summary: Start with a small cozy hookah lounge and turn it into the most popular spot in the city! Your goal is to craft perfect hookahs, satisfying even the most demanding customers.

games.name: Iron Dice
games.summary: The empire has fallen. Will you reunite its factions or forge your own path? Iron Dice is an open-ended grand strategy game set in a fictional, early medieval world. Outmaneuver and outwit your neighboring kingdoms as you develop your economy, research new technologies, and conquer territory.

games.name: Over the Moon
games.summary: The final game in The Rose Garden Trilogy. Can you convince Moon to come home, or will her anger towards you be ever resolute?

games.name: Birdoo
games.summary: Birdoo is an indie action game were you take control of a bird on his quest for revenge against the humans that mistreated him. For too long have you been called a flying rat and shooed away. It's time to take revenge!

games.name: Latitude 76: Land of the Onkilons
games.summary:
Latitude 76: Land of the Onkilons is an action-adventure game inspired by the true story of the 1900-1902 polar expedition. It tells the story of brave explorers who decide to prove the legend of the phantom island in the Arctic Ocean.

Switch between characters, use your grappling hook to explore a phantom island, home to mammoths. Face threats from hunters and choose to play stealthily or confront the dangers head-on. Inspired by real events.

games.name: Land of Glarefall
games.summary: An action-adventure survival game where every night could be your last. Explore a vast, dangerous world where survival depends on smart resource management, tactical combat, and what you choose to do before night falls.

games.name: Nothing Strange Here
games.summary:
Nothing Strange Here is a single-player open-world adventure game with mystery and slice-of-life elements. Set in the small town of Larcenest Gap, players take on the role of a reporter exploring the community, documenting strange events, and interacting with townsfolk.

The game combines narrative discovery with photography and journaling mechanics. Players can photograph scenes, collect evidence, and publish their findings in a customizable in-game journal. NPCs follow daily routines, and the world changes based on the player's actions and the time of day. Additional features include hidden collectibles, such as stickers and gnomes, and dynamic events that encourage exploration and investigation.

games.name: Stabjack
games.summary: A combination of Roguelike Deckbuilder and comic noir tragedy. Stabjack plunges you into a dark, gritty, demon-infested world, with gameplay that builds on the familiar concepts of Blackjack. Can a talking knife help you solve your wife’s murder, or is this just the beginning of your descent into madness?

games.name: Death and Tactics
games.summary: A post apocalyptic turn-based strategy game. Permanent death is a primary mechanic, with unique events and items being unlocked based on how you play the game. Your choices matter and each loss reveals new strategic opportunity, cutting down on time wasted spent grinding or resetting.

games.name: Grow a Girlfriend
games.summary: You accidentally grew a mushroom girl! Overcome your social anxiety to help her live her brief life to the fullest! Or… don't ;)

games.name: Stellar Freight: Echoes of the Void
games.summary: Take command of a freight ship traveling through deep space. Every jump brings danger, every decision matters. Manage your crew, upgrade your ship, trade, fight, and survive in a hostile galaxy where resources are scarce and every day could be your last.

games.name: Dreadcore: Locked Unit
games.summary: A first-person psychological horror game focused on exploration, puzzle-solving, and environmental storytelling. Discover the tragic story of Unit 199, where a fragmented consciousness still haunts the place.

games.name: Treeplanter
games.summary:
Create and enjoy a peaceful, interactive woodland throughout the changing seasons.
For every copy sold, we plant a real tree! 

Welcome to Treeplanter, an interactive woodland that grows and changes with the seasons. Piece together a small grove of trees, branch by branch, and watch as their roots blossom under the soil!

As time goes by, an ecosystem of animals, plants and birds will move in, turning your creation into a living world. Changing seasons and weather will affect the miniature universe of your grove.

Build your grove in a variety of landscapes, from sunny meadows to ancient ruins. Combining meditation and education, Treeplanter aims to teach players about the interconnected wonders of the natural world, above and below ground.

Each copy of the game sold helps Henry plant trees, wildflowers, meadows and community orchards, through partnerships with schools, farms, communities and woodland charities. Meaning you’ll help restore real-life nature too!!

games.name: Void Authority
games.summary: A sci-fi roguelike document-inspection game where you approve or deny alien travelers, scan for contraband, and navigate shifting galactic laws across border outposts, with each run shaping the future political climate.

games.name: Rhythm Animal Café
games.summary: Welcome to ​Rhythm Animal Café​! Animals' daily chaos meets funky beats: boss hype, colleague woes, your slacking, unfair blame—all become hilarious one-tap rhythm games! Simple controls, joyful groove. Feel music fuse with daily life’s warmth!

games.name: Jungle Jinx
games.summary: Set up camp deep in the jungle and begin your adventure! Explore lost ruins, collect artifacts, upgrade your gear, and grow your expedition. In Jungle Jinx, choose your path: dodge deadly traps, fight enemies, or race through the jungle on wild karts!

games.name: Mystic Fishing: A Fantasy Fishing RPG
games.summary: Travel through over 10 different biomes, catching over 90 different kinds of fish. Collect different rods, level up, and try to fill your Fish Encyclopedia. Experience a story-rich narrative filled with a fun and unique cast while exploring a Lovecraftian-ridden sea.

games.name: Lux Leonarii: A Mechanical Puzzle Adventure
games.summary: A puzzle game revolving around guiding beams of light throughout an ancient structure using a multitude of mirrors and devices, ranging from simple A to B connection to multiple colours and complex interactions.

games.name: Mage Blast
games.summary: Forge arcane might in this semi-idle deckbuilder! Craft spells layer by layer—turn a simple fireball into a barrage of flaming meteors. Build a deck of modifiers to trigger explosive combos, explore ancient realms for rare resources, and stitch together magic unlike anything the world has seen.

games.name: Factory Town 2: Paradise
games.summary: A cozy city-builder where you craft and sell tropical items to keep villagers happy. Use conveyor belts, trains, zip lines, catapults, and boats to automate delivery, optimize production, and earn the favor of a giant sentient volcano.

games.name: Iconic
games.summary: Battle an army of merciless monster icons in this lane-based horde survival roguelite frenzy and put an end to their evil endeavors. By clicking.

games.name: LinkShift
games.summary: A abstract arcade-style puzzle game with roguelite elements in which you place Nodes on a grid to try and form big connection chains. Use Upgrades and Master Nodes to change the rules or break them.

games.name: Stock the Shelves
games.summary: A Frantic Store Management Sim. Create the best shop you can imagine, then make it better! Manage, Upgrade, Keep Customers Happy, but most importantly STOCK THOSE SHELVES!

games.name: Sabotrix
games.summary: Sabotrix – A New Kind of Trolling Game! Use cunning strategy, precise control, and a variety of skill combinations to sabotage your enemies' operations and bring down those who seek to corrupt the Matrix World!

games.name: Kioku: Last Summer
games.summary: Kioku: Last Summer is a cozy, story-driven adventure where you play as Asti, a young girl spending her first summer on the mysterious island of Kioku. Set in a hand-crafted world blending Scandinavian and Japanese influences, players explore, build friendships, play minigames, uncover secrets, and relive the magic of early 2000s childhood summers.

games.name: Vexcell
games.summary: Vexcell is an elegant, minimalist puzzle game. Embrace the satisfaction of everything falling into place.

games.name: Floatineer
games.summary: The game is set in a world where lands have vanished beneath the waves. Players experience life as floating engineers, using modular architectural blocks to rebuild shelters that can withstand various disasters and fulfill villagers' aesthetic requirements within a given time limit.

games.name: Feudal Craft
games.summary: Immerse yourself in an exciting medieval settlement simulator where you will have to fight for your place in the feudal hierarchy. Use a smart strategy to develop your settlement. After all, it is the skills and equipment of each peasant that can make the difference.

games.name: Rest in Paws
games.summary: Explore the touching story of Kebab, a rural cat, as she copes with grief following her passing from old age. Delve into her world and discover the story of her life, from her adoption by a loving family to the meaningful recollections that shaped her being.

games.name: Inner Voice
games.summary: Step into the world of "Inner Voice", where the silence is louder than screams. In this atmospheric horror experience you will uncover long-buried secrets as the story unfolds. Every creak and every whisper holds a part of this story. Are you ready to face this nightmare?

games.name: Game Store Chronicle
games.summary: Run your own game store! Stay ahead by following the timeline of gaming history and preparing for key events that has shaped the industry. Stock shelves, set prices, and sell consoles, games, and accessories. Strategize to grow your business and dominate the market!

games.name: Wavekin
games.summary: Wavekin is a narrative adventure and underwater exploration game where you dive into the depths to discover an ancient civilization. Observe, listen, and use your song to unravel the ocean’s mysteries and breathe new life into a world on the brink of silence.

games.name: Before the Silence
games.summary: In this turn-based strategy, you will take control of an anti-disinformation department and protect your citizens from terrorist influence. Manage your agents and resources, analyze media, and restore order in different regions of your country.

games.name: Croakspire
games.summary: Dive into a fortress labyrinth crawling with monsters, defending yourself with your... tongue? As a frog, it's your best bet to traverse this retro-inspired 2D metroidvania title. Collect treasures to gain permanent upgrades, discovering new areas of the massive interconnected map with them!

games.name: Mysteries of Old Tokyo
games.summary: Step into the Imperial Capital, where knowledge is your weapon. Research and explore 40+ real-life Tokyo locations, past and present. Encounter a cast of wandering spirits, interrogate their stories, and separate the truth from their lies.

games.name: Remembrance
games.summary: Step into the fractured mind of a dying scientist in Remembrance, a mind-bending VR puzzle adventure. Piece together broken memories, uncover devastating truths, and decide the fate of a world teetering on the edge of collapse. Will you save humanity?

games.name: Gallipoli
games.summary: Land on the battlefields of the Middle Eastern Front of World War 1! Gallipoli brings the most authentic WW1 FPS battles yet, with desert warfare, beach landings, historical classes and realistic weaponry.

games.name: Chickens Don't Fly
games.summary: In this tough-as-nails physics-platformer, swing to freedom as a rooster whose only hope of escaping a harsh pit of hopelessness lies in a pair of plungers and his own strength. Grapple your way to freedom, but be careful—one wrong move can send you back to the start.

games.name: Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes
games.summary: In Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes, take command of a fleet escaping the annihilation of the Twelve Colonies. Manage crises on board as you prepare for the next encounter with the Cylon Fleet. Times are dire, and hard choices must be made. Your only hope: rejoin the Battlestar Galactica.

games.name: Sherlock Holmes: Night Stalker
games.summary: “When you have eliminated all which is impossible, then whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth.” — Sherlock Holmes. This work is an immersive mystery and deduction game, powered by the latest large-scale AI model technology and offering a brand-new interactive experience.

games.name: Sky Legends: An Aeropostal Epic
games.summary: Play as the iconic pioneers of aviation and fly their legendary aircraft. Between human challenges and technical feats, cross the extreme landscapes of the Sahara, the Andes, or the Atlantic in an immersive, narrative, and historical virtual reality adventure.

games.name: Mega Drill: World Domination
games.summary: Run your mining empire to success and become the richest person in the world! Mega Drill is an action, management, upgrade game with a digging theme. Procedurally generated islands make every run different!

games.name: Heroes and Forsaken: The Official Wheel of Time Digital Card Game
games.summary: Heroes and Forsaken is the official Wheel of Time digital card game. Build decks under Leader identities, choose Light or Shadow, and face rivals in fast, tactical matches across the world of The Wheel of Time. Command legendary characters and spells, outplay your opponent, and shape the fate of the Age.

games.name: Frontline Logistics: Isarian Warfare
games.summary: A tactical survival and outpost management sim driven by dynamic battlefield events. War isn't just about combat—it’s about the daily lives of your soldiers. Keep logistics running, scavenge every usable resource, and do what you can to ease the harsh reality of life on the frontlines.

games.name: GameShop Simulator
games.summary: Run a GameShop set in the early 2000's. Manage your products for sale such as games, consoles, and accessories. Customize your store and your character to make it your own. Play solo or enjoy up to a 4 player co-op and run the store your way.

games.name: You Know The Drill
games.summary: You Know The Drill is a relaxing incremental mining game about digging underground to harvest ores. Collect resources, sell them, and upgrade your drill to go even deeper!

games.name: Touhou Unite Arena
games.summary: "Touhou Unite Arena" is a card Roguelike game based on the theme of the Touhou Project. Build your own team, combine the spell cards in your hand, play explosive attack values, defeat the target enemy step by step, and challenge the final champion!

games.name: Bonemarrow
games.summary: Bonemarrow is a short action survival horror in which you play a mutant creature created in a lab, destined to be used as a test subject. When the facility you were created in falls into disarray, you finally have your opportunity to escape. You may just make it out alive.

games.name: Dungeon Bodega Simulator
games.summary: Dungeon Bodega Simulator is a retro styled fantasy shop game where you can grow crops, brew potions, sell items and raise slimes as pets! Can you build up your bodega into a one stop adventuring shop while solving the mysteries of the dungeon beneath you?

games.name: Orebits
games.summary: Smash through alien rock with oversized mining gear, collect rare ores and uncover strange secrets. Orebits is a gritty sci-fi idle game full of mystery and metal.

games.name: Defense Collapse
games.summary: Defense Collapse is a strategy game set in a medieval fantasy world. Pioneer the unexplored dark forest, build your town and defenses, and hold out against the massive hordes of enemies. How long can you survive?

games.name: Bag of Dreams
games.summary: Bag of dreams is the cozy card-based Roguelike Dreambuilder you didn't know you needed. Can you piece together the perfect sleep, one fragment at a time?

games.name: Last Man Sitting
games.summary: A bunch of dudes sit in an office, all of them wearing black suits and white collared shirts. Everyone sits in the same lime green swivel chairs. For a video game, Last Man Sitting sounds really boring. Add shotguns and ragdoll physics, though, and you have a recipe for the only battle royale game left to make.

games.name: Little Nemo and the Guardians of Slumberland
games.summary: Explore a dream world as Little Nemo, armed with toys, candy, and stuffed animals in this colorful platforming metroidvania adventure.

games.name: Subliminal
games.summary: Subliminal is a psychological horror game inspired by the urban legend of The Backrooms. Bleeding-edge lighting and rendering, handcrafted open-ended levels, light and perspective-based puzzles, nostalgic spaces, unfamiliar faces, and a rotting feeling that something is not quite right.

games.name: Timeless Rain
games.summary: Explore this foreign world and use manipulate time to defeat any creature who dares to stand between you and your goal! Meet the inhabitants of this strange realm as they push you towards finding the Timeless Rain...

games.name: The Posthumous Investigation
games.summary: Travel to a noir Rio de Janeiro in 1937 and investigate the mystery behind the murder of Bras Cubas, the famed character created by Machado de Assis. Until the truth is out, you'll be trapped in a time loop, amidst a plot full of conspiracy and treason.

games.name: Saddle Up and Drive: El Contrabandista
games.summary: Saddle Up & Drive is a top down car game. Gotta hustle and rustle up some cash. Get involved in shady business with underground stills, land an honest job or race in the County Competition! Every day's a fresh start, and a new job awaits ya!

games.name: Cooking Simulator 2: Better Together
games.summary: Cooking Simulator is back – bigger, better, and with optional multiplayer! Create your own recipes and take advantage of new and improved controls to become the best restaurant cook in the city! Or just have fun and enjoy cooking at your own pace. You’re the chef here!

games.name: Grime II
games.summary: Become the stealer of forms in GRIME II, a surreal action-adventure metroidvania. launch tendrils made of hands to absorb foes and summon molds in their shape, as you explore a bizarre lived-in-world obsessed with art.

games.name: Crown of Greed
games.summary: Ascend to the throne of Rodovia - a mystical realm inspired by Slavic mythology. Engage in an unusual, indirect management system in which you can't issue direct orders and must skillfully bend your subjects and heroes to your will. Perfect your ruling skills to build, expand and secure your legacy.

games.name: Lilac: Side Witch
games.summary: Visual novel adaptation of the stage play by Project Ricoro about an interspecies academy story between mages and humans that depicts the “ordinary” within the “extraordinary.” Side Witch is the version with an all-female cast.

games.name: Legends of the Round Table
games.summary: Lead the Knights of the Round Table through King Arthur's legend in a unique RPG, full of honor, magic and romance. Plunge into a colorful world inspired by medieval art, tales and music. Undertake perilous quests and fiercely defend your kingdom to make the flower of chivalry blossom again.

games.name: Tombwater
games.summary: Explore the accursed Wild West town of Tombwater and lay bare the eldritch horrors that lie beneath. Survive blood-spilling combat in this gruesome 2D action-RPG that might just drive you to madness.

games.name: Aether & Iron
games.summary: Immerse yourself in this narrative RPG set in an alternate 1930s where anti-gravitational technology has taken cars, roads, and even New York City into the sky. Muster a crew, master tactical, turn-based combat, and unravel the dark secrets lurking beneath the floating metropolis.

games.name: Fuel Me Up
games.summary: Fuel Me Up is a shoot ’em up roguelike game. Your ship’s fuel tank is leaking, and you must eliminate the aliens that have invaded planet Vorthex. Earn money by defeating enemy ships, buy upgrades and add-ons, unlock new ships and pilots, and try to get farther each run.

games.name: Raccoin: Coin Pusher Roguelike
games.summary: A coin-pushing dopamine machine. RACCOIN is a roguelike deckbuilder where you combine special coins with powerful items to trigger wildly satisfying combos. Stack shiny towers, spin the lucky wheel, and shake the machine until all the coins drop.

games.name: Operation Terra
games.summary: Lead mankind to its new Earth in this science fiction First Person Shooter/Role Playing Game. Grab your gear and fight through hordes of hideous robots, droids and machines. Loot credits and power ups. Complete missions to unlock permanent bonuses. With procedurally generated levels and maps.

games.name: Gobocore
games.summary: Roguelite Turn Based Auto-Battler about little goblins rescuing their kidnapped tribe members. Smash. Evolve. Survive.

games.name: Puzzle Spy International
games.summary: Pursue a ring of diamond thieves and their trail of cryptic puzzles in this ‘60s spy adventure. As Agent Epsilon you’ll choose your path as you chat with (or chat up!) suspicious contacts. Decode cryptograms, decipher clues and deduce answers as you solve wordplay & logic puzzles across the globe!

games.name: Buckle Up
games.summary: Buckle Up! is a chaotic 2–6 player party shooter where every round is a new mess. Battle friends across fast-paced gamemodes, upgrade weapons, fight to grab the most points, and show off your style with fun character customization.

games.name: Hozy
games.summary: Transform abandoned spaces into cozy havens in Hozy!

games.name: Sacrificio
games.summary: An intense and fast-paced survival horror shooter in a dark fantasy world. Face overwhelming odds in a brutal struggle against evil.

games.name: HyperTyper 2000
games.summary: Type, dodge, parry, and survive in HyperTyper 2000! A hybrid typing/bullet hell game where both halves of the action are nonstop! Test your typing skills with one hand and dodge with the other.

games.name: Cubin II
games.summary: Cubin II is a first-person puzzle-platformer game that re-immerses you in the LGA experience. Complete the story by solving these 50 new experiments to finally escape from this terrible place.

games.name: Quintillion Quest
games.summary: A fantasy-themed run-based active incremental game

games.name: Fate Architect
games.summary: Fate Architect is a roguelike deckbuilder where you build and modify symbols on a slot machine to earn points and shape your strategy. Each run offers new combinations, synergies, and challenges as you design the ultimate slot machine of fate.

games.name: Towerlings
games.summary: Watch autonomous adventurers climb a 100-floor tower while you guide their fate through strategic intervention. No direct control — only decisions. Choose when to summon, strengthen, or protect, and decide whether to build an army or raise a few elite heroes.

games.name: Hong Huang Evolution
games.summary: A top-down lightweight Rogue-like survivor game where players take on the role of a beast capable of evolving multiple times to fend off hordes of enemies. Choose from various evolution paths, talents, and skills build, survive against all odds, and ultimately evolve into the ultimate life form.

games.name: Gear Slots
games.summary: Spin the wheels of weaponry to incrementally upgrade your gear while endless monsters are defeated by your idle attacks. Watch your hoard of coins grow and find new ways to spend them to tip the scales of luck in your favor.

games.name: Barking from the Dark
games.summary: Barking from the Dark is a first-person horror game about a lonely night shift worker at a remote railway crossing.

games.name: Baseball Scouter
games.summary: You awaken as the manager of the league's worst team, burdened by the disastrous legacy of your predecessor. Your only edge is a secret ability: to see the hidden baseball potential in anyone. Scout overlooked talent, rebuild the roster, and uncover the truth behind the team's ruin.

games.name: Legends of Wasteland
games.summary: Legends of Wastelands is an idle RPG where you shape your hero's growth. Choose among six classes, master 100+ skills, and combine talents and gems for unique synergies. Idle for rewards or dive into boss fights and shifting wastelands, with pets and gear adding endless build variety.

games.name: Shiny Recollection: First Step
games.summary: A doujin dating-sim set in the Idolmaster Shiny Colors universe, which will let you romance Meguru, Kogane, Juri, Rinze and Chiyuki.

games.name: Hyouhon Hako de Uka wo Matsu
games.summary: A romance between an unidentified human-plant and an human(?) girl, both of them trapped in a cage.

games.name: CyberPunk Sex Tower
games.summary: The world of the future, modern technologies make it possible to create a super realistic sexual experience ...

games.name: Farming Sweeper
games.summary: Build, manage and grow your farm in a unique way: Solving puzzles with traditional minesweeper mechanics and managing your business finances in a relaxing game with great replay factor.

games.name: The Host: Cataclysm
games.summary: After a Post-Armageddon event the world has gone back to its roots living in simpler times, back to swords, kings, and war. After the hero has chosen evil the world is left in ruins as everyone struggles to survive in this new found world.

games.name: Who Are You!?
games.summary: Who Are You!? is a sci-fi psychological horror experience based on real UFO research. The story centers on Ray Roswell and his internal fight to understand the disappearance of his wife, which may involve an alien abduction.

games.name: The Wide Open Sky Is Running Out of Catfish
games.summary: A story-driven photography game... on the back of a giant, flying catfish. Transform clouds into sea creatures and bring abundance back to an empty sky.

games.name: Theralite
games.summary: A turn based Sci-fi Roguelike where players explore the deep mines on a distant planet, find/trade equipment, battle monsters and try to survive.

games.name: Somniora: Chapter 1
games.summary: Somniora is a horror-puzzle game. Get ready to delve into the adventure of our character, who is trapped amidst strange dreams, while searching for answers to the questions lurking in their subconscious.

games.name: Flora Corner
games.summary: Flora Corner is a cozy idle game about growing houseplants and decorating your living space.

games.name: Dictocracy
games.summary: Take charge as the President of a newly independent country, Adelphia. Build infrastructure, approve policies, juggle between conflicting priorities of the public, your ministers and other countries' leaders - All with only one action per turn and a different political landscape in each playthrough

games.name: Infinite Cards
games.summary: Discover infinite cards in this roguelike deckbuilder. Every card is unique, every run a new experience. Craft, combine, and build your deck completely freely to defeat enemies and bosses, or take on cleverly designed puzzle challenges!

games.name: Don't Fall
games.summary: Will you manage to reach the summit? In this challenging 3D platformer, roll, jump, and climb through levels filled with obstacles and traps across diverse biomes. A precision challenge where every move counts as you navigate increasingly complex worlds.

games.name: Mega Man Star Force: Legacy Collection
games.summary: The Mega Man Star Force series, which expanded into an anime, is back in the Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection! This collection includes seven games and additional features like a gallery of illustrations and music! Online play is also supported!

games.name: The Cubes
games.summary: The Cubes is a colorful puzzle adventure where you control four unique cubes to solve spatial challenges. Switch between the cubes, activate buttons, overcome spikes, collect coins and solve puzzles in a relaxing yet brain-teasing experience.

games.name: Island of Hearts
games.summary: After a rough breakup, you do what any reasonable person would: run away to a remote tropical island full of beautiful strangers. There, you’ll meet six captivating women, each with her own charm, secrets, and questionable taste in men. Your choices decide who you love, lose, or accidentally ghost.

games.name: ChloroLink
games.summary: In ChloroLink, a cute and cozy management game, guide Lux the plant of life as she spreads her rootweave to connect charming plants. Use each plant’s growth pattern to explore, reinforce the links between plants, overcome gentle challenges, and help Lux bloom the world back to life!

games.name: Eastern Era
games.summary: To escape from pursuit, as the leader of your sect, guide your disciples to rise again! Engage in farming and hunting, train in martial arts, and forge weapons and armor. Build your sect's base and fortifications from the ground up to survive in this perilous, ambition-filled martial world!

games.name: Riruka ha Ikue ni Yoru wo Irodoru
games.summary:
"I have other personalities," said the girl on the night they first met.

Her eyes were serious, pointed at the self-professed detective Shiraishi Naoya, who lit a cigarette with a skeptical look on his face. Indeed, at first he didn't believe her - there couldn't exist many personalities within one body.

The overfamiliar and cheeky Nanase, with a penchant for overt physical intimacy.
The prudish but naive Senri, who gets easily flustered.
The calm and collected Kanna, who always keeps her composure.
And the one who Naoya met first - the pure and honest Riruka, who has a streak of shyness.

They met in the rain at night, and as if by fate, Naoya ended up bringing the "girls" home with him.

She's a girl with multiple souls, and each personality has a wish of her own - each wish so strong that a personality was born to fulfill it.

What awaits at the end, when all her wishes are fulfilled?

games.name: AI Limit: Eirene's Furnace of War
games.summary: Continue the story beyond the ending of AI LIMIT. After the fall of the Church, embark on a new journey into the Northern Parish. Step into the domain of Eirene, the Warfare Bishop, and face a new trial within the Furnace Arena, where long-forgotten myths of Havenswell rise once again.

games.name: Echoes Untold
games.summary: Echoes Untold is a wordless, space-brutalist adventure where a lone female traveler explores a realm shaped by time distortion, hidden timelines, and ancient philosophical atmosphere. Players unlock unique movement abilities, solve environmental puzzles, and uncover the truth behind the Void.

games.name: Forever With You
games.summary: Finding love isn't always easy. Within a limited time, manage your life and find someone you truly love.

games.name: Tasogare no Shape Shifter
games.summary:
“I’ll become your ideal girlfriend. So please, just give me one more chance.”

The one who appeared before Hiroto Takenouchi saying that was Chise Koumoto, his clingy ex-girlfriend whom he should have broken up with yesterday… or rather, something else wearing her form.
Calling herself Eiko, her true nature is that of a shapeshifter: a shadowy aberration that devours other beings and blends into human society by mimicking them.
Though she has taken Chise into herself, Eiko claims she hasn’t absorbed her completely, instead keeping her inside. She makes a demand:
“I don’t care if it’s only for a limited time. I want to live as your girlfriend. If you do that, I’ll safely release Chise.”

And so begins a temporary, make-believe romantic relationship born from that promise. Yet once they actually start dating, Eiko turns out to be even more in sync with him than Chise ever was.
Through his interactions with Eiko, Hiroto’s exhausted heart is soothed, and he begins to remember what it feels like to like someone, to feel fulfilled by it.

But precisely because of that, there will come a day when he must face it.
The truth that the girl before him is an inhuman being, living by principles different from those of humans.
And the fresh yet bitter memories that have shaped Hiroto into who he is…

games.name: Ama Nee: Osananajimi Onee-chan to no Echi Echi Amayakasare Dousei Seikatsu
Alastrius
games.summary: In this explosive on-the-rails shooter pilot powerful Star-Fighters and wage a vast interstellar war. Chart your own course across a galaxy of exotic sci-fi worlds as you carve a path to the Capital. Lay waste to hordes of enemy ships and bring down ruthless bosses. You are the Republics last hope!

games.name: Roof Leak Hero
games.summary: Keep things from flooding as long as possible and get the highest score! Throw your containers and make trick shots to land them directly where you need them to be. Dump excess water into the drain and advance to the next point level to get point multipliers and reach even crazier scores!

games.name: Chained Wheels
games.summary: Embark on a chaotic co-op drive in Chained Wheels, where two vehicles are chained together and every move turns into a shared adventure or a DISASTER.

games.name: Noneday
games.summary: Grab your notebook and get ready to explore every nook and cranny of the surreal, esoteric adventure game Noneday! Search dreams for clues, solve puzzles, and unlock the secrets hiding within Bow’s own mind.

games.name: Idle Demon Summoner
games.summary: A dark yet vibrant idle game featuring creature collecting, tower-defense, and bullet-heaven elements. Unlock new demons and weapons to conquer distant worlds.

games.name: Farming With Lasers
games.summary: Incinerate various pests with your giant laser, as you grow your farm. Purchase incremental upgrades to expedite the process.

games.name: Moving Day: Make It Home
games.summary: Turn empty houses into cozy homes at your own pace. Complete gentle client requests, unlock items for Sandbox Mode, and capture your finished designs in Camera Mode.

games.name: Don’t Turn off the Light
games.summary: Don't Turn Off the Light is a 5-player asymmetrical multiplayer horror game where one player becomes a demon lurking in the darkness. Survivors must rely on light, teamwork, and scavenged weapon parts to avoid possession, escape captivity, and fight back before it's too late.

games.name: Trushybin & Removin: What I Couldn’t Delete
games.summary: A cozy and emotive 3D platformer about two tiny PC icons who, with innocence and love, accompany their owner on a journey of emotional healing and memories.

games.name: Afterdepth
games.summary: Explore, build, and survive in the depths of a forgotten world. Manage oxygen, power, and resources as you uncover the secrets buried beneath the surface.

games.name: Anything Simulator
games.summary: A powerful 2D sandbox simulator — physics and magic, characters and animation. Create anything you can imagine!

games.name: My Egg Girls: A Gentle Story
games.summary: A 100-day cohabitation romance you’ll wish would never end. Your choices sway emotions, shaping reactions and the ending in this emotional growth ADV.

games.name: Princess of Worlds End
games.summary: A dark fantasy visual novel about a girl named Princess who, through a strange series of events, unlocks a new power that changes her life forever. Guide Princess to help her get her life together, manage her relationships, her addiction and, most importantly, prevent the end of the world!

games.name: Crispy Kart
games.summary: Crispy Kart is a pixel-style survivor-like game where players take the wheel of a kart made of cookies and desserts, battling through waves of enemy vehicles to survive—all while uncovering the sinister group sabotaging the races.

games.name: IncreKnight
games.summary: A short incremental game about a knight slaying a dragon.

games.name: Marvel MaXimum Collection
games.summary:
Marvel MaXimum Collection is a compilation that will feature the following Marvel games from the 1990s: X-Men: The Arcade Game, Spider-Man/X-Men: Arcade's Revenge, Captain America and the Avengers, Spider-Man/Venom: Maximum Carnage, Venom/Spider-Man: Separation Anxiety, and Silver Surfer.

The compilation will feature save state and rewind, display options, and a music player to listen to the songs from the games.

games.name: Build A Bank Tycoon
games.summary: Ready to get rich?

games.name: Make Moku Proud
games.summary: Uncover the truth behind a broken ritual in Make Moku Proud... a psychological visual novel where guilt and obedience, and what it means to make Moku proud, shape the fate of a witness watching his companions disappear.

games.name: Venus in Transit
games.summary: The mother vessel is adrift in space, out of fuel and doomed. Your mission is the colony’s only hope for survival. Will you be able to navigate the claustrophobic canyons when your ship begins to fail?

games.name: Call of Dookie
games.summary: Imagine you went to the crapper, and emerged an hour later to a monster apocalypse! Retro first-person shooter action inspired by 90's classics! Old-school local deathmatch & co-op for up to 4 players!

games.name: Copa City
games.summary: Organize high-stakes football events in the first football tycoon! Get the urban space and the stadium ready, ensure safety, and provide fans with an amazing football fiesta! But stay alert: Your decisions will not only influence the city but also the emotional rollercoaster for football fans!

games.name: Rubber Sharks
games.summary: Plunge into the tranquil existence of the sweet poolside life with the amazing company of peaceful Rubber Sharks. This adventure invites you to revel in the bliss of your cherished poolside sanctuary. But could there be a mystery hidden in this peaceful scene, or even more?

games.name: Project Songbird
games.summary: Project Songbird is a cinematic first-person narrative horror game set in the Appalachian forest. Take on the role of Dakota, a musician who must record their new album in a remote log cabin amidst a writer's block. Take caution, however. These woods were never empty...

games.name: Devils on the Moon Pinball
games.summary: Themed on the astrologically Occult, Devils on the Moon is a Single board VG-Pinball Heavily inspired by all the great Pinball games of the past and some modern ones as well.

games.name: Screamer
games.summary: High-octane action and anime aesthetics collide in this arcade racing game, featuring fighting mechanics and a storyline that hits hard. In this world, some race for glory while others seek power or revenge. Every race is a fight and every battle is personal.

games.name: VMX
games.summary: VMX offers an authentic riding experience with gesture-based tricks and responsive bike handling. Take on challenges in carefully crafted skateparks and dirt tracks, customize your bike with a realistic spray-painting system, and express your style through a variety of outfits.

games.name: Curse Warrior
games.summary:
Curse Warrior is a dungeon crawler RPG where you explore and conquer the underground labyrinth “Eclipse,” filled with curses.

In the dungeon, your party members may become cursed through various actions.

Since curses alter the abilities and actions of your party members, players must constantly monitor the state of their party and make crucial decisions on how to proceed. Build stronger characters while managing and adjusting the effects of curses to successfully clear the dungeon.

games.name: EverSiege: Untold Ages
games.summary: Liberate Bastion, humanity’s last refuge. Defend against evil hordes, reclaim lost powers, rebuild ancient ruins, and adapt your tactics to break the everSiege. A top-down action-strategy rogue-lite where choices shape every run, playable solo or up to 3 players in co-op.

games.name: Chico's Rebound
games.summary: A mysterious tower full of challenges has appeared. Launch Chico's walnut up at the blocks to break them all! Dash, dive, and tail-whip, while deploying an arsenal of creative power-ups. In between stages explore the Celestial Tower to solve puzzles, earn rewards, and uncover its secrets!

games.name: Nutmeg!
games.summary: NUTMEG! is a nostalgic football manager game with a deckbuilding twist, set in the '80s and '90s. Relive the days when the tackles were as hard as the mullets were long and football was about football.

games.name: Living Dead House
games.summary: Living Dead House delivers a pulse pounding, classic arcade experience. Battle through waves of the undead solo or team up with a friend. Use an arsenal of weapons and survival items to outlast the night. Will you escape alive and claim your top spot on the leaderboard?

games.name: GridBeat!
games.summary: Dungeons! Danger! Rhythm Action! You just hacked into the biggest corporation in the world and stole an unfeasibly valuable amount of data, but getting in was the easy part. To get back out you’ll need to explore the Mainframe, solve puzzles, battle security programs… and do it all on the beat!

games.name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park
games.summary: More experiences are coming to the Flower Kingdom! Enjoy a variety of attractions in the Bellabel Park plaza that lets you team up with (or work against) friends and family. Collect the most coins, run and hide in Phanto Tag, work together to pass a Bob-omb to the goal and more! This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition adds even more content and enhancements as well.

games.name: Icarus: Console Edition
games.summary: Land on Icarus, a planet broken due to failed terraforming. Once meant to be humanity’s second home, it is now a hostile frontier of toxic skies, savage wildlife, and relentless storms. Every drop from orbit is a fight for survival. Build shelter, craft weapons, hunt for food, and seek your fortune in exotic matter.

games.name: Etrange Overlord
games.summary: Join Étrange on this musical odyssey as she seeks to conquer hell in the pursuit of living her best afterlife.

games.name: Before Exit: Gas Station - Daylight DLC
games.summary: In the Daylight DLC, the perspective shifts to the gas station employee’s wife as she searches for her missing husband. Across seven days of investigation, you explore the station in daylight, documenting supernatural anomalies through photography to progress the new investigation-focused mode. Missing any key detail forces you to restart the inquiry. The DLC presents unexplained events that challenge logic, revealing the story from a new viewpoint and uncovering what truly happened to your husband.

games.name: Sweet Starlight Sisters
games.summary: “Sweet Starlight Sisters” is a character-raising romance adventure where you share a sweet life under one roof with the bunny-girl sisters Anya and Sanya. Train the duo with your own hands to become top performers, and—while occasionally fielding their heart-pounding advances—lead them to victory.

games.name: Taito Milestones 4
games.summary:
The 80s were a simpler and more colorful time. Especially in the arcades! With the Taito Milestones 4 collection, you can transport yourself back to the era of hairspray, neon, and pixels, and experience ten games from a variety of genres. Whether you enjoy sports, martial arts, platformers, shoot 'em ups, or even blocks and balls, you’re guaranteed to find something magical here.

WATER SKI
Released: 1983
Control a water skier being pulled by a motorboat while avoiding obstacles. Jump to dodge small obstacles, and hit a jump ramp to earn points! Just beware of the shark...

FIELD DAY
Released: 1984
This colorful sports festival includes seven unique games, such as three-legged race and tug-of-war. Up to four players can join, with two players competing in each match. Who will be the ultimate victor?

TYPHOON GAL
Released: 1985
Wear down your opponent’s stamina with punches and kicks, then finish them off with big techniques like the shoulder throw or brain buster! It’s a fight for the ages!

ARKANOID
Released: 1986
The classic block-breaking game! Arkanoid is easy to understand yet hard to master. Use the paddle-like craft Vaus to bounce balls, destroy blocks, and defeat the boss DOH! Elegant, simple and totally addictive!

BONZE ADVENTURE
Released: 1988
Yokai time! Two Buddhist priests must fight snakes, giant eyeballs, ghosts, spiders, and more to exorcise the evil from Enma, the king of the underworld. Too scared to go alone? Ask a friend to play with you!

KURI KINTON
Released: 1988
You are the master martial artist Kinton! Kick and punch your way through hordes of thugs to rescue an intelligence officer of the WSPO (World Shadow Police Organisation) and his daughter. Failure is not an option!

SYVALION
Released: 1988
Pilot the golden dragon-shaped mecha Syvalion to thwart Earth’s invasion by a mysterious army. The storyline changes dramatically with each playthrough, featuring over 100 different ending!

DON DOKO DON
Released: 1989
Join lumberjacks Bob and Jim as they set out to rescue the kidnapped king and princess of Marry Land. Use their trusty mallets to defeat any enemies standing in their way!

CAMELTRY
Released: 1990
Rotate the screen to guide a ball to the goal! Press the shake button to make the ball jump, and hold it to increase rolling speed. Can you get through the mazes in time for a high score?

THE NINJA KIDS
Released: 1990
When a peaceful town of puppets is overrun by a cult seeking to resurrect a demon, four ninja puppets take up the fight. This unique action fest supports up to four players at the same time!

games.name: Weed Supermarket Simulator
games.summary: Grow weed and grow your business! Run your own weed supermarket, manage stock, set prices, and help customers. Try new strains, choose the best products, upgrade your shop, and keep your store running smoothly so people always come back.

games.name: Neopets: Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey
games.summary: Journey back to Neopia with 26 classic games, brought back to life for new and returning fans!

games.name: Life is Strange: Reunion
games.summary: Life is Strange: Reunion is the thrilling finale to the Max and Chloe saga, a chapter that brings their book to a close. This is a full circle moment for both developers and fans—one that builds on everything that has come before. And even as the game delivers a reunion long-thought impossible, it also caps off our time at Caledon University in a literal blaze of glory.

games.name: Dwarf Guild Mania
games.summary: Lead your capitalist dwarves across new lands in search of gems and gold. Each game brings a unique experience in this procedural turn-based strategy. You must vanquish your enemies, prospect for gems, construct mines, dispatch spies, and risk it all. For the Guild!

games.name: Diceaster
games.summary:
I made this game with one clear idea:

See how far you can go before you give up.

You control a die. Each face represents one available hit. Every time you launch yourself, you lose a face. As long as you still have faces, you have control, precision, and the ability to correct mistakes.

When you run out of hits, the die stops being a die. It turns into a ball and starts rolling. Rolling is not an advantage: it’s an alternative. A risky option that can help you move forward… or wipe out all your progress in seconds.

Each level reduces the number of hits available. The challenge is reaching just as far with fewer resources.

You will fall. A lot.

You will climb… sometimes.

And if you reach the top, there will be proof that you were there.

games.name: GwenBlade Witcheresque
games.summary: Hack and slash your way through depression in lightning-paced Soulslike to find a way to finally move on from loss in real life

games.name: Karigurashi Renai: Living on Borrowed Love
games.summary: Welcome back to your childhood town! The Full HD Remaster of Karigurashi Ren’ai: Living on Borrowed Love perfectly preserves ASa Project's signature blend of comedy and heartwarming charm while offering a stunning new visual experience.

games.name: Michael Test
games.summary: Michael Test is a point-and-click adventure game where you uncover hidden truths within classical paintings and follow faint traces of sound to deduce and choose the final ‘sin.’

games.name: Commie Block
games.summary: Survive as the newly appointed manager in an expanding communistic regime where our purpose is to produce more and more resources for the glory of motherland! Manage the workforce & optimize output of buildings to survive against unrealistic demands as long as possible in our own commie block

games.name: Is Zombody Home?
games.summary: Upgrade the house, customize the weapon and charge the special attacks, your cute zombie horde is about to attack.

games.name: Cards Lie
games.summary: Unmask the demons. Trust no one. You’ve gathered the entire village for a midnight ritual. Among them hide creatures of pure evil — demons disguised as villagers.

games.name: Blastroid
games.summary: Blastroid is an arcade-style roguelite set in space. Players customize their ships by combining different engine and weapon systems, striving to survive against ever-evolving threats in regions swarming with enemy waves.

games.name: BasketBlow
games.summary: Play tabletop basketball with realistic physics in relaxing environments. Compete in customizable leagues and cups, edit your teams, and complete your trophy room. Collect points to unlock courts, balls, and environments. Play with friends locally or online.

games.name: Rocky Idle
games.summary: Rocky Idle is a single-player idle/incremental game. Level up your skills, gather resources, and craft powerful combat gear to defeat the strongest bosses and complete your collection log.

games.name: Otome Daoshi Fighting For Love
games.summary: Welcome to Kayu, where every citizen, both man and woman, young and old alike, enjoy martial arts. Living in that kingdom as a Daoist priestess in training, you made your way to the Tournament of Valor to root for your childhood friend.

games.name: Tiny Misery
games.summary: A sick mother and her young son move into the home of a lonely old woman. A tragic story inspired by the dark puppet animations of the 80s and 90s.

games.name: The Knights of the Cross
games.summary: The Knights of the Cross is an RPG card game adapted from The Knights of the Cross by Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz. You will play as the knight Zbyszko and embark on a medieval adventure.

games.name: Vanishing Starlight
games.summary: Vanishing Starlight is a horizontal action adventure game similar to the Metroidvania. You will play the role of a prisoner who has lost his memory, wading into the sea of ​​stars, traversing rivers and mountains, embarking on a journey in search of memories, old friends and your own destiny.

games.name: Roombattle
games.summary:
Roombattle is a party fighting game where players will control robotic vacuum cleaners and will fight equipped with sharp objects and balloons. The main objective is to be the last to be equipped balloons in the game. In addition to the battles, the game contains a large crowd of minigames.

Meet up with your friends, customize your vacuum, and get ready to battle in different rooms to claim victory!

games.name: Shinonome Abyss: The Maiden Exorcist
games.summary: The main character is a shrine maiden named "Yono," who has to survive in a haunted houses where Mononoke (yokai and vengeful spirits) lurk, using a limited number of items and traps in this strategy roguelike horror action game!

games.name: Damon and Baby
games.summary: An exciting new style of action adventure fusing shooting action with exploration.

games.name: Coincidences?
games.summary: After a sudden rent hike, you move into a suspiciously cheap house deep in the woods. The price is absurdly low and there’s work nearby—it seems like a stroke of luck. But you soon realize something is seriously wrong with the place...

games.name: Lofi Mahjong
games.summary: Dive into a calm, cozy world with Lofi Mahjong. Enjoy classic Mahjong Solitaire enhanced by a lofi soundscape for maximum focus and minimum stress.

games.name: Reconquista
games.summary: A fast-paced dungeon boomer shooter with melee combat, magic, and seed-based generated levels.

games.name: Mushi
games.summary: Welcome to Mushi! The next-gen Auto-RPG set in a rich fantasy world. This is a feature-packed incremental idle game, meaning that it mostly plays on its own. Your hero will automatically defeat enemies and level up on your screen while you do other things. Begin your rise from level 1 today!

games.name: The V Anomaly
games.summary: The V Anomaly is an atmospheric observation game where small changes matter. Search each room for anomalies and choose the correct exit: progress deeper as the Area number climbs or make one wrong call and return to Area 0. Stay sharp. Doubt everything.

games.name: Honkai: Star Rail - Unraveled for Daybreak
games.summary:
Version 4.1 of Honkai: Star Rail, which includes:
• New character: Ashveil
• New Trailblaze Mission: "Unraveled for Daybreak"
• New events
• ...and more!

games.name: The Mystical Traveler
games.summary: Play as a mysterious green cube and rise from the depths of a ruined world. Master your jumps, survive traps, and purify a dying ecosystem in this 2D platformer.

games.name: Rank: Warmaster Bunker Buster
games.summary: Rank Warmaster: Bunker Buster meets tactical control with strategic execution, bringing RTS elements to this sci-fi, action tower defense. Acquire resources as you further secure your bunker strategically placing perimeters and defensive and offensive units.

games.name: Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy
games.summary:
A new Dissidia story unfolds in modern Tokyo, where legendary Final Fantasy warriors assemble to save the world from destruction.
Defeat the boss faster than the enemy team in exhilarating, action-packed battles in this 3v3 Team Boss Battle Arena.

games.name: Mask of Soul
games.summary: Mask of Soul is a 2D Metroidvania action-adventure where you play as Cheong-O Chasa, the underworld’s gatekeeper, hunting spirits released under the Red Moon. Master precise parry combat, switch between spirit masks, and explore a dark fantasy world inspired by Korean mythology.

games.name: Brighter Days
games.summary: Fight difficult enemies, explore dangerous locations, and gain strength in this hand crafted world to defeat the evil that lays waste to these Scarred Lands.

games.name: Genji Reincarnation: The Seven Mysteries of Shirahata High
games.summary: Friendship or fate—what will they choose? A karmic and occult visual novel where urban legends blur the line between life, death, and reincarnation.

games.name: Farming Simulator 25: Vredo Pack
games.summary: Counter grassland degradation with technology from Vredo, the renowned specialist in overseeding and self-propelled slurry injection vehicles. In the meantime, wild boars have been set loose to roam the land and threaten the health of crops. Includes 12 new machines, also featuring Evers Agro.

games.name: Overpowered 2: Crux of Fate
games.summary: Press your luck to its absolute limits as you fight for survival in a deadly monster arena!

games.name: Oops! Inc. Emergency Center
games.summary: Run the galaxy’s most chaotic hospital in Oops! Inc. Emergency Center! Play as a diploma-free robot doctor, diagnose bizarre space illnesses, craft the right remedies, and treat patients fast before insurance turns you into a fridge. Funny, frantic, and out of this world!

games.name: Final Stand Waves
games.summary: Defend your tower against endless hordes of zombies in this 2D top-down game.

games.name: Stickman Physics Battle Arena
games.summary: Level up and unlock the ultimate weapons in a bloody physics playground! You must kill countless enemies to increase your stats and become the greatest warrior. Dual wield over 75 unique and fun weapons in 7 different modes across nearly 100 different levels with up to 2 players in co-op or VS.

games.name: Detective 26
games.summary: DETECTIVE 26 is a relaxing, turn-based mystery board game for 5-minute investigations. Roll dice and traverse low-poly maps to gather clues. Use logic to unmask the Wanted before turns run out! Level up your rank, unlock new content, and master the art of being a true detective!

games.name: Melody Friends
games.summary: Just drop in your favorite song—done! A cute rhythm game that auto-generates multiple difficulties. Play comfortably with any key and clear a song your way with five friends.

games.name: Incremental Ragebait
games.summary: Incremental Ragebait is the journey of Demon Incrementus to ragebait god! Buy new weapons, unlock upgrades, and build a purgatory to automate the ragebaiting process.

games.name: Violet Impetus
games.summary: Violet Impetus is a bullet-hell arcade melee 'em up set in a series of (lightly) procedurally-generated arenas. Drop into different biomes to rid the world of Æris—the demiurge, petrificate & fractured. Its other children just won't see things eye to eye.

games.name: To Be a Millionaire
games.summary: Ordinary people can also become millionaires. In the game, you can get money by transporting apples. Once you have accumulated a certain amount of money, you can own your own barbecue restaurant. From then on, becoming a millionaire is no longer a dream.

games.name: Journey of the Garden Rose
games.summary: Lily must explore a fantastic palace and contest with the machinations of a cruel prince to rescue her mother in this Old-School 3D Action-Adventure game!

games.name: Pakinpaks
games.summary: A cozy puzzle game where you go on a journey all around the world packing and organizing all sorts of travel gear. Fulfill your client's request in any way you wish and — as long as everything fits — prepare the neatest bags that you can!

games.name: Nothing Beyond This Point
games.summary: In the Void, everyone is alone, and you're no exception. Use your health as damage, create your own character with abilities and Sigils, and fight through corrupted souls in this top-down action Metroidvania. Don't be fooled - you're nobody's last hope.

games.name: No Vacation for an Executioner
games.summary: It's a a Dark Fantasy Action-RPG about a frustrated executioner in late 17th century. He ran away from the gallows. It aroused a riot of monsters, he had to clean up this cruel mess, and find out the truth of this crazy world.

games.name: Summer’s Heartbeat
games.summary: Village romance hotter than summer's heat! Drowning in debt, you escape to the countryside only to meet the loan shark noona, your first love, and the tsundere village princess! This summer, your heart’s melting faster than ice cream. Who’s going to set your world on fire?

games.name: Shū Liàn Yǔ Jūn: Xiānzǐ Xiàn
games.summary: A vibrant, white-haired beauty, but her true identity is actually a timid, short-haired, glasses-wearing girl?! I'm still dating her! A 200% sweet college romance! Dates, hand-holding, hugs, kisses, and marriage after graduation!

games.name: Hail the Devourer
games.summary: Hail the Devourer is a darkly satisfying incremental clicker where destruction becomes progression and razing cities to the ground brings an ancient evil closer to ending it all.

games.name: Mistfall Ruins
games.summary: Follow the mist. Discover the forgotten.

games.name: Ephialtes
games.summary: THE NIGHTMARES NEVER END. Survive a series of antagonists that linger in the corners of your mind, each playing by their own rules.

games.name: Bargalian Regicide
games.summary: Bargalian Regicide is a stylized fantasy game about a disgraced prince in servitude of an ancient being. Cut through hundreds of soldiers to bring about change in a crumbling empire.

games.name: Pinball Dream
games.summary: Pinball Dream is an 80s arcade-style pinball and brick-breaker game. If you want to relax and relieve stress, this game is perfect for you. Get amazing power-ups, break all the blocks, and defeat the boss! Drop everything and play "Pinball Dream".

games.name: Spirit & Steel
games.summary:
The spirits of a remote volcanic island have lived in balance for generations, until William Von Pingleton III arrives with a mining army and a plan to turn them into fuel for his machines. When his first attack knocks the island’s shaman, Ila, off her feet, the spirits answer with a gift: the power to command the elements themselves.

In Spirit & Steel, you play as Ila, a short but stubborn 70-year-old shaman who hits harder than she looks. Swap between elemental fists, chain melee combos, and weave in dashes and air movement to outplay swarms of mechanical enemies in tight, focused combat encounters. Every arena asks you to use your full toolkit; knock foes back with wind, pull them in with crashing waves, and burn through armored threats with searing fire.

As you fight deeper into the island, lush beaches and sacred temples slowly clash with scaffolding, smokestacks, and churning machinery.

Your journey builds toward a final showdown with Pingleton in his volcanic stronghold, where you’ll put all of your unlocked elements to the test. Defeat him, free the captured spirits, and restore the island’s balance, or watch it disappear under steel.

games.name: Unusual Friends Bundle
games.summary: ~ Bumballon + Cat Souls + Prisonela DX ~

games.name: Football Legacy
games.summary:
Football Legacy offers realistic football manager features: transfers, training, scouting, detailed infrastructure, sponsor negotiations, and matches against real players. Later, it will even be possible to compete against players from all over the world.

Football Legacy places a special focus on long-term development and realistic club building. Unlike in fast-paced casual games, managers start at the bottom: on the cinder pitch of League 6. From here, the aim is not only to strategically strengthen the squad, but also to expand the club's facilities step by step. From a simple training ground to a modern stadium complex, each expansion unlocks new opportunities in training or revenue, making forward-thinking financial planning essential.

Close cooperation with the community is at the heart of the philosophy. Players can provide direct feedback via Discord and social media, which is incorporated into regular updates. The result is a football manager game that is transparently developed "by players for players."

games.name: The Undermall
games.summary: This is an anomaly game set inside a mall. Currently only one store is available ("Warm Subject") with many more planned. Spot the difference game with a touch of horror / jump scares.

games.name: LoopiaLike
games.summary:
LoopiaLike — A bullet heaven roguelite where spell fusion changes everything.

Choose your wizard, survive endless waves of enemies, fuse spells into devastating combos, and become unstoppable. Every run is different. Every build is unique.

games.name: Grizzly Cup Turbo Challenge '92
games.summary: A retro-inspired local multiplayer arcade racer where you pick a car, race solo or with up to 4 players on one screen, and battle through short, fast-paced events with easy-to-learn but hard-to-master handling. It features three camera modes, distinct cars, single races, Time Attack, multi-race Cups, and a built-in track editor with test drive plus track code sharing for custom circuits.

games.name: Castle Tycoon Simulator
games.summary: Let's build a castle!

games.name: Mote: The Old Office
games.summary: MOTE: The Old Office is a reflective walking simulator where you explore an abandoned startup space through the eyes of its CEO. Wander through meeting rooms, break areas, and forgotten corners as voice memories surface—stories of late nights, impossible deadlines, and the small moments that shaped everything. Along the way, collect 20 hidden donuts—a sweet reminder of the “night shift” days when sugar and panic powered the dream.

games.name: GunX
games.summary: Get ready for the ultimate VR Gun assembling experience with PvP Duels, Zombie Campaign and a Shooting Range for perfecting your assembling speed and accuracy. Challenge your friends or join them in co-op and immerse yourself in an adrenaline-fueled fight.

games.name: Meta Card Backpack Legend
games.summary: The third installment of the MetaCard series, MetaCard: Backpack Legend, is a backpack management Roguelike card game! Before Battle: Manage your artifact backpack to build and synergize your playstyle. During Battle: Drag and drop cards to unleash skills on key enemies at the right moment.

games.name: Bobo in Hell
games.summary: Survive hell in this Roguelike Deckbuilder that features card battles with an in-depth auto-battler-esque synergy and combo system. Help Bobo, the little penguin, recruit allies and face the many horrors that await him on his journey to save his friends.

games.name: Spinner Smash
games.summary: Master your spinner in SPINNER SMASH, a 3D Fighting Platformer. Throw, jump, strike, and dodge with your spinner to overcome Aroa’s challenges. Face the leaders of each stage and rise to the top. Give Bart, the school bully, what he deserves!

games.name: Kuromaku
games.summary: Kuromaku Is An Indie First-Person Psychological Thriller Experienced From A Child’s Perspective. Complete Chores Assigned By Your Mother, Uncover Hidden Secrets, And Survive Unsettling Encounters. Objectives Must Be Completed To Progress Further Into The Rich, Unfolding Story.

games.name: Spot the Spy Guy
games.summary: Can you find two identical hidden objects?

games.name: Colornova
games.summary: A color matching space shooter about saving your home planet from total destruction!

games.name: Desktop Fishing Cat
games.summary: Here’s a cute, chubby black cat. All it wants to do is quietly go fishing. “Right in the corner of your desktop!” Collect fish to fill up the cat’s encyclopedia, earn money, and dress it up in adorable outfits!

games.name: Curse of the Shadow
games.summary: "Curse of the Shadow" is a BL-themed horror visual novel. Cursed by a "ghost", protagonist Xu finds eerie dark shadows in every photo he takes.Once escaping reality, he’s forced by fate to face fears again.To uncover the curse’s truth, he and two friends embark on a terrifying, unknown journey.

games.name: Tow the Line
games.summary: Chained together meets tow trucks in this challenging platformer. Play solo or co-op!

games.name: Mini Up: Cepa Skin
games.summary: Unlock the Cepa skin for Mini UP.

games.name: Mini Up: Lyco Skin
games.summary: Unlock the Lyco skin for Mini UP.

games.name: Mini Up: Frutex Skin
games.summary: Unlock the Frutex skin for Mini UP.

games.name: Mini Up: Supporter Pack
games.summary: This pack includes all premium skins for Mini UP in a single purchase.

games.name: Mini Up: Capsi Skin
games.summary: Unlock the Capsi skin for Mini UP.

games.name: Mini Up
games.summary: Mini UP is a free parkour game where every second counts. Optimize your movements, perfect your precision, and achieve faster and faster times.

games.name: Doodle Wipeout
games.summary: Doodle Wipeout is an action rougelite - survive waves of chaotic doodles by erasing them. Dodge, upgrade, and clean the canvas before it’s overrun.

games.name: Vault Vandals
games.summary: Chaotic local multiplayer roguelite for 2-4 players. Command robots through deadly dungeons - but don't control them directly. Issue AI directives, grab cursed treasures, steal from friends, and escape before the Wall of Doom rises.

games.name: VitvitDriver 3D
games.summary: a late-90s inspired eclectic delivery driving game. perform tricks, stack combos and complete deliveries to earn points across a set of unique maps.

games.name: 1000 Score: 2D Platformer
games.summary: Try to safely guide the square to the end of the screen! But beware: no dying! One failure ends the game. Are you brave enough to repeat this challenge 1000 times?

games.name: Pound for Pound
games.summary: A sports management simulation where you build an MMA promotion from the ground up by signing fighters, running events, and expanding your reach in a living competitive world.

games.name: Socks!
games.summary: Strategic, Satisfying Sock Packing Action! Pair up socks, fresh off the clothesline, in this cute and relaxing physics-based puzzler. Match two socks to roll them up into an adorable bundle and free up space in your sock basket. But don't let your bundle basket overflow either! Pack wisely!

games.name: Inky Blinky Bob
games.summary: Fly a weaponized hot air balloon across a chain of dangerous islands overrun by failed experiments. Scavenge resources, upgrade your flying machine, and dismantle the defenses of an occult biotech corporation before its greatest creation breaks free.
