games.name: Chopping Together
games.summary: A 1-4 player co-op, You are stuck in a forest alone or together with one goal to chop every tree in sight. Chop Trees, Gather Wood, Make Money And Upgrade Your Tools

games.name: Hell Dice Gambit
games.summary: Hell Dice Gambit is a strategic roguelike game using dice. Collect various relics, dice, and pills to grow stronger and struggle on. Can you escape from the abyss of hell?

games.name: Vice Versa
games.summary: Play solo or with up to 5 players in this strategic card-stacking challenge. Place your entire deck on ascending and descending stacks, use clever resets, and survive two unique modes filled with tense, cooperative decision-making.

games.name: 86'd
games.summary: Order Up, Chef! Grow a ragtag goblin kitchen crew and cook disgusting dishes for detestable diners, where mistakes don't just cost time, they cost a goblin's life! Can you keep your crew from getting 86'd?

games.name: Paracesium
games.summary: PARACESIUM is a body horror time management game where you collect, analyze, dismember and reassemble body parts in order to create a pure cadaver for your experimentation. Every action takes time, so make your next decision carefully. Manage time, bodies and monsters and stay alive. Who is Delilah?

games.name: Payroll
games.summary: You owe the loan shark everything. Chain devastating combos, break the game wide open, and outsmart the odds. A roguelike deckbuilder where clever beats lucky. Pray it's enough.

games.name: The Great Flood
games.summary: "A War you can grasp." An upcoming strategy game, featuring the ability to engage in duels in VR/MR Dual Modes.

games.name: Village Merchant
games.summary: Run and expand your own medieval shop! Sell weapons, armor, food, and rare goods to peasants and lords alike in the immersive medieval store simulator.

games.name: Butler Guillotine
games.summary: Flesh filled puppets in a mishapen hotel. No windows, no exterior. Follow different characters' intertiwining paths and unearth forgotten events from a time long gone. Bring the ceremony to a halt.

games.name: Lost Wiki: Kozlovka
games.summary: Explore a wikipedia-like database and solve a small town mystery in Eastern Europe. Step into the shoes of a journalist in the 90s as you sprawl through articles and uncover the secrets that have been laid in front of you.

games.name: Fidget Widget
games.summary: Fidget Widget is a collection of mini games that chill on your desktop, ready to play anytime you’ve got a few minutes to spare.

games.name: Re.dive Wonderland
games.summary: Re.dive Wonderland is a mystery × romance visual novel where a girl wakes up in a strange RPG world with no memories. Make choices, connect with companions, and solve puzzles to uncover the truth. Includes 4 story routes and multiple endings.

games.name: Off Course
games.summary: Stuck in a time loop, stop the possessed captain's plans in this cooperate-with-yourself puzzle game. Record each pirate’s actions to solve puzzles, interact with adorable animal companions and get to know the brave pirate crew and the bond they share with each other!

games.name: VeilWood
games.summary: Protect your farm from twisted creatures as you cultivate the land and put an end to the Azure Haze in this first person real time strategy dark farming sim.

games.name: Mafioso's Dice
games.summary: A high-stakes mafia-themed dice and risk game. Four players roll dice to climb toward victory, then face off in deadly rounds of Russian roulette. Strategy, bluffing, and hidden cards determine who walks away alive.

games.name: Lap of the Gods
games.summary: When the sun shines on the Lap of the Gods, it is blood red. And when it rains, the sky sobs. Explore a strange world populated by even stranger beings in this story-driven adventure as Marion attempts to undo a mistake on a universal level, before everything she has ever known becomes Undone.

games.name: Excoverse
games.summary: A story-driven action RPG where you play as a noble lord torn between rescuing his lost daughter and leading a dying nation. fast combat, stealth, moral choices, and anime-style intensity await.

games.name: Crystalfall
games.summary:
Free Online Action RPG in a Steampunk World

Take on the role of a convict who has been thrown into the dungeons by a powerful ruling organization. Embark on a journey through a world devastated by a mysterious asteroid, scattering powerful crystal shards across distinct world zones brimming with mutated creatures and steampunk enemies.

Delve into post-apocalyptic dungeons that randomize upon each visit and ascend to new heights of power with epic loot, extensive talent tree progression, theorycrafting and lootable skills.

games.name: Moto Rush Reborn
games.summary: Feel the pulse of retro-futuristic Tokyo veins urging you to go faster, drawing you deeper. Surrender to the speed, let the thrill consume your essence. Each surge, each flicker of light, is your path to glory or oblivion in 'Moto Rush Reborn'. Is your soul worth this speed?

games.name: Poke All Toads
games.summary: A puzzle game starring mischievous fairies. Solve levels by working as a team, operating dangerous machinery and manipulating local wildlife.

games.name: Rubato
games.summary: A collect-a-thon about a frog fixing the solar system after it explodes for some reason.

games.name: SuperEats
games.summary: An action game where you use super powers to fly freely and deliver food at ultra-high speed! In 'SuperEats,' race across Gourmet Island. Hurry, a little destruction is acceptable to get the goods there! Uncover the mystery of the amnesiac hero and become a legendary delivery person!

games.name: Console Archives: Ninja-Kid II
games.summary:
Ninja-Kid II was released by UPL in 1988 for an 8-bit home console.¸

In this action game, you embark on an adventure across diverse fields—including mountains, oceans, and caves—to defeat your greatest and most powerful foe, Ashura.

Despite its cute art style, the game offers hardcore ninja action, featuring wall-kicking and intense battles using a wide variety of weapons.

The Console Archives series is developed with the concept of faithfully reproducing masterpieces released on various home game consoles, allowing players to easily enjoy them on the latest hardware.

The series is packed with convenient features, including customizable button layouts and screen settings, as well as the ability to save and load at any point.

Whether you played them back in the day or are experiencing them for the first time, please enjoy the masterpieces that shaped the history of console gaming!

(The options menu and manual are available in Japanese, English, French, German, Italian, and Spanish.)

games.name: Wuthering Waves: Resolution to Illuminate the Shadows
games.summary:
Version 3.2 of Wuthering Waves, including:
• New character: Sigrika
• New story quests
• New echoes, events and more!

games.name: Eggconsole Hydlide MSX2
games.summary: Step into the shoes of Jim the Hero to overthrow Varalys, the most powerful demon in all of legend! Experience the definitive 80s action RPG classic.

games.name: Enter the Dodgeball
games.summary: Hold the Joy-Con in both hands! For kids who aren’t good at dodgeball. And for adults who want to try it again after a long time.

games.name: Blastoids
games.summary: Grab your friends, hit the couch, and blast through 30 chaotic stages in this local co-op battle game for 1–4 players.

games.name: Fortnite: Chapter 7 - Season 2: Showdown
games.summary: Players will be able to access new content and skins as a new battle thaws from the frigid standstill, with The Foundation and The Ice King preparing for a showdown.

games.name: HestiaFort
games.summary: At the end of the blue sky that spreads out like the sea, HestiaFort

games.name: OneShot Challenge
games.summary: A challenging roguelike where you control a single bullet. Redirect it with your frying pan, dodge the chaos, and master every room.

games.name: Hatters
games.summary: Hatters is a cooperative bullet hell roguelike for up to 4 players. Random spells of five elements, magical artifacts, new heroes and a light story with humor. Chaotic battles where magic and laughter fly everywhere.

games.name: Delivery Service: Courier
games.summary: Be a courier and earn more allowances within the time limit!

games.name: Setuna: Legend of Hamburger 2
games.summary: All motions, all frames cancelable. The second installment of the ultra-free 3D action-adventure [SETUNA]. Challenge the limits of your skills with a fully professional-grade input system!

games.name: Mall Rivals
games.summary: Competitive mall simulation. 1-8 players open stores in the same mall, fight for customers, crush rivals. Team up or go solo. Fair play or dirty tricks? Your call. Procedural maps, employee system, physical mechanics.

games.name: One Shot Challenge
games.summary: A challenging roguelike where you control a single bullet. Redirect it with your frying pan, dodge the chaos, and master every room.

games.name: The Mortimer Paradox
games.summary: A third-person sci-fi horror game about exploring your grandfather’s abandoned mansion and its interdimensional portals. Solve puzzles, evade monsters, and uncover why Dr. Voss vanished.

games.name: Pirate's Dual
games.summary: A 2D pixel-art PvP ship battle game where you outplay opponents with smart attack and defense tactics. Climb matchmaking, join tournaments, earn in-game currency, unlock skins, and more.

games.name: Blackjack Roulette
games.summary: Blackjack meets roulette in a deadly duel. Lose a hand, pull the trigger. Use powerful cards to outsmart opponents in 1v1 battles, or defeat the Clown to escape. Win or die.

games.name: Underdog Futsal
games.summary: Become the manager of a small neighborhood futsal club, recruit players on a tight budget, and build your tactics. Manage morale through team activities, shift the momentum with substitutions and tactical changes in tense text-based matches, and grow your team step by step.

games.name: Sync Together
games.summary: SYNC TOGETHER is a parkour game focused on keeping a jet-powered flying vehicle balanced by working together. Use coordination, speed, and teamwork to finish the course as fast as possible.

games.name: Dungeon-Doku
games.summary: Dungeon-Doku is a rogue-lite Sudoku game where you fill in puzzles, gain treasure and face traps while trying not to take damage by messing up. How far can you make it in the dungeon?

games.name: Find Cats 6
games.summary: Pixel World's Hide-and-Seek Cat Challenge! Eight magical realms hide cute fluffy kittens. Solve interactive puzzles, unlock hidden maps, use your wisdom to bring all the furry little rascals home, and enjoy a healing and stress-relieving cat-hunting experience.

games.name: Unwilling Host
games.summary: This is a first-person indie horror game with VHS effects. Be careful—you're facing a terrifying entity.

games.name: MineSweeper.R
games.summary: MineSweeper.R is an ultra-casual roguelike Minesweeper game with spell-programming mechanics. Build your own sweeping skills freely and experience Minesweeper in a whole new way.

games.name: Party Pong
games.summary: A fast-paced beer pong party game with an action card game twist, make the shot, draw a card, and turn momentum into mayhem.

games.name: Content King
games.summary: Streaming simulator roleplaying game featuring voices from Twitch streamers

games.name: Card Colony
games.summary: It’s a card game where you build a deck, draw cards, and strategically place towers on a tile grid to earn gold. And you must defend your empire from the enemies closing in. They won’t let you build in peace.

games.name: Fuse
games.summary: A cozy, 3D, puzzle platformer with a underlying story. Play as cute origami characters exploring a vast world through puzzles, combat and platforming. Fight your way past enemies and rid the world of the black tar.

games.name: Headquarters: Cold War
games.summary: Headquarters: Cold War is a fast-paced turn-based strategy game set in a hypothetical 1984 conflict between NATO and the USSR. Play as both sides and command helicopters, tanks, and infantry across 20 campaign missions and rewrite the outcome of modern history.

games.name: Briar Flame
games.summary: A stylized action-platformer set in a world consumed by eternal thorns. Explore handcrafted zones, unlock new flame-forged upgrades, and face brutal bosses as the Young Emberhost in a desperate attempt to reach the Heart of the Briar.

games.name: Ergenekon
games.summary: Ergenekon is a story-based, cinematic-heavy, linear, third person single player game about the Turkish epic Ergenekon. You will witness the resurrection of the Turks with Ergenekon.

games.name: Youth Academy
games.summary: Youth Manager is an auto-battler football management simulation about developing young talents between the ages of 16 to 18. Your goal is to train wonderkids, help them sign professional contracts, and build your reputation as a top academy.

games.name: Virtual Ties Isekaijoucho Träumerei
games.summary: Our protagonist, Kirishima Yu, returns from Tokyo to the island where he once lived and reunites with his childhood friend, Minase Seikai. Seikai, who had been on the verge of giving up on her dream of becoming an idol, looks somewhat gloomy. Wanting to make her smile again, Yu proposes that she debut as a virtual idol named "Isekaijoucho" based on an illustration he drew himself.

games.name: Zombocalypse Now!
games.summary: The Zombocalypse is upon us. Build up and defend your settlement from the Zombie hordes until help arrives.

games.name: Three Kingdom: Zhang Jiao Revival
games.summary: Three Kingdom - Zhang Jue Revival is a real time RPG roguelite. Battle alone or recruit up to 10 comrade to fight along side in real time combat. Specialize in 1 class or learn all 6, wide range of equipment to create your own build. Powerful yet simple statistic system to spice up game play.

games.name: Zoo Life Simulator
games.summary:
Build and manage your dream zoo from the ground up!
In Zoo Life Simulator, you can play solo or with up to 4 friends in co-op mode take care of animals, expand habitats, manage staff, and keep your visitors happy in this realistic management and simulation experience.

Start small with simple animals and grow your park step by step as you unlock new biomes and exotic species. Feed, clean, and care for your animals while balancing your zoo’s economy and visitor satisfaction. Whether you’re expanding enclosures, rescuing runaway rabbits, or designing the perfect visitor area, Zoo Life Simulator offers a fun and creative sandbox for all animal lovers.

games.name: Heroes of Magic & Cards
games.summary: Build the perfect deck, draw the perfect hand, and strike down your enemies with pairs and straights. Heroes of Magic & Cards is a roguelike deckbuilder with a poker twist, sending you and your fifty-two into a mystical fantasy world of monsters and magecraft!

games.name: Harmonic Convergence
games.summary: Master the rhythm of combat in this roguelite where attacks must hit on beat! Match inputs to music as you battle through conspiracy hotspots like Government Bases, Bimini Road, and alien worlds. Uncover artifacts, craft game-breaking builds, and uncover the truth behind Harmonic Convergence.

games.name: DoppelTest
games.summary: Kagari, a withdrawn child, and Kagami, the robot living in society as their stand-in— Only one will be recognized as the real Kagari. Your role is to gently observe their choices and decisions.

games.name: Rushing Beat X: Return of Brawl Brothers
games.summary: The legendary beat ’em up series from Jaleco returns. Master trained fighters take on a rising evil with raw strength and refined technique. Built around easy-to-use auto-combos, the game lets skilled players weave powerful strings for exhilarating combat. Let your fists burn with fury once more.

games.name: True Vikings
games.summary: Choose your own path: become a powerful jarl or a legendary king, or perhaps switch sides and follow the path of a knight, reliving the story of the Duke of Normandy.

games.name: Quickcast
games.summary: A turn-based strategy roguelike game where you and your opponent share a single deck. Use matching rules to cast spells and collect powerful artifacts. Defeat wizards specializing in each element and absorb their powers to become the best wizard you can be.

games.name: Rule the Waves 3: Expanded Battles
games.summary: Prepare to return to the definitive naval warfare simulation game, Rule the Waves 3, with the new Expanded Battles expansion! Take your love and knowledge of 20th century naval warfare from the exciting campaigns of the base game and get ready to craft and fight the naval battles of your dreams.

games.name: Danger Cliff 2
games.summary: Danger Cliff 2 is a very open-ended 2D Platformer inspired by Super Mario 63. Run, jump, and drill through huge, interconnected levels with wild themes, unique mechanics, and branching paths. Between being able to hunt down whatever collectibles you want, taking advantage of deep movement mechanics, and three playable characters to choose from, you decide how you tackle this adventure!

games.name: Crimson Desert
games.summary: Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game set in the beautiful yet brutal continent of Pywel. Embark on a journey as the Greymane Kliff and restore what has been lost. Explore uncharted lands, fight against threats that stand in your way, and discover the wonders the world has in store.

games.name: Let's Freeze Some Penguins
games.summary: Walnut the Walrus sets out to save his friends, and all of Northern Bear, from the dreaded Emperor Penguin. Luckily, his chilly Walrus Wind is ice cold. Now let's freeze some penguins!

games.name: In Their Shoes
games.summary: From the first day of spring, to the last day of winter, wear seven shoes of seven characters and live their most intimate moments. Explore their thoughts, choose their steps and shape their paths in a mumblecore narrative game where the most extraordinary setting is ordinary life itself.

games.name: Overwords: Infinity
games.summary: Overwords is back: Stack, fuse, and expand.

games.name: Abandoned Stories: Inherited Silence
games.summary: Adopted into a new family, Maria soon realizes she was never meant to feel safe there. Trapped inside a quiet home with something watching you, Maria must uncover the truth behind a growing nightmare.

games.name: Back to the Village
games.summary:
Back to the Village — build your dream farm and enjoy a peaceful life in this cozy indie game!
Have you ever dreamed of escaping the noisy and polluted metropolis? The hero of Back to the Village takes this step and starts a new life among fields, gardens, and cozy buildings.
Create a farm from scratch that you can truly be proud of: grow crops, care for animals, develop production, and step by step turn a small household into a thriving business. And who knows — maybe this story will inspire your own farm

games.name: Everything Will Be Fine!
games.summary: A dark conversation with a girl during a nightly car trip. A short multi-ending novel game where you try to understand this girl and her pain.

games.name: Goritaire
games.summary:
Goritaire is a solo card-based survival game centered on building a troop of seven or more gorillas. The deck consists only of Gorillas and Bananas, demanding strategic balance.

Bananas are essential for survival; if the supply fails, the troop scatters, resulting in defeat.

Strategically master diverse actions unique to each stage, expand the troop, and secure the necessary resources to reign as the master of the jungle!

games.name: SpaceShift
games.summary: Save the crew in this 2D puzzle platformer! As a small robot, you manipulate gravity, time, and your size to repair a damaged ship. Use portals to change perspectives, avoid dangerous lasers, and solve creative puzzles in an unstable pixel world.

games.name: Layer Land
games.summary: Layerland is a sandbox survival game set in a world that mirrors Earth’s terrain. Travel through gates, capture monsters as pets, and team up to battle, gather, craft, and build.

games.name: Shadow Tactics: Blades of the Shogun Ultimate Bundle
ArvusForge
games.summary: Craft your own weapons and carve your path in this fast-paced 3D roguelike action game. Defeat enemies, collect materials, and build powerful gear as you progress through a node-based world. Every run is a new challenge with randomized skills and endless crafting possibilities.

games.name: Peasant or Rebel?
games.summary: A chaotic, asymmetrical party game for up to 5 players! One player becomes the Lord, while the others are Rebels hiding among the Peasants. Will the Lord expose them in time - or be overthrown?

games.name: Weapon Master
games.summary: Dash! Combo! Strike into throw, throw into dodge, dodge into strike! WEAPON MASTER is an action game built around fast, fluid combo-driven combat. By combining main-hand weapons, off-hand weapons, equipment, and talents, you can create a combat style that is truly your own.

games.name: Prescription: Madness
games.summary: In this visual novel, you take the role of Tenty, and interact with (mainly) dark and humorous characters, that aim to find the cause of a mysterious virus that's been unleashed in the Overworld.

games.name: The Moon Looks Beautiful Tonight: Definitive Edition
games.summary: The Moon Looks Beautiful Tonight: Definitive Edition is a Yuri Visual Novel about fear of the unknown. The re-release is a complete edit of the original story, including new graphics, an original OST, and an updated story.

games.name: Paddlenoid
games.summary: Paddlenoid is a fun brick breaker you can play solo or with a friend. There’s nothing out of the ordinary and absolutely no reason to suspect a deeper purpose. Just have a good time and remember to ignore the crystals!

games.name: Defender of the Kingdom
games.summary: "Indie wave-based defense game with exploration and resource management. Protect the castle, face hordes, and complete missions as the weather and day/night cycle change with each challenge."

games.name: Crawling Angels
games.summary: Smash and thrash the mysterious Forever Chicken, a living ragdoll central to a frightful midnight carnival. Your Uncle Tontine assures "you can leave as soon as you desire" but despite their efforts no child has ever gone home... Will you be the first?

games.name: Scritchy Scratchy
games.summary: Scritchy Scratchy is a satisfying scratch card incremental game. Buy tons of scratch-off's, buy an auto scratcher to do all the hard work and win jackpots! Will you risk it all for the big reward or play it safe?

games.name: The Cube, Save Us
games.summary: A post-apocalyptic extraction action game built around brutal, close-quarters combat. Step through the Cube Gate and discover ever-shifting worlds filled with strange landscapes and terrifying enemies. Escape the Cube by fighting your way through twisted mutants and Raiders you once called allies.

games.name: Void of Lilly
games.summary: Void of Lilly is an adventure in the world of the near future with JRPG elements and Bullet Hell battles! Help Ann to find her sister and uncover secrets of this world... Void of Lilly is coming on Steam for free!

games.name: Foolish Earthlings!
games.summary: A side scrolling side-on shooter from the depths of a long-lost arcade cabinet where you take the role of a UFO on the hunt for human prey! Capture them alive with your tractor beam and pull them into your saucer while unleashing your heat ray upon tanks, planes, and all manner of military might!

games.name: Cloudwalkers
games.summary: Cloudwalkers is a hilarious third-person shooter-platformer where you defend the cloud world from quirky alien invaders.

games.name: Awakeroots
games.summary: Awakeroots is a passion project—crafted by two brothers who combine creativity with a deep love for Slavic culture and storytelling. It’s not just a game—it’s a journey into a world that could have been… and now awakens again.

games.name: Fireside Fables
games.summary:
Fireside Fables is a narrative driven 3D platformer, which follows a group of children telling stories around a campfire. These stories then come to life, and you play through them as your favourite plushie!

You will be transported across worlds! From a pirate island, to a lush forest, even to outer space - Anywhere that the children's imaginations can take you!

games.name: SOG: Vietnam
games.summary: Head to Vietnam as a lone SOG operative. Gear up, upgrade your skills, and explore the danger-filled jungles. Complete the missions assigned by your country and eliminate enemies using napalm and artillery in a brutal, tactical, turn-based 2D roguelite that does not forgive mistakes!

games.name: Gun Store Simulator
games.summary: Take control of a gun store in Gun Store Simulator and manage every aspect of the arms trading business. Buy licenses, select products, hire staff, and ensure safety to grow your store and build a successful chain. Can you dominate the market?

games.name: AI.VI
games.summary: A mercenary robot is forced out of retirement as the P.A.S.C.A.L. Gigacorporation conquers his planet to squeeze it dry. Combine your FPS and tower defense skills, then send the corporate invaders to the scrapheap, seize the means of production, and take the planet back for the worker bots!

games.name: World's Goodest Pup
games.summary: A cozy roguelike deckbuilder where you enter dog shows! Collect new tricks, decorate your pet resort, unlock breeds, and accessorize at shops as you make your way to the top dog podium. Fluffy, heartwarming runs await!

games.name: RoadHouse Manager
games.summary: Bartend and run a roadhouse in this AI-enhanced roguelite-sim! Patrons once impressed, will become permanent barflies that can be hired as staff, or sent on quests in the mysterious mist. Upgrade your roadhouse, hire a band, and build your Signature Cocktail, with 333 ingredients to choose from.

games.name: Poly Impulse
games.summary: Poly Impulse is a fast-paced FPS platform game where you will have to shoot colorful polyhedrons to impulse yourself through the level. Speedrunning is not an option, only the fastest with godlike aim will get the SS rank.

games.name: Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor - Deluxe Edition
games.summary: This Deluxe Bundle of Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor includes North Western Railway’s Number 5 engine: James! Join everyone’s favourite red, mixed-traffic tender engine on some extra adventures around Sodor.

games.name: Never Forget
games.summary: You're trapped in a repeating basement corridor. Watch closely: objects shift, signs change, and something is always slightly wrong. Detect anomalies, choose wisely, and survive the darkness miss a detail and the loop pulls you back.

games.name: Plura Ingenia: Patient 16
games.summary: A first-person psychological horror game where your personality shapes the experience. Answer unsettling questions, endure disturbing trials, and survive an evaluation that adapts to how you think and behave.

games.name: Midwest Drag Racing
games.summary: Midwest Drag Racing delivers semi-realistic drag racing thrills with deep progression, car customization, tuning and painting. Take control in solo or multiplayer races and tournaments as you build, personalize and race your ultimate drag car.

games.name: Kimi to Koishite, Soshite Sotsugyou Suru
Shop Simulator Collection Bundle: Trading Card & Collectible Cars & Retro Geek
games.summary: Can you turn your small shop into the ultimate shopping haven? Prepare to manage, sell and grow in these amazing shopping simulators!

games.name: Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor - James Addon
games.summary:
Join everyone’s favourite red, mixed-traffic tender engine on some extra adventures around Sodor.

Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor – James Add-On is powered by Train Sim World, combining the unparalleled detail and realism of Unreal Engine and Simugraph with accessible controls to create a nostalgic experience that all Thomas & Friends fans can enjoy.

games.name: Opus Magnum: Complete Edition
games.summary: “Without a doubt one of the best puzzle games I’ve ever played.” IGN “One of the very best puzzle games of the year, if not the decade.

games.name: Shapes of Memory: Jigsaw Puzzle
games.summary: Shapes of Memory brings the tranquility of Suitcase Stories to the traditional jigsaw puzzle format. Choose an illustration from the original game and lose yourself in the calm flow of putting pieces together. A Zen experience to organize your mind and complete beautiful images without rushing.

games.name: Deck of Treads
games.summary: Deck of Treads is a chaotic 2–6 player tank brawler with a deckbuilding twist. Stack upgrades that transform how your tank looks — and how it fights. Each match spirals into unpredictable mayhem, packed with ridiculous, over-the-top tank builds!

games.name: Opus Magnum: De Re Metallica
games.summary: An independent story set before the events of Opus Magnum, De Re Metallica follows a maverick alchemical researcher named Saverio Daas, who believes he can unlock heretofore unknown metallurgical secrets. Includes new puzzles, glyphs, story, music, and even a new Sigmar's Garden variant!

games.name: Wild Wizard War
games.summary: You are an all powerful Wizard. Craft spells from elemental cards. Battle against friends and other Wizards in this turn based party game. Learn deep elemental synergies or lean into wild magic for over the top destruction. Fast paced duels and the luck of the draw ensure no two battles are alike.

games.name: Relicguard
games.summary: Relicguard is an idle/clicker that you can leave running without it taking up the whole screen. Gain resources over time and spend them to upgrade your army. Once powerful enough, fight for powerful relics to augment your army. Build. Fight. Repeat.

games.name: Jaxx Blorgin's UFO Jam
games.summary: Legendary space-baller Jaxx Blorgin is comin' at you with the only UFO sports title licensed to use his name! Master physics and your UFO to shoot, dunk and defend in this arcade basketball game.

games.name: MLB The Show 26: Digital Deluxe Edition Bonus Content
Pirate Ghost Ship
games.summary: "Step into the boots of Jack, trapped on a cursed pirate galleon. Solve dark mysteries, hide from the undead, and survive the wrath of a ghostly captain. Every decision you make determines if you'll find the treasure or become part of the ship's crew forever."

games.name: What Did the Chicken See
games.summary: A short, dark visual novel about a broken world. You are trapped with a cynical narrator who questions everything—school, society, and even you. In this glitchy reality, do your choices really matter, or are you just part of the system?

games.name: Jimmy Jumps
games.summary: Jimmy Jumps is a throwback platformer that combines the simplicity of classic platformers with the mechanical depth of speedrunning. Compete for high scores in over 90 hand-crafted levels!

games.name: Gallipoli Trenches: The Forgotten Front WW1
games.summary: Amidst the chaos of Gallipoli, a battle-hardened officer vows to protect a lost child. Navigate trenches, solve environmental puzzles, and witness the human cost of war. In this atmospheric 2D platformer, survival isn't just about staying alive—it's about keeping your humanity.

games.name: Saccharine Echo
games.summary: Saccharine Echo is a story that walks the line between psychological drama and dark paranormal romance. Your choices will shape the fate of a young woman haunted by an obsessive entity from another world.

games.name: Cypher Dungeon
games.summary: Identifier = ZERO. Localization = unknown system. Objectives = survive, decrypt, escape. Codes are key. Death is protocol. The sequence begins now.

games.name: Petal by Petal
games.summary: Petal by Petal is a relaxing incremental gardening game where mindful movements are rewarded. Water seeds, grow flowers, sell your harvest, and unlock permanent upgrades across a sprawling skill tree.

games.name: Planetary Inc.
games.summary: A short incremental game about building a career by destroying planets, meeting corporate goals, and investing in profitable — and maybe not so ethical — ventures.

games.name: Side Hustle
games.summary: Welcome to the Side Hustle program! You have 5 days to dispose of defective androids and earn the prestigious City of Light citizenship! Your freedom HAS a price, and it’s a great deal!

games.name: Wizard 64
games.summary: Destroy incoming enemies as a flying wizard. Collect points to grow stronger. Unlock new weapons and abilities, and use different builds to defeat endless monster hordes.

games.name: Timber Rush
games.summary: Timber Rush is a fast-paced incremental roguelite where every swing explodes into upgrades, chaos, and massive numbers.

games.name: KeyBreach
games.summary: Your keyboard is your weapon. In this high-speed typing roguelike, speed isn't enough. Stack items to break the game economy, exploit glitches for profit, and battle unique bosses. Reach Root Access before the timer hits zero. Try not to break your spacebar in panic.

games.name: Tekken: Dark Resurrection
games.summary:
Experience Tekken: Dark Resurrection originally released on the PSP (PlayStation Portable) system, enhanced with up-rendering, rewind, quick save, and custom video filters.

The immensely popular 3D fighting game, Tekken 5: Dark Resurrection, breaks out of the arcade with all new systems and features! Experience the captivating stories of Armor King and newcomers Lili and Dragunov, unique openings and endings for each character, and even an all-new opening CG movie.

Story Battle, Quick Battle, Arcade Battle, and Practice: all of the modes you've come to expect from the series are here.

games.name: Hearthstone: Cataclysm
games.summary: Cataclysm is Hearthstone's 32nd expansion, featuring 135 new collectible cards released on March 17, 2026. This expansion continues the story of Across the Timeways, where Murozond refused to accept the defeat from Chromie, smashing the Hourglass of Time and opening a portal to a nightmare timeline where Deathwing never fell.

games.name: Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor
games.summary: Join Thomas and his friends on a special journey across Sodor! Hop into the cabs of North Western Railway’s classic steam team to enjoy nostalgic stories and all-new narratives right from the drivers’ seats. Explore the Wonders of Sodor – fun and magic await!

games.name: A Stupid Game About Pouring Drinks for the P.T.A.
games.summary: The P.T.A. (Parent Teacher's Association) is planning the Summer Fete but they need money to hire everything. Selflessly serve drinks and upsell the heck out of them to gain funds. Dig deep! It's for a good cause, after all.

games.name: Amphibarium
games.summary: Relax and collect hundreds of unique frogs and salamanders in this cozy idle game. Watch tadpoles undergo metamorphosis in real-time, customize lush terrariums, and discover rare species. Let your vivarium thrive in the background while you work or study. Start your collection today!

games.name: Medieval Life Simulator
games.summary: Rise from nothing to wealth! Mine ore, harvest crops, cut trees, gather livestock products, sell resources, hire workers, buy rentable houses, gamble with card games, bet on fights, and expand into an empire.

games.name: The Artisan of Glimmith
games.summary: The Artisan of Glimmith is a cozy, relaxing puzzle game about coloring stained glass and restoring the artworks of a kingdom above the clouds. Explore a world of handcrafted puzzles designed with intent, where simple rules lead to delightful surprises.

games.name: Monster Tavern
games.summary: A Roguelite Deckbuilder where drinks are your weapons and monsters are your guests. Serve smart, upgrade your drinks and hold the bar together for another night.

games.name: Twisted Fate
games.summary: A turn-based roguelike with a deep ability-modification system. Lead a party of three heroes, adapt their skills using modifiers, collect artifacts, and craft unique builds to destroy the source of corruption… or die trying.

games.name: I Shouldn’t Have Drawn That!
games.summary: Decks are dungeons. Each turn reveals four cards and you must face three: fight monsters, swap weapons, or manage your health in this single player rougelike dungeon crawler. Build custom dungeons and share runs with your friends using the same shuffled decks, so everyone faces the same challenges!

games.name: Trinket Bag Maker
games.summary: Trinket Bag Maker is a retro sandbox game inspired by the 2000's girl games, where you can create your own trinket bag! Choose between many adorable charms and bags to create the trinket bag of your dreams!

games.name: The Lost Experiment
games.summary: It is 1997. Farhad, an investigative journalist, arrives at an abandoned military base to uncover the truth behind a silenced 1986 meteor crash. But as he delves deeper into the forest, he finds that the debris isn't the only thing buried here. Some headlines are better left unwritten.

games.name: Bearly Flying
games.summary: A difficult game about flying a bear-powered helicopter. Ascend through the floors of a deadly factory. Solo or local co-op. Watch out for emotional turbulence. Careful with those propellers.

games.name: The Abyssal Maze
games.summary: Trapped in a nightmarish labyrinth, you have only two goals, find the ancient book and escape. But the walls are alive with echoes, and the monsters that stalk the corridors never sleep.

games.name: Midnight Scenes: Among Graves
games.summary: When the graves stop whispering in your ear, it’s time for you to surrender to eternal silence. So says the Agreement, and so it must be fulfilled. Welcome to a new dimension of horror. Welcome to Midnight Scenes.

games.name: Jiǔ Měi Zǐ Zhī Sǐ: Zhāohé Shàonǚ Xuèsè Gàobái
games.summary: In 1988, on the eve of the bursting of Japan's bubble economy, he transformed himself into a detective who was wrongly accused of a crime. He investigated the strange suicide case of Qingmei, which led to the secret of a 20-year-long serial murder case. He shuttled through the streets of Showa, which were filled with cigarettes, alcohol and neon lights. Amidst the choices between human hearts and life and death, he searched for clues and found the truth of the bloody case.

games.name: The Demon's Apple: Otome Game
games.summary: The Demon's Apple is a Dark Fantasy otome game with mature content. Pomme, a herbalist as to make an alliance with a bloodthirsty demon she saved to survive in a world hostile to both. Play as Pomme who has to learn to live under the same roof as the demon who wants her blood and more.

games.name: BoobyRogue: Tumor Takedown
games.summary: BoobyRogue: Tumor Takedown is a fast-paced 2D roguelike where you choose your hero and fight through waves of enemies in a symbolic battle against breast cancer. Collect weapons and items, create unique builds, and survive until the final Tumor.

games.name: The Ratline
games.summary: A murdered priest. A secret list. Hunt Nazi fugitives across the globe in this gritty 1971 detective thriller. Analyze evidence, follow leads, and make sharp deductions before the trail goes cold. From the creators of Family, Rivals, Conspiracy, Echo Beach and Riley & Rochelle.

games.name: Comet Tycoon
games.summary: Build and automate your way to cosmic riches in this satirical tycoon sim. Harvest comets, entertain space tourists, recycle the broke ones, and let COMTEC help you replace humanity… one drone at a time.

games.name: Tales of Klodan
games.summary: Prince Fescillia's mission in Klodan was meant to bring peace, but the cold hides something far more sinister. Alongside his friend Leonar, he becomes entangled in shadows of the past and meet a mysterious warrior in a beastly mask. Five paths, one fateful choice… Will the prince find the right one?

games.name: Street Fighter 6: Additional Character - Alex
games.summary: Hailing from the Big Apple, it’s the brawler who puts the bomb in Power Bomb! Coming in at 245 pounds and with enough muscle to bench press the entire stadium, this New York native will show he’s the undisputed champion when he enters the Street Fighter 6 ring. Let’s hear it for Alex!

games.name: Retro Rewind: Video Store Simulator
games.summary: Manage your very own video store in the early 90s! Rent, sell, decorate and expand your business from the ground up and relive the golden ages of video rentals!

games.name: Sub Optimal Co.
games.summary: It's simple. Maneuver your submarine to collect the target and return back to base while not scratching the cave-walls. Invite your friends to take control. Navigate carefully and consider every move while exploring unique cave systems in this slow pace, athmospheric, multiplayer diving experience.

games.name: Everwind
games.summary: Everwind is a novel take on RPG and Sandbox Survival genre in First-Person-Perspective. Embark on the adventure with your friends - Build a base on a flying island-ship, gather resources, craft, loot, and fight while you rise above the clouds to uncover the mysteries of this world!

games.name: Skeleseller
games.summary: Skeleseller is a laid-back idle game set in a vibrant fantasy world. You're a skeleton shopkeep who hires adventurers to collect loot for you after your untimely demise. Send adventurers into battle, sell what they find, and build up your town!

games.name: Valkyrie Destruction
games.summary: Explore a classic JRPG world together with a cute battle maiden! Upon being rescued from a monster by a passing battle maiden, the protagonist Batz begins journeying together with her. But taking advantage of her weakness, the scoundrel Batz has other plans for his beautiful savior.

games.name: College Basketball Manager
games.summary: Take charge as head coach in College Basketball Manager. Recruit your dream team, whether that be through All-Americans or hidden gems. Strategize gameplay, schedule games, run practices, and manage your staff, because you are in control. The court is your canvas – create a powerhouse.

games.name: Pretend Cars Racing 2
games.summary: An old school top-down racer with split-screen multiplayer, track editor and night and day transitions.

games.name: Dungeon Crawl Tower Run
games.summary: Single player 3D action roguelike extraction game. Create unique builds out of various combinations of skills and equipments to reach the 6th floor of the Tower!

games.name: Sphere Shootout
games.summary: "Blue Warrior 4" is a 2D cover tactical shooting game. The key to win in the game is not the shooting technique but the tactical walking.

games.name: Neve
games.summary: Neve is a non-linear interactive fiction in which your decisions can completely change the course of history. Manage your team, race against time and unravel the mysteries surrounding your ship's crash in this suffocating retrofuturistic thriller that will have you hooked from the first second.

games.name: Primarch
games.summary: Primarch is a roguelike auto-battler centered on a single hero. After being exiled to a foreign planet, you are challenged by a fallen God and pitted against your comrades to determine who is most worthy of the title ‘Primarch’.

games.name: Rikua
games.summary: Rikua is a 2.5D action platformer ninja cyberpunk game surrounded in beautiful, realistic and futuristic 3D aesthetics, and introduces a unique hack-and-slash/third-person-shooting mechanics that will keep you constantly on the edge!

games.name: Fallen Tear: The Ascension
games.summary: Fallen Tear: The Ascension is an epic adventure set in a vast magical world where you’ll fight dangerous beasts, defy corrupt gods, and face many challenges, all in an attempt to bring balance back to your world.​Embark on this journey with Hira, a mysterious young boy who seeks the truth about his forgotten past. Along the way, bond with many fully-voiced characters to unlock new skills and abilities that will aid you in your battle through environments that constantly change and react to your choices - all in classic, hand-drawn animation.

games.name: Idle Library
games.summary: Turn a small reading room into a legendary archive of knowledge in this relaxing idle incremental game featuring research upgrades, prestige progression, and offline growth

games.name: Catmorphosis
games.summary: A supernatural adult visual novel with weird romantic elements, a unique vibrant retro art style, and an abnormal storyline. You're Johann, and one night, you decided to order a cat from shady website. However, when the cat arrives a few days later, it's definitely NOT a normal cat.

games.name: Rain & Sacrifice
games.summary:
Build a functioning society of Aztec Jaguars by sacrificing people to the Gods in order to gain Favor and keep your people alive by summoning Rain and Thunder from the skies. Expand your domain while always being set back by the very forces that will assist you.

Protect your city from evil heretical Aligators, farm the land and provide an equivalent exchange of Death into Life before all falls apart once the Feathered Serpent arrives at the dawn of the 15th day.

games.name: Us Five Forever
games.summary: Olivia Herrera's closest friend Kyle went missing at a frat house two years ago. A party at that frat house is her chance to investigate what happened to him, and get to the bottom of a strange connection she shares with her former group of friends.

games.name: Shard Squad - Wind Character Pack
games.summary: Focused on speed, area control, and dynamic interactions with enemies, the four Wind Shards bring new ways to dominate the battlefield.

games.name: YEKO
games.summary: Ever said, “Let me finish this hand, then I can die”? We did and took our gaming addiction to the afterlife. Yeko tells the absurd tale of skeletons who couldn't get enough of Okey in life and now set up the table beyond the grave low on calcium, but never on competitive spirit.

games.name: Another Day As President
games.summary: You are the president. Stay awake, work, survive... Complete your term one day at a time whilst fending off disobedient staff. Juggle tasks, stay alert, and don't miss a shot.

games.name: Crucifier
games.summary: Crucifier is the worlds most Christian racing game ever developed! Play as a Roman soldier as he completes his day! Compete in 3 races to get on the top score boards! Farm your local fields for crops to obtain enough money to rest comfortably! Talk to lovely locals and battle a crazy time traveler!

games.name: The King is Watching: Crowns of History
games.summary: Play as Cleopatra, Taizong of Tang, and Xerxes, three legendary-inspired rulers with radically different playstyles. Master death and rebirth, dominate with devastating defenses, or risk everything for overwhelming power.

games.name: DDOL
games.summary: Don't Destroy On Load" — Souls engraved on the board. DDOL is a strategy game of "Succession" and "Sealing." Channel souls to expand territory. If the flow is severed, the chains of Lock emerge. Outsmart "Breakthrough" cards. Lock the board, deprive options, and reach a rock-solid Checkmate.

games.name: Blunt Blade and a Hundred Halls
games.summary: Kill. Kill. Die. Repeat. Blunt Blade and a Hundred Halls is a game about slaying monsters in a dungeon to grind their meat as an offering to the devil who lives in your basement walls. A retro-styled, fast-paced, rogue-lite slash 'em up with lots of blood and gore.

games.name: Super Ant Art Tycoon
games.summary: You're an art dealer with nothing but ants. They paint. You set the prices. Sometimes it sells, sometimes it doesn't. Grow your colony, design galleries, and become absurdly wealthy in this fully remastered 3D idle tycoon game where the artists are tiny and the ambition is enormous

games.name: Fly2k
games.summary: A Y2K, cyberspace, butterfly flight sim. Flap using 2 button controls, avoid malware obstacles, boost your speed and break free from the web!

games.name: Line of Taste: Pizza Crust
games.summary: Line of Taste – Pizza Crust is a pizzeria simulation where you run the restaurant on your own. Place conveyor belts to solve puzzles in your charming kitchen!

games.name: Pit Pioneers
games.summary: A Lemmings-inspired puzzle game where you guide pioneers through treacherous underground caverns by strategically assigning abilities like digging, building, and blocking to overcome obstacles.

games.name: Greenfield Valley
games.summary: Build your peaceful farm in a quiet mountain valley. Grow crops, care for animals, complete quests, level up, and upgrade your home. A cozy farming experience with dynamic weather, no timers, and no pressure. Just relax and enjoy farm life.

games.name: Idlemon
games.summary: Idlemon is an idle desktop monster tamer. Played on the side of your screen, your monster will gain experience and collect monster eggs. Upgrade your stats, purchase and collect cards, used to decorate your island.

games.name: MingJiangSha
games.summary: "MingJiangSha" is a multiplayer identity deduction and strategy card game. Players can transform into legendary generals throughout history, play cards, deduce identities, coordinate skills, formulate strategies in ever-changing battlefields, and engage in a thrilling strategic showdown!

games.name: Doomstacker
games.summary: A compact power-fantasy strategy experience wrapped in an auto-battler. Choose a castle, build it up, collect artifacts, and craft wild synergies between artifacts and (massive) armies.

games.name: Thunder and Line-ing
games.summary: Move lightning through the air to form lines. When everything aligns a boom echoes blasting your score up to a higher strata!

games.name: Peeping
games.summary: Peeping​ is a psychological survival game where you, a detained "supernatural suspect," must balance pretense and madness during a 31-day prison observation.

games.name: Mine Mine
games.summary: Mine Mine is an incremental game about mining ores, upgrading your equipment, and unlocking better and better quarries!

games.name: Capper
games.summary: Lower your expectations. Now lower them further. This is a game about flipping bottle caps. The goal is simple: pay off your bar tab by flipping bottle caps face up.

games.name: Qelochia
games.summary: On a secret arctic research base, a scientist, soldier, AI, and eldritch beast struggle for happiness. A short visual novel about love and pain set in an alternate history where humanity is ruled by eldritch gods.

games.name: All Hail the Orb
games.summary:
All Hail The Orb is a quirky and short active incremental game in which you devote yourself to The Orb!
Explore the once lost dungeon as you build your gathering of cultists and bring the dungeon back to its former glory!
Explore and enjoy the light-hearted progression and story!

games.name: Orbital Overdrive
games.summary: Orbital Overdrive is a high-octane roguelite twin-stick arena shooter where you are pitted against hordes of relentless enemies on an orbit of a planet. Choose from hundreds of different abilities and weapons to create the deadliest build and smash the resistance!

games.name: Notebook Battlegrounds
games.summary: A multiplayer game where your voice is the weapon. Play as a random letter and use proximity voice chat to hear nearby players. Say the funny words on your screen to shoot opponents, find secret words for special powers, and battle in Timed Deathmatch or Battle Royale!

games.name: Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!
games.summary: Lock and load into the Starship Troopers universe and join the Mobile Infantry in the most realistic depiction of war ever made ! Experience an original story in this action-packed, first-person retro shooter. Would you like to know more?

games.name: 100 Blacksmith Cats
games.summary: Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. ️‍Can you find them all?

games.name: Balltopia
games.summary: Balltopia is a roguelike marble racing simulator where your only objective is to make more money. Featuring dozens of unique levels and over 50 game-altering cards, the potential to win is almost limitless - but be careful! Place an errant bet, and you could lose it all.

games.name: Yes, My Warlord
games.summary: Rule as a hobgoblin warlord in this kingdom management RPG. Balance resources and manage the shifting opinions of commoners, goblinoids, and elites. Face difficult decisions, and choose whether to rule with fairness… or with brutality.

games.name: Golemworks
games.summary: Assemble a factory, manufacture golems, and defend yourself from ruin.

games.name: Love in the Time of Spellphage
games.summary: A one-hour spellpunk narrative adventure about pandemic, wizards, and first love.

games.name: A Ragdoll Rage Game
games.summary: A Ragdoll Rage Game is a physics-based rage platformer where you grab, aim, and fling a ragdoll through challenging obstacles. The game also features secret badges, unlockable cosmetics, a built-in level editor, global leaderboards, and more.

games.name: Grind Survivors
games.summary: Grind Survivors is a fast-paced action roguelike where demon hunters face endless hellspawn. Dodge, loot, and blast through brutal bullet-hell combat with dynamic builds and ever-changing weapons in a scorched, demon-ridden world.

games.name: Little Chef: Cozy Cooking
games.summary: Little Chef: Cozy Cooking is a physics-based cooking game full of discovery and playful chaos. Experiment with everything in the kitchen and unlock around 300 recipes on your way to becoming a master chef!

games.name: Deadline Delivery
games.summary: Strap in, floor it, and deliver the goods... before the bomb goes off. Play as Carl, a monkey driving a wildly unstable mail truck that's rigged with explosives on a tight deadline.

games.name: Deadline Escape
games.summary: Deadline Escape is a Low Poly Extraction Looter Shooter that throws you into a Post-Apocalyptic World. Scavenge for valuable resources, face deadly enemies and fight for your survival as the clock ticks down toward the deadline.

games.name: Creature Creation Station
games.summary: Create characters, watch them play together, and easily share your creations with friends!

games.name: Cavescape
games.summary: Escape a procedurally generated cave by grappling and swinging. Explore the depths of the ecosystem, fight foreign creatures, and upgrade your tools. Destructible environments, deep mechanics, and tough bosses!

games.name: Age of Enchantment
games.summary: Tower defense deckbuilder where your towers are classes from D&D. Enchant towers with powerful buffs, sacrifice cards to forge new synergies, and select artifacts to customize your build.

games.name: Frog Holm
games.summary: Unexpectedly, you become the owner of a pub that has seen better days. During the day, set sail to explore a variety of new islands, each with its own unique treasures and ingredients for your cocktails. Can you restore the pub to its former glory? Dive into this charming adventure and find out!

games.name: Murder at the Birch Tree Theater
games.summary: Use deductive and abductive reasoning to uncover the truth behind a series of several unsettling deaths at a smalltown community theater. Uncover a narrative that spans decades by revealing the lies, petty grievances, and power struggles of people who came together to make art.

games.name: Stitched Together
games.summary: Stitched Together is an RPG adventure with a deep story, unique battle mechanics, world-defying stakes, and a whole extra dimension!

games.name: Find Matt's Cats
games.summary: A scavenger-hunt adventure that spans 80 hand-crafted levels, including beautiful holiday destinations and fantasy themes. Look in buildings, detonate bombs, unlock treasure chests, dig for secrets, and more! Every item is clickable as you search for Hidden Cats & Dogs!

games.name: Movierooms: Cinema Management
games.summary: Become the manager of your own Cinema in this thrilling new Tycoon! Through space and time, explore the various aspects of handling a thriving business. Manage movie choices and screenings, staff, rooms, and more!

games.name: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime
games.summary: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime is a frog-obsessed comedy adventure featuring tactical frog battles, bizarre quests, and the mother of all frogs: the motherfrogger.

games.name: Age of Barbarians Chronicles
games.summary: Chronicles is a crude and violent action RPG game in pure Sword & Sorcery style. Get ready to live the heroic and bloody adventures of barbarians, amazons, and sorcerers against the insane and omnipotent Sorcerer Gods, absolute masters of the prehistoric world of Atlan.

games.name: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin
games.summary: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin is an open-world action RPG set in the universe of The Seven Deadly Sins. Step into the role of Prince Tristan of Liones and explore an open-world Britannia, as you embark on a journey to restore order to a world thrown into chaos by the collision of time and space.

games.name: Duck and the Land of Flightless Birds
games.summary: Duck and the Land of Flightless Birds - A charming platforming adventure where you play as a fat duck that can't fly.

games.name: Minesweeper Arena
games.summary: Find all the mines quicker than your friends in the classic puzzle game.

games.name: Super Smash Bros. Ultimate: Ichiban Kasuga Moveset (Yakuza)
Kenny vs. Spenny: The Handheld Game
games.summary: Since the beginning of time mankind has been forced to compete for survival. This spirit of competition has reached a pinnacle in the relationship of two best friends who battle against each other. Why? ... Glory for the winner, humiliation for the loser. This is KENNY v.s. SPENNY, The Handheld Game.

games.name: Cheated
games.summary:
Hack your friends to make them fall.
You are tiny. Reach the attic. It's easy.
2-8 players, or streamer mode.

games.name: Wizard Punks!!!
games.summary: WIZARD PUNKS!!! is a fast-paced, spell-slinging 4-player local party game. Create spells by combining the four elements of Air, Earth, Fire and Water, and defeat your fellow wizards with a variety of bombastic magics.

games.name: Vault of The Vanquished
games.summary:
Vault of the Vanquished is a rogue-like adventure where you have been sent to the afterlife, after you were killed by the kings orders. You have now been resurrected and now you can collect and unlock hundreds of cards, to vanquish as many enemies as possible and bring peace to your Kingdom.

This game is built on the idea of RNG, bringing you through countless items to collect, and enemies to Vanquish! Push to Vanquish enough enemies to fight the boss of each zone, cleansing them one by one, and bringing peace to the Kingdom.

games.name: Aviarium
games.summary: Aviarium is a relaxing sky sanctuary simulation filled with cute birds. Manage your floating aviary with click and idle mechanics, collect resources, and enjoy a pleasant experience in a colorful and peaceful world above the clouds.

games.name: Hotshots
games.summary: HOTSHOTS — is a dynamic, 2D adventure where the price of error is the complete loss of progress. There is no place for saving here: every run is an intense, separate battle. Your only reward for victory is taking valuable weapons with you to start the next, even more dangerous run...

games.name: The Hero of Destiny Was Killed by the Final Boss
games.summary: How many NPCs equal 1 Hero? In the land of Alta, The Hero of Destiny was fated to defeat a terrible Dark Wizard... but the Hero of Destiny was killed by the final boss. What now? Next to the final dungeon, in a sleepy village, 50 NPCs decide to take matters into their own hands.

games.name: The Town of Nowhere: End Of The Line
games.summary: This is the first downloadable entry in the Town of Nowhere series. This game was made with the intention of being playable and enjoyable regardless of if you know the back story of the larger surrealist horror series. Largely inspired by CGA DOS adventure games TTON:EotL is in full first person 3D.

games.name: Scarred Steel
games.summary: A brutal medieval roguelite where every scar tells your story. Permanent injuries, hard choices, and bloody duels shape your path in a dying world.

games.name: The Underdog
games.summary: A top-down soulslike action game. Play as a medieval mercenary, use 4 weapon types (sword & shield, two-handed sword, mace, spear) to tackle BOSS warrant levels, explore diverse scenes, strengthen through failure, and unlock surprises.

games.name: Troll Chess Sekai
games.summary: One day, you gain the power to cast a troll spell in a chess game. Eager to try it out, you head to the chess club—where rivals range from novice Mirai to the mysterious owner who surpasses human skill. The rules of chess are no longer safe. Will you seize victory, or be swallowed by chaos?

games.name: Giant’s Heart
games.summary: Giant`s Heart — roguelike dungeon crawler with gardening elements. Discover powerful artifacts, make critical path choices - time is your most precious currency. A Giant marches toward the castle... You have just 5 minutes to descend into the dungeons, find and destroy its heart!

games.name: Keplerian Space Discovery
games.summary: Travel through the solar system in your own spaceship! The motion of each celestial body is accurately reproduced by the Kepler equation.

games.name: Altiros
games.summary: Build! Craft! Destroy! Jump on clouds and fight cute monsters in skill-based battles of steel, magic and spirit in this online sandbox adventure set in a fantastical world of sky islands!

games.name: Kawaii Survivors
games.summary: Fight endless enemy hordes in a glitched cyberpunk world as Lucy the cosplayer. This bullet heaven roguelite blends kawaii anime aesthetics with intense top-down survivors-like action. Use cosplay powers to battle waves of corrupted enemies. Pure bullet hell chaos with a touch of 90s anime.

games.name: SCP-3008: Infinite Store
games.summary: An observation-driven psychological horror set inside an endless furniture superstore. Spot anomalies, choose the correct path, complete your shopping list — and escape the loop.

games.name: B-Day-25
games.summary:
B-Day-25 is an Another World story set in the WithoutEyes series.

It tells the story of someone who wanted to save another person,
and someone who relied too deeply on that kindness.

A destructive brotherhood drama shaped by guilt, blame, and emotional dependence.

games.name: Leaves 3
games.summary: Dive into the enchanting world of Leaves 3, a handcrafted adventure full of mysteries and wonders. Explore a world crafted with love and imagination, solve puzzles and free the Treefruities.

games.name: Buying Tomato
games.summary: This is a short visual novel about going to buy a tomato.

games.name: Coin Pit
games.summary: One chamber. One machine. Endless damnation.

games.name: Sand Seeker
games.summary: Walk the ancient paths. Seek what was lost.

games.name: Suction Bot
games.summary: Suction Bot is unique, mouse only platformer that has you climbing from a sewer to space. As you climb, you'll encounter challenges, such as swinging pendulums, flying pigeons, wrecking balls and more.

games.name: Knights End
games.summary: Work together to survive the knight shift in this co-op PvE horror game. Serve your villagers’ as a disgraced knight by completing their commands in a cursed kingdom. Reclaim your lost honor to earn items and a chance at your freedom.

games.name: Uknon Jones: Portal
games.summary: In this platform and puzzle game, Elsa LOVELUST is equipped with a gate gun. You must destroy objects or teleport her through the portals to help her cross inaccessible places and reach the flag of the different levels of the game.

games.name: I Traveled Back to 5 Days Before the Apocalypse
games.summary: "I Traveled Back to 5 Days Before the Apocalypse" is a real-time text adventure. After freezing and starving in the apocalypse, you revive five days prior. Now you must stockpile supplies, manage neighbor relations, and survive the impending catastrophe—your choices determine everything.

games.name: Sinker Sound
games.summary: a Fishing game with Musical Rhythm gimmick! Explore a Strange Fantastical lake and find many strange fishes with its own unique original music!

games.name: Deckbuilder Fantasy
games.summary: Embark on a thrilling deckbuilding adventure! Craft your strategy as you explore treacherous lands and face challenging foes. Discover a vast array of powerful cards and unique treasures, fighting your way to the final boss on a journey that's different every time.

games.name: Sherman Commander
games.summary: Command a platoon of Sherman tanks over the most famous theatres of WW2. Take the commander’s seat and give specific orders to your crew, or open the tactical map to coordinate your actions with accompanying units.

games.name: Monari Station
games.summary: An ordinary commute becomes a moral crucible in Monar Station, a short psychological horror visual novel. Navigate an extreme situation, make value-defining choices... Discover what lingers after the train moves on...

games.name: Channel 64
games.summary: A short psychological VHS horror about routine tape digitizing, where reality starts to feel more and more strange with each new recording.

games.name: Smile More
games.summary: A short medical simulation horror game with multiple endings where the imperfect are made HAPPY. Perform tasks and operations on sedated patients to fix their defects before submitting your files to the Ministry of Happiness & Peace!

games.name: Sato Killing Time Chat.exe
games.summary: It was supposed to be just a harmless chat to kill time with a stranger named Mina. But from the other side of the browser, the boundary between your reality and the internet is slowly being eroded. This is a desktop-invasion chat horror.

games.name: Grand Containment Sector 4
games.summary:
Grand Containment : Sector 4,

"They said it was just a server farm. They lied."

For years, Grand Gaming Technologies Private Limited (GGTPL) has been a leader in virtual entertainment. But rumors have started to circulate on the dark web—rumors of people going missing near their remote "Logistics Center" hidden deep in the forest. They call it Sector 4.

You are a whistleblower who has received a cryptic coordinate. Armed with only a flashlight and a camera, you must infiltrate the decaying industrial complex to find out what GGTPL is really building.

But the factory isn't abandoned. The machinery is still humming, the security protocols are active, and something horrifying is stalking the assembly lines.

Investigate. Survive. Expose

games.name: Carrot Overload
games.summary:
our young rabbit hero travel without goal to the green area.the middle land of the rabbit territory is known for being at peace. But it is no longer the fact today.

it is time adorable hero to explore and give a good pawn in the slimes.

trials are stacking, hopes are increasing !

become the hope they deeply need.

games.name: Guerilla Cinema // Guerilla Theater
games.summary: A comedy horror indie visual novel about an experimented on silverback gorilla that escapes from a research facility and breaks into a movie theater. The player has to choose between three different items to stop the gorilla and whatever item they choose determines what ending they get.

games.name: Tilde and the 9 Mystical Glorbos
games.summary: You follow Tilde, an average 20-year-old guy living a humdrum life on his own. When one day word spreads of a cluster of so-called "meteorites" that came from the sky in the middle of the night. With nothing better to do he decides to check it out. If only he knew what he would set in motion...

games.name: The Narrator Says We're Meant to Be!
games.summary:
A sweet and comedic love story where you romance Julian, the most popular guy around, while also dealing with an opinionated and tsundere Narrator trying to give you advice on how to reach your happy ending.

Will you succeed, comically mess up, or... fall for someone who wasn't supposed to be a character in the first place?

games.name: Super Holo Wars
games.summary:
Super Holo Wars is about one simple concept: Take the members of Hololive, put them into giant robots and give them a world to play around in.

Super Holo Wars offers a full-length SRPG experience covering the first part of a two-chapter story. Join the members of Hololive as they embark on their quest to protect two worlds from an Alien invasion and the Noise

games.name: The Black Whale
games.summary: The factory chip began to malfunction. Your horrible headaches don’t bother anyone in this dystopian world. “Black Whale”, the attractive white powder, is the only thing that can stop the pain. And show you the life without the horrors of harsh reality.

games.name: Kicking Upwards
games.summary: Kicking Upwards is an experimental, skill-based physics game where you kick a red ball up a mountain.

games.name: SketchCode
games.summary: SketchCode is an online multiplayer party game where players draw and guess words in team-based matches. Players can create private rooms, customize teams and rounds, add custom words, and compete under time limits by explaining terms through drawings while following the game rules.

games.name: Faye's Garden
games.summary: Here, in this verdant embassy, Faye opens her arms, and legs, to you. So, don't forget take a deep breath, savor the magic in the air, and get ready to experience the beautiful land of Ithonia!

games.name: Happy Harvest
games.summary: A cozy themed, idle incremental farming game.

games.name: Draft Day Sports: College Basketball 26
games.summary: Build your college basketball dynasty in Draft Day Sports: College Basketball 26. Recruit elite talent, manage NIL strategy, dominate the transfer portal, and guide your team through March. The deepest and most realistic college basketball simulation yet.

games.name: Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain
games.summary: Your Virtual Vacation Awaits

games.name: Penguin
games.summary: Fish, sell, upgrade, and dive ever deeper into an ocean full of secrets. Collect the entire ARTICDEX!

games.name: Coloring Pixels: Natural Wonders
games.summary: This Natural Wonders book unlocks 20 additional levels for Coloring Pixels. Each image shows a different natural wonder from our beautiful green-and-blue planet! See the wonders of the natural world in this book!

games.name: Flash Knight Nymphelia
games.summary: A selfie-obsessed-girl-turned-transforming-heroine fights against an evil organization in a powered suit fueled with her stress from hiding her true self from public!

games.name: Beyond the Eyes
games.summary: A 2d game with a view from above, where you are in the shoes of a blind protagonist and have to find a way to escape from a mansion by collecting various items scattered around it at random while being chased by a monster.

games.name: Trade Empire
games.summary: Trade Empire is a medieval trade strategy simulation game. Create your merchant, start trading in your chosen city, and use diplomatic moves to take control of trade across the entire map and eliminate your rivals.

games.name: Find 100 Ducks and Blast Them...in Space!!!
games.summary: Yes! In this game you must blast 100 toy ducks...IN SPACE! Relax, take aim, and let the feathers fly! With light-hearted gameplay and cute ducks to hunt, it's a casual first-person experience full of wholesome, family-friendly fun!

games.name: Night of Nightmare
games.summary: Every night, the nightmare comes. Your room is no longer safe... The moment you lie down on a strange bed and close your eyes, you are no longer alone. Is this reality? Or are you inside someone else’s nightmare?

games.name: Exercise Your Demons
games.summary: Step into the world of Exercise your Demons, a 2d narrative adventure inspired by Irish fairies and folklore. Meet and befriend 5 locals while you work towards settling into the small fictional town called Inishsióg in County Galway, Ireland.

games.name: Topobeam
games.summary: Topobeam is a puzzle game about redirecting lasers in different two-dimensional manifolds. The levels operate on a grid system, but pay attention to how the sides of the grid are glued together as players, objects, and lasers can cross over these gluings to different parts of the level.

games.name: Sidyq
games.summary: Sidyq combines monster collection with dynamic turn-based battles. Unleash your tactical creativity and face formidable bosses in a strategic RPG where every decision can change the outcome of the fight.

games.name: Don't Crack!
games.summary: A chaotic co-op or solo rage platformer about a fragile egg’s dangerous journey back to its nest.

games.name: Cyber Saber Pro
games.summary: Become HKKMR-U, the legendary Cyborg Samurai, and test your reflexes in a fast-paced arcade hack-and-slash survival game. Stand your ground, unleash your sword skills, and face wave after wave of mechanical enemies inspired by Japanese folklore.

games.name: Insanio
games.summary: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

games.name: Viral Hunters
games.summary: You are trapped in the same facility, aiming to find a way out through the scattered "Vaccine Injectors". The game's core revolves around the crucial vaccines.

games.name: Omoide Cafe
games.summary: Omoide Cafe is a calm café/pastry shop simulation where you develop your own café step by step, unlocking new recipes, equipment, and features with the guidance of Bebii.

games.name: Phantom the Huntress
games.summary: Not sword-clanging trash. Not glitter-magic garbage. Bow only. The rest is for peasants. I’m Phantom, elite huntress, eternally exhausted. You’ll track, gather, goblin-slay, babysit dumb NPCs and rank up at snail pace. Wishlist now. I get bonus wine money. Do it or vanish. My patience is dead.

games.name: Everfall 2: Idle Dungeon RPG
games.summary: Unique Bosses, Loot Filters, Combat Pets, & Pick Your Team of 4 to Customize with Skill trees, Keystones, Abilities, and Runes in a MASSIVE ENDGAME!

games.name: Akunin-Akka
games.summary: An interrogation game where you play as the detective in charge of a case and interrogate suspects to uncover the truth behind the bombing. Uncover the weaknesses of the unique suspects and get to the bottom of the case!

games.name: I am Slime
games.summary: Memory backtracking, as one puzzle after another is solved, the memories of the blue slime are also turned over page by page ..

games.name: Duck the Miner
games.summary: Duck the Miner is a 2D mining game, where you control a little duck, that unfortunately has a huge debt. To pay it off, you were contracted by a greedy company to embark on missions across space, collecting resources to help restore Earth from its devastating past.

games.name: Today's Menu
games.summary: Mix cards with restaurant management in this sim game. Build, gather ingredients, and learn recipes. Use your deck to serve customers, earn profits and fame, then upgrade and expand to craft your ideal restaurant.

games.name: Tiny Biomes: Cozy Idle
games.summary: Tiny Biomes is a relaxing idle game where animals peacefully produce resources and you gather wood in a tranquil harvesting area. Build small biomes, earn gold, and enjoy steady progress without pressure, timers, or stress. Play at your own pace and unwind.

games.name: Next Patient
games.summary: During a pandemic, you are a medical distribution officer at a controlled checkpoint. Review IDs, medical reports, and blood tests; approve or deny requests. Supplies are limited. Procedures are strict. The decision is yours.

games.name: Darkrite: The Blight of Love
games.summary: Old school, rich with lore, and made with love. Experience a linear gothic story with carefully handwritten prose. Play either as an action RPG or visual novel. Your Weaver journey starts here.

games.name: Mazy
games.summary: MAZY is a first-person PS1-style horror game where you explore procedurally generated mazes, solve a variety of minigames and survive while hostile clowns hunt you down. Collect coins to buy power-ups and assistance to help you escape.

games.name: UltiMage
games.summary: Rogue-lite, magic based combat system. A lighter dark fantasy about a person "iseaki" 'ed to another world.

games.name: Droste Detective
games.summary: You're stuck in an office corridor with no exit that has a painting of the same corridor on the wall. But then you notice the corridor in the painting is not quite the same. You decide to inspect the painting...

games.name: Scission
games.summary: Scission is a dark and gruesome action game where you control two characters at once. Fight grotesque representations of the subconscious, master new skills and explore the depth of the human mind in this singleplayer game.

games.name: Desktop Aquarium
games.summary: A relaxing mini aquarium that stays on your desktop corner while you do other stuff — collect fish, upgrade tanks, and enjoy a cozy idle experience.

games.name: End of Garbage
games.summary: A darkened sky. A blazing fire. A wretched tombstone. And you, here at the end of everything. End of Garbage is a short, first-person puzzle game exploring the dark surreality of endings.

games.name: Recursive
games.summary: Incrementals layered inside of an incremental. Click your way through waves of enemies to grow and defend your kingdom. Unlock a bunch of minigames with different mechanics and bonuses along the way! Can you defeat the final boss and reclaim the throne?!

games.name: Drill and Delve
games.summary: You've been trapped in a mine. You'll need to use your tools to dig your way to the exit in a fully destructible 3D voxel terrain. Manage your oxygen and equipment, and uncover the dark mystery buried deep within the mine.

games.name: Echo Factory
games.summary: The world has gone silent. Tap into the void, generate echoes, and automate the restoration of sound in this neon-soaked, sci-fi idle game. Build powerful machines, unlock complex frequencies, and rebuild the cosmic core to bring harmony back to the universe.

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Thea: Canyne Ward
games.summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Thea: Canyne Ward Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Relaxed-acabra
games.summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Relaxed-acabra Change Rudy's look with outfits!

games.name: Völund
games.summary: The forge remembers every strike. In VÖLUND, a blacksmithing roguelike, you shape raw ore into weapons of legend. Unearth cursed metals, master the ancient craft, and forge your path to immortality.

games.name: Teko
games.summary: Teko is an Indie Roguelike Deckbuilder where you have to reach the highest possible score by playing Poker hands, but in an unconventional way: making 3 combos at once.

games.name: Caribbean Legend: Age of Pirates
games.summary: You are the captain and owner of your own ship—the finest fate one could hope for in the 17th century Caribbean. Unlimited sandbox experience. A unique genre blending naval combat, land exploration, and global map. Think Sid Meier's Pirates! meets Bannerlord.

games.name: Cat Familiar Center
