games.summary: Cat Familiar Center is a relaxing cat-raising game. Players will play as a witch and, with the help of fellow witches, train different cat familiars and find suitable new homes for them.

games.name: Summer Delicous Simulator
games.summary: Start your career on the bustling city streets as an ice cream or hotdog vendor! Upgrade your cart, outsmart your rivals, and compete with friends to become the most popular seller in town!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Special Outfits Set
games.summary: This set includes recommended downloadable content. Contents: * Special Outfits Set

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Rudyzeno
games.summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Rudyzeno Change Rudy's look with outfits!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Scintillating Armor
games.summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Scintillating Armor Change Rudy's look with outfits!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Shogun Rudy
games.summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Shogun Rudy Change Rudy's look with outfits!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Rudy's Outfit: Rudy's Arkbelt
games.summary: Contains the following: Rudy's Outfit: Rudy's Arkbelt Change Rudy's look with outfits!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Ogden: Summertime Ogden
games.summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Ogden: Summertime Ogden Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Gaul: Fur-tive Five Leader
games.summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Gaul: Fur-tive Five Leader Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Kora: Attendant's Attire
games.summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Kora: Attendant's Attire Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

games.name: Toy Zombies
games.summary: Escape the abandoned mall by hiding from the creatures, learn their behaviors and explore the place to find the way out.

games.name: Shuffles 'n Scuffles
games.summary: Enter a papercraft world in this single-player, deck-building, card-battling, roguelike strategy game. Use your wits to battle your way through waves of enemies, while rewriting the very definitions of the cards you hold.

games.name: Homeshift
games.summary: Guide a young boy through fears and dark caverns, in hopes of reaching a happy home. Homeshift sees you platforming in diverse environments, utilising your wits and tools to overcome challenges in creative ways.

games.name: Happy Bones: Welcome Home
games.summary: After receiving a frantic message from her father, Laura heads out to her parents house located inside a cult compound to search for the truth, in this complete remake of the classic horror themed JRPG!

games.name: Pizza Slice
games.summary: More than just a simulator, Pizza Slice is a true Italian adventure! Take on the role of Tonio, manage your family pizzeria, bake authentic Italian pizzas, fight the competition and grow your business. See if you can win the title of the best pizzeria in the area!

games.name: Forever-Happy-Town
games.summary: A PvE multiplayer shooter where a prophecy of eight endless nights is rapidly approaching, are you good enough to keep the town forever happy? You'd better be, else a herd of lovely rabbits will require rapid relocation.

games.name: You're My Favorite Person
games.summary: Spend time with your new best friend! Have fun as it takes you through digital worlds to solve puzzles and collect Perfect Stars! After all, it knows what's best! It knows what's best! It knows what's best.

games.name: The Last Screening
games.summary: You find yourself inside a cinema hallway, ready to watch your film. The venue, however, has other plans for you.

games.name: Reap: We Reap What Crawls
games.summary: Co-op horror dungeon crawling X creature collection & farming! Descend into shifting dungeons, throw physics objects, and trap terrifying monsters! Imprison them in your decaying basement lair, farm and feed them cursed crops, then sell them to crazy buyers. R.E.P.O. meets Slime Rancher!

games.name: Killer Island
games.summary: A first-person social deduction survival horror game. Stranded with your friends on a foggy island—but one of you is a killer. Chop wood to stay warm, hunt animals for food, retrieve artifacts for sacrifice, and expose the killer before it’s too late. 3–8 players. Proximity voice chat.

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection
games.summary: Twin Rathalos, born in a twist of fate. Two centuries after a conflict that divided neighboring kingdoms, the drums of war are reignited as twin Rathalos—long thought extinct—hatch from a single egg: an omen of destruction. Is there hope beyond the northern border?

games.name: Lucid Blocks
games.summary: Explore, build, and survive in a liminal voxel expanse oozing with surreal landscapes and esoteric critters.

games.name: The Shame of a Daydreamer
games.summary: Shame & choices = possible apocalypse. You need to figure out what’s causing the apocalypse to happen, so that you can prevent it. 2 playable characters with different relations to shame → 2 unique perspectives of the same story. Complicated families, branching choices and unforgiving consequences.

games.name: Reflections of the Void
games.summary: A sci-fi drama about love, control, and the price of human emotion. Care for your wards, follow every order — or break the rules to discover who you truly are.

games.name: Dyping Escape
games.summary: Escape from a dying-typing game where the words you type become reality and turn against you.

games.name: Shifting To The Backrooms
games.summary: "Shifting To The Backrooms" is a mix of psychological horror and drama game where the protagonist, Will, grappling with family tragedies, discovers the method of "shifting" enabling him to escape to the dream liminal worlds. However, the dream turns into a nightmare from which Will cannot wake up.

games.name: Funi Raccoon Game
games.summary: Explore a series of whimsical, interconnected worlds to steal everything not nailed down. Make a garbage bin a garbage home :)

games.name: Piece by Piece
games.summary: Piece by Piece is a jigsaw puzzle platformer where each level is fragmented into jigsaw pieces. Clear each puzzle by connecting and disconnecting each piece to make your way through each of our 100 handcrafted levels. Discover new themes and mechanics along the way!

games.name: Vespera Bononia
games.summary: Fight the nightmares of the city! Master a blend of third-person shooting, magic, and bullet hell to survive the fast-paced, ever-changing chaos that grips the streets. Change classes during combat, enter Bononia, and face your destiny.

games.name: Shadows Of Wyrmwood
games.summary: Shadows of Wyrmwood is a roguelike adventure RPG. Use spells, swords, and strategy to defeat every corrupted foe. Travel across four procedurally generated maps that grow harder with every encounter. With each victory, you obtain new armor, weapons, and spells from defeated enemies.

games.name: Yellow Trouble
games.summary: 8-way water gun blasting horizontal 2D arcade co-op shoot ‘em up, with ducks?!

games.name: Spoopcore 3D
games.summary: Spoopcore 3D is a low-poly 3D platformer/FPS hybrid where you play as a slime named Reggie on a mission to save ducks from across the multiverse and kill a god. Zoom through levels, find secrets, and dispatch enemies using weapon combos.

games.name: Gensokyo: Presumption of Guilt - Pansies Before Dawn
games.summary: An ancient village, once sealed by yokais for a millennium, is now plagued by a series of bizarre yokai murders. Follow the protagonist as they delve into the investigation, unravelling the mysteries submerged in the history.

games.name: Mythmatch
games.summary: A Greek mythology community sim about bringing people together by putting things together.

games.name: Bird Watching Simulator
games.summary: An avid bird watching simulator with realistic watching mechanics. Grab your binoculars and build your attention span, Bird Watching Simulator is an unbelievably relaxing and interactive game that draws you so close to nature, it feels like you're apart of it.

games.name: Ghost Cam
games.summary: Ghost Cam is a spooky exploratory VR and PC game where you search for ghosts – at your own risk… Discover how good you are at finding ghosts, figuring out clues and uncovering the story - if you can survive the multiple endings.

games.name: Subsequence
games.summary: Subsequence is a linear single player story driven 3D adventure game about overcoming obstacles, solving logical puzzles and exploration of the world.

games.name: Panic Floor!!
games.summary: An extremely unforgiving and constrained precision oriented platformer with fast paced flow!!

games.name: FixForce
games.summary: Leap, climb, and launch your friends in this chaotic co-op extraction platformer for up to 6 players! Use your drill-wrench to build your way across a vibrant post-apocalyptic world, find replacement parts, and fix broken machines. And if you lose your head, don’t worry: it’s all part of the job.

games.name: MLB The Show 26
games.summary:
Step up and take control of how you leave your mark in the most immersive MLB The Show yet.

Discover improved Road To The Show mechanics, deeper Franchise experiences, thrilling Diamond Dynasty modes, enhanced customization options, and true-to-life on-field action.

games.name: LasTar
games.summary: Survive endless waves, stack powerful upgrades, and create broken builds in this fast-paced 2D spaceship roguelike. Unlock permanent progression, experiment with different weapons and amulets, and push your limits against escalating enemy threats

games.name: Mnemosyne's Cube
games.summary: My name is left behind these white walls. In its place, I am left with dozens of questions. I wander aimlessly, though she seems to guide me. I do not feel safe. Twenty-four hours... and everything will fall into place.

games.name: Räv Kafé
games.summary: Räv Kafé is a 2D action platformer where you wander around in the world and in order to survive you need to find materials and food. Explore the open world.

games.name: Unity-Chan: Desktop Companion
games.summary: An AI desktop companion with her own personality and a virtual room to play various mini games with her. "Hi! My name is Kohaku Otori, but everyone calls me Unity-chan! I just found a way to visit you on your desktop, may I come? 🧡"

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Accessory: Gold Circlet
games.summary: Contains the following: Accessory: Gold Circlet A special accessory for the protagonist to wear!

games.name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection - Layered Armor for Simon: Wind Wyvern's Friend
games.summary: Contains the following: Layered Armor for Simon: Wind Wyvern's Friend Change the Rangers' appearance with layered armor!

games.name: Sniper: Elite Shooter Squad & The World of War II: Frontlines of History
games.summary: Aim true. Fight smart. Rewrite history.

games.name: Street Soccer
games.summary: Jump into casual street soccer and relive the joy of playing on the neighborhood playground.

games.name: Speed Boom: Last Delivery
games.summary: FULL SPEED. BEAT THE CLOCK. DELIVER OR LOSE.

games.name: Taxi Hyperdrive
games.summary: Drive at full speed, pick up passengers and compete for the top spot in this fast-paced futuristic taxi arcade.

games.name: ACA Neo Geo: Pop'n Bounce
games.summary:
"Pop’n Bounce" is a brick breaker released by Video System in 1997.
Enemy characters serving as blocks fuse into a single unit when adjacent enemies are the same color.
Connect as many as possible to make them grow, then take them down to score massive points and earn power-up items!

games.name: Killing Floor III: Operation Deep Freeze
Quick Brain Letter Hunt
games.summary: Find the ONE specified character! Search across Hiragana, English letters, Hangul, and Traditional Chinese!

games.name: Quick Deduction Short Mysteries
games.summary: One-minute spark, satisfying payoff! A collection of bite-sized mysteries you can solve in no time.

games.name: Zumba: Galactic Marble Blast
games.summary: Leap across the cosmos—match, blast, and save the galaxy in marble style!

games.name: Veggie Warfare: Feast of Fury
games.summary: Enter the warzone against furious killer vegetables!

games.name: Eggconsole Advanced Lord Monarch PC-9801
games.summary: Fortify your nation and conquer enemy castles in Falcom's masterpiece RTS. With 52 diverse stages and addictive gameplay centered on occupation rates.

games.name: Ready or Not: Boiling Point
games.summary: The relentlessly debased city of Los Sueños faces an existential crisis when a subversive terror attack severs any remaining faith in what's become an ineffective and overwhelmingly militarized city government.

games.name: Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax
games.summary: Strong hands. Playful tension. Total relaxation.

games.name: CreArt: Painting by Numbers
games.summary: Relaxation meets creativity

games.name: Six Seven Nights
games.summary: You have six nights. The seventh day changes everything.

games.name: DecaDungeons
games.summary: DecaDungeons is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler where fate is decided by a magical six-sided dice. Explore 10 deadly dungeons, battle fierce foes, hunt monsters, and survive!

games.name: Collie Call: The Future Is Calling
games.summary: Collie Call: Sheep Mission in Space

games.name: Province Simulator
games.summary: Province Simulator is a survival-driven quest game set in a harsh Russian provincial city. Fight cold, hunger, and illness, earn little money, endure unpredictable weather, and try to escape to a better life.

games.name: Metrocity
games.summary: Play Metrocity, a challenging and innovative city builder game. prove your ability to organize and create the best city in the world. develop your city from 0 to thousands of people only in this game.

games.name: CFS: Chinese Football Simulator
games.summary: Chinese Football Simulator is a management game themed around Chinese football. As both club owner and head coach, you'll develop and manage teams either existing or customimmersed in authentic Chinese football culture.

games.name: Echoes of Myth
games.summary: Action Roguelite with a bit weightier Souls-lite combat in a broken world where you're chasing that perfect run. Loot and draw power from relics of vanished gods, forge devastating builds from spell and steel, and crush the wretches in your way!

games.name: Island of Ruin
games.summary: "Island of Ruin" is a puzzle novel game where you collect memory cores hidden across the island and uncover the truth behind a tragedy of the past. When the horrors that befell the boys and girls and the island’s strange phenomena are revealed, what final choice will you make?

games.name: Ollie and the Merchant of Dreams
games.summary: Ollie and the Merchant of Dreams is a 2D Metroidvania where you traverse a lore-rich world, summon monsters to your aid, ride a winged unicorn into battle, and unravel a story of duty and betrayal to free all of creation from chaos.

games.name: Plane vs. Blocks
games.summary: "Plane vs. Squares" is a vampire survivor-like game in which you shoot squares, gain experience and upgrade your weapons. It includes 7 playable levels and 10+ upgradeable, selectable weapons. Choose your Plane, defeat the Squares, and achieve victory!

games.name: Pocket Flight
games.summary: Fly your own way in Pocket Flight - a cozy endless flight adventure! Explore dynamic biomes, face shifting weather, customize your plane, and take on daily challenges. Relaxing skies, infinite horizons. Ready for takeoff?

games.name: Chosen Garden
games.summary: In this unique roguelike deck-builder, tend your garden and harvest plants for high scores! 100+ plants, 5 gardens, and a wealth of unique weather, animals, and tools — countless builds await!

games.name: Dung Ho!
games.summary: Dung Ho! is a co-op physics game where you and your friends are dung beetles rolling a (dung) ball into a hole.

games.name: Coraroc
games.summary: A back-to-basics retro platformer! Waking up alone in a mysterious laboratory, Coraroc must make his way through colorful stages and dastardly enemies to rescue his friends. Can you help Coraroc defeat the Pacicap menace?

games.name: Mewseum: Film Festival
games.summary: Mewseum: Film Festival is a puzzle game featuring famous movie posters in a charming feline universe. Get the museum ready for the big gala night in a relaxing and fun experience! Lights, camera... meow!

games.name: Out of Sight: Stage Fright
games.summary: Uncover the story of a tormented Unseen, a spirit child who reaches out to Sophie for help with their final performance. Together with Teddy, they reveal new perspectives, a chilling history, and a need to overcome their greatest fears.

games.name: Mr. Sleepy Man
games.summary: In Mr. Sleepy Man, you play as a sleepy guy who's up way past his bedtime and out of control! Make a mess of everything you find and turn Bedtime Town against you! This sandbox adventure is filled with comical hijinks, outrageous characters, and platforming action!

games.name: Out of the Park Baseball 27
games.summary: 27 years of sports gaming excellence! Out of the Park Baseball 27 is here - officially licensed by MLB, the MLB Players Inc. and KBO! This year's brand new version puts you firmly in charge of your favorite baseball franchise or country. Your team, your way, your rules.

games.name: Silent Harmony
games.summary:
Silent Harmony is an emotional rhythm game where you tribute your late sister's death and try not to let people down, falling into her place in the band upon her death.

Silent Harmony is an emotional rhythm game where you play a virtual clarinet and control your breathing. You pick up your late sister's clarinet and continue her legacy in her old band as Noah Harper, a young depressed teenage boy. While pressure builds up, you struggle not to make Noah feel like he has let his sister down.

games.name: WWE 2K26
games.summary: The show never stops in WWE 2K26! Step into CM Punk’s 2K Showcase, dominate with 400+ Superstars and Legends, and unleash chaos with all-new match types.

games.name: Scrub Dudes
games.summary: A world built from cardboard, fabric and handcrafted creations. Everything is messy and covered in grime, but the Scrub Dudes team is ready for action. Climb, glide, collect trash, fix things and WASH it all clean. Enjoy this cozy handcrafted world.

games.name: Fumpers 2: Dual Realms
games.summary: Fumpers 2 delivers a chaotic platforming experience that tests your reflexes and patience. Stay alert through physics-based gameplay, surprising obstacles, and challenging levels. Don’t fall. Don’t quit.

games.name: Homura Hime
games.summary: "Homura Hime" is a third person action game, featuring Japanese anime visuals and intense 3D bullet curtain gameplay. Alongside Homurahime, fight against Demon Girls possessed by deviant "emotions", and get closer to discovering the truth of not only the fallen, but also your own veiled legacy.

games.name: iRacing Arcade
games.summary: Race across global licensed series and build your own racing team to secure your motorsport legacy in this third person arcade racer.

games.name: Fixer Undercover
games.summary: Welcome to DIY Espionage - a VR puzzle adventure where everyday tools and found objects become your problem-solving kit. Go undercover as a repair worker inside a prison, investigate a mysterious rehabilitation program through various challenges, and make your escape with the truth.

games.name: Last Dolls
games.summary: Last Dolls is a roguelite horror game set in a dark fairytale world. Do you have what it takes to survive in a shattered world of dolls, scavenging supplies while evading monsters?

games.name: Ultrapool
games.summary: The pool bar is always open! Ultrapool is a colorful roguelike about playing pool with a bunch of wacky balls with crazy effects. Carefully craft a perfect build and get the craziest trickshots!

games.name: Manairons
games.summary: Manairons is a 3D action platformer game inspired by the legends of little creatures living in the Pyrenees. Help Nai face off against the landowner who has taken control of a charming village using the power of the "canut," with magic, flute, and plenty of chaos.

games.name: Demon Tides
games.summary: Explore the open seas and uncover the kingdom's dark secrets as you expressively platform your way across dozens of locales, upgrading your gear every step of the way!

games.name: Harvest Cafe
games.summary: Explore, grow, repair and cook delicious food! Harvest Cafe combines an open-world adventure with a restaurant business simulation, giving you the opportunity to enjoy farm life.

games.name: Fur Squadron Phoenix
games.summary: Embark on an action-packed adventure in this on-rails space shooter. As a trainee pilot, you will fight in strange virtual worlds. Master your ship, upgrade your skills and protect the federation from an imminent threat. Are you up for the challenge?

games.name: Norse: Oath of Blood
games.summary:
Norse is a turn-based tactics and combat game for PC and console. Set against the rich backdrop of the Viking Age, join Gunnar, a young warrior, on a relentless quest for revenge across the rugged landscapes of Norway.

Build a thriving settlement, govern your community, forge alliances, grow strong, and win the favour of the gods. For this is a time when legends are forged in the fires of conflict, and only the brave are remembered.

Written by prize-winning and Sunday Times bestselling author Giles Kristian, Norse is set in a fully realised historical world, driven by a compelling narrative and brimming with memorable characters.

games.name: Gear.Club Unlimited 3
games.summary: The Gear.Club series is back! Customize and set up your favourite cars to race at top speed along the roads of the French Mediterranean coast and Japan. Don't just win – show off your style!

games.name: Death is Sunhaired
games.summary: You’re living in a 19th century village where no-one understands you, suddenly all your fellow men start dying and you are sent on a one-way quest to the lord’s castle.

games.name: High on Life 2
games.summary: An intergalactic conspiracy threatens the fate of humanity! Team up with a wide cast of talking alien guns as you shoot, stab, and skate your way through the exotic locales to take down the bad guys and save your favorite species (humans)!

games.name: RD Racing
games.summary:
RD Racing is a casual combat racing game where speed and firepower decide who survives. Compete in intense top-down races, destroy rival drivers, earn cash, and upgrade your vehicle to dominate the competition.

Inspired by the classic Death Rally game, the game brings back the thrill of arcade vehicular combat — but with a modern twist and colorful 3D cartoon-style graphics. Fast races, explosive weapons, and strategic upgrades create a chaotic and addictive gameplay loop.

Win races. Eliminate opponents. Build the ultimate combat machine.

games.name: Pure Pool Pro
games.summary: Welcome to Pure Pool Pro; the ultimate pool simulation. Play solo or online, master every game type, and compete in high-stakes tournaments in immersive venues. Experience breathtaking 8K native visuals, lifelike physics, and pinpoint-precise controls.

games.name: Final Payload
games.summary: Final Payload is a fast-paced 2D action game where you control a guided warhead. Manage inertia and fuel, destroy enemies, avoid guarded zones, and land precisely to complete missions.

games.name: Deco Online Origins
games.summary: Deco Online Origins is a free-to-play 3D MMORPG that put players deep into the fantastic story of two warring nations, "Millena" and "Rain". As a legendary swordsman, a fierce archer, or a master of wizardry, players were constantly challenged by the opposing nation and by monsters that lurked around every corner. Notable features included a combo system with hundreds of potential skills, and guardian pets that buffed entire guilds.

games.name: Starsand Island
games.summary: Leave the hustle of the city behind and embrace life on Starsand Island. Fish, farm, raise animals, and befriend or fall in love with locals to learn their secrets. Customize your world with our DIY system, and invite friends to help build your dream paradise!

games.name: Kuky Adventure
games.summary: Help Kuky, a curious character who gets lost in the Candy World and must travel through colorful environments to find the way back home. Along the journey, collect candies and face strange sugar-made enemies such as marshmallows, cookies, and other living, dangerous sweets.

games.name: Kiipluu
games.summary:
Kiipluu is a hardcore stealth adventure set in a brutal Neolithic world.

Every encounter is a tense survival puzzle. Study patrol routes, use tall grass, shadows, sound, and terrain to stay hidden. Set traps, strike from ambush, or slip past unseen. Being discovered can quickly become fatal.

When stealth fails, combat is fast, brutal, and unforgiving. Weapons are primitive. Injuries matter. There are no easy victories.

Along the way, Kiipluu is haunted by dreamlike spirit journeys and visions of his father, a legendary hunter whose shadow looms over every choice. Your decisions shape who survives, who is lost, and what kind of person Kiipluu becomes.

This is a story of fear, survival, and growing up in a world that wants you dead.

games.name: The Red Pearls of Borneo
games.summary:
The Red Pearls of Borneo is a detective mystery deduction game inspired by Type Help, Return of the Obra Dinn and The Case of the Golden Idol.

You are a clairvoyant investigator in 1948 London, exploring the psychic echoes of a tragedy that occurred eight years prior on a remote plantation in Borneo.

games.name: Dark Auction
games.summary: The game is a mystery adventure centering on the idea of a historical figure having surreptitiously bequeathed a fictitious estate, following the drama that plays out among the characters faced with an enigma extending all the way into their modern world.

games.name: Space Warlord Baby Trading Simulator
games.summary: Buy low, sell high, and short an entire universe of babies in this arcade stock market sim set in the world of Space Warlord Organ Trading Simulator.

games.name: The Midnight Walkers
games.summary: Fight, Scavenge, and Extract in The Midnight Walkers, a hardcore FPS game with deadly zombies, dangerous players, and valuable loot. Craft weapons, armor, and consumables; trade items; and maintain your hideout. Escape Liberty Grand Center mega complex, and thrive...or die and lose everything.

games.name: 5omeday
games.summary: You have been assigned to guard a dragon girl set to be executed at the end of 5 days and have the ability to kill her instantly at any time with the push of a button in this multi-ending visual novel.

games.name: Disgaea Mayhem
games.summary:
Disgaea Mayhem is a brand-new 3D action RPG from an all-star team consisting of director Shunsuke Minowa, character designer Takehito Harada, and composer Tenpei Sato.

In this game, players will be able to experience the exhilaration of defeating enemies with overwhelming power that defies convention—unleashing flashy techniques with simple controls, completionist elements like leveling characters up to 9,999 and “reincarnating” them to grow even stronger, and developing overpowered stats that let them deal over a billion damage.

games.name: Journey to the Void
games.summary: Prepare to fend off attacks from all directions in this hybrid strategy roguelite deck builder. On your journey through varied grid-based biomes, battle unique foes and make tough moral choices to restore a corrupted land and decide the fate of your world.

games.name: Game With Balls
games.summary: Game With Balls! Move the Steam Deck to navigate through handcrafted mazes.

games.name: TR-49
games.summary: Narrative deduction meets audio drama, from the creators of Heaven’s Vault, Overboard! and A Highland Song.

games.name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Additional Digimon & Episode Pack 2: Gaku-Ran
games.summary: In this Digimon Story Time Stranger DLC, five new digivolution paths for Mega Digimon are unlocked, granting players a special story woven from encounters that transcend time and space separately from the main storyline.

games.name: Myth of Valderit
games.summary:
Myth of Valderit is a psychological horror experience set in the cursed village of Valderit, inspired by the abandoned Catalan village of La Mussara. You wake up as Nil, separated from your friends Julia and Enric, and soon uncover the dark secrets lurking within the village…

This single-player, first-person experience combines exploration, survival, and puzzle-solving. Nil must endure and remain alive, evading the fanatical devotees of an unimaginable entity.

games.name: Stardust: Wish of Witch
games.summary: STARDUST: Wish of Witch is a single-player SRPG beautifully crafted in pixel art. Follow the secret of the wish-granting star and join the adventure of the girl “Star” and the mage “Yu”.

games.name: GravBot
games.summary: GravBot is a physics-based puzzle platformer, where you decide which way is "up" as a little robot falls and pivots through each level. Collect all the batteries to win, but watch out. A wrong move could be deadly!

games.name: Bomboban
games.summary: Bomboban is a classic Sokoban-style puzzle game with an explosive twist: instead of pushing crates, you push enemy robots into bombs to defeat them and clear each stag

games.name: Ghetto Zombies: Graffiti Squad
games.summary: Expect blasts of green zombie goo painting the screen in this top-down shooter packed with crazy guns that blow the heads off some… freaky zombies. Your mission is simple: graffiti the whole city before these mutants dog-pile you.

games.name: Umbra Lumen
games.summary: Roguelike Deckbuilder meets puzzle gameplay. Collect tarot cards and mystic items as you face unpredictable events, meet memorable characters, and explore the beyond life. Each run is different, and every decision matters. Will you ascend or fall in this unique turn-based RPG?

games.name: Puzkin: Magnetic Odyssey
games.summary: PUZKIN: Magnetic Odyssey invites players to explore a vibrant, magical world where magnetic energy sustains the balance of nature and creatures called Puzzies. Players, embodying chosen children, are transported to this mysterious realm to restore its harmony through epic adventures, collaborative construction, and immersive quests.

games.name: Spar Kart
games.summary: Spar Kart is a free-to-play racing fighting game that combines casual racing gameplay with competitive fighting game mechanics. The game offers a unique blend of casual fun with friends and intricate combat that's both accessible to newcomers and deep enough for competitive players.

games.name: Heavy Duty
games.summary: Heavy Duty isn’t just about driving. It’s about controlling the toughest machines on Earth and leading a crew through high-stakes missions. Pick your cargo carefully, balance every load, and be ready to drop, crack, break, and try again until the job gets done.

games.name: The Dead Roam Free
games.summary:
Play Snake as you’ve never played it before.

In The Dead Roam Free, you slither, shoot, and snack your way through a twisted military experiment gone wrong. Blood, betrayal, and bad jokes are all part of the package.

You are Bob Segatti, private eye and fixer for those who can pay. When a mysterious dame walks into his office, Bob bites off more than he can chew — literally. One betrayal and a concrete floor later, he wakes up undead and hungry for answers.

Crawl through labs, streets, and sewers in a top-down action-puzzle adventure where every meal makes you longer, stronger, and dumber. Uncover the truth behind the army’s secret zombie program, rescue the girl, and get revenge — one bite at a time.

games.name: Pardon My French Toast
games.summary:
In Pardon My French Toast, you play as a Toasty (a talking slice of brioche) who dreams of participating in the new edition of the bread wrestling competition. To be physically up to the challenge, he decides to follow a training program organized by the previous champion of the discipline, which will take him all over the world and make him meet a bunch of wacky weirdos.

Pardon My French Toast is an adventure / platform game in 2D top view in which the player explores different worlds, solves puzzles and meets a whole bunch of fun characters. Bread wrestling is a... special sport. We will introduce the discipline later.

games.name: Bluey's Quest for the Gold Pen
games.summary: Join Bluey on a fun-filled quest for the Gold Pen in an original story by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm. A joyful experience for the whole family.

games.name: Digital Market Simulator
games.summary: Run a marketplace where you can sell games and everything related, take care of customers and shape it however you want.

games.name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Episode Pack 1: Alternate Dimension
games.summary: In this Digimon Story Time Stranger DLC, five new digivolution paths for Mega Digimon are unlocked, granting players a special story woven from encounters that transcend time and space separately from the main storyline.

games.name: Drop Duchy: Complete Edition
games.summary: Drop Duchy: Complete Edition includes all additional content released so far (“The Tribe” and “The North” DLCs) bringing the full strategic experience to console players! In a charming, maquette-inspired medieval world, Drop Duchy blends deckbuilding, puzzle mechanics, and roguelite progression into one seamless, strategic experience.

games.name: Two Point Museum: Zooseum
games.summary: Now hiring for Wildlife Experts to heal, raise and re-wild some wonderful wildlife in our brand new museum location!

In this 2D pixel RPG, 24 navigate battles, puzzles, and quests in a war-torn world devoid of color. Your choices dictate the non-linear plot, with multiple endings and an open world hanging in the balance. Will you bring back color as the savior or succumb to darkness?

games.name: Bubble Bobble: Sugar Dungeons
games.summary: Adventure again and again! Get stronger! The first step-up Bubble Bobble in the series! Go on an adventure through strange dungeons that change every time you step inside!

games.name: Last Gasp
games.summary:
Whatever you do, do not give up.

Create a party on the fly and engage in Turn-Based JRPG Combat. Awakening in the world of Limbo, the Wanderer must take hold of their inspirations to escape. Limbo constantly changes and ideas will flow. You will have to work with what you're given and improvise your strategy.

games.name: Party Pop Bubblyz
games.summary:
Jump into the Ultimate Penguin Party!
Break the ice and have fun at the Park! Join the 20-player party to be the star!
Explosive Fun in Just 10 Minutes

games.name: Constance
games.summary: Constance is a 2D hand-drawn action adventure featuring a paintbrush-wielding artist, striving to escape from a colorful but decaying inner-world, created by her declining mental health.

games.name: Leaks In Space
games.summary: Build your own Spaceship, Mine, Trade, Craft, Explore & Survive! Leaks in Space is a 2D space-sim sandbox where you pilot a pressurized ship, battle and destroy pirate's ship part by part, while managing your own ship's integrity and fatal leaks.

games.name: Solo Leveling: Arise Overdrive
games.summary:
The Solo Leveling webtoon is now an action RPG!
Live the epic journey of E-Rank hunter Sung Jinwoo on his way to becoming the Monarch of Shadows!

games.name: Cleared Hot
games.summary: CLEARED HOT is a nostalgic helicopter shooter with satisfying physics and light tactical elements. Shoot, dodge, move your squad around the battlefield, and pick up almost anything with your rope and magnet.

games.name: Moonlighter 2: The Endless Vault
games.summary: Live the double life of a fearless adventurer and a crafty merchant! Dive into vibrant dimensions brimming with shiny loot and pesky enemies. Grow your shop, tinker with weapons and gadgets, as well as make your mark among a ragtag community of castaways.

games.name: Birdcage
games.summary: Shoot, Slash and Weave through bullets and enemies in this story-driven arcade shooter. Two giant fleets converge over the surface of the Earth. Pilot the HALCYON to prevent all-out war and the destruction of your Home. What is the value of a bullet when you wield a Sword?

games.name: Birdcage
games.summary:
BIRDCAGE is an arcade-style vertical scrolling shoot’em up inspired by genre classics, blending gritty pixel art sprites with 2.5D backdrops and a pumping retro soundtrack! Blast through 6 unique stages of bullet hell mayhem, facing off against enemy swarms using multiple shot types and rechargeable specials.

Chase high scores by maintaining chains and kill rate. Strategically activate Hyperblade mode in tense situations, and take down screen-filling bosses! Can you break free of your cage and redeem humanity?

games.name: Unmourned
games.summary: Unmourned is a first person psychological horror game where you play as Jason, a man who moves into a new house only to be haunted by escalating paranormal activities. As the disturbances grow more intense, Jason discovers that the house's previous owners mysteriously vanished. Driven by terror and desperation, Jason must uncover the truth behind the family’s disappearance and find a way to break the curse that now haunts him. Can he solve the mystery before it's too late?

games.name: Cozy Marbles
games.summary: Cozy Marbles is a comfy game about building marble runs on a sunny afternoon. Using a huge range of bits and pieces, fit together the marble course you’ve always wanted to build and play with. Unwind to a lo-fi ASMR soundscape and roll with the nostalgia.

games.name: Rabbit Samurai
games.summary: In Rabbit Samurai, you’ll join a colorful 2D deck-building adventure. Each fight is tougher and funnier than the last.

games.name: Conductor: Eternal Service
games.summary: Conductor: Eternal Service is an atmospheric horror simulator of a Russian train conductor. Perform routine duties, sell goods, and keep the carriage in order… until passengers begin to show signs of demonic possession.

games.name: Anima Gate of Memories: I & II Remaster
games.summary: A third-person action RPG that brings to life the world of Gaia from the Anima: Beyond Fantasy RPG table-top books. Explore a deep and multifaceted story where your choices and actions directly impact the journey and decide the fate of the characters.

games.name: Hop & Seek
games.summary: Hop & Seek is a multiplayer egg hunt game set in a game show for Easter bunnies. You can hide eggs, seek eggs and trick your friends.

games.name: My Little Puppy
games.summary: "There is a saying that when you depart from this world, the dog who went ahead will warmly welcome you." While spending time in dog heaven, Bong-gu the Welsh Corgi suddenly catches his dad's scent. Now, he embarks on a journey to meet his dad. Will Bong-gu be able to see his dad again?

games.name: Ages of Cataria
games.summary: Care for generations of townsfolk in a land of mystique and wonder. Build colonies along side your friends in this multiplayer colony sim and narrative RPG.

games.name: Devil Jam
games.summary: Rampage through hell’s metal artists and their countless followers! Immerse yourself in a hand-animated, survivor-like experience that blends beat-driven combat with a unique 12-slot inventory system, allowing for near-infinite demonic builds.

games.name: Syrup 2: Candy Alchemy RPG
games.summary: SYRUP 2: CANDY ALCHEMY RPG is a direct sequel to Syrup and the Ultimate Sweet. As the title implies, the series has evolved into a fully featured RPG! Synthesize candies, battle monsters, and complete quests while discovering more about the world beyond Atelier Sweets!

games.name: Majogami
games.summary: The sword fighter Shiroha cleaves through a twisted world with her high-speed Setsuna, facing off against the powerful witches in her way, in 2D paper craft character action. Paper craft character action! Majogami - the story of one girl who cuts gods like paper.

games.name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage
games.summary:
Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage takes the gameplay of Virtua Fighter 5 to new heights:

Rollback Netcode and Cross-play support let you take on any challenger, anywhere, across the globe in the most intense battles yet.

A brand-new single-player mode, ""World Stage"": Challenge powerful rivals on a solo quest to become the ultimate fighter

Enhanced replay functionality and improved training tools.

games.name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage: Legendary Pack
games.summary:
Get a blast from the past with customization items, characters models, stages and music straight out of the ground breaking original Virtua Fighter.

・Character customization items (around 2,000 types）
・Original Virtua Fighter character models (38 total)*
• Character Costumes (19 total)
・Original Virtua Fighter stages**
・Original Virtua Fighter battle UI*
・Virtua Fighter series music (180 tracks）
・Spectator stamps (36 total）

games.name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage: Yakuza Series Collaboration Pack
games.summary: Crank up the heat gauge with stylish character costumes and electrifying music from the Yakuza / Like a Dragon series. Dive deeper with even more character costumes, customization items, additional stamps, and newly arranged music from Virtua Fighter 3 to keep the adrenaline high.

games.name: Final Formation
games.summary: Equipped with the Fusion × Transformation “PELL” System! Free Map Side-Scrolling Shooter

games.name: Through Blood and Dragons: Dragon Wars
games.summary: Through Blood and Dragons: Dragon Wars is a third-person, fantasy-themed, on-rails shooter for a single player; players take the role of an archer on the back of a dragon AND the dragon itself through short first-person dragon-breath segments.

games.name: Motionrec
games.summary:
Motionrec is an action game that progresses through stages by recording and replaying the trajectory of your movements. Using MotionRec, you aim to clear stages quickly by recording and replaying your unique motions.

MotionRec is a gear that allows you to record, replay, and reverse-play your own movements. Customize it to your original specifications and strive for the fastest performance.

games.name: Mannequin Mayhem: Physics Ragdoll Shooter
games.summary: Get ready for a wild ride in "Mannequin Mayhem," the craziest shooter this year! Say goodbye to zombies and aliens; it's time to blast creepy mannequins. Survive endless waves, customize your arsenal, and embrace the chaos. Let's laugh and blast our way through the weirdest enemies ever!

games.name: Microvania
games.summary: Explore a tiny world, find upgrades, discover hidden paths, and battle bosses in this retro-style metroidvania action platformer.

games.name: Elemental: Reforged
games.summary: Create a character and lead your civilization in this epic, turn-based fantasy strategy game. Design units, research technology, learn magical spells, send adventurers on quests, craft magical items, trade or battle other civilizations for dominion of worlds of your imagination.

games.name: A Recipe for Survival
games.summary: Use two decks of cards to serve food to your customers during the day! Then fight them off when they turn to monsters at night in this fun and unique deckbuilding roguelike!

games.name: Starbites
games.summary: The story of a girl's growth and adventure on a vast desert planet, "Bitter."

games.name: Wake Up
games.summary:
Wake Up is a thrilling 2D/3D adventure game made by R16studio. Dive into a world full of mystery, puzzles, psychological horror, and tension where every choice matters.
Are you ready to wake up and find the truth or maybe not.

games.name: Royal Revolt Survivors
games.summary: Thrilling 1-4 players co-op survivor gameplay combined with stunning graphics, where powerful Warriors battle through hordes of vicious enemies using a blend of melee and ranged weapons.

games.name: Bleu Bayou
games.summary: A lonesome crawdad sets out to destroy the bayou’s vicious syndicate of loan sharks and robber barons—and erase his debts once and for all.

games.name: Rager
games.summary: Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-fueled excitement of this melee combat rhythm game! Master weapon of your choice – sword, mace, claws, hammer, axe, your own fists and many more! Stunning visuals and spatial audio technology puts you right in heart of the action.

games.name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger
games.summary: The latest in the Digimon Story series is finally here! In this RPG, unravel a mystery that spans across the human world and the Digital World, collecting and raising a wide variety of Digimon to save the world.

games.name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Costume Chosen Children Set
games.summary:
Grants Costume Chosen Children Set usable in Digimon Story Time Stranger. Additionally, a side mission related to the costumes will be unlocked.

Costume Chosen Children Set includes:
• Protagonist (Dan Yuki) Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Protagonist (Kanan Yuki) Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Inori Misono Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Aegiomon Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Side Mission: The Targeted Cosplayer

games.name: Scribed Castle
games.summary: Scribed castle is a city builder where you scribe whimsical towns, cozy villages, and gothic cathedrals in the medieval illustration art style.

games.name: Fractured Worlds
games.summary: Fractured Worlds is a dark fantasy action RPG set in the shattered remnants of a ruined reality. Master weighty, precision-based combat, explore diverse realms, and face challenging bosses alone or together with other players of the realm

games.name: Advent Arena
games.summary: A PvP card-game/tower-defense hybrid.

games.name: Unseen Diplomacy 2
games.summary: You're a Secret Agent during a dangerous time, Evil-doers are plotting to destroy the world. Complete missions, manage your agents & use Intel to narrow down the plot & save the Earth. Play a real-life VR obstacle course using every inch of your room - you will run, roll, sneak & hack to victory!

games.name: Chop Chains
games.summary: Chop Chains is a relaxing incremental game where you chop, gather, and upgrade to become the ultimate lumberjack through trees, axes, and skills.

games.name: Ratatan
games.summary: Ratata Arts and TVT have announced Ratatan, a new rhythm action game from the creator of Patapon previously teased as Project JabberWocky.

games.name: Easy Delivery Co.
games.summary: Easy Delivery Co. is a relaxing driving game with strange secrets. Chill out, make deliveries and get to know the mysterious residents of this scenic mountain town, all while earning well below minimum wage.

games.name: My Little Coffee Shop
games.summary: Open the doors of your own coffee shop and immerse yourself in the world of fragrant coffee! In My Little Coffee Shop, you will have to: prepare different types of coffee and desserts; serve customers and fulfill their orders; decorate and improve the interior of your coffee shop; expand your business and discover new opportunities. Create the most cozy place in the city where everyone will find their favorite drink.

games.name: The Lift
games.summary: You are a handyman renovating a massive research facility abandoned after a mysterious incident. The Lift is an eerie first-person simulator with satisfying house-flipping gameplay, a mind-bending story, and a highly interactive world inspired by Soviet sci-fi and the SCP Foundation.

games.name: Letters to Arralla
games.summary: Deliver letters, parcels, and packages to the residents of Arralla, a small fictional island off the coast of Australia populated by big booty cutie fruits! In this relaxing RPG, you play as a mail delivery turnip covering the holiday of the previous mailman. It’s your job to get the mail where it needs to go by solving visual puzzles and exploring.

games.name: Oddinary Farm
games.summary: Stuck on an alien TV show where your death is entertainment, you must escape a variety of bizarre islands filled with riches and deadly creatures before impending doom consumes you.

games.name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle: The Order of Giants
games.summary: There is a myth of a beast in the hidden depths of Rome, rumored to guard a terrible secret. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle: The Order of Giants DLC is an all-new story chapter that takes Indiana Jones to the ancient streets of Rome where forgotten catacombs twist into something far more sinister. Indy must outwit a dangerous cult and decipher intricate puzzles designed by emperors to uncover the dark legacy of the Nephilim giants.

games.name: Chark
games.summary: CHARK is a chess roguelike about risk, synergies, and precise calculation.

games.name: Dice Card Heroes
games.summary: In this roguelike deckbuilder, every card features its own dice. Battle against many fantastic creatures across 3 chapters. Upgrade your cards, build countless synergies and find mighty weapons to shape your playstyle. There is only one goal: Be the hero, slay the dragon.

games.name: TriggerHeart Exelica Enhanced
games.summary: "Pull the trigger of your heart once again with new friends!"

games.name: Whisper of the House
games.summary: What's happening in this seemingly peaceful town? Strange residents, bizarre incidents, and unexpected storylines! Please be sure to let go of all your human lifestyle preferences and strive to meet the special requests of your otherworldly employers. Decorate this house with peculiar furniture!

games.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex
games.summary:
The Librarian Ariana’s mission is to repair the Seven Hero Codices, which have been altered. Due to the terrible damages, magic has vanished from the world.

By utilizing special Librarian magic that allows her to enter Codices, Ariana seeks to mend the books to bring back magic. Can Ariana safely repair each tome and unravel the mysteries hidden within the Library?

games.name: Soup-of-War
games.summary: You are a clumsy one-armed pirate cook desperately trying to prepare meals for your crew by grabbing, cutting, and throwing ingredients into pots while your ship heaves violently on stormy seas, turning every simple cooking task into a chaotic physics-based struggle against time and your own limitations.

games.name: Void/Breaker
games.summary: VOID/BREAKER is an Adrenaline-Fueled Roguelite FPS. Fight relentless machines driven by a hostile AI. Escape an endless cycle. Craft infinite weapon variants with deep gun modding. Forge deadly synergies. Carve your way out through environmental destruction/BREAK THE SYSTEM /BREAK THE SEQUENCE /BREAK FREE

games.name: Off
games.summary: “I’m the Batter. I’ve been entrusted with a sacred mission.” -- One of the most influential RPGs of the last 20 years is finally coming to Steam and Nintendo Switch. Take control of the Batter as he seeks to purify an uncanny and hopeless world haunted by specters, guided by a cryptic, grinning cat called The Judge.

games.name: Out and About
games.summary: You've come to help your Granny after a terrible storm destroyed her cottage and wreaked havoc in her idyllic coastal town. Can you find a way of restoring her home and uniting the townsfolk? Connect with nature by foraging, gardening, and cooking, then try out your new skills in the real world!

games.name: Tiny Bookshop
games.summary: Leave everything behind and open a Tiny Bookshop by the sea in this ambient narrative management game. Stock your wagon, set up shop in scenic locations, and navigate a post-capitalist future alongside Bookstonbury’s eclectic cast of characters.

games.name: The Alley
games.summary: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore a maze-like Korean alley, photograph and identify supernatural 'Demon Traces' from realistic illusions, and escape while evading a relentless ghost.

games.name: PhotoLoop
games.summary: PhotoLoop is a casual game about editing photos using an outdated editing software that only has the lasso tool. Make sure to make your edits clean and concise, or you might not be able to pay your rent due in five days!

games.name: Earthion
games.summary:
Earthion is an upcoming aftermarket shooting game developed by Ancient primarily for the Sega Mega Drive. Physical MD versions will be published by SUPERDELUXE GAMES in Japan and by Limited Run Games in North America. The game will also get a 16:9 version for modern platforms.

Earthion is published under the label YKGGG, a brand name covering all the retro-style games developed at Ancient. If Earthion meets success, Ancient will go on the venture of releasing video games designed for retro consoles. A separate version of the game for Arcade was confirmed by Ancient and published by exA-Arcadia, which features a new, exclusive mode that will not be available in the Mega Drive version.

games.name: Primal Planet
games.summary: Unveil a heartfelt story of family, dinosaurs, and UFOs! Craft, upgrade, and survive in a realm of primeval predators, savage tribes and... ancient aliens. Rise from a humble cave dweller to the planet’s last hope — alone or in local co-op. Welcome to the dinovania!

games.name: Mystic Explorer
games.summary: Mystic Explorer is a treasure rogue game. Players will play the role of treasure hunter in search of treasure chests in the siege of monsters, defeat the ever stronger enemies, and bring back your own archive treasures.

games.name: DeGen Rivals
games.summary: The ultimate Kart-based Battle Royale. Smash your Rivals in free-to-play, 8-player online chaos across a variety of wild levels and arcade game modes.

games.name: Magical Girl Witch Trials
games.summary: Thirteen girls awaken, only to find themselves in a prison. What awaits them: a Witch Trial. Help them prepare for the trial by exploring the prison in order to find the witch hidden amongst them. Find the witch, learn what kind of magic she holds, dispel the lies, and prepare for the execution.

games.name: Spirit Crossing
games.summary: Spirit Crossing is a beautiful cooperative life-sim about building friendships and community. Sign up for our Closed Alpha playtest and discover a world where you can connect, escape, and belong.

games.name: The Sword Game
games.summary: The Sword Game is a semi-fast paced retro styled 3D platformer, made to mimic shareware games of early 2000's. Your mission is to get the lowest time possible on all levels. You can cheat, find shortcuts, you have all the freedom in the world.

games.name: Psycasso
games.summary:
Take on the role of a serial killer who creates paintings with their victims blood! Sell your creations to earn money while trying to avoid capture by the police and other civilians.

In this pixel art adventure you'll play as Psycasso, a struggling gallery artist living in an open world city. By day you'll work a day job to earn money and level up skills, seamlessly blending into society. By night you'll be on the lookout to harvest 'red paint' from one of the 'walking meat-bags' to help you create original 2D art. Sell your artwork to art galleries for huge profits! Become rich from your unique artwork while avoiding capture from the ever growing police presence using stealth techniques and unique traps. Buy property, upgrades, furniture, weapons, discover a bustling city and play a host of mini games in this controversial indie title like nothing before.

games.name: Under Heaven or Hell
games.summary:
You wake up in Hell with no memory of how you got there, and no clear way out.

To return home, you will have to survive the brutal politics of this realm and forge alliances with two dangerous devils and an enigmatic angel, each with their own secrets, and temptations that may pull you closer.

Will you escape with your soul intact, or will your path become forever tied to those who linger within the flames?

Your choices will shape your fate, and perhaps, the fate of Hell itself.

games.name: Overtrick
games.summary: A trick-taking roguelike with style! Outplay your rivals, purchase special abilities, and dazzle 1920s high society with your unstoppable cardplay. Call your contract, follow suit, flush trumps, and claim the hand. This isn't your grandma's bridge club... this is Overtrick!

games.name: Calamity Angels: Special Delivery
games.summary: A rag-tag group of kooky carriers protect and trek packages through treacherous terrains in this delivery service RPG!

games.name: Dragon Ball Sparking Zero: Shallot (Dragon Ball Legends)
games.summary: Shallot from the mobile game DRAGON BALL LEGENDS joins the battle!

games.name: Foodslingers
games.summary: Cook, run, jump, and throw— all in the name of FoodCorp. This chaotic, physics-based spin on the classic cooking formula demands speed, strategy, and just the right amount of panic! Play with up to 4 friends and try to run the restaurant smoothly... or let it all go up in flames.

games.name: All Will Fall
games.summary: A post-apocalyptic city builder where every structure can collapse. Master a unique physics-based 3D construction system, create a sprawling vertical settlement on water, scavenge for resources, explore the ocean, and ensure your colony's survival by making difficult yet necessary decisions.

games.name: Clover Reset
games.summary: "Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?" Set at "Shonan Saika Academy," a prestigious school in Shonan, Kanagawa Prefecture, this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.

games.name: Saeko: Giantess Dating Sim
games.summary: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you. Experience the fate of Saeko and the little people in this cruel yet captivating story with avant-garde art.

games.name: Racer Overdrive
games.summary: This game tells the story of your rise from obscure rookie to racing star. A global championship, hosted by a mysterious tech company, is your chance to establish yourself in the world of racing. Experience extreme drifting and nitro acceleration on iconic tracks around the world. Experience a refreshing driving system, multi-mode racing, and a rich main and side storyline. As the race progresses, participate in various events and become famous. Ultimately, uncover the championship's conspiracy from the mysterious host company and face off against an out-of-control super artificial intelligence!

games.name: Sol Cesto
games.summary: Sol Cesto is a tactical and frenetic roguelite in which you have to master your luck. Choose a hero and reach the bottom of a random dungeon. In this grim world, every action has consequences...

games.name: Automate It
games.summary: Automate It is a factory building game that requires clever solutions to its size, power, and time constraints. Solve challenges, build and share your own levels, or open things up in sandbox mode. If you want to build it - Automate It.

games.name: Propaganda vs. Zombies
games.summary: Build your deck of Propaganda, Bullets, and Spells to defend your Leader in this Bullet Heaven where you can't move! Use Propaganda to turn Zombies into your Comrades and make them fight for You! Make choices about your people but be careful, they might overthrow you if you choose wrong!

games.name: Volontés
games.summary: Volontés is an Dark Fantasy × Suspense otome game in which the main character, who has lost everything, finds her way of life while facing tragedy.

games.name: Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta
games.summary:
Experience a timeless chapter in the storied RPG franchise making its debut on Nintendo Switch, filled with duplicitous schemes, treacherous geography, and secretive characters.

As Adol Christin, search for clues to your past in an epic adventure, making use of strategic combat, and exploring a dangerous world to a newly rearranged OST.

games.name: Frog Legs
games.summary: A short, single-player horror action game starring Carl, the suburban house frog. Will you be able to conquer arcade challenges, solve puzzles, and Ribbit and Tear your way back to the life you once knew?

games.name: Starvault
games.summary:
Choose your hero. Squad up. Push lanes. Farm creeps. Clear jungle camps. Upgrade your abilities mid-match. And dominate the map in intense 5v5 team fights.
Classic MOBA with stunning visuals that push the Meta Quest to its absolute limits.

games.name: Shrine Protectors
games.summary: A casual arrow shooter meets rogue-lite strategy. Lead your army, crush waves of enemies, and unlock powerful upgrades and passive spells. Combine precision shooting with tactical army management in this relentless bullet hell.

games.name: The Midnight Walk
games.summary:
Embark upon The Midnight Walk in this reverent dark fantasy adventure built in clay, from the minds behind Lost in Random and Fe.

Become The Burnt One, befriend a lost lantern creature named Potboy, and use his flame to light your way through a conflicting world of wonder and horror. Survive and outsmart the many monsters eager to devour your little friend’s flame as you experience five tales of fire and darkness, featuring an incredible cast of odd characters.

Marvel at every disturbing detail in a landscape painstakingly handcrafted with real life clay and animated in a stop motion style. Fully playable in both flatscreen and with a VR headset.

games.name: Deck of Haunts
games.summary: Deck of Haunts invites you to become a malevolent Haunted House. Lure humans into your cursed halls, manipulate their fears, and drain their essence to grow your power. Use strategy to build your mansion and expand your dark influence, turning your home into a terrifying, inescapable nightmare.

games.name: Dice With Death
games.summary: Dice With Death is a Dicebuilding Roguelike – Unfortunately you have already died. Fortunately, Death is up for some friendly competition. Collect new dice and their paired relics, create damage stacking combos, and even cheat Death himself to emerge victorious.

games.name: Scribble Wolf
games.summary: A Werewolf game (or social deduction game), in which you can control the character that you have drawn. Up to 10 players can play online. Perhaps the key to victory is to "draw tracing" of an opposing team's character and "disguise yourself" as it...?

games.name: Cookie Run: OvenSmash
games.summary:
️The Cookies have gathered in Platter City for the fight of their lives
Three factions... three goals... What could they be fighting for?

Get ready for the urban fantasy Cookie battle of your dreams!
Tune into the fight narrated by your new idol, DJ Miya!
It's time to fight, win, and make your dreams come true!

games.name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered
games.summary: Explore Cyrodiil like never before with stunning new visuals and refined gameplay in The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered.

games.name: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero - Dragon Ball Daima: Character Pack 1
games.summary:
New warriors from the Dragon Ball DAIMA anime series join the battle!

- 8 Playable Characters:
• Goku (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini)
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 2
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 3
• Glorio
• Panzy
• Majin Kuu

‐ Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit
• New costume for Goku (Mini) that changes his moves

Get the Dragon Ball DAIMA: Character Pack 1 and enjoy new battles!

*Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit is different from Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini).
*Ownership of Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini) is not required.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will not alter his appearance.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will transform his Ultimate Blast into Aura Impact.

games.name: The Boba Teashop
games.summary: A cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop. Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to grow your business.

games.name: Scorched Warfare
games.summary: This is a strategy action game set in a fictional fantasy world. You play as a warmaster, commanding troops in battles. Use the roguelike system to customize your gameplay style: will you be a one-man army, standing against thousands, or a mastermind tactician controlling the battlefield?

games.name: Hollywood Animal
games.summary: Make your dreams come true — or crush someone else’s. Take the helm of a major Hollywood studio at the dawn of sound cinema, and guide it through decades of creative achievements and glamor, debauchery and dark deeds, tough choices and unpleasant compromises.

games.name: Tears of Metal
games.summary: Tears of Metal is a medieval hack-and-slash co-op roguelike. Carve through hordes of enemies to reclaim your island with the help of your formidable Scottish battalion. As you advance deeper into the trenches, uncover more about the mysterious Dragon Meteor and the treacherous enemy invasion.

games.name: Outbound
games.summary: Build your own home on wheels and live sustainably off-grid. Craft workstations and power supplies, source energy from the sun, wind, or water, upgrade and customize your vehicle, grow crops, automate your production, and explore a colorful world.

games.name: Peppered: An Existential Platformer
games.summary:
A light hearted 2D platformer about the meaningless of existence. Dark humour. Big focus on narrative-driven gameplay. Regret. Currently being developed for PC and Mac.
You play as a nameless civilian of an immortal world an hour before a return of the God of death. Life presents you with an opportunity to take this matter into your own hands. And then presents you with countless ways to fail spectacularly.

games.name: CloserLook VR: Oldways
games.summary: CLoserLook: Old Ways, a captivating interactive story VR adventure game set in modern day west Africa. Awakening in a locked university administrative building, you'll need to solve a series of intricate puzzles to find your way out. As you navigate through the game, explore secret locations and uncover a gripping narrative that delves into themes of exploitation, corruption, and betrayal.

games.name: Cucina Stellata: Starred Cuisine
games.summary:
Gastronomy meets horror in an unsettling narrative experience set in 19th-century Romagna, Italy.

Step into the shoes of a solitary writer and gourmet, inspired by the historical figure of Pellegrino Artusi, as a midnight snack spirals into the unexpected.

Cucina Stellata ✦ Starred Cuisine isn't your typical horror game: no frantic chases or cheap jump scares, but rather a thick atmosphere of tension, disturbing themes, and chilling twists that will linger in your mind long after the credits roll.

games.name: South of Midnight
games.summary: South of Midnight is a new action-adventure from Compulsion Games. Explore the mythos and confront mysterious creatures of the Deep South in this modern folktale while learning to weave an ancient power to surmount obstacles and face the pain haunting your hometown.

games.name: Shadow of the Road
games.summary: Shadow of the Road is a story-driven, turn-based RPG where feudal Japan meets magic and machine. Assemble your team from a diverse set of characters and test your skills against yōkai and steampunk contraptions. Carve your own path through an immersive story and change the fate of the Empire.

games.name: Eternal Fate: A Journey Begins
games.summary: Old-school style RPG to enjoy a nostalgic tale with difficult and fair gameplay that is fully voiced.

games.name: Dust & Courage: Jake Bolton’s Journey
games.summary: "Dust & Courage: Jake Bolton's Journey" is a historical fantasy RPG set in the Wild West. Play as Jake, a cowboy uncovering secrets and exploring towns. Your choices shape Jake's destiny through quests and tough decisions. Experience compelling and fun stories for a memorable experience.

games.name: Gamblers Table
games.summary:
Gamblers Table is an idle automation game where you toss coins to earn money. Buy bigger and better coins, unlock upgrades and hire little helpers to automate the process and take care of all the busy flipping work for you. Simple. Satisfying.

Click a coin to toss it. Every time it lands on Heads, you earn money.

The more coins you own, the more you can flip. Buy upgrades to make them flip faster and yield more money. Discover curious interactions and unexpected synergies between different coin types.

Hire little helpers to take care of all the manual labour for you. They don’t complain, and they never question.

Leave your fortune behind and rise to something greater. Start again with peculiar new talents you didn’t have before.

Admire your riches, lean back, and watch your automated coin-flipping empire grow.

games.name: Surviving Skeleton Island
games.summary: Surviving Skeleton Island is a challenging survival RPG set in a vast 3D low poly island world of 12 unique biomes. Explore, hunt, craft, build, farm and fish to survive, while quests and clues unveil the secrets of the island, and your past. Forge your destiny and plot your escape!

games.name: Splintered
games.summary: A unique RPG where the villain randomizes the world with each defeat. Start with a classic RPG experience, then delve into shifting worlds where the overworld, items, and enemies shuffle, creating new challenges. Conquer these worlds to unravel the story and make your way to the final showdown!

games.name: Slayer: The Demon Haunted World
games.summary: The time of glory has passed, and a new era has begun. Historian called this era "The time of ash and dust" A Slayer Enter the tower to save the world

games.name: Sim Sports Raid
games.summary: *NOTE: A CONTROLLER OR STEERING WHEEL IS REQUIRED TO PLAY THIS GAME* SIM SPORTS RAID offers you the excitement of off-road and navigation competition with maximum realism. You can also compete in duels in Challenge mode and participate in events that we will make available to our users

games.name: Vextorial
games.summary: Vextorial is a mind-bending puzzle-platformer where you swap between 2D and 3D perspectives and twist gravity itself to solve impossible puzzles, explore a surreal, ancient ruin suspended in shifting dimensions, and uncover a mystery only you can piece together.

games.name: Dead Silence: Echoes of the Damned
games.summary: An atmospheric horror game with an open world and cinematic scenes. Explore the dark forest, search for items, read notes, perform rituals, and uncover a terrifying story. A first-person experience filled with jumpscares and intense tension.

games.name: RavenQuest
games.summary: RavenQuest is a true sandbox MMORPG where your legacy shapes a living, breathing world. Set in a vast, ever-evolving realm built by its players, RavenQuest delivers deep character progression, thrilling PvE and PvP combat, and a dynamic, player-driven economy. Through seamless blockchain integration, players can truly own, trade, and utilize in-game assets as NFTs—but participation in Web3 features is entirely optional, ensuring a welcoming experience for all adventurers. Designed with ultimate player freedom at its core, RavenQuest lets you choose your path, whether forging alliances, battling for dominance, mastering the economy, or leaving your mark through professions and crafting. Every decision you make drives the story forward and leaves a lasting impact on this nostalgic yet innovative fantasy world.

games.name: TimeLost
games.summary: TimeLost is a Soulslike Team-Based PvP Arena Fighter. Master precision combat, customize your playstyle through dual-weapon builds, and climb the ranks in Arenas that transcend space and time.

games.name: Eldritch Verdict
games.summary: "Eldritch Verdict": A dark fairy tale turn-based card game. Strategic planning and battle execution shape your adventure amid challenges. Progression customizes character growth for a deep, replayable experience.

games.name: Seven Knights Re:Birth
games.summary:
100 Million Hearts, A Legacy Reborn! - Seven Knights Re:BIRTH

Seven Knights Re:BIRTH - an adventure filled role playing game!

Seven Knights is Netmarble’s flagship IP that has surpassed 100 million cumulative downloads and has received immense love and support from fans around the world.

Over the past 11 years, the Seven Knights IP has maintained strong popularity through its robust lineup of titles with diverse gameplay, including Seven Knights, Seven Knights 2, Seven Knights Idle Adventure, and more.

Developed by Netmarble Nexus, the newest entry in the franchise, Seven Knights Re:BIRTH was launched in Korea on May 15, 2025. Built on the accumulated heroes, lore, and expertise in the franchise, Seven Knights Re:BIRTH achieved remarkable success by ranking No.1 on both major mobile app stores in Korea just five days after launch.

games.name: Bapbap
games.summary: Join BAPBAP, the Roguelike Party game where no two matches are ever the same. Round up your homies, pick a character, and build a giga-unfair build that'll make them hate you - then do it all over again!

games.name: Gotchi Guardians
games.summary: Adapt, strategize, and dominate your rivals in this multiplayer roguelite tower defense brawler. Upgrade towers, wield powerful items, and outlast the madness to become the last Guardian standing!

games.name: DashFire
games.summary: A fast-paced arena-style shooter with an emphasis on movement, collect various weapons, and other pickups to dominate the competition in a peer-to-peer 8-person free-for-all!

games.name: Nubby's Number Factory
games.summary: A plinko-style roguelike where you work at a number factory. Launch your spherical friend, Nubby, down a pegboard to make bigger and bigger numbers! But beware, if you fail to meet your number quota, the sun will explode.

games.name: Octopus Goulash
games.summary: Explore a futuristic metropolis, interact with a population of NPCs, and experience a unique narrative. Engage in dynamic missions, battle between flying cars, and shape your story in this interactive world where every choice is an opportunity, every moment an unparalleled adventure!

games.name: Rogue Hands!
games.summary: A rogue game aimed at delivering a thrilling experience, crafting a powerful genre, and pushing forward to the end!

games.name: Lost Lullabies: The Orphanage Chronicles
games.summary: "Lost Lullabies - The Orphanage Chronicles" is a Co-Op horror game set in 1980, inspired by the real stories of an orphanage ruined by a fire in 1960 Lowell. Playable with 1-4 players, the goal is to identify and expel malevolent spirits alone or with your team.

games.name: Endless RPG: Untold Tales
games.summary: Craft a party of diverse characters, each with customizable skills and looks. Explore a living world with dynamic day-night cycles, changing seasons, and diverse biomes. Embark on an epic journey where you shape your destiny as the director of your unique story.

games.name: Dragonkin: The Banished
games.summary: In a world ravaged by dragons, play as four heroes, solo or multiplayer, and fight hordes of enemies, adapt your build with the unique Ancestral Grid system, improve your city, and share it with your friends.

games.name: Sorcerer's Servant
games.summary: It is a roguelike spinning RPG where you turn slots to strengthen equipment and fight monsters. By chaining equipment with slots, you can strengthen your abilities and upgrade to new equipment. Use your skills to lead her to victory.

games.name: String Theory
games.summary: This is a music game where players can compose and improvise. Players will learn some basic musical structures and apply combinations of these musical structures to combat. Defeat enemies with different music styles.

games.name: Manhunter
games.summary: Join 'Hunter' and his Syndicate, through Brutal combat. As he uncovers the secrets of our existence. Learn real-world information and advice. Expand your knowledge as you play. Become a Formidable Soldier.

games.name: OPA: Super Janken
games.summary: A reimagining of the classic Rock-Paper-Scissors to make it more competitive and engaging. Collect the cards and boost your score by facing increasingly stronger opponents.

games.name: The Bazaar
games.summary: The Bazaar is the first Hero Builder, developed by Tempo. Set in a vibrant, ever-changing galactic marketplace, players assume a role from a roster of unique heroes, trading and upgrading otherworldly items & skills to assemble them into a plethora of combinations used to outplay and defeat opponents.

games.name: Suit Up
games.summary: A new threat arises! Will you stand up and protect the planet?It’s time to SUIT UP, survive an alien invasion and protect your loved ones in a world where Wave Survival, Twin Stick Shooters, RPG and Roguelite come together in one epic mashup!

games.name: Grimoire Groves
games.summary: Restore the magical forest as you grow cute plant creatures with your witch magic in this cozy rogue-lite dungeon crawler. Unlock all spells, discover new plant types, befriend magical creatures, and unravel the mystery of the rainbow socks.

games.name: Sculplings
games.summary: Welcome to the world of Sculplings! Here, trainers collect and battle a random assortment of hand-sculpted monsters in order to become the #1 Sculpling Champion! Sculplings is a mashup of roguelikes with traditional monster fighter games!

games.name: CardScrawl
games.summary: Enter the Chaotic Tower and take part in the Tower Lord's gambit in this Auto Battler, Roguelike Deckbuilder. Wielding the power of your Creature and Enchantment decks, the limits of your strategy will be tested. The Tower Lord awaits a worthy opponent. Are you ready?

games.name: Phobos Down
games.summary: A sci-fi twin stick shooter stripped down to the bare essentials with focus on smooth controls and satisfying action.

games.name: Star Crafter
games.summary:
A space survival crafting mining base building and star system building game.
Craft rockets to create planets and Dyson Rings, mine and craft advanced materials, terraform the terrain, manage electricity, farm food, and more as you watch the star system evolve into stunning, everchanging views.

games.name: Stone Simulator
games.summary:
Be a stone / rock / boulder. Do nothing. Just exist.
Relax, meditate, and watch the seasons change in the most peaceful simulator ever.
Ever wondered what it’s like to be a rock?
Become an unflinching stone in a serene, ever-changing world. Survive centuries of seasons, weather, and absurdly mundane adventures. Grow moss, collect bird poop, and question your existence—Stone Simulator is the Zen meditation you never knew you needed… or the most boring game ever. You decide!

games.name: Pixel Pixie
games.summary: A Vorpal Knight with twisted ambitions has kidnapped the last Pixies to drain their power! Replace your weak starting party with stronger heroes, find useful items and game-changing relics, and assemble a formidable rescue team in this roguelike auto-battler, a love letter to the 8-bit RPGs of yore.

games.name: Evocreo II
games.summary:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo.
