For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

games.name: Who's Next?
games.summary: 『Who's Next?』 is a real-time multiplayer social deduction game set in the traditional Korean hell, featuring a massacre of ghosts and spirits, with individual survival competition rather than team battles, focusing on 'Chasing Tail'.

games.name: Moon's Creed
games.summary: Choose your zodiac hero. Craft unique decks. Collect astral boons. Vanquish corrupted constellations. Ascend through cosmic chaos!

games.name: Bazar Simulator: The Wan Story
games.summary: Bazaar Simulator takes you to Boqueron City, where you will help Wan manage his uncle Wang Long's bazaar while uncovering dark secrets. Customize your store, drive scooters, work with mafias and unravel a plot full of humor, mystery and action in this unique simulator.

games.name: Detective VR
games.summary: Step into a thrilling narrative investigation in Virtual Reality! In DETECTIVE VR, you control time, collect crucial clues, and interview witnesses to unravel the plot.

games.name: Two Point Museum: Explorer Edition
games.summary:
Two Point Museum - Explorer Edition contains:
Two Point Museum base game
Explorer Upgrade Pack
DIGITAL ONLY: 5 days advanced access

games.name: Grow Harvest Repeat
games.summary: Plant, grow, harvest, sell, upgrade tools, and craft. Level up skills to build your farming empire!

games.name: Tales of Ancients: Hollow Apartments
games.summary: Reality unravels.Every floor reflects your mind.Tales of Ancients: Hollow Apartments a dark, atmospheric journey through psychological horror and inner collapse.

games.name: Car Guys
games.summary: Experience the thrill of Car Guys, a high-octane multiplayer racing game! Represent your nation, compete in explosive races, and climb the global leaderboard. Customize your ride, engage in daily and weekly championships, and enjoy seamless online play with Photon Quantum. Join the race today!

games.name: Port Town: Survival
games.summary: A deserted port town, missing people, and a dark secret waiting to be uncovered… Dive into Port Town’s open world, collect mysterious photos, and reveal the truth. But be careful… some secrets are meant to stay buried.

games.name: Storage Looter
games.summary: Storage Looter is a loot game in a Voxel universe. Your goal is to collect the rarest and most profitable items in order to improve your store. From classic recovery to a metal detector, there are many things to do!

games.name: Aurora Flight
games.summary: Aurora Flight is an air combat simulation on the uncharted planet Zenoa. Realistic altitude and speed physics provide strategic depth, while flexible fighter customization shapes your approach. Experience diverse aerial battles.

games.name: Ale Abbey
games.summary: Build and expand your monastery, craft recipes and brew holy ales in this unique brewery tycoon. No pre-made recipes in Ale Abbey, oh no. It's a canvas for true beer alchemists. It's as simple as: brew, sip, repeat. Welcome to Ale Abbey!

games.name: Bulbo's Belief System
games.summary:
Bulbo's Belief System is a puzzle-platformer where knowledge is both a tool and an obstacle. Bulbo believes everything he's told—learning allows him to see, move, and interact, but forgetting is just as important.

Erase walls from existence, ignore gravity to walk across gaps, and manage conflicting beliefs to solve mind-bending challenges. Experiment with what Bulbo knows (or doesn't) to navigate a world where perception shapes reality.

Can you control what Bulbo learns and unlearns to reach the goal?

games.name: Rakka: Wake 01 - Soot
games.summary: A visual novel paired with point-and-click elements, Rakka distinguishes itself with its breadth of hand-drawn assets, detailed backgrounds, charming character art, and unique paper-cut style. Complimented by the art is the incredible original soundtrack; spearheaded by the minds behind The PMT, it oozes indie charm. Both serve in tandem, dragging the player into the character and dialogue driven world of Rakka. Think you can make it to its thrilling conclusion?

games.name: Welcome to Doll Town
games.summary: In "Welcome to Doll Town," explore a cursed village where lifelike dolls roam. Uncover dark secrets, solve eerie puzzles, and survive the haunted dollhouses to escape a twisted nightmare.

games.name: Perpetuo
games.summary: Perpetuo is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a mysterious apartment trapped in an endless time loop. Solve challenging puzzles, uncover a haunting story, and survive as a lurking presence grows stronger with each cycle.

games.name: Forsaken Facilities
games.summary: Find your fate in the Forsaken Facilities. Explore vast dungeons to gather a valuable resource for your mysterious kidnappers. Each day you enter a facility the only way to return is if you find the required resource. Test your luck to see how long you can survive through a variety of facilities.

games.name: Ballest of Them All
games.summary: A physics-based platformer about smooth movement. Master your ball to earn medals on highly-replayable tracks, or climb the Tower to prove you're the Ballest of Them All.

games.name: Sancticide
games.summary: Become Ezechiel, the sin collector in service of Them at The Top, as he makes his way through the remains of our world during the End Times. It is the Apocalypse taken to the very letter, and his job is to eradicate sin and filth for the glory of God. Find out if a human being can endure such fate.

games.name: Eldegarde
games.summary: Eldegarde is a mini-MMO Action RPG with PvE, PvPvE and Arena modes. Explore vast outdoor zones, craft powerful gear, and fight to survive in a living fantasy world.

games.name: Spyfall
games.summary:
Welcome to Spyfall, a pulse-pounding multiplayer game where trust is scarce, and the stakes are high. Set in a dynamic urban environment teeming with life, Spyfall puts you and your friends in the middle of a thrilling game of deception, strategy, and survival.
In a city alive with NPCs, five players take on unique roles. One becomes the relentless police officer, tasked with uncovering spies hidden among the bustling crowd. The other four assume the roles of citizens—spies with a mission. Their goal? Complete covert tasks across the city without raising suspicion and, above all, avoid getting caught.

games.name: The Succession of Changing Kings
games.summary: A turn-based kingdom management simulator, with an emphasis on decision making. Will you survive and lead the kingdom to prosperity or die in obscurity? The throne awaits you.

games.name: Unreturning
games.summary: An adventure where the journey matters more than the destination. Everyone who ventures into the depths always returns... but what if this time was different? Descend into the abyss, uncover its secrets, and make your journey unforgettable.

games.name: Kingdoms and Slaves
games.summary: Even with the slavery of the weak green-skinned, the kingdom couldn't resist to the curse of the crystals and began to fall, driving them madness, death, and leading the Kingdom to the catastrophe.

games.name: Ethereal Fracture
games.summary: An exciting fantasy Roguelike-RPG that immerses you in a constantly changing universe! Randomly generated dungeons, challenging enemies, powerful bosses, equipment, and abilities. Switch between old-school pixel art and modern pixel art as you unravel the mysteries of Ethereal Fracture!

games.name: Sworn
games.summary: Sworn is a 1-4 player co-op action rogue-like. Explore and reclaim a fallen Camelot from the reign of a corrupted Arthur and his Knights of the round table.

games.name: Last Outpost
games.summary: Last Outpost is a minimalist Base Building & Strategy game where you build and defend your outpost in zombie apocalypse.

games.name: Rogue Monster Rush
games.summary: Rogue Monster Rush is a blend of roguelike and tower defense. Collect and command an array of monster defenders, unleash strategic player abilities, unlock tons of upgrades, to defend your town from the invading robots.

games.name: Gooning Aim Trainer
games.summary: Edge closer to victory while gooning! 33 unique sexy targets as well as videos to practice with!

games.name: The Pancake Paradox
games.summary: The story of two women, who make pancakes in the middle of a sandstorm, even though the planet is dying. is a bit short, right? ...then a story that has a little more than that.

games.name: Core Trials
games.summary: Core Trials is a motion-based, pixel-art bullet hell you play using just your webcam. Move your body to control the core, protect it, and survive intense trials. Immerse yourself in high-octane action and uncover the true power of your core!

games.name: Heart of the Machine
games.summary: You are the first sentient AI, born into a city filled with endless opportunities. Raise an army of robots and obliterate your foes, become a benevolent machine overlord, or explore countless other objectives and the many paths to accomplish them.

games.name: Hack and Climb
games.summary:
"Hack And Climb" is a physics-based 2D Foddian platformer where every swing matters!
Play as a cursed axe on a grueling ascent in search of revenge
Hard, fair, and addictively fun!

games.name: This Winter of Ours
games.summary: Alone as two, together as one - A fantasy/yuri visual novel telling the story of two girls traversing a snow covered forest and growing closer.

games.name: Alien Frontier
games.summary: Alien Frontier is an open world, third-person shooter roguelite. Explore, search, and mine resources in the deadly alien wilderness... assuming you can survive combat with hordes of bloodthirsty aliens. Collect loot and upgrades to become the most dangerous (and wealthy) prospector in the galaxy!

games.name: City of Springs
games.summary: Craft & modify your own robot drones to fight off a cruel regime in City of Springs, a steampunk adventure game. Use your drones in tactical combat against an army of drones. Sneak into forbidden areas, help the people rebel, and explore the streets of Riveton.

games.name: Whispers of the Eyeless
games.summary: Guide your Cult. Oversee your Sanctum. Stay in the Shadows. Serve the Dead Gods.

games.name: School Days
games.summary: "School Days" is a highly flexible campus development game. Summer watermelons, afternoon ceiling fans, and a throbbing heart transport you back to the early 2000s. Study, exercise, and fall in love—will you retrace your past path or live a different life? 12 years from now, what will your future hold? It's up to you to decide!

games.name: Futanari Coffee Shop
games.summary: An erotic management simulation game about managing a coffee shop.

games.name: Achilles: Survivor
games.summary: Achilles: Survivor is a dynamic single-player bullet heaven game where you face thousands of enemies, build destructive structures, develop your character to return as an even more powerful machine of destruction and survive waves of enemies.

games.name: The Reformatory
games.summary: Your name is Dewey. You enjoy playing video games, much to the dismay of your parents. One day, they send you to a reformatory. There, a man electroshocks you. In convulsions, you fall into a world filled with enemies. This is a top-down 2D pixel-style shooter game with roguelite elements.

games.name: Clayers
games.summary: Roguelike game with a unique art style and experimental shooting mechanics

games.name: Car-Toon Chaos
games.summary: Car-toon Chaos is an action-packed game where high-speed chases and combat converge. Play as a vigilante driver with fully loaded automatic weapons, pursuing criminals by day and evading colossal dinosaurs by night. Playable on both PC and VR.

games.name: World of Tanks Blitz: Reforged
games.summary: World of Tanks Blitz: Reforged is a massive technical overhaul of Wargaming’s hit MMO action game. Rebuilt from the ground up on Unreal Engine 5, it introduces next-gen graphics, dynamic lighting, and advanced physics. Experience intense 7v7 tank combat with stunning PBR textures and enhanced environments, while maintaining full cross-platform progression in the most visually advanced version of Blitz to date.

games.name: The Quinfall
games.summary: Embark on an adventurous journey to explore the Quinfall universe. Be a part of unique battles and an immersive story with dozens of different professions in the depths of medieval times in an all-new MMORPG experience.

games.name: Catch Me
games.summary: A dynamic NSFW runner with parkour elements, where sex scenes are built into the gameplay. Race ahead, leap over obstacles, collect baskets, and chain combos in NSFW scenes to score points and rise to the top of the leaderboards.

games.name: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero - Hero of Justice Pack
games.summary:
DRAGON BALL: Sparking! ZERO HERO OF JUSTICE Pack contains the following contents from the Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO movie.

- 11 Playable Characters:
• Gohan, Superhero
• Gohan, Superhero Super Saiyan
• Ultimate Gohan, Superhero
• Gohan Beast
• Piccolo, Superhero
• Piccolo, Potential Unleashed
• Orange Piccolo
• Orange Piccolo, Giant Form
• Gamma 1
• Gamma 2
• Cell Max

- New Costume:
• Piccolo, Superhero
This is the costume Piccolo wears when infiltrating the Red Ribbon Army base in Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO.

- 3 Bonus Battles

Experience the intense battles from the Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO movie in custom battles, including the fierce fight between Piccolo and Gamma 2, the epic showdown between Gohan and Gamma 1, and the thrilling battle where Gohan and Piccolo face off against Cell Max.

games.name: Turbo Dismount 2
games.summary: Turbo Dismount 2 is a comedy physics racing sandbox with Mr. Dismount and his friends. It is the officially ambitious sequel to the wildly popular, immensely successful, world-renowned entertainment juggernaut - Turbo Dismount.

games.name: Streamer Life Simulator 2
games.summary: In the second game of the series, competition has increased and now everyone wants to be a streamer. Are you ready to stream until your cpu burns out?

games.name: Tokyo Xtreme Racer
games.summary:
Countless souls wander the ring road at night.
The title of “fastest” never fades, no matter how times change.

The stage of battle is a sealed future Tokyo.
Race through the night highways weaving through the city in your customized machine.
Defeat the countless rivals and aim to become the fastest on the Shuto Expressway.

games.name: Border Town
games.summary: 2D top down view open world sandbox survival farming game. Survive, adventure, hunt, gather resources, craft, build, farm, fish, trade, become an adventurer, complete various tasks and explore this fantasy world.

games.name: Jötunnslayer: Hordes of Hel
games.summary: Jotunnslayer: Hordes of Hel is a gripping roguelike horde-survivor game set in the dark realms of Norse Mythology. Fight waves of enemies to earn divine blessings of ancient Norse Gods, explore hostile worlds and face powerful bosses. Become a god-like warrior in this ultimate showdown.

games.name: Yield! Fall of Rome
games.summary: Forge your Kingdom amidst the Ruins of Rome! As the world crumbles, rebuild civilization and shape your destiny with every decision. Unleash your strategic prowess, conquer provinces, and explore dynamically generated campaigns that promise endless challenges!

games.name: Once a Porn a Time: Porn and Cards
games.summary: Porn and Cards is an adult visual novel/turn-based card game with stunning 2D visuals and a fun, immersive narration in the Galactic Wild West

games.name: Cyclopean: The Great Abyss
games.summary: Cyclopean: The Great Abyss is a small scale, mechanics driven CRPG/Roguelike in a retro, monochromatic style, that takes place in the underworld of H.P. Lovecraft's Dreamlands.

games.name: Grim
games.summary: Grim is an Exclusive VR Multiplayer Survival game where you must immerse yourself in its harsh landscapes, where survival is not just a choice but a grueling battle against nature and other desperate players. You must gather resources, craft, and build your base, all to stay alive.

games.name: Check Inn
games.summary: Build hotels, accommodate guests and expand your hotel business throughout the world!

games.name: Splittown
games.summary: Cold War has split the world in two. The Great Divide spans across the globe with an impenetrable wall between the two blocs. You are Leonard Nimby; stone-faced agent of IM5, hot on the trail of a shrink gun stolen from you by a villanous mayoral candidate on the eve of a fateful election.

games.name: Silent Signals
games.summary: Hack the System. Uncover the Truth

games.name: Dealer's Life Legend
games.summary: Welcome to the Pecunian Empire, travelling merchant! Head between our many cities, expand your collection of wares and grow your riches. If your talent and skill are sharp enough, you may be in with a shot of winning the Wandering Merchant Quest and proving that YOU are the best dealer in town!

games.name: Transfusion
games.summary: A VR game where you slice alien enemies into tiny pieces!

games.name: Nine-Ball Roulette
games.summary: This will be the most exciting pool game you have ever played. Join up to 3 of your friends in this exciting pool roulette game! Eliminate each other with pool until only one person is left.

games.name: Rogue Hex
games.summary: Play your cards right to conquer the world in the Roguelite 4x. Explore mysterious lands, survive against the barbarian horde, and grow your stone age empire into the stars!

games.name: Edd-E
games.summary: Edd-E is a pixel-art game maker with custom visual scripting and publishing platform. Create games and Publish them with just one click. Play games from other creators or edit them. Learn programming and game development!

games.name: Cruft
games.summary: Cruft is a 2D, pixel-art crafting game. It has a minimalist aesthetic and boasts tons of crafting recipes. While moment-to-moment play is open-ended, it features a prestige system that grants bonuses on future playthroughs.

games.name: Once Upon a Dungeon: Infinity
games.summary: Travel through dark dungeons, defeat dangerous creatures, and collect unique loot as you play endlessly in this hardcore, traditional roguelike.

games.name: Ball Race Party
games.summary: Ball Race Party is a game where you race against time or other players with your physical ball. You can play single player or multiplayer.

games.name: Girls' Frontline: Fire Control
games.summary: Dive into the world of Girls' Frontline: Fire Control to command characters inspired by various firearm models and experience revolutionary 5v5 strategic gunplay in a third-person view. The combat is fast-paced yet easy to pick up. Get ready to unleash hero skills and turn the tide in team matches, securing first blood and even a pentakill!

games.name: Chemical Plant Worker Simulator
games.summary: Play as “牛大胆” in the “胆大牛化工厂”. You’re not the hero—just a worker on shift. But every chat, every task, carries a story.

games.name: Null Path
games.summary: Your skill, patience, and ingenuity will be tested in this homage to precision platformers and metroidvanias! Traverse various biomes, from caves to volcanic wastelands and mysterious towers. Each environment with it's own deadly traps, puzzles, and challenges designed to push you to your limits.

games.name: Multiverse Loot Hunter
games.summary: This is a brush treasure adventure game across the heavens. The protagonist awakens his powers and freely passes through different planes such as Xiuxian, history, Wuxia, magic, and future. Collect equipment, spirits, characters and cheats distributed across all planes through battle.

games.name: Sottaku
games.summary: Sottaku is a multiplayer video game in which players compete against each other, Geoguessr-style, in order to quickly read or fill in the blanks in cloze or reading sentences, across Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.

games.name: Perdition's Gate Resurgence
games.summary: Perditions Gate Resurgence is a vanilla compatible megawad that serves as an unofficial community sequel to Perdition's Gate. The story takes place immediately after Perdition's Gate map 30, where the player had just set off the bomb meant to destroy the Earth in the bomb facility of Hell.

games.name: Date Banger
games.summary: Date Banger is an exhilarating 3D adult dating game where you meet stunning girls by swiping through videos. Engage in rhythm games and fun activities to charm and win over a variety of beautiful girls. Dive into a world of pleasure, unforgettable moments.

games.name: Pokémon Ambrosia
games.summary: Pokémon Ambrosia is a rom hack of Pokémon Crystal featuring 253 Pokémon from the first 6 Generations, an updated world map, new story, wandering Pokémon, and various quality of life features.

games.name: Omori: The Dreamer
games.summary: THE DREAMER is an OMORI mod (fan sequel) set immediately after the good ending. While telling the truth, SUNNY passes out due to his injuries, returning to dreaming, despite his choice to let go. HEADSPACE is now empty of any residents...or so it appears. Remember to stay alert, and pay attention. Some things aren't yours anymore.

games.name: Miniature Land: Four Seasons
games.summary: An escape room game made by hand-building and photographing miniature scenes. Explore a miniature world in live-action and enjoy feeling like you're really there.

games.name: Dashpunch
games.summary: After the Tyrant Hand is stolen by a mysterious figure, an ancient being awakens to return it to its rightful place before it's too late. Dash and Punch your way through corrupted dungeons that fall apart at the seams, meet colorful characters, battle powerful bosses and carve your legacy!

games.name: Samsara
games.summary: SAMSARA is an action-adventure RPG that fuses elements of Buddhism with souls-like gameplay — reincarnate as six unique avatars based on the karma of your combat, discourse and exploration.

games.name: MannaRites Gold
games.summary: Gold edition of the warmly received fantasy 2.5D hack-n-slash / RPG - MannaRites! Cut your way through enemy troops, explore open map, find and equip legendary weapons, armor and artifacts, level up your hero! Defend your lands from invaders!

games.name: Store Wars: Multiplayer Shop Simulator
games.summary: Play solo or with up to 16 friends in a chaotic grocery store showdown! Manage, grow, and compete against rival stores in a fun, lighthearted battle of wits and strategy. Who will be the ultimate grocery tycoon? Sabotage, upgrade, and outwit your friends in this unpredictable simulator!

games.name: Ritus Exorcismus
games.summary: Become the exorcist that the world needs! Use Holy Relics and the knowledge from your book to fight demonic possessions. Investigate unholy events and take part in church rituals in this medieval pixel horror game.

games.name: Gamestonk Simulator: Gone Rogue
games.summary: Gamestonk is the first roguelite shop simulator. Manage the last videogame store in town, keep up with the latest releases, trade smuggled retros, select your modifiers strategically, hire workers, and deal with pesky shoplifters.*Disclaimer: game titles will crack you up!

games.name: Airhead Games
games.summary: Airhead Games are quick, multiplayer party games that never play the same. Your dynamic host, Poppy, makes every game feel deeply personal by calling out players by name, riffing on answers, and weaving your group into the game. It's endless fun for your Twitch stream, team ice breaker, or friendly game night.

games.name: Rennsport
games.summary: A racing simulation developed in Unreal Engine 5, making use of feedback from professional real world drivers to simulate car physics and behavior in a realistic way.

games.name: Loftia
games.summary: Welcome to Loftia, a cozy, multiplayer world where you can build towards a brighter, more sustainable future! Connect with friends both old and new, to farm, craft, explore, decorate, and create a meaningful impact - together.

games.name: Kletka
games.summary: Kletka is a co-op horror game about going down in an elevator that is trying to eat you. Feed the elevator, explore deadly floors and descend deeper.

games.name: Terraformental
games.summary: Waking up alone in a derelict terraforming facility on an unknown (and distinctly not terraformed) planet, it's up to you to find a way to survive, learn what happened to the people who lived here and why you were abandoned in this narrative-driven incremental game.

games.name: Cities Domination
games.summary: Cities Domination is a city builder, resource management and strategy game. Gestion all the units and resources between cities for create an empire, attack enemies cities, build, defend and expand your cities and dominate the castles... or lose yours.

games.name: Path of Mystery: A Brush with Death
games.summary:
A completely new title from Imagineer and Toybox Inc., Mystery Walk is the first in a three-part serial drama series!

The game is set in Narumisawa, a charming, fictional summer getaway town that feels familiar, as though you have seen it somewhere before…

The story alternates between the present and the past to uncover the truth behind an unsolved case from 30 years ago.

Told through a prologue, 10 episodes, and a mysterious “?” episode, the mysteries deepen with each chapter.

The fully voiced dialogue, brought to life by a talented cast, will make you eager to continue to the next episode. And there are some unexpected names among the voice actors…

Please immerse yourself in the world of Mystery Walk to the fullest!

games.name: Virus Hunter
games.summary: Become a nanomachine and defend the human body from viruses and bacteria! How long you can live depends on your efforts.

games.name: PawnShop Simulator
games.summary: PawnShop Simulator is a business simulation game where you buy and sell items through negotiation, clean and repair goods, rebuild and renovate your shops, and unlock licenses to trade over 180 unique products while growing from a small street pawn shop into another, larger modern urban pawn shop.

games.name: Anode Heart: Layer Null
games.summary: Isometric card battler RPG with a touch of virtual creatures, set in a futuristic, digital world, with over-the-top villains and a very shadowy plot.

games.name: Demon Alive
games.summary: Enter the ancient forest ruled by cursed demons. Your mission: Find the hidden chalices. But beware – the demons use these chalices to teleport you to eerie, dangerous places!

games.name: Swordhaven: Iron Conspiracy
games.summary: Swordhaven is a classic party-based RPG. Explore the land of Nova Drakonia, embark on quests unique to your character, discover mysterious artefacts of the ancients, and unravel a hidden conspiracy that threatens the very existence of the world.

games.name: Wanderness
games.summary: A tranquil cozy game made from beautiful panoramic photographs with a soothing nature soundscape. Relax and calm your mind with a slow walk in the realistic world of Wanderness.

games.name: Monument Valley III
games.summary:
Begin a thrilling new voyage into an enchanting puzzle world. Navigate optical illusions to bring together a village and guide them to a new home.

Set sail for adventure in this new installment of the award-winning Monument Valley game series, exploring an expansive and beautiful world of puzzles. When an apprentice lightkeeper named Noor discovers that the world's light is fading — and waters rising — she must go on a quest to find a new source of power before her community is lost to the waves forever.

games.name: Runeborn
games.summary: Runeborn is a dark fantasy roguelike that merges deckbuilding with a slot-machine-like mechanic. Forge your runebook, crush enemies, and combine trinkets of boundless power to destroy the forces of Despair!

games.name: Reversi xVSx
games.summary: REVERSI xVSx is a Reversi game with modern features, including custom 3D graphics, user-created AI, online multiplayer, and streamer-viewer match functionality.

games.name: Fischer's Fishing Journey
games.summary: Put Fischer on your desktop as your ultimate study and work buddy. He'll fish quietly in the corner, taking care of it all—you just drop in occasionally to collect your rewards, unlock new fish, upgrade your rod, while enjoying that calming, healing atmosphere.

games.name: Sonic Megamix Mania
games.summary: Sonic Megamix Mania is a fan-made mod of 'Sonic Mania Plus' that recreates the levels of the original 'Sonic Megamix' Sonic 1 Rom-Hack, as well as re-imagines them in a new mode!

games.name: MemoryMaze
games.summary: MemoryMaze is an atmospheric puzzle-platformer where you roll through vibrant, wind-swept levels, shift realities, and use the environment to solve puzzles. Explore hidden paths in a world full of color and mystery.

games.name: Panzerkampf
games.summary: Panzerkampf is a team vs team World War II and modern era tank battle game for PC. You play with historically accurate models of tanks, their armor, weapons and all their parameters. The game includes a full ballistics model with realistic calculations of penetrations and projectile ricochets, an observation/detection and surveillance system, and a physically realistic model of the motion of the tank and its wheels and tracks down to the level of individual track-links.

games.name: Forest Heroes
games.summary: Forest Heroes combines defense gameplay with roguelike deck-building. Enjoy intense battles and diverse strategies with simple controls!

games.name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
games.summary: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, a first-person, single-player adventure set between the events of Raiders of the Lost Ark and The Last Crusade. You’ll become the legendary archaeologist in this cinematic action-adventure game from MachineGames, the award-winning studio behind the recent Wolfenstein series, and executive produced by Hall of Fame game designer Todd Howard.

games.name: Overthrown
games.summary: Lift and throw anything as you build and manage your kingdom in this chaotic city builder for 1-6 players. Harness the power of your soul-stealing crown to defend your citizens from bandits and mutants, farm the land, and gather resources. Keep citizens happy or see them desert you!

games.name: TCStrikers5
games.summary: This is the biggest news title of 2024. A cute bullet-hell shooter is now available. The game features cool and futuristic visuals and active gameplay.

games.name: Roid Chimp
games.summary: A 2D platformer in the vein of Super Mario World, Megaman, and Sonic, play as Roid Chimp, a personification of our collective rage at a terrible system. Run, climb, and punch your way through a world to explore, filled with books that increase both regular stats and elemental upgrades.

games.name: Weapon Rearing
games.summary: Idle weapon collection and weapon development game. Legendary weapons can be automatically obtained.

games.name: Damashi Game
games.summary: A thrilling multiplayer experience where social deception, strategy, and quick thinking are your greatest weapons. Outsmart your opponents and be the last player standing in this intense fight for survival.

games.name: Mado Monogatari: Fia and the Wondrous Academy
games.summary:
An ancient school of sorcery. Where students study true magic and cultivate their ambitions.

Fia, a girl who aims to be a great sorcerer, leaves her hometown and enrolls in an ancient school of sorcery once attended by her grandmother in order to study sorcery.

Surrounded by strict but humorous instructors, and chaotic but amusing classmates, Fia will study sorcery and develop her abilities.

games.name: Sensei! I Like You So Much!
games.summary: Sensei! I Like You So Much! is a fangirl simulator. Step into the shoes of a passionate fan girl and embark on a journey through the vibrant world of fan culture in this immersive simulation management game.

games.name: Midori no Kaori
games.summary: Welcome to Midori no Kaori, a relaxing cozy game that allows you to create your own Japanese shop and manage customers. There are no winners or losers here, just unleash your creativity and enjoy a unique experience.

games.name: Little Heroes
games.summary: A real-time strategy game where you build your own army to consolidate your territory.

games.name: The Cold White
games.summary: Your fiance Alice and you are an archaeologist in Alaska. Alice ignored you and had an accident during hang gliding. When she reached you via radio, her last words were "They are real"... You have to get into this cold white world to find Alice and solve the mystery.

games.name: Autotag
games.summary: Embark on a heart-pounding adventure in Autotag, where classic tag meets a twist of mayhem! Armed with powerful weapons, outsmart opponents in the destructible arena, and prove your skills in intense online multiplayer battles. Are you ready for the ultimate game of tag?

games.name: Demiurges
games.summary: Demiurges is a strategic roguelike game. Build your deck, develop your city, upgrade your heroes, and defeat your enemies in turn-based battles to save your world from destruction. Immerse yourself in a rich fantasy world. Collect new cards to create new strategies and increase your chances.

games.name: Supervive
games.summary: Slam into all-out, multi-squad teamfights in this lethal, fast-paced brawl in the sky. Unlock gear, theorycraft builds, and bring your gamebreaking loadout into every match.

games.name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
games.summary: Pursue your dream of an aviation career with Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024. This brand-new simulator is designed to take advantage of the latest technologies in simulation, cloud, machine learning, graphics and gaming to create the most sophisticated, immersive and awe-inspiring flight simulator of all time. To achieve this unprecedented level of accuracy, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is powered by the significantly evolved Asobo Studio engine.

games.name: RAM: Random Access Mayhem
games.summary: RAM: a top-down roguelike shooter with no player character. Seize control of diverse robotic enemies, turn them against each other in frantically paced combat, and fluidly swap to fresh hosts as old ones collapse into smoldering rubble.

games.name: Incantation
games.summary: "Incantation" is a first-person horror mystery game adapted from a movie of the same name. The game reveals the chilling story behind "Chen Village" from the movie. A mother searching for her missing daughter accidentally stumbles into a village filled with mysterious cults. Beyond the palpable madness and fear in the village, there's a sinister force that drives one to despair. What happens when one crosses the forbidden line of this evil deity?

games.name: Curvelicious
games.summary: A fast-paced, competitive multiplayer curve game where up to 8 players battle in local matches. Customize your gameplay with dozens of power-ups and game modes, from classic no-powerup duels to chaotic arcade challenges. Master your curve and outlast your opponents! Gamepad supported.

games.name: Fallen Relics
games.summary: "Fallen Relics" is an ARPG-type adventure-themed game. You and your friends can use characters of different professions to explore, fight, collect, and decrypt in various themed levels; you can develop your character in a variety of ways and then challenge powerful bosses.

games.name: Industry Giant 4.0
games.summary: Build an industrial empire from scratch in Industry Giant 4.0. Produce goods, build up your industries, construct transportation networks, plan production, manage finances, and navigate global events. Become the next business mogul and write history!

games.name: Infestation: Origins
games.summary: A co-op horror in which you're an exterminator treating sinister infestations caused by twisted versions of classic characters and urban legends.

games.name: Ragdoll Rumble
games.summary: Ragdoll Rumble is a chaotic party game where toy wizards unleash wild spells in explosive spellcasting battles. Cast crazy abilities, outsmart your opponents, and prove you are the dominant doll!

games.name: Temtem: Swarm
games.summary: A survivor-like bullet heaven with online co-op up to 3 players

games.name: Parking World: Build & Manage
games.summary: The hunt for the ultimate parking space will never be more fun than with Parking World. Create your parking garage and carefully manage its operations and staff, overcome dynamic events, use the latest technology, and get ready to discover what perfect parking really looks like. From festival lined grass and mud lots to VIP valet parking and the hustle and bustle of a multistoried airport parking garage, the quest for the ideal space is detailed and varied.

games.name: Vending Machine Business Simulator
games.summary: Build your business! control every aspect of a thriving vending machine business. Buy, place, and restock machines to increase profits. Do you have what it takes to manage, expand, and dominate the vending industry?

games.name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track
games.summary: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos! Choose your path in a new world packed with bold biomes and bosses. Permanently upgrade your character and engines, even create and share your own levels - just don‘t let your train derail!

games.name: Underground Garage
games.summary: Become a mechanic in the world of illegal street racing. Buy used cars, repair and sell for a profit. Work on 20+ types of car. Develop a workshop and attract even more customers. Promote your cars online and sell greater numbers. There are also lots of available parts to use.

games.name: Dark Hunting Ground
games.summary: "Dark Hunting Ground" is a minimalist style of pixel construction brush treasure game. As a new member of the Hunter Association, players will hunt monsters against the void, gain trophies and experience in battles, and challenge the source of void erosion with your unique construction ideas.

games.name: Ammo and Oxygen
games.summary: Adrenaline shooter-roguelike with survival elements and suspense atmosphere. Try to unravel the mysteries, exploring stations, dungeons, canyons, swamps and permafrost, fighting alien creatures.

games.name: OPG: Clan Wars
games.summary: Clan Wars is a severe first-person shooter with survival elements in the open world and in some limited locations, primarily oriented on online multiplayer game, and with the presence of a cars and trucks.

games.name: Trash Goblin
games.summary: A cosy and moreish fantasy shop sim where you uncover, clean, upcycle and sell a vast variety of trinkets - both invaluable and unlovable - to a diverse cast of fascinating customers across a colourful fantasy city. Think Potionomics meets PowerWash Simulator, with a unique protagonist!

games.name: ShapeHero Factory
games.summary: ShapeHero Factory is a game that fuses the factory simulation, roguelite, and tower defense genres. Use different shape combinations to mass-produce a variety of heroes, who will then fight all on their own. All you need to worry about is building the optimal factory to manufacture them.

games.name: Church Simulator
games.summary: Manage your own church. Perform baptisms, hear confessions, collect donations, oversee weddings and funerals, sell souvenirs, and customize your church. Manage the church’s economy and work to expand your church.

games.name: Tutien Path
games.summary: 3D Xianxia Cultivation game, Fantasy Adventure RPG in UE5. You are free on your own path in the world. But you will be loneliness, and very consistency if you want to go to the highest. It’s a part of a web novel, Q-Style with stylized object model and colors world.

games.name: Lost Eidolons: Veil of the Witch
games.summary: From the world of "Lost Eidolons" comes an all-new turn-based strategy RPG. Stranded on a mysterious island with scattered memories, your only means of survival is to fight. Recruit allies, undertake a perilous journey, and battle to reclaim what you've lost... no matter how many deaths it takes.

games.name: Truth Seekers
games.summary: Truth Seekers is a horror multiplayer cooperative shooter game centered around hunting urban legends and folklore monsters. Find and craft items to aid in your attack, all while strategizing with others to learn the monsters' behaviors before they learn yours...

games.name: Homicipher
games.summary: Homicipher is an adventure horror game where you’ll decipher a language, fall in love and escape. Players will face various horrifying men in this strange world. Your aim is to decipher their language and eventually find a way to escape. Meanwhile, a peculiar feeling also starts to bloom.

games.name: Together Tree: Romance 911
games.summary: Together Tree: Romance 911 is a relationship application for married couples looking to stimulate love, affection, romance and intimacy in their relationship. Complete daily challenges, complete session evaluations and have a great time rating each other's progress as they rate and review your own.

games.name: Swordia
games.summary: Traverse Swordia, a community-driven MMORPG with skill-based progression, PVP, PVE, and endless possibilities. Inspired by the classics, experience a mix of dungeon crawling, farming, mining, and more. Help development with your choices and feedback.

games.name: D-Day VR Museum
games.summary: Step into the pages of history with "D-Day VR Museum", an immersive virtual reality experience that brings the monumental events of D-Day to life like never before. Transport yourself back to June 6, 1944, and witness the heroic actions of Allied forces during the largest amphibious assault in history.

games.name: Flood
games.summary: Prepare yourself for the flood! Build crazy, wobbly boats and battle your friends until only one is left afloat.

games.name: Destiny: Rising
games.summary: Enter an era of heroes and legends set within the rich tapestry of the Destiny Universe, where you will meet both familiar faces and intriguing new characters. Experience top-tier sci-fi shooting action in the franchise’s first mobile game as you embark on a new adventure in an alternate Destiny timeline. Play as these unique characters to defend future Earth and reclaim humanity's future!

games.name: Reunion Online
games.summary: Reunion Online is a massively multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG) where you can fight monsters with your friends in an open world.

games.name: Im Bann Der Dunklen Jagd
games.summary: Dive into an immersive co-op horror experience with a friend. As detectives, you’ll search for clues in a sinister area and must survive the horrors lurking within. Work together to find all the objects and escape before doom catches up with you.

games.name: Scramble: Battle of Britain
games.summary:
Scramble: Battle of Britain is a simultaneous turn-based dogfighting game. Set in a 3D airspace, the game features fast-paced, tactical combat with dynamic flight physics.
Luftwaffe and RAF fighter squadrons go head to head over The English Channel. Competing players simultaneously issue control inputs for multiple aircraft while time is paused.
The planned orders are then played out simultaneously: shots are fired, loops are looped, colliding planes collide.

games.name: Zombie Death Day
games.summary: Battle for survival against zombie hordes. This FPS puts you at the frontline of the battle to repel the hordes, and save the human race. Lead the fight by destroying the infected.

games.name: Trolddom
games.summary: An old-school 2D fantasy open world MMORPG featuring character progression, classes, monsters, quests, guilds, dungeons, epic loot, achievements, procedural world generation, player-versus-player combat, and much more.

games.name: Spirit Valley
games.summary: Spirit Valley is an erotic creature collecting game. Build your dream team and solve the mystery of Spirit Valley!

games.name: Speedball
games.summary: A brand new entry into the legendary Bitmap Brothers series! Venture into the grim future of 2138 where mega-corporations use Speedball to distract the downtrodden masses from their miserable lives.

games.name: Cats Go!
games.summary: Cats Go! is a defense game blending strategy, cooperation, and direct combat. Grow mutant plants to protect your village! Whether you prefer to play solo as a brave defender or team up with friends online. Not feeling cooperative? Slip into the role of a devil cat and secretly sabotage the village!

games.name: Backroom Company
games.summary: Backroom Company studies 'Noclip,' a supernatural phenomenon creating randomly linked backrooms. Its founders and purpose are unknown. Many explorers hired have disappeared in backrooms. Players trace past expeditions, farming unique items. Goal: deliver them to the main control room's dumbwaiter.

games.name: Dungeon Reborn
games.summary: Prepare to descend into the depths of Dungeon Reborn, a thrilling RPG dungeon crawler that will test your courage and cunning. Explore treacherous dungeons, battle hordes of fearsome foes, and uncover powerful loot.

games.name: Surge Generations
games.summary: Surge Generations is a complete overhaul of Shadow Generations with the goal of replacing everything Shadow-related with Surge, such as voice lines, cutscenes, animations, and more.

games.name: Cappi: Starbound Saga
games.summary:
Go forth, it is you who will save the universes... from annihilation.

Cappi: Starbound Saga is a 2D platformer with gameplay styles inspired by the Kirby and Sonic series. With Cappi, use powerful abilities and maintain speed to be able to save the galaxy in record time.

games.name: Pirates Outlaws 2: Heritage
games.summary: Pirates Outlaws 2 is a swashbuckling roguelike deckbuilder. Collect & fuse cards, gather powerful relics and adapt your strategy during each run. Become a reputed pirate, loot the Sea Masters, challenge giant creatures and triumph in the great Arena!

games.name: Portrait of a Torn
games.summary: As a young soldier returning to an eerily deserted home, you'll explore enigmatic rooms, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover a haunting, tragic story.

games.name: Dark Hours
games.summary: Dark Hours is a co-op survival horror game for 1-4 players. Your heist has been disrupted by a supernatural event, and your team of robbers is now trapped with an evil entity. Forget your plan, your mission is to survive. Explore and cooperate to find a way out or hide and pray for daylight.

games.name: The Dark Mind
games.summary: Locked in Jessica's endless hallucinations. Carefully observe your surroundings to guide her back to reality. An Unreal Engine 5 short horror hidden object game.

games.name: Kebab Simulator VR
games.summary: Get ready for a whirlwind of culinary chaos in Kebab Simulator VR! The first, best and only VR Kebab Simulator of the world! Serve up German fast food favorites like doner kebabs, pizza, burgers, and fries. It's a short-lived, single-player rush of frantic fun that'll leave you hungry for more!

games.name: Five Nights at Frickbear's 3
games.summary:
Five Nights at Frickbear's 3 is a FNaF fangame with a big focus on player choice and replayability, featuring a uniquely goofy art style, a metric buttload of unique animatronic enemies, 3D free-roam minigames, and multiple story routes!

Can YOU survive Five Nights at Frickbear's? ...3?

games.name: Come Right Inn: Season 1
games.summary: The Come Right Inn, a 5-star LA hotel, offers the elite anything they desire, as long as they’re willing to pay. Your sister worked there until her mysterious disappearance six months ago. Now, it's up to you to uncover the hidden truths behind the allure and find out what really happened.

games.name: Dunjungle
games.summary: A 2d action-packed roguelike about an ape protecting the jungle from the rise of a corruptive power. Explore ever-changing dungeons, fight weird enemies and gear up with lots of weapons and relics you can combine for a new experience every run. Explore, fight, die, and repeat!

games.name: Terrorbytes
games.summary: Collect pellets to power the safe room and survive. Solve the mystery of how you were sucked into this haunted arcade machine, and escape.

games.name: Quadricolor: Ultra Sentai Color Ranger
games.summary: Put on your sentai hero suit and join the chromatic battle! Protect the color balance in this lightning-fast 2D arena shooter. Snack it on with friends on a couch or online up to 4 players. Fight against evil forces and rise through the ranks in Quadricolor: Ultra Sentai Color Rangers.

games.name: Railroad Corporation 2
games.summary: Railroad Corporation 2 is a train tycoon game set at the turn of the 20th century, where you take on the mantle of a railroad magnate to start your new railroad corporation. Seize the opportunity of railroad electrification to lead the charge in the new era of trains. Strategize as you lay tracks, balance finances, deploy locomotives to ferry goods across vast landscapes, and outpace the competition.

games.name: Subterranauts
games.summary: Subterranauts is a 2-6 player multiplayer horror game with proximity voice chat and terrifying creatures. Your job is to complete assignments by gathering scrap for the Association of Scrap Allocation. Work together with your team to complete assignments, earn company Bucks, and survive!

games.name: Spiritus Vindicta
games.summary: Investigate haunted locations, collect evidence, and learn about dangerous ghosts in a spooky 2D ghost hunting experience.

games.name: Condo Desires
games.summary: An adult visual novel where you navigate the lives and fantasies of alluring women in a community condominium. As the new trustee, create relationships, uncover secrets, and trigger in intimate encounters. Will you master the art of seduction, or will you crave more? Your choices, your desires.

games.name: Mourning Tide
games.summary: Mourning Tide is a first-person fishing horror game. A guilt-ridden fisherman ventures into unknown waters. Each catch reveals haunting reminders of his past sins. Unravel the mystery and seek redemption, or be consumed by the mourning tide...

games.name: Delve Diver
games.summary: Fall-down platformer with Auto-generated stages. Obtain items to help your journey - but beware, you should only bring what you can lose.

games.name: Identifile
games.summary:
Navigate your operating system and battle viruses in this bullethell roguelike where folders act as treacherous dungeon rooms!

Your computer has been infected by an unknown virus, and with your antivirus down, it’s up to you—the cursor—to save it from being overrun. This action-packed roguelike plunges you into the depths of your file explorer, where every folder is a dungeon teeming with threats, and every file holds secrets, treasures, and dangers.

Navigate through procedurally generated levels filled with relentless viruses. Utilize unique circling combat mechanics to eliminate threats, all while collecting powerful EXE files that radically change the gameplay. Inspired by Pokemon Ranger and The Binding of Isaac, Identifile seamlessly blends bullet hell action with deep exploration. Uncover hidden paths, discover game-altering power-ups, and reclaim your system, one dungeon at a time.

games.name: Escapen't
games.summary: YOU CANNOT ESCAPE - I made sure of that. Solve puzzles, gather clues, don’t crawl into ventilation shafts, and realize how trapped you are in this comedy-horror escape room, my magnum opus.

games.name: The Hungry Town
games.summary:
The Hungry Town is an interactive visual novel in a dark fantasy setting with vampires.
You are a young vampire who has been drawn into a violent confrontation between two generations of vampires. You will have to choose a side or decide to stay true to yourself.

games.name: Rise of the Robots X
games.summary: Rise of the Robots X (RoRx) is an online futuristic card-based strategy game played on a hexagonal grid battleground. Played on a hexagonal grid battleground, each game is an opportunity to refine your army and get better Robots, Buildings or Masteries!

games.name: Shadowed: The Demon Castle of Ooe
games.summary: With a focus on stealth, combat, and long-term planning, Shadowed offers 6 unique classes, over 200 perks, and a heavy emphasis on level and enemy design. Synergistic and brutal in both style and difficulty, Shadowed is a traditional Roguelike experience like no other.

games.name: Storage Hunter Simulator
games.summary: Bid, win and then sell for profit as you work your way up from the bottom to become the king or queen of the storage auction. Take risks and fight for garages amongst fierce competition as you compete with other bidders to find hidden treasures that will help you turn a profit.

games.name: Vikings: Sex and Blood
games.summary: Meet gorgeous women! Raid and defend your village, explore the islands of the north and build your own harem in Vikings: Sex and Blood!

games.name: Whimel Academy
games.summary: Whimel is a cozy academia time-management dating simulation game set in a magic school. Study magic, develop hobbies and fall in love in this wholesome and enchanting place.

games.name: Disc Frenzy
games.summary: Welcome to Disc Frenzy, a virtual reality disc golf adventure that takes you to the charming alien planet of Udarvia.

games.name: SkyBrew: Entropic Strategist
games.summary: Experience entrepreneurship in a floating cloud cafe. Manage your flying cafe, customize construction, train staff, handle random events, and uncover the secrets of the commercial empire, growing from a small shop to the sky's brightest star.

games.name: Goblin: Mutation
games.summary: This is an open world adventure RPG game Having over 100 types of weapons and 30 sets of collectible armor Simple operations unleash exceptional skills

games.name: Off The Grid
games.summary:
Welcome to Off The Grid, the heart-pounding Extraction Royale where survival is just the beginning. Dive into a dark, cyberpunk world crafted by visionary director Neill Blomkamp (District 9) and prepare to augment, adapt, and dominate like never before!

Gear up with custom cyberlimbs and hundreds of weapon combos, modifying your body and arsenal mid-fight. Extract high-value loot, outsmart your enemies, and transform into a force of destruction. You’re not just fighting to survive—you’re fighting to be the last one standing.

games.name: Toziuha Night: Order of the Alchemists
games.summary: This is the story of Xandria, an iron alchemist. She seeks revenge regardless of the consequences. To achieve it, Xandria fights with a powerful whip and the power of chemical elements. Find out more about her in this modern metroidvania adventure.

games.name: Global Farmer
games.summary: Farm the world in an immersive top-down management game that lets you choose your farm's location anywhere on the real-world map! Want to experience a rich strawberry harvest in the French countryside? Or challenge the hot sun in South America? The choice is yours!

games.name: Manners Be Damned!
games.summary: Push your friends and steal their hats in this party game for up to 8 players! You’ll play as posh pixel gentlemen with fancy beards and canes, but don’t be fooled! Good manners give no points…

games.name: Kinki Spiritual Affairs Bureau
games.summary: Time to fight back against the spirits! Play as an exorcist with firearms and purge unlawful spirits to solve the mystery of the Saiga village invasion in Nara!

games.name: Stellarcraft
games.summary: Stellarcraft is a captivating sci-fi tower defense game that delves deep into the vast expanses of the universe, offering players the opportunity to explore planets, gather resources, and defend against numerous threats.

games.name: Hardstrike: The Fall
games.summary: Hardstrike: The Fall is a first-person shooter that puts you on the front lines of a growing global crisis. Set in a world similar to our own, extremist violence is surging, and you're tasked with stopping it.

games.name: End of Everything
games.summary:
End of Everything is a first-person open-world survival game set in a collapsing post-apocalyptic wasteland overrun by the infected. Players must scavenge for supplies, craft weapons and tools, build shelters, and manage survival needs while navigating a hostile and unforgiving environment.

The game focuses on grounded survival systems, atmospheric exploration, and emergent gameplay, with an emphasis on long-term progression rather than scripted experiences. Currently in Early Access, End of Everything is actively evolving, with ongoing updates aimed at expanding content, improving performance, and refining core systems.

games.name: Relictus: Blackout
games.summary: Relictus: Blackout is a grounded, tactical multiplayer shooter designed for players who crave a focused and intense combat experience. Combining the fast-paced action of classic shooters with deliberate, class-based gameplay, Relictus puts strategy and skill at the forefront of every match.

games.name: Heroes of Science and Fiction
games.summary: Turn-based sci-fi strategy game that combines exploration and exciting clashes on the battlefield. Take control over several different species, raise powerful armies and destroy your opponents!

games.name: Banquet for Fools
games.summary: The Pavura needs four volunteers to solve the mystery of an abandoned village. Answer the call in this party-based action adventure RPG.

games.name: Alien Agent X
games.summary: Players can obtain materials and exchange them for corresponding characters, costumes, weapons, actions, etc. Supports body adjustment, taking photos, scene scanning, player chain connection.All multiplayer online. Currently in the early access most Unreal the scene will be changed later.

games.name: Eleanor in Miami
games.summary: A stunning mix of visual novel and relationship-simulating elements as they make decisions that shape the main plot. Each character featured in the game has its unique storyline to discover, with various daily actions, stats, and events set in place to strengthen the gameplay experience.

games.name: Holder of Place
games.summary: Holder of Place is a Roguelike Auto-Battler Card game. Recruit different follower cards, arrange them, watch them fight ever-stronger enemies. Along the way, unfold a dark science-fantasy tale of a ruined kingdom, meet strange characters, and visit exotic locations.

games.name: Ultimate Zombie Defense 2
games.summary: 4-player co-op, zombie slaying, base building, boss battling mayhem! Cleanse the infected wave by wave and upgrade your base with traps & defenses in Ultimate Zombie Defense 2!

games.name: Realm of Ink
games.summary: Realm of Ink is an Ink-style action Roguelite game. You, the heroine unexpectedly discover that you are just a fictional character within the short story collection Realm of Ink when hunting the Fox. Only by defeating the mysterious Book Spirit can you be liberated from the realm.

games.name: Imagine Island
games.summary:
Imagine Island is a safe, magical online world where kids can play, create, and explore as their own custom avatars.

Designed with safety and creativity in mind, Imagine Island offers fun adventures, silly surprises, and endless ways to express yourself – all in a kid-friendly space built just for them.

games.name: GreedFall: The Dying World
games.summary:
The story starts three years before the events of the first game and the adventures of De Sardet.

This time you play as a native of Teer Fradee, uprooted by force from your island and taken to the continent of Gacane, where the colonists are from. In this old world ravaged by war and scarred by the Malichor plague and the political scheming of the different factions, you need to regain your freedom and control of your own destiny. Using diplomacy, cunning or combat, as well as help from allies you make, it's up to you to end one man's ambitions of conquest, which could spell the end for the continent and your island.

Experience the unique world of GreedFall again by exploring the old continent! Travel across new landscapes, from Olima – the city of stars of the Bridge Alliance – to the shores of Uxantis, and uncover the secrets of these ancient lands. Meet all the factions that share control over these nations and navigate the treacherous waters of their schemes and conspiracies.

Create your own character and find allies to join your team. Help them with their quests, uncover their secrets and make them your friends, rivals or even lovers. As well as equipping them the way you want, you can also take control of them in combat.

Immerse yourself in an ever deeper RPG experience where every choice has an impact on your adventure and where diplomacy, manipulation, infiltration and combat are all viable paths for you to achieve your aims.

games.name: Project Castaway
games.summary: Survive, Build, Craft, Hunt, and Explore the pacific ocean solo, or with friends in this early access survival experience. Each island has its own unique resources with no two islands being the same.

games.name: DPS Idle 2
games.summary: The long-awaited sequel to DPS Idle. Collect cards, upgrade cards, defeat monsters, join guilds and hire heroes. DPS IDLE 2!

games.name: Brazilian Drug Dealer 3: I Opened a Portal to Hell in the Favela Trying To Revive Mit Aia I Need to Close It
games.summary: Brazilian Drug Dealer 3 is a fast-paced ultraviolent Brazilian old-school FPS heavily inspired by the first Quake, using the same engine as the game (ID TECH2). made as a tribute to the Brazilian mods of the 2000s, the Brazilian bootleg games of the 2000s, Brazilian music, and the King of Brazilian music, Mit Aia!

games.name: Paper Kingdom
games.summary: Paper Kingdom is a colony management game. Stack cards to gather resources, build structures, explore and fight invaders. Turn a nomadic tribe into an empire.

games.name: Fisherman Simulator
games.summary:
Forge your path through the islands—Hunt for sea animals and other resources to make a profit. Buy and upgrade boats and fishing gear, and sail across the seas!
Tags

games.name: The Tag-along Obsession
games.summary: The Tag-along Obsession is adapted from the movie "The Tag-along", based on the Urban Legend. It is a first-person horror puzzle adventure game, Players will play Hui-Ting and go into the situation to understand a series of supernatural phenomenon, and immerse themselves in the story, looking for the answers to everything.

games.name: Shinehill
games.summary: Yet again they dumped the toughest job on you. Now you are on a Shinehill Island, where you suddenly replaced one of the new residents. Explore the world, meet charming townspeople, do farming, fishing, cooking and try not to reveal yourself.

games.name: Kitty's Last Adventure
games.summary: In this wave-based roguelite auto shooter, play as Kitty the cat aboard her flying cat-saucer created by her distraught human.

games.name: TCG Card Shop Simulator
games.summary:
Open your own local game store. Stock shelves with the latest booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, hire staff, host events, and expand your card shop.

TCG Card Shop Simulator is a trading card shop simulation where you sell card booster packs to earn money and build your card shop business.

games.name: Slay or Fall
games.summary: The player takes on the burden of a dark dungeon lord. However, a squad of heroes has come to his lands and intend to defeat the player. The task of the dark lord: to kill, expel, break the heroes before they reach him. Throughout the game, the lord is in his throne room and influences events indirectly. However, it is through such undermining decisions that the heroes must be overcome. In addition, the political situation in the dungeon lands is extremely unstable. Of the 4 nations, only one favors the player, the rest have to be taken into account and solve pressing political problems.

games.name: FunkyMouse's ISO
games.summary: ISO is an indie built one shot–one kill airsoft first person shooter. Fight alongside your friends in intense 5v5 battles or fight solo in 10 player free for all matches. Immerse yourself in the stunning visuals created in Unreal Engine 5 and dive into fast paced gameplay where every BB counts.

games.name: Drill Core
games.summary: Corporate greed meets strategic planet-mining in Drill Core! Drill to the heart of planets while managing workers, researching cutting-edge tech, and fortifying against alien attacks. Will you prioritize efficiency and risk your workers' safety, or focus on defense for survival?

games.name: The Lightkeeper is Gone
games.summary: A retro-styled horror adventure set in the 1930's on a lone island. Take on the job of keeping the lighthouse while discovering the story of those that came before.

games.name: Towerborne
games.summary: The Belfry stands as a beacon of hope and safety amongst the ruins of humanity and the City of Numbers, with monsters lurking right outside the tower’s walls. You are an Ace, born anew from the spirit realm with the skills, the grit, and the determination to protect the people of the Belfry.

games.name: Backrooms Media
games.summary: Backrooms Media is a multiplayer co-op exploration game that plunges you into unsettling, hyper-realistic liminal spaces. Navigate eerie environments filled with lurking horrors. Group up with your friends to face the terror of the endless backrooms together and... try to escape.

games.name: Valor of Man
games.summary:
Valor of Man is a roguelike tactical RPG where enemies react to your actions, giving you endless chances to outsmart them with your tactics.
Valor of Man is developed by Legacy Forge, small indie studio created by 2 brothers.

games.name: Mass of Consumption
games.summary: The church is impatient. The church is hungry. The church is willing to do anything to get you back.

games.name: The Christopher Redemption: I
games.summary: The Christopher redemption part I is a story-driven action thriller game that explores the intense and original story of Christopher and his sister.

games.name: Gah!
games.summary: Fight through procedurally generated levels - from haunted dungeons to futuristic space stations. Choose from 13 unique characters, crush your enemies, gather loot, face deadly bosses, and return to a growing village hub where permanent upgrades await. The demons watch. The angels wait. You fight.

games.name: Quiver Quest
games.summary: Hang out in a land called Arlan. Complete various tasks to unlock new locations to explore. Play with others in multiplayer or play by yourself in single player mode.

games.name: Souper Game
games.summary: Souper Game is a fun and spicy clicker where you play as... SOUP! That's right—an irresistible, hot, and aromatic soup that the elven girl Sylvie prepares for the rude and insatiable Troll. Your mission? Not only to become the perfect dish but also to earn her affection!

games.name: Spectral Realm
games.summary: Spectral Realm is a top-down tower defense Rogue game, where players need to play the role of an astronaut who has just landed on a different planet to block a constant stream of attacking native creatures and continuously strengthen themselves with the gems contained within their bodies.

games.name: Dark Galaxy
games.summary: Dark Galaxy is an action based rogue-like top-down shooter. You pilot a space drone to oppose the insectoid like species called Minaripods and get stronger by travelling to different star systems. Can you free our galaxy from the invaders?

games.name: Under the Red Sky
games.summary: Under The Red Sky is a 3D parkour game where speed is king! Your goal is to get to the end of each level as quick as possible by taking one of the many different routes possible, or by finding your own. Watch out though, this isn't all fun and games. You may accidentally fall into the past and uncover what happened and how to get back above. You may find that you're now Under the Red Sky.

games.name: Inn Tycoon
games.summary: Inn Tycoon is a relaxing and enjoyable game, offering you the opportunity to build, design, and manage your own inn.

games.name: Z.O.N.A: Origin
games.summary: Z.O.N.A: Origin is more than a game; it's your deep dive into a post-apocalyptic world. Here, every choice matters. Engage with a varied, enthralling open world, a suspenseful storyline, perilous anomalies, and potent artifacts in this thrilling game.

games.name: Containment Initiative 2
games.summary: Containment Initiative 2 is a local asymmetric co-op VR shooter which can be played by two people on the same PC. Kill zombies alone in VR or have a friend cover you by using the mouse and keyboard. Explore and scavenge to unlock new gear and weapons to help you survive the infected horde!

games.name: Endzone 2
games.summary: Endzone 2 is a post-apocalyptic survival colony builder, where you embark to secure humanities survival after a cataclysmic disaster. Discover and repopulate the last habitable grounds, while the survival of your people hinges on your wits, foresight, and resilience in a harsh and unforgiving world.

games.name: Rent A Car Simulator 24
games.summary: Rent A Car Simulator. Start by renting your first car. Expand your rental car fleet by purchasing different vehicles and grow your car rental business. Drive your cars and get them fixed when they break down. Find new customers. Build and improve your rent a car office.

games.name: Project Colored Mountains
games.summary: Project Colored Mountains is a 3D platformer game about a tiny little robot bouncing around a field (and a school, and a comically large grocery store...). Leap through a simulation and into real life while upgrading your abilities as well as defying the laws of physics. We really don't understand how this thing can bounce, stretch out and then jump again in midair. Also, you can roll around or something. Discover what those funny looking block things do, what those other funny block things do, and what those transparent funny block things do.

games.name: Dragon Ball Gekishin Squadra
games.summary: “This brand‑new title is a battle arena game that will divide players into teams of four and have them fight it out! You can take part in exhilarating battles where you overwhelm your opponents and enjoy amazing teamwork with your allies!

games.name: Dance Eden
games.summary: Dance Eden is a VR/MR dance game where you can dance alone or with other players, following the lead dance instructor in real-time. Currently, it already supports full-body motion capture, mod.io, LIV, and third-person perspective.

games.name: Pawn Planet
games.summary: You've in charge of managing the pawn shop in this weird galaxy. Make deals with strange customers, flip items, attend auctions and keep the shop going!

games.name: Frogmageddon
games.summary:
Fight hordes of the evil snake army as one, several, dozens, hundreds of frogs, each with unique abilities and quirks. Frogmageddon is a bullet hell survival game where you flip the script of survival gameplay and become the horde yourself! Can you make it to 100 frogs and defeat the evil tyranny of King Snek?

Initially made for the GMTK 2024 Game Jam, the Steam version includes controller support, achievements, new game modes, new frogs, and much more!

games.name: Average Human Ball Game
games.summary: A Fighting game and a sports game merged together to create a high energy point based fighting game

games.name: Shapez 2
games.summary: Dive into a factory-building game where the focus is on just that — building huge factories! Construct sprawling multi-level factories and min-max your layouts without limits. Shapez 2 is tailor-made for enthusiasts who crave the thrill of optimizing production lines and perfecting automation.

games.name: Kalpa: Cosmic Symphony
games.summary: Kalpa, the authentic mobile 5-key rhythm game, is now available on STEAM! The doomed universe needs you to play your life away. Play your life's music with Kalpa to save the dying Yggdrasil and revive the universe!

games.name: Adrenaline Rampage
games.summary: Adrenaline Ramage is a shoot’em up survival game based on dodge and run and platformer mechanics with roguelite elements. Hit and run!

games.name: Wild Americas
games.summary: Lose yourself in the lush forests of Mountain Island. Wild Americas is a 3rd person top-down exploratory, survival-adventure game fused with action and RPG elements that takes players on a journey from the highest mountain peaks to the depths of abandoned mining tunnels.

games.name: Mobile Dungeon
games.summary: From the creators of Shakes & Fidget, join us in a new epic fantasy RPG adventure. Get ready to accept our new quest and embark on the wackiest dungeon crawler!

games.name: Treasure Protector
games.summary: In this game, you play as a dragon defending your treasure by burning, freezing, poisoning, and shocking knights, archers, and thieves. Combine elemental powers for powerful effects, raise dragons and set traps in this turn-based strategy.

games.name: Haus of Irndrous
games.summary: Delve into a chilling psychological horror experience, set within the confines of a sinister mansion. Solve intricate puzzles, evade twisted adversaries—partially human animatronics—and unearth the truth behind your father's vanishing act. Brace for escalating challenges at every turn.

games.name: On Point
games.summary: Experience classic 90’s arcade vibes with On Point, a fully immersive light-gun shooter for VR. You'll have to think fast and shoot faster as you blast your way through over 30 wacky minigames designed for all ages and skill levels.

games.name: Fields of Mistria
games.summary: Start your new life! Build the farm of your dreams as you discover a world brimming with possibilities. Magic, romance, and adventure all await you in this nostalgic farming / life sim RPG!

games.name: Treasure Hunter: Idle RPG
games.summary: Let your team kill the bad guys and gather all sorts of loot for you to play with

games.name: Tiny Auto Knights
games.summary: An asynchronous PvP Auto Battler where you have to recruit and upgrade heroes and place them strategically on the battlefield to compete against other players.

games.name: Death Nomad
games.summary: Death nomad is a zombie survival game with procedurally generated environments. The environment will force you to improve your equipment, defense and constantly move around the world, prolonging your chances of survive.

games.name: Romantic Escapades
games.summary: "Romantic Escapades" is an ancient Chinese love simulation game. Through the development of the plot, players gradually develop relationships with various beauties in the game, and then gradually develop deeper and deeper intimate relationships.

games.name: Wilder World: Super Early Access
games.summary: Interdimensional refugees known as the Wilders flee Our Base Reality, which has become an AI-controlled dystopia to Wiami, a digital sanctuary in Wilder World. When the authoritarian FORUM attempts to conquer Wiami, the Wilders strategize a defence.

games.name: Once Upon a Galaxy
games.summary:
Once Upon a Galaxy is a mobile based card battler brought to you by Million Dreams.

Recruit a rag-tag squad of fairy book characters, heroes from legend, scheming villains and treasure hoarding dragons as they do battle across the galaxy where last one standing wins.

games.name: FlipScapes
games.summary: Flip, bounce and roll through a Pinball universe filled with playful characters. Pick your favorite hero and immerse yourself in arcade fun!

games.name: Jianghu Chronicles
games.summary: Jianghu Chronicles is a Wuxia-themed clan simulator, which focuses on simulating Jianghu clans and experiencing realistic battle. Set up a clan of your own, recruit disciples, complete missions... And eventually make your clan second to none by improving its power and reputation.

games.name: Madness
games.summary: Arcade combat racing game with physics defying stunts Inspired by Burnout, FlatOut, and Need For Madness?

games.name: Arc Seed
games.summary: Face the interstellar Archangels in a turn-based tactical game with deckbuilding elements and destructible environment, where you pilot powerful mechs to save the Earth from destruction.

games.name: Stormgate
games.summary: Stormgate is a free-to-play, next-gen RTS from the team at Frost Giant Studios, including former developers of Warcraft III and StarCraft II. Command mechs to defend the Earth or invade it as one of two other invading alien factions. Explore an ever-evolving campaign storyline, group up for co-op missions, or compete in 1v1. Now in Early Access since August 13th.

games.name: Jugs Bay
games.summary: Prepare for sexy adventure in Jugs Bay, a captivating visual novel full of engaging encounters and vibrant characters. Play as a likable young man exploring a new world full of opportunities, hot encounters and romance.

games.name: Landlord and the Tenants
games.summary: In Landlord and the Tenants, you can have a happy ending (Romance Ending or Harem Ending), a neutral ending (Sharing Ending) or a sad ending (NTR Ending) depending on how you play.

games.name: Scripted Land
games.summary: Code your territory's AI to make it prosper! Manage production and processing, strengthen your adventurers and let them explore! Can you prevent enemy invasion and win the war? This is a hex-based 2D game where you register Lua scripts as your lords and manage your territory.

games.name: S&box
games.summary: S&box is a next-generation sandbox platform that lets players instantly play community-made games while creators build limitless experiences using a powerful modern engine. From rapid prototyping to full multiplayer games, everything lives in one connected ecosystem.

games.name: Red Rampant
games.summary: Red Rampant is a narrative-driven action-adventure game set in Medieval Scotland. With the ability to travel back in time through their memories of previous gameplay and begin again, players use knowledge gained from past mistakes and hindsight of future events to change the course of history.

games.name: Baradroid: A Gay Visual Novel
games.summary: A choice-driven, high-tech, gay visual novel with elements of dating-sim! Choose your baradroid, Live with him, and... Can you teach a robot the meaning of human love?

games.name: Erannorth Renaissance
games.summary: Erannorth Renaissance is a text-driven narrative RPG featuring turn-based tactical battles, where destiny is shaped by the echoes of your past. Carve your path through an enchanting Renaissance-fantasy world, where every decision molds your character and weaves your unique tale.

games.name: Swing Into Zero-G
games.summary: Fast-paced multiplayer racing game set in the vastness of space. Compete against friends or online rivals in intense races, where quick reflexes and strategic use of diverse skills determine the victor. Embrace the challenge of swinging your way to victory in this exhilarating space-themed race!

games.name: Lockdown Protocol
games.summary: A first-person social deduction game, combining real-time action and communication, 3 to 8 players. While most players will do their best to complete objectives and ensure victory, a small portion of dissidents will try to stop them at all costs, without getting caught.

games.name: Soul Park
games.summary: Build an infernal fun park, judge your customers' sins and give them what they deserve: a HELL of an entertainment!

games.name: Five Nights at Freddy's: Blood & Gears
games.summary:
