"You hoped you'd never have to return to this place of sorrow, but after 20 years, something has called you back."

Five Nights at Freddy's: Blood & Gears is a complete reimagining of Scott Cawthon's original *Five Nights at Freddy's* game. The game is directed by JDBRYANT and is created by a passionate team of over 30 people.

games.name: Gods of Fire
games.summary: Engage in fierce conflicts with up to 6 players to compete for dominance over the Dragons Valley. Control your dragon, unleash fiery breath, launch fireballs, and use unique perks to dominate the battlefield.

games.name: Old School Rally
games.summary: A nostalgic racing game that combines the charm of classic retro style visuals with the thrill of international rally competitions.

games.name: Pennon and Battle
games.summary: "Pennon and Battle" is a turn-based strategy war game. As a lord, you will play a crucial role in the revival of the kingdom! Lead heroes and armies to expand territory in Ruachland, utilize tactics and magic to eliminate enemy forces, and create your own legend!

games.name: Galaxy Idle Clicker
games.summary: Embark on an interstellar journey with Galaxy Idle Clicker! Conquer galaxies, upgrade your spaceship, and face off against a myriad of enemy ships. With engaging minigames, powerful upgrades, GIC delivers an unparalleled idle space adventure. Join the cosmic conquest today and dominate the universe!

games.name: City Lights Love Bites Season 0
games.summary: MC gets a fresh start after quitting his job and moving to the city of RoshVale. In RoshVale, he will encounter six main female characters. Will he find his perfect match under the city lights, or will he be a player driven by lust? The choice is yours!

games.name: My Last Stand: Survivors
games.summary: Zombies are approaching fast. You have nothing to trust but the weapon in your hand. Eliminate zombies as quickly as possible. Survive. Gain upgrade points to unlock different abilities. And become stronger. Hold your position until the end of time. Then you can escape from this bloody hell.

games.name: Project Unknown
games.summary: PROJECT UNKNOWN is a 1-4 online co-op horror game with unique playable characters and special abilities. Exorcise different ghosts, utilize a variety of tools, and immerse yourself in an experience full of horrifying visuals and complex mechanics.

games.name: My New Paranormal Life
games.summary: My New Paranormal Life is a story-rich, erotic visual novel focused on its dating-sim and sandbox aspects.

games.name: Yuki
games.summary: Explore an abandoned school where memories linger longer than the living. Uncover the mystery of your best friend’s disappearance. Dodge bullets.

games.name: Midnight Murder Club
games.summary: Heart-pounding and hilarious multiplayer FPS fun. Trust your senses and overcome your fears as you’re armed with a flashlight and a revolver, then set against your friends in a pitch-black mansion with surprises around every corner. Hide, seek, & shoot in the dark.

games.name: Burkina Faso: Radical Insurgency
games.summary: BF:RI Is a Hardcore Tactical Shooter depicting the ongoing Burkina Faso Insurgency. You are CIA Special Operations Group tasked with hunting down ISIS insurgents

games.name: Pennylooter
games.summary: Pennylooter is a roguelike that takes place in an infinite world, where you'll have to fight increasingly numerous enemies as you explore your surroundings and collect pennies so that you can buy more items and survive the next wave.

games.name: Drop It! Jelly Man
games.summary: There's only one reason the Jelly Man goes into the deep end. He just needs a beer. Please join him on his dizzying adventure! To survive, you must fall into the water. Continue down. It won't be visible. Still, don't give up and take the courageous plunge!

games.name: Mad World Survivors
games.summary: Mad World Survivors is a casual Vampire Survivors Like game in the style of cyber-post-apocalyptic horror with elements of a simplified roguelike. Here, every decision you make can cause an avalanche of consequences for the hordes of monsters you will face.

games.name: The Paradogx Incident
games.summary:
Step into "The Paradogx Incident," where puzzle-platforming meets rhythmic precision. Guide Dox the dog through mind-twisting, recursive puzzles in a dynamic, beat-driven world and rhythm levels.

Enjoy full controller support and an adaptive soundtrack that changes with every dimension.

Experience a unique blend of genres in this innovative adventure!

games.name: SpaceCraft Brawl
games.summary: A top-down, multiplayer, physics driven, space shooter game with destructible ship parts. Build your own spacecrafts. Fight with and against other players in different game modes, using a variety of weapons. Pick up super weapons and slice enemy ships in half. Easy to get into, hard to master.

games.name: Zombi Efem
games.summary: Join the battle for survival against zombies with "Zombi Efem"! Play solo or online with up to four players in both TPS and FPS modes. This horror survival game invites you to face challenging combats and thrilling moments. Plan your strategy, prepare your weapons, and fight to survive!

games.name: Cyber Clutch: Hot Import Nights
games.summary: Cyber Clutch: Hot Import Nights is a high intensity arcade combat racer set in a neon future. Compete in ranked online races, unleash tactical abilities and outdrive rivals across chaotic circuits. Choose your ride, customize your style and dominate the track.

games.name: Dungeon World
games.summary: Dungeon World mixes roguelike and sandbox elements while keeping simple gameplay and retro style. Explore procedural worlds, plan your journey, make a family, modify the lands, get old and reincarnate with more world knowledge.

games.name: Western Death
games.summary: Western Death is a 2D roguelike set in the Wild West, combining RPG and fantasy elements.

games.name: Aarik: and the Ruined Kingdom
games.summary: Aarik (and the ruined kingdom) is a perspective based puzzle game centred around a Prince trying desperately to repair his father's kingdom. Using a magical crown Aarik must grab, roll, move and mend to save his homeland and his family.

games.name: Shoomer Booter
games.summary: An unexpected find at an antique shop, a soy boy stumbles upon an ancient beard ointment. Each night, he slips into a dream where he embodies a Sumerian warrior, tracing his lineage to Gibil. In this fantastical realm, he courageously confronts demons that lurk within the mystical attics of Irkalla.

games.name: Word Turtle Island
games.summary: Word Turtle Island is a nature dungeon action shooter where you use words as weapons to rescue books and readers in danger from creatures destroying the most powerful library in the galaxy. After battle, help the books and readers get where they need to be in your book sanctuary home base.

games.name: This Grand Life 2
games.summary: A money-focused life simulator. Create characters with allergies and addictions. Manage their lives through financial booms and busts. Advance their careers, start a small business, invest in real estate and stocks - or roleplay a penniless hobo.

games.name: The Battle of Aurinoxia
games.summary: A retro space shoot 'em up with pixel art graphics, unique enemies, tough angry bosses, and a killer soundtrack. You are among the first pilots to arrive in the system to mount the counteroffensive against the aggressors. Get out there and show these aliens the price for messing with The Alliance!

games.name: Go-Go Town!
games.summary: Thank god you’re here Mayor - you’ve got lots of work to do! In this city building sim, you’re responsible for the layout, logistics optimisation, population growth - all whilst navigating the everyday chaos of infrastructure, worker management and dynamic challenges to make your dream town.

games.name: Pax Dei
games.summary: Welcome to a vast, social sandbox MMO inspired by the legends of the medieval era. Here, myths are real, ghosts exist, and magic is unquestioned. Join thousands of players as you explore the land, build your home, forge your reputation, and craft your own stories. What world will you make?

games.name: Swamp Up
games.summary: Jump between mushrooms, collect power-ups and break records while exploring your own path through a procedurally loaded map in this innovative endless runner with no lane limitations. Be fast, precise, and skillful to avoid all of its dangers. And most importantly, never touch the water.

games.name: Lunia Record
games.summary: Originally an ordinary adventure life, after meeting a problem person, the brother and sister stepped into a magnificent and extraordinary world.

games.name: Clothing Store Simulator
games.summary: Are you ready to shape fashion world? Make a brand deal, order products, fill the aisles, dress the mannequins and start selling. Dresses, shirts, coats, pants, nightwear, underwear, shoes and more are waiting for you.

games.name: Exes Assault!!
games.summary: A BL Bara Romantic Comedy Visual Novel

games.name: Master of Chess
games.summary: Make the right moves and become World Chess Champion! Develop your skills and opening repertoire in this chess player management game. Apply the right strategy to win matches and climb the rating ladder to become the best chess player the world has ever seen.

games.name: Dragon Is Dead
games.summary: Dragon is Dead is a hack-and-slash, roguelite action platformer. It offers tons of customization fun with different character skill trees and legendary equipment. Overcome repeated deaths to defeat Guernian, the leader of the Dark Dragons.

games.name: The Amazing Crackpots Club!
games.summary: The Amazing Crackpots Club! is a fast-paced, action-packed magic duel in a 2D arena, where wizards throw powerful spells trying to destroy the opponent’s pots, while using mobility and defensive abilities to protect their own pots from incoming attacks.

games.name: Ghost Janitors
games.summary: Ghost Janitors is a multiplayer psychological horror game for 1-4 players. Your job? Cleaning haunted houses while avoiding terrifying monsters. Ready to face the spine-tingling challenge with your team?

games.name: Forgotten Seas
games.summary: You are lost in the Bermuda Void, where the ocean is endless and dry land precious. Craft your Ship-in-a-Bottle, then experience survival on the high seas. Sail for new land, build camps, hunt for treasures, trade for goods - then defend your ship from dreaded pirates stalking this strange realm!

games.name: Kristala
games.summary:
Kristala is a dark fantasy ARPG featuring Sekiro-inspired combat, acrobatic parkour, and exploration to uncover a detailed story. Embark on a journey to join ranks with Ailur’s most elite warriors as you battle to master the ancient magic of the Sacred Six and uncover the source of a dark curse.

Play as a catlike warrior from one of six clans, each with its own unique magic specialty. Choose your own style of combat: avoid damage by blocking, dashing/rolling, and deflecting attacks; combo light and heavy attacks; utilize multiple weapon abilities; and cast numerous spells.

Your catlike character will be fully customizable via various Talent Trees, including an innovative Feline Skill tree that allows you to unlock and level a multitude of feline-related skills.

games.name: Whispers in the Dark
games.summary: Whispers in the Dark is an online cooperative RPG horror game mixing exploration phases of haunted and management places. Improve your character, his knowledge of the paranormal, his skills and his tools thanks to a research system.

games.name: Soulmask
games.summary: Soulmask is a sandbox game that prioritizes an authentic survival experience. As the "last one" blessed with the mysterious mask, players will grapple for survival in a primitive land steeped in mysterious faiths, carving out a path to ascendance. Start from nothing, explore, build, recruit tribesmen to fortify your clan, and ultimately unravel the mysterious truths hidden behind the civilizations of this world.

games.name: Mutant Football League 2
games.summary:
Mutant Football League 2 is an over-the-top, arcade-style football game packed with thrills, strategy, and unrelenting action. Created by the original designer of Mutant League Football and Mutant League Hockey, MFL2 takes brutal gridiron battles to the next level, delivering deep strategic 8-on-8 gameplay, bone-crunching hits, and outrageous mutants that parody your favorite players.

Prepare yourself for the most brutal football experience ever. Step into diabolical arenas filled with deadly traps, where victory isn’t just about scoring points – it’s about survival. Win the traditional way by outscoring your opponent or force a forfeit by racking up a body count that leaves the opposition in shambles. Outwit, cheat, and dominate your way to victory in the most chaotic, carnage-filled football game yet. Whether you're a die-hard sports fan or just looking for wild, unpredictable fun, MFL2 delivers an experience like no other.

games.name: Blocks and Bones
games.summary: Blocks and Bones is a zombie wave shooter with endless hordes of the undead in custom maps built by players. Build mode is the sandbox side of the game where you build levels from blocks and publish them online in-game so other players can survive the apocalypse inside your chilling creations.

games.name: The Rogue Prince of Persia
games.summary:
The Rogue Prince of Persia is a 2D action-platformer developed by Evil Empire in collaboration with Ubisoft. The game combines fast-paced parkour movement with roguelite combat and progression systems. Players control the Prince as he battles enemies and explores procedurally generated levels filled with traps and hazards.
Each run offers new weapons, upgrades, and choices that influence gameplay and replayability.

games.name: Sonic Rumble Party
games.summary: Ready, Set, Rumble! Join Sonic in this intense arcade royale game set in Dr. Eggman's diabolical Toy World. Collect legendary skins, all-new emotes, and build skills as you progress through this action-packed game! Mayhem is best with friends!

games.name: Star Rabbits
games.summary: The rabbits being trained at the Knights Training Center on the Rabbit Planet of the Space Republic!! Dodge and defeat various stages full of random elements, obstacles, and enemies, and try to graduate from the training camp while recording high scores and fast clear times!!

games.name: The Transference
games.summary: Escape from your own house, in which you have been locked up. But be careful, you will not be alone in your captivity. Immerse yourself in this first-person horror adventure, full of family secrets and betrayals. And find out who and why they locked you up.

games.name: Lorelei and the Laser Eyes
games.summary:
A woman, summoned by an eccentric man to participate in a project in an old hotel somewhere in central Europe, becomes embroiled in a game of illusions, increasingly dangerous and surreal.

Now you are invited to fall into the same rabbit hole, in a non-linear mystery with an immense amount of handcrafted puzzles, constantly presenting you with new riddles to solve, each leading you closer to deciphering the enigma of Lorelei and the Laser Eyes.

games.name: Cozy Caravan
games.summary: Embark on a single-player, top-down journey in Cozy Caravan, where the arts of crafting, trading, and exploration come together in a beautifully cozy world. Form lasting bonds as you and your caravan journey through charming towns, enriching lives along the way.

games.name: Aeruta
games.summary:
A bread revolution across the world now begins!
Aeruta is a side-scrolling action game with a shop management twist, fight monsters for materials and use them to make breads, then finally make the deserted town popular again!

games.name: Sacred Earth: Reverie
games.summary: Sacred Earth - Reverie is a fantasy RPG with visual novel elements, inspired by both classic and modern JRPGs. Explore dungeons, interact with your allies and the townsfolk, build your characters with equipment, abilities, and perks, and test your might against foes in thrilling turn-based combat.

games.name: Furry Aim Trainer
games.summary: Train your aim with a beautiful selection of Furry girls! Shoot the girls with various weapons, and have a fun time while practicing!

games.name: Doll Defenders
games.summary: You were teleported to Male Doll's multiverse with one goal: to save the heroes of our games. However, you may fall in love with them along the way and get the happy final ending you deserve. Are you looking to save the world, or the love of one hot man that’s everything you ever wanted? Don't lie!

games.name: Gatekeeper
games.summary: Gatekeeper is a fast-paced rogue-like. Go on a quest to chase down Chaos and reclaim the stolen Heart of Time, fighting your way through relentless enemy forces. Play solo or in 4-player co-op and become the next Gatekeeper!

games.name: Ammossum
games.summary: Build an endlessly upgradable weapon! Evolve projectiles into unstoppable firepower in this action roguelike. Fight through hordes of infected beasts, save your family, and feel the thrill of bloody shootouts filled with bullets, explosions, and acid. Can you survive the madness?

games.name: Astropods: Starside Glaze
games.summary:
Astropods: Starside Glaze is a 2D Fighting Platformer with endless mobility and combat potential! Starring as Hemi and Acro, swap between them at any time to utilize their unique attacks and physics within various environments.

Astropods combines platform fighter combat with platformer styled levels, alongside nonlinear progression and perk customization, to create a dynamic combat-platforming experience unlike anything else!

games.name: Casino Boss Simulator
games.summary: Casino Boss Simulator is a casino management simulation game that turns your dream of building a casino empire from scratch into reality. Manage, expand, and lead your own casino empire in the competitive world of gambling.

games.name: Arena Breakout: Infinite
games.summary: Arena Breakout: Infinite is an ultra-real immersive military simulation. Join a fight to shoot, loot, and raid your path to fortune.

games.name: Hades II
games.summary: Battle beyond the Underworld using dark sorcery to take on the Titan of Time in this bewitching sequel to the award-winning rogue-like dungeon crawler.

games.name: KingdomScape
games.summary: KingdomScape is turn based roguelike card game with medieval fantasy settings. Each turn you advance your kingdom by strategically picking a card representing various aspects of your realm.

games.name: Feather Party
games.summary: Welcome to the fantastic party on the adorable planet of chicks! Feather Party is a multiplayer party game for up to 8 players. Engage in a diverse array of fun mini-games with friends or against rivals to be the winner of this party!

games.name: Abiotic Factor
games.summary: Abiotic Factor is a survival crafting experience for 1-6 players set in the depths of an underground research facility. Caught between paranormal containment failure, a military crusade, and chaos from a dozen realms, the world’s greatest minds must survive against the universe’s biggest threats.

games.name: Sales Employee Takeru-Kun
games.summary: Hello World!! This game is based on the image of a Japanese arcade game from the 70's to early 80's where you could easily play by inserting 1 coin. The player will work hard at his sales job to save L.Planning, a company that has been reincarnated into another world.

games.name: Melon Man
games.summary: Embark on a deliciously delightful challenge with Melon Man, a charming 2D platformer that will test your platformer skills and tickle your taste buds! Join Melon Man on his quest to collect all his melons in this vibrant and exciting adventure.

games.name: Agent Simulator
games.summary: If you are a sharpshooter, you would be a great fit for us. Within a short period of time, select 3 options from the list and deal with your enemies. Do not forget that the ability of using time efficiently and aiming your targets are crucial. Complete each mission and earn an agent certification.

games.name: Rustil: Eternal Labyrinth Castle
games.summary: In a randomly changing labyrinth castle, Rustil aims for the top floor. An exhilarating roguelike action game in which players aim to reach the top floor while efficiently strengthening the main character by acquiring abilities from the souls of heroes.

games.name: Rotwood
games.summary:
Hack and slash your way through the Rotwood in this rogue-like dungeon crawler developed by Klei Entertainment.

The world has been thrown into chaos, and it's up to you and your friends to battle the corrupted beasts of the Rotwood. Upgrade your gear, choose your preferred weapon, and hone your skills to defend your safe haven.

games.name: Apex Rush
games.summary: Race, Drift & Stunt in this physics-based arcade racing game! Build and share your own tracks with the world and top the leaderboards!

games.name: Heart of Crown Online
games.summary: The great emperor's untimely death... Seven princesses are candidates for his succession! Who will save the empire from chaos? An online deck-growing card game where you grow your deck and fight for the Princess.

games.name: Honey Bunny
games.summary: Honey Bunny is a bartender at Lucky Rabbit's Foot Casino, the cutest casino in all of Starlight City! She's busy at work when the no-good gang, The Cool Cats, steals away the casino and the entire city's supply of cocktail cherries. Chase them down as Honey Bunny using your ears to headbutt enemies, grab items, and platform around the city as you recover as many cherries as possible!

games.name: Kill it with Fire 2
games.summary: Arachnophobia. The Game. The Sequel. Travel across the multiverse and exterminate every. last. spider. The world's funniest spider murdering is back with advancements in cutting-edge sci-fi tech to hunt down the arachnid menace once and for all.

games.name: Quack Attack
games.summary: Join the Cubic Chaos! Get ready for a wild ride in this 4v4 FPS arena on a cube planet. Choose your animal, collect ducks, and let limbs fly in this cartoon mayhem. With collectible weapons, multiplayer and voice chat, it's a fun carnage at its finest!

games.name: Iftar for Two
games.summary: Iftar for Two is a very short kinetic novel made for Ramadan game Jam 2024. It features two former friends who decide to have iftar together and talk about bits about this and that.

games.name: Rootin' Tootin' Lootin' & Shootin'
games.summary: Rootin' Tootin' Lootin' & Shootin' is a unique fusion of traditional turn-based roguelikes and twin-stick shooters. A fast-paced take on strategy games where you dodge deadly bullet patterns and kill enemies for their money - all at your own pace

games.name: Sky Runner
games.summary: Take control of agile, heavily-armed drones bristling with explosives and defend your home from waves of hostile missile launchers that emerge from every corner of your room. Quick thinking and sharp reflexes are your keys to survival. But there's more at stake; a hostage is trapped in the environment. Can you outmaneuver the enemy, rescue the innocent, and claim victory?

games.name: Ereban: Shadow Legacy
games.summary: Ereban: Shadow Legacy is a fast-paced stealth platformer game where you become Ayana, the last descendant of a forgotten race. Harness mystical shadow powers, high-tech gadgets and avoid or kill to uncover the truth about your past and the key to saving a dying, morally grey universe.

games.name: Laysara: Summit Kingdom
games.summary: Build and expand your very own settlements in high mountains! Carefully plan production chains and satisfy various needs of your three-caste society while dealing with mountain hazards such as weather breakdowns and avalanches. Are you skilled enough to make your town thrive?

games.name: Amulet
games.summary: Embark on a gothic hack-and-slash RPG in "Amulet." Shape your character with a unique "pure loot" system, choose your class, master weapons, and face evil creatures. Dynamic gameplay and a dark world await. Become the hero in "Amulet."

games.name: The Scar
games.summary: The scar is an open world adventure and survival game, where you can create your own weapons and tools, build bases and fight against what were once humans and aliens. You will be able to use Ashun's summons, which to our eyes is magic.

games.name: Reign of Guilds
games.summary: Reign of Guilds is a classic MMORPG. Dark magical middle ages: open world, castle sieges, economy and diplomacy, merchant and craft associations, church and mercenaries, counts and of course the King. Choose your side.

games.name: Device 0101
games.summary: Device0101 is a mystery action adventure that aims to find a key in a mansion, open the door, solve puzzles, and destroy monsters to escape

games.name: FolkOrigin
games.summary: Start taking control of the map and build buildings, recruit units, fight monsters and conquer enemy villages. It's a 2D game in which you move on a hexagonal map. A strategy game combined with an RPG game. All in the times of the ancient Slavs. More information soon...

games.name: Content Warning
games.summary: Film your friends doing scary things to become SpöökTube famous!

games.name: Wink and the Broken Robot
games.summary:
Explore the weird and cute post-apocalyptic world of The Outskirts while collecting coins and mysterious ancient treasures like floppy disks and cassette tapes

Wink is taking inspiration from Gameboy classics like Super Mario Land 2 and Link's Awakening, but doing its own little thing.

games.name: Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road
games.summary: The latest entry in the character collection and football simulation RPG series, "Inazuma Eleven!" With an original story featuring new main characters, over 4,500 players from across the series' history to collect and train, as well as exciting online tournaments, you can play the game your way!

games.name: A Promise Best Left Unkept: Aya Edition
games.summary: A standalone Hard NTR visual novel with Aya as the heroine. Follow Harry's tragic fight for love and betrayal in a 450k+ word story with new events, 130+ CG sets, 60+ animated sex scenes, and 3 endings.

games.name: Daemon Sigil
games.summary: Defend your village from an eldritch invasion in this creature collector, turn-based card battler. Train your favourite characters through a Roguelite upgrades system. Assemble a formidable daemon squad and journey to an otherworldly realm to close the last portal!

games.name: Solo Leveling: Arise
games.summary: Solo Leveling: Arise is an action RPG based on the South Korean web novel of the same name.

games.name: Sinners Landing
games.summary: Sinners Landing is an adult-themed, romance-based, dungeon crawling RPG with a card-style battle mechanic. Explore dungeons, slay monsters, get loot, and romance the women of the local town.

games.name: Arksync
games.summary: Wired from the ashes of twin stick Shooters, Arksync evolves the genre with breakneck player movement and lethal enemy AI. Kill for energy to buy weapons, utilities, and upgrades; risk it all as you enter the depths of the evacuation facility. It's the only way to take this robot teddy bear home.

games.name: Eldabyss
games.summary: A fast-paced, bloody, gothic, and stylish platformer video game about saving the mortal realm from the wrath of Hell's armies.

games.name: The Darkness Below
games.summary: Embark on an epic journey into "The Darkness Below", a homage to the golden era of 90's cRPGs, with grid-based movement, turn-based combat and 2.5D perspective. Wander a vast and colorful fantasy world filled with puzzles, exotic creatures, forgotten dungeons and ancient guardians.

games.name: Hyperspace Deck Command
games.summary: Hyperspace Deck Command is a sci-fi card-battler roguelite. Deploy spaceships that operate on individual turn timers, combine a wide variety of cards into powerful decks and use dual-use status effects to defeat the hegemonising swarm intelligence.

games.name: Arc TCG
games.summary: ARC TCG is a 3D fantasy card game. Build your deck and challenge other players in battles full of surprises. Play smart and crush your opponents with powerful abilities. This game is inspired by more successful TCG titles, but adapted to offer new game strategies.

games.name: Rezarus
games.summary: Rezarus is a futuristic online tank game inspired by an old world game called Tanarus. Multiplayer tank battles!

games.name: Slidemagi
games.summary: Slidemagi is a magical combat between two mages. Each one will use their deck of cards to cast spells or create warriors that will fight under their control. It is a turn-based strategy game with a unique way of moving on an isometric board, playable by one or two players, locally or remotely.

games.name: Turkish Throne
games.summary: Lead your political party in a fierce competition to seize power against major rivals. Invest strategically, secure votes, and navigate crucial decisions to claim the presidential seat. Will you shape the destiny of Turkish politics?

games.name: Endless Wonder VR
games.summary: Endless Wonder VR is a colorful VR platformer in which you will need to use unique sticks with unique abilities that can be combined in any way to complete a campaign consisting of various levels with a unique stylized environment, enemies and obstacles.

games.name: Star Racer
games.summary: Compete to be the first, or only, racer to finish and become the fastest in the galaxy. Welcome to Star Racer! Get ready for a journey through time and space, where speed, skill, and sheer radness will determine the ultimate racer. Star Racer awaits - buckle up for the retro ride of a lifetime!

games.name: Cycle Idle RPG
games.summary: An RPG where your character is constantly grinding - even when you're offline!

games.name: Winter Survival
games.summary: Winter Survival is a story-driven survival game where trauma turns reality into a reflection of your breaking mind. Battle cold, hunger, hallucinations, and adapt to the wilderness as it adapts to you.

games.name: ServiceIT
games.summary: If you love DIY and the world of technology isn't scary to you, don't wait and get at the helm of a recently acquired IT service! Repair equipment, configure it and develop the company. It's up to you to decide which jobs to do, who to hire and what you want your office to look like!

games.name: One Lie
games.summary: One Lie is a choice-driven adult visual novel about a young man not having the best start to his adulthood. His best friend betrays him and he decides to start his life somewhere else. Will he find peace, love and new friendships? Of course, he will. With whom? That's up to you.

games.name: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
games.summary: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth is the second entry in the Final Fantasy VII remake project, which retells the story of the genre-redefining RPG across three distinct games. Iconic heroes Cloud, Barret, Tifa, Aerith and Red XIII have escaped from the dystopian city Midgar and are now in pursuit of Sephiroth, the vengeful swordsman from Cloud’s past who was thought to be dead.

games.name: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth: Digital Deluxe Edition
games.summary:
Content of the Digital Deluxe Edition:
・ Final Fantasy VII Rebirth main game
・ Digital art book
・ Digital mini soundtrack
・ Summon Materia: Magic Pot
・ Accessory: Reclaimant Choker
・ Armor: Orchid Bracelet

games.name: Dummy Dungeon
games.summary: Fight your way through randomly generated dungeons in this hardcore rouge-lite game. Discover your favorite character from a group of unique heroes, get powerful weapons and power-ups to save beautiful princesses in need.

games.name: DudeGo
games.summary: Each map is different and has a challenge for you. Are you ready to conquer the unexpected? Prove that you can handle every challenge the game has to offer. Last survivor is the winner. will it be you?

games.name: Island Paradise
games.summary: Island Paradise is a survival game where you build, upgrade, customize your own island and use nearby resources to create a home for generations to come!

games.name: PolyDestroyer
games.summary: Engage in cosmic battles with PolyDestroyer, a riveting 2D shooter. Navigate space, customize your ship, and thwart alien foes to save the galaxy. Your spacecraft, your adventure!

games.name: Yomi 2: Renegades
games.summary: Includes two new characters (Troq and River), two new gems (Orange and Diamond), and the ability to play any of the unlockable "wacky rulesets" from Career Mode in online friend matches.

games.name: Bootstrap Island
games.summary: Stranded in the 17th century after a brutal shipwreck, you awaken alone on a deadly tropical island. To survive, you’ll need to learn fast - facing wild beasts, nature’s wrath, and uncovering secrets hidden deep in the jungle. Every step is a fight for your life.

games.name: Nanny's Journey
games.summary:
Nanny didn't come to knit!
Get ready to jump, run, grab everything you can in this dynamic platform game. Use a grappling hook to propel yourself through a hellish level to the surface.

games.name: Le Mans Ultimate
games.summary: Le Mans is a continually evolving story... powered by emotion, speed and glory. Le Mans Ultimate – the official game of the FIA World Endurance Championship & 24 Hours of Le Mans.

games.name: Oil Sheik
games.summary: A fun simulation/puzzle game combining elements of chess puzzles and stock trading. Complete challenging missions and puzzles or simply play a quick game vs AI on multiple difficulties. Personalize your experience with card backs and more in-game rewards.

games.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors
games.summary: A port of the original PS Vita game, in English for the first time.

games.name: The Great Ocean
games.summary: Dive into adventure-missions in the earth’s oceans. Explore in your high-tech submarine fascinating spots like the Galapagos or the Deep Sea. Use your upgradeable tools to solve quests when you free jailed whales, or explore sunken WW2 battleships. Swim with majestic whales, sharks and sea turtles. And take real action to save the oceans.

games.name: Colonize
games.summary: Colonize is a combination of survival game and building strategy that takes place during the colonization period - the 17th century. It tells the story of a settlement in the new world and all the difficulties encountered by the early settlers.

games.name: Sisyphus Paradox
games.summary: Sisyphus Paradox is a fusion of roguelike tactical elements with classic side-scrolling shoot 'em up gameplay. Explore and fight your way across the galaxy as you try to get back home to Earth in this hand drawn indie game.

games.name: Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor
games.summary: Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor is a single player survivor-like auto-shooter. Wield the full arsenal of Deep Rock Galactic, take on hordes of lethal aliens, mine riches, and unlock powerful upgrades. It's one dwarf against all of Planet Hoxxes!

games.name: News Tower
games.summary: News Tower is a news and resource management game. Your goal is to build a newspaper empire in 1930s New York that is profitable, independent, and – most importantly – wins the trust of its readers.

games.name: DunHero
games.summary: Dunhero is Roguelike game where character is in procedurally generated dungeon. Hero has to explore a lot of different rooms, level up character and gather equipment to defeat all enemies and reach final stage.

games.name: Lightphobe
games.summary: Beware of the darkness... Lightphobe is an asymmetrical team-based PVP game that blends stealth action with fast-paced shooter gameplay. Pick a side and work together as a team to emerge victorious!

games.name: Republic of Jungle
games.summary: Who do you trust? In a party game for 5 to 10 players, a secret group of Leakers undermine President Puma and his Loyalists by earning their trust and leaking their confidential affairs to media. Bluff, betray, confide and conspire in a crossover between Jackbox and social deduction games.

games.name: Exotica 2: Pet Shop Simulator
games.summary: Welcome back to the world of our dear friends in Pet Shop Simulator 2! We reintroduce you to new and more animal species. Build your own pet shop. In addition to new exotic species, you will also be able to breed and adopt cats and dogs.

games.name: Beast: Bio Exo Arena Suit Team
games.summary: Immerse yourself in the cosmic adventure of BEAST! A unique 3V3 online shooter designed for all ages. BEAST combines charm and excitement with intuitive controls.

games.name: Rite of Eris
games.summary: Rite of Eris is a survival roguelike inspired by the likes of Vampire Survivors, Hades, and more. Unlock new characters, each with their own unique abilities, then jump into battle, unlocking powerful abilities along the way to aid your conquest against hordes of enemies.

games.name: Memori
games.summary: Embark on a captivating Platforming adventure in Memori! Master challenging obstacles while unraveling the enigmatic secrets of a peculiar world. Gather clues, solve puzzles, and confront mortality, only to be reborn anew.

games.name: Sanctity
games.summary: Sanctity is a Hack & Slash RPG with platformer elements where you travel between the Real and Virtual Worlds in fast-paced combat against swarms of enemies and boss fights inspired by MMO raid design.

games.name: Dinosaurs Dominion
games.summary: Explore and conquer in this single-player dinosaur adventure where you fight, evolve, and conquer territories to reclaim the wilds. Each conquest brings progress, but death sends you back to the start.

games.name: ChildStory
games.summary: As a child, we all wondered: "Where does the Moon disappear every month?". This ChildStory will tell about Sonya, a girl in a purple Kigurumi, and the angry Heavenly shepherdess Nora. The two of them create the cycle of the appearance and the loss of the Moon.

games.name: Palworld
games.summary: Palworld is a multiplayer, open-world survival crafting game where you can befriend and collect mysterious creatures called "Pal" in a vast world! Make your Pals fight, build, farm, and work in factories.

games.name: Monkey Math
games.summary: Inspired by DK Jr. Math. A mathematical puzzle game to test your speed and knowledge of endless mathematical operations! Compete against your friends or compete against your personal best to improve your high score. There's monkey's, there's math, it's Monkey Math!

games.name: Xanadu Land
games.summary: Xanadu Land is a fast-paced massively multiplayer bullet hell game that brings you to the arcade gameplay. In the nonstop BOSS battle, your death is just the beginning，accumulate experience, acquire equipment, and fight side by side with other players to knockdown all the bosses!

games.name: Monday Meltdown
games.summary: Unleash your inner Monday rage in "Monday Meltdown," a 2D multiplayer mayhem. Engage in intense battles across casual environments like the office, gym, and grocery store. With a vast arsenal of weapons, be the first to achieve 10 kills for victory. Let off some steam and conquer Monday madness!

games.name: The Grey Dream
games.summary: The Grey Dream is an adult Visual Novel about a man who got offered a job in an international trading company right after graduation. As soon as you accept it, the consequences of the past start to manifest. Who knows? Maybe you can get rid of your past or spice up your future with it.

games.name: Event Race
games.summary: Event Race is the ultimate local multiplayer racing game, accommodating up to 30 players. Use your smartphone as an additional controller, gather friends and family, and immerse yourself in a fun, chaotic, and unforgettable racing competition.

games.name: New Stars
games.summary: Expand your own galactic empire across new stars, research technologies, and challenge great alien powers in this immersive 4X grand strategy game. Build interstellar colonies, and starbases to gather more resources. Explore a unique galaxy full of secrets, great perils, and limitless possibilities.

games.name: Sanguo's Ambition 4: Three Kingdoms
games.summary: The world's first competitive SLG strategy game with real-time matchmaking for multiplayer battles. In 《Three Kingdoms Ambition 4》 you can experience the unique journey of starting as a small faction and growing into a powerful warlord during the turbulent Three Kingdoms era.

games.name: Boxing Simulator
games.summary: Boxing Simulator is a 3D, Strategy, Simulator, Action, Fighter, Fist Fight, Boxing game.

games.name: Return From Core
games.summary: Explore the Inner Earth world and its mysteries in this survival sandbox adventure game! Dig for materials to craft new gear and defend your camp against the creatures and perils of the Core. If you recover the technology lost after the catastrophe, maybe one day you can return to the surface!

games.name: My Little Blood Cult: Let's Summon Demons
games.summary: Embark on a demonic fishing adventure in My Little Blood Cult! Combine skill with luck to master a unique fishing mechanic and collect demons, creatures, and more to fill out your oddities cabinet and become the most powerful cult.

games.name: Pioneers of Pagonia
games.summary: In a world of countless islands populated with scattered tribes, you build up and manage a thriving community of thousands of inhabitants. Send out your Pioneers to explore untouched soil, find hidden resources and defend your settlement from life-threatening enemies hiding in the mysterious fog.

games.name: Suck Up!
games.summary: Play as a vampire trying to charm your way into your fully AI-driven neighbors' homes. Speak to them using your voice or text and wear clever disguises to form a convincing story.

games.name: Dandelion Planet
games.summary: A heartwarming atmosphere,SF novel adventure game. Let's relax on another planet! You enjoy going to different places, interacting with space people, and trying part-time jobs.

games.name: Rated Sudoku
games.summary: Everything you ever want in a Sudoku game! You can play Sudoku, analyze puzzles, edit puzzles, generate puzzles, there are campaigns (lessons) and you can even paint Sudoku images!

games.name: Jammer Dash
games.summary: Jammer Dash is a free rhythm 2D game in which you move and destroy objects on beat made for Windows and Linux! Inspired by many awesome games such as Muse Dash, Geometry Dash and osu!. Made in Unity and C#.

games.name: RTM: The Last Days
games.summary: As the only survivor of a military plane crash, you find yourself in a mysterious island battling to stay alive and discover the dark secret that lies beneath the ground.

games.name: Rogue Masters
games.summary: Rogue Masters is a 6 player co-op horde survival game with souls-like combat and extensive character customization where you fight Entropy in long-lost civilizations.

games.name: GuildMestar
games.summary: Control, defend, and manage a guildhall in this fantasy, party based, card battler with a heavy focus on trading. Your journey will take you through many procedural generated dungeons on your quest for power.

games.name: Gothic II: Complete Classic
games.summary:
Continue the story of the Nameless Hero in Gothic II: Complete Classic, the award-winning sequel that improved on its predecessor in every way. Experience it now for the first time on Nintendo Switch.

Gothic II: Complete Classic brings together the excitement of Gothic II and the add-on Night of the Raven to your fingertips for the first time on a console.

games.name: Cross Blitz
games.summary: Cross Blitz is an exciting turn-based RPG card battler set in a wondrous world teeming with vibrant characters and fierce battles. Explore Cross Dawn Isle and uncover its secrets as you level up, craft new cards, build the perfect deck and battle your way to victory!

games.name: Bubble Ball!
games.summary: Combine balls of the same type to create bigger balls and earn as many points as possible without filling up the container in this cheery, casual puzzle game! And if you dare use the Ball Launcher, beware of bouncing balls to the stratosphere...

games.name: Pixi Poxi Autorunner Lab
games.summary: Pixi Poxi is a challenging autorunner rage puzzle platform game that will test the limits of your gaming skills. You will accompany a test subject on their quest to escape to freedom fighting through several levels with a variety of difficulties, traps and barriers!

games.name: Bravest Chicken
games.summary: Minimalist precision platformer starring a cute chicken. Flap your wings, avoid obstacles, get to the top of the tower and become Bravest Chicken!

games.name: The End Grows
games.summary:
"The End Grows - a tales of Ashes" is a 2D action RPG combining exploration and time loops. Players battle hordes of monsters in a world collapsing every five minutes, grow stronger through persistent gear between runs, and uncover a powerful story told across 8 chapters filled with revelations.

The game is part of the Ashes saga, set in the same universe as "Ashes – Exponential RPG" released on mobile.

games.name: Supermarket Security Simulator
games.summary:
Welcome to your first day of work at our supermarket.
I know this is your first time working security so listen up.

As security you will have to:
Keep an eye on people so they don't steal, which entails searching old ladies, keep an eye out for gypsies (and not so gypsies) stealing from you.
If a thief tries to flee, don't be afraid to hit him with the truncheon or electrocute him with the taser. Check the ticket and if he has something he didn't buy you handcuff him and put him in the dungeon.
Check the security cameras, which will alert you if they detect someone stealing. They are shitty and sometimes fail, you will have to hit them with the broom to fix them...
Watch out for the trolleys, the old ladies are trying to take them home.
Kids are bastards... Some of them come to eat whatever they want and then they leave the packages empty.
They often come to rob the supermarket, so be alert and when you see a robber you neutralize him with a punch.
You will also have to work at night so don't be afraid and if some robbers come you can shoot them.

games.name: Survivors Last Stand
games.summary: Survive waves of alien invaders. Upgrade your weapons and create insane builds. Addictive arcade roguelike action awaits you!

games.name: Little Planet
games.summary:
Little Planet (LP) is a 3D life-simulation, and role-playing game for VR headsets that will let you escape into a fairytale, charming, ever-growing world full of fun, items, creatures, and wonder or play whenever and wherever you want with yourself or friends.

Live your dream new life, develop relationships with adorable characters, craft or trade versatile, beautiful items which you can use in-game and explore with old /new friends, or find a spot to enjoy yourself for sunset!

games.name: Entity: The Black Day
games.summary: A third-person survival horror action game set in dark, atmospheric underground environments, blending psychological suspense with intense combat.

games.name: Streetoir
games.summary: Streetoir is a first-person / open-world / graffiti-painting game, where you paint everywhere you want and whatever you want.

games.name: Residiuum: Tales of Coral
games.summary:
Explore a universe rich in personality and full of mysteries.

After the sun went mad and exploded, all that was left of the world was the Auric Earth. A region divided between the Elite with their suited men and their experiments and technologies with the multi-purpose gas Sig, and the less fortunate who must deal with gangs of criminals of various kinds and a hostile environment full of toxic and poisonous substances.

games.name: Microcivilization
games.summary: Incremental clicker strategy, where you expand, construct, research, fight, collect heroes and make choices between good and evil. Ascend through difficulty tiers by playing through challenge campaign going back and forth through history. Mammoths included.

games.name: Sign Craft: Simulator
games.summary: Sign Craft: Simulator puts you in the steel-toe boots of a Sign Technician! It is a 3D first-person game that allows you to utilize power tools and equipment to construct signs!

games.name: TerraForge
games.summary: TerraForge is a mining simulation game mixed with a bit of shop management. You dig for ores, craft items, research new blueprints, improve your shop, sell your items and slowly grow your own little mining town.

games.name: Hellfire Poncho
games.summary: Hellfire Poncho is a western rogue-lite isometric shooter. Shoot little demons with your upgraded weapons, die, and try again stronger. Bet your upgrades against the creatures you meet in the saloon, and develop your best build. Don't push your luck....

games.name: Beyond Sunset
games.summary: Welcome to a high-octane cyberpunk first-person shooter with RPG elements. You are Lucy, an enhanced street samurai searching for lost memories. Fight yakuza, zombies & robots in large, open, interactive levels. Inspired by Doom Eternal & Deus Ex, made using a modernized Doom II engine!

games.name: Back to the Dawn
games.summary:
A gripping prison escape RPG woven with crime, corruption, and hidden agendas. Step into a maximum-security facility where every inmate has a past—and a plan. You'll have to fight to survive, investigate, and ultimately break free before the time runs out.

Uncover a scheme that threatens more than just your life—it could bring down the entire city. In this thrilling adventure, choices matter, and escape is your only salvation!

games.name: Pirate Patrol
games.summary: Manage anti-piracy operations and secure important trade lines. Command your carier and send your fighter pilots on missions. Find and train new officers and pilots, on procedural game universe map. Equip your ship with new weapons and equipment.

games.name: Match Tree
games.summary:
Match Tree is a breathtaking puzzle experience (...it's actually a match 3 game).
Embark on an epic journey with pixie, gnome and witch full of adventure, mystery (huh?) and sheep.
Become the master of combination and create magnificent mansions from trees, flowers and carrots (I swear, it's fun!).

games.name: The Super Mario Bros. Movie Demastered
games.summary: Experience and play through the Super Mario Bros Movie in an all new epic way through an action packed retro 2D Platformer with over 80 levels, 6 playable characters, 90 Missions, Multiplayer and a rewritten story!

games.name: ChromaBeat
games.summary: Rhythm-based matching madness! Lineup holograms of matching colors in time with the beat in this exciting and smutty science-punk puzzler!

games.name: Demonic Episode
games.summary: In this 4 player first person online co-op horror game, play as a group of content creators who are on a mission to banish a demon back to hell. The advanced, randomized game mechanics offer you and your friends a high replay value.

games.name: Midnight Heist
games.summary: Go on heists through Midnight City alone or with up to three friends to fulfill tasks as a hacker for various organizations. Improve your reputation, earn money, customize your character and uncover the secrets of shady companies in this co-op horror game.

games.name: Simply Moose
games.summary: Reflex-based puzzle game based on Boulder Dash principles, but with its own unique style.

games.name: Power Fantasy
games.summary: Survive hordes of blood hungry enemies and hope for the best upgrades while you level up! Power Fantasy is a fresh rogue-survivors-like with unique heroes and tons of customization.

games.name: Moonlight In Garland
games.summary: A chill open-ended life sim about finding your feet, making a positive impact and enjoying the journey in the big city. Find an apartment, make friends, grow plants and love your city life!

games.name: Chaos on Wheels
games.summary:
Take a wheel of a heavily armored car of your choice, and drive yourself to victory while shooting and destroying enemy cars, turrets, and hazards in this chaotic vehicular combat experience. Choose a driver, customize your cars, upgrade armor, buy new weapons, and leave nothing but chaos!

Chaos on Wheels: Ultimate & Chaotic vehicular combat experience. Customize your cars, equip armor, buy weapons, unlock new gadgets, upgrade ammo, and fight other cars in a battle of total mayhem. Choose your driver and take a wheel of a heavily armored car. Drive yourself to victory by destroying any enemy that stands in your way. Avoid projectiles, traps, and hazards and bring chaos to anyone who opposes you.
Complete achievements, upgrade cars and make even more chaos.

games.name: Space Tales
games.summary: Space Tales is a real-time strategy game set in a retro-futuristic environment. Take on the role of a commander in the Intergalactic Planetary Expansion (I.P.E.) and immerse yourself in a thrilling mission to explore and conquer new planets, pushing the boundaries of the Human Empire.

games.name: Harem in Another World
games.summary: Save the world. Get the girls!

games.name: Acres
games.summary: Acres is a small strategy simulation game about growing crops for evolving market demands. Build a farm, one acre at a time, to create a prosperous enterprise. Upgrade equipment, optimize harvests, and nurture the soil against increasing time pressure. How long can you keep the farm operating?

games.name: Bottle Can Float
games.summary: Bottle Can Float is a relaxing casual game. In the game, you will select a bottle to go down the river. It will float freely along the flowing water. You can do You can influence the direction of the bottle by throwing small stones, and there are different small animals hidden in the river. You can make rafting more interesting by looking for these contents. I hope you can relax and have fun in the sound of gurgling water.

games.name: Glassbreakers: Champions of Moss
games.summary: Lead your squad of Champions into an immersive arena in this exciting game of tactics, magic, and power! This 1v1 real-time battler puts you face to face with your opponent and their squad for action-packed gameplay that will keep you coming back for more.

games.name: Mistward
games.summary: Mistward is a survival city-builder set on a mysterious island enshrouded in a poisonous mist! Create light sources to keep the mist at bay, build houses and command humans to gather resources. Explore the island and find a way out!

games.name: WTC: Love's Labour's Lost
games.summary: The Violet Hotel's waitress and local tour guide are determined to foil the protagonist's plans to take Grendel back to America. Unfortunately, neither native is prepared for the cost of doing so

games.name: The Front
games.summary: The Front is a survival-open-world-crafting shooter game. Players will assume the role of a resistance fighter sent back in time to stop the rise of a tyrannical empire that has conquered the world using technology based on unknown relics.

games.name: 9th Sentinel Sisters
games.summary: The battle of the clone girls unfolds on a post-apocalyptic Earth, devastated by the alien life form known as "Bleed." Pilot the manned weapon "Father" to eliminate enemies. Upgrade weapons, create powerful builds, and strategize to successfully clear stages.

games.name: The King is Watching
games.summary: The King is Watching is a roguelite kingdom builder. Rule by the power of your royal gaze! Decide between producing resources, training armies, or balancing both, while adapting to unique events every run.

games.name: Lost Paws
games.summary: Survive as a stray dog in a large open world. Scavenge, craft, trade, and steal your way into a world where all the pets disappear. Arm yourself and take to the streets to rise from homeless to well-off no matter what it takes. What kind of story will you tell?

games.name: Gothic Classic
games.summary:
For the first time, relive this amazing RPG on a handheld console and enjoy the game that revolutionized roleplaying games on the go. Dive into dark times and adventures with great performance and a well adapted UI and controls.

War has been waged across the kingdom of Myrtana. Orcish hordes invaded human territory and the king of the land needed a lot of ore to forge enough weapons, should his army stand against this threat. Whoever breaks the law in these darkest of times is sentenced to serve in the giant penal colony of Khorinis, mining the so much needed ore. You are thrown through the barrier into this prison colony. With your back against the wall, you have to survive and form volatile alliances until you can finally escape.

games.name: Narrenschiff
games.summary: "Narrenschiff" is a psychological horror puzzle game. Players take on the role of an amnesiac man who awakens in a mysterious mental hospital. As they explore, they unravel a story involving their own origins and the conspiracy brewing within the walls of the mental institution.

games.name: Relic Hunters Legend
games.summary: Fast. Fluid. Fun. An online cooperative Shooter/Looter/RPG. Gather up to 4 friends, gear up, and save the Galaxy from a terrible villain who has stolen the past!

games.name: Bloom
games.summary:
Bloom is a new free casual puzzle about chain reactions and a puppy with a bizarre love for berries. Follow Arya and her dog Bo in an adventure set in vibrant locations and a cute story with witty characters across hundreds of mind-bending logic puzzles.
Done saving the world?

Enjoy an endless catalog of free levels created by players like you, or try the ultra-simple level maker to create your own level and share it with your friends! Show off your creativity and become the best creator in the world!

games.name: Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition
games.summary:
The Beyond the Dawn Edition includes:
• Tales of Arise
• Beyond the Dawn Expansion

Wield the Blazing Sword and join a mysterious, untouchable girl to fight your oppressors.

games.name: HumanitZ
games.summary: HumanitZ is an isometric, open-world sandbox survival game set in a world ended by a zombie outbreak. Survive alone or with friends by scavenging, crafting, building, and fighting to last as long as ‘humanly’ possible. You can’t change the past, but you can fight for the future of humanity.

games.name: Ortharion: The Last Battle
games.summary: The Mage Ortharion has chosen you for The Last Battle! Make the right choices as you explore a world filled with magic and secrets. Improve your character in multiple ways and manage an adventurer's guild.

games.name: Army Troop
games.summary: Army Troop is an old-school PvP World War 2 online first-person shooter. Reminding you of the good old days World War games.

games.name: Frontera
games.summary: Frontera is a fantasy city builder and colony sim where you start with a small camp at the edge of a dark forest. Build up your settlement and economy to attract more settlers. Form a military to clear the forest, and claim it for yourself!

games.name: Wandering Sword
games.summary: Wandering Sword is a Wuxia-style pixel RPG. Play as a young man from Liao City in the Outer Lands who is accidentally drawn into a feud between two rival sects. Being in the wrong place at a wrong time results in getting poisoned with the lethal Frozen Toad. However, you are fortunate enough to have Qingxu, Sect Leader of Wudang, come to your aid and save your life. This is your turning point: the moment you decide to become a great warrior and enter the land of the Central Plains.

games.name: Rage of Towers
games.summary: Rage of Towers is a modern Realistic Tower defense game. Typically, you build towers on the path to destroy enemies before they reach the end, But what if you could take control of the tower by yourself and feel the battlefield.

games.name: Monster Path
games.summary: A deck building roguelike-JRPG with a 2.5D storybook fantasy art style accompanied by a dynamic score

games.name: Meer's: Escape
games.summary: Meer's: Escape is an island version of the classic city simulation. The game expands on some of the deep-rooted tropes of the city-building experience while introducing new gameplay elements to recognize the excitement and challenges of creating and maintaining a real city.

games.name: Starfield
games.summary: In this next generation role-playing game set amongst the stars, create any character you want and explore with unparalleled freedom as you embark on an epic journey to answer humanity’s greatest mystery.

games.name: Usagi Shima
games.summary: Usagi Shima is a relaxing, idle bunny collecting game. You’ve been tasked as caretaker of an abandoned island — as you decorate it over time, curious (but adorable!) bunny visitors start to appear! Buy toys, plants, and build structures on an abandoned island to entice curious bun tourists to pay your island a visit. Discover, take photos, and make friends with a variety of bunnies that visit based on how you’ve decorated and arranged the island.

games.name: Megaman X: Omega Blaster
games.summary: Megaman X Omega Blaster is an Arcade/Arena style fangame inspired by the classic saga arcades (Megaman: The power Battle & Megaman 2: The power fighters) but focused on the X saga but more dynamic, fun, challenging and with improved graphics.

games.name: Sea of Stars
games.summary: Sea of Stars is a turn-based RPG inspired by the classics. Promising the Sabotage touch in every system, Sea of Stars aims to modernize the classic RPG in terms of turn-based combat, storytelling, exploration and interactions with the environment, while still offering a hearty slice of nostalgia and good old, simple fun.

games.name: Infinity Islets
games.summary: A relaxing fantasy archeology sandbox. Dig through the sands of Infinity Islets to unearth hidden interdimensional artifacts. Your mission is to return these artifacts to the museum, bringing it back to its former glory.

games.name: Battlesmiths: Blade and Forge
games.summary: Battlesmiths is a role-playing strategy game with a deep crafting system and tactical combat

games.name: Iterum
games.summary:
Engage in tile-based tactical real-time combat, where every maneuver and flanking action can turn the tide of battle. Position your units carefully to outsmart your opponents and secure victory on the field.

Oversee the survival and prosperity of your city through deep seasonal yield management. Store grain for the winter, adapt to unpredictable hazards, and balance rations, taxes, and happiness to keep your people thriving. High taxes and generous rations can both shape your city's fate, just like in classic survival city-builders.

Build and fortify settlements at key locations, exploit and refine resources, and maintain vital supply lines to support your armies on campaign. Every decision matters as you expand your influence and defend your realm.

Unleash your creativity with a custom script-based map editor. Design your own scenarios, craft unique challenges, or relive historical campaigns from the age of the Roman Empire. Shape the world and the stories you want to play.

games.name: Ridle
games.summary: RIDLE is a 2D action game where you run around the stage in all directions.

games.name: J-Jump Arena
games.summary: A turn based, jumping elimination game where everything happens all at once! Learn to be precise with your jumps and weapon handling, as well as in the art of outsmarting your opponents! Multiplayer for up to 10 players and single player mode available.

games.name: Politon
games.summary: Politon is an easy to learn turn-based strategy game where you challenge the minds of your opponents with your cunning and wits.

games.name: Competitive Checkers
games.summary: Are you ready to take on the challenge and become a Checkers champion?

games.name: Dimwood
games.summary: A roguelike deck builder where you venture into the Dimwood, armed with unique modal cards. Rendered in dense 1-Bit pixel art, carefully build your deck and modify your cards to balance offense and utility. Battle your way past increasingly fearsome enemies and defeat the Beast at its heart.

games.name: Dwarves: Glory, Death and Loot
games.summary: Build and command your own party of Dwarves in this mix of RPGs, roguelike and auto battlers. Prepare formations, assign equipment, and decide the fate of up to 10 Beardlings, as you lead the raid through reckless runs filled with Glory, Death, and Loot!

games.name: Desynced
games.summary: Desynced is a sci-fi strategy game with fully customizable units and behaviors. Gather, build, research, and explore the unknown. Alone or with friends, unveil the mystery of an AI on the edge of self-awareness and uncover the hidden truth in this blend of strategy, automation, and exploration.

games.name: The Night Shift
games.summary: Trapped in a department store during a storm, survive with only a flashlight while completing tasks and evading a malevolent presence that only moves when you're not looking. Uncover secrets and face evolving horrors in this immersive first-person horror game.

games.name: Anchor Panic
games.summary: In 2085, Taino star was invaded by the alien race "Shogel", and mankind encountered an unprecedented crisis. They wanton destruction, infection, assimilation, parasitism, human civilization is facing unprecedented crisis. The infection of fission bodies, the threat of new humans, the conspiracy of ancient alchemists, a series of problems are intertwined at the same time, where should the fate of mankind go?

games.name: Greedland
games.summary: Welcome to Greedland, an exhilarating top-down shooter where you play as an interstellar mercenary. Battle through ever-changing environments and annihilate waves of enemies. If you enjoy the action-packed gameplay of Crimsonland and Vampire Survivors, Greedland is the perfect game for you!

games.name: DriveCrazy
games.summary:
Drive a Kei Truck through a collapsing Japan!
You are being chased by aliens, and the last thing you want to do is get caught, so you can't help but panic and break street lights and road signs.

If you think it's a road, it's a road. Run inside buildings, walls, any road and survive!

games.name: Endlight
games.summary: Break through and outlast shifting, twisting, chaos. Fly through surreal landscapes desperately trying to get hoops. Dodging is impossible, so start smashing.

games.name: Rightfully, Beary Arms
games.summary: Rightfully, Beary Arms is a bullet hell roguelite that is about more than collecting loot, dying, and then losing everything. Carefully choose enemy upgrades against your own. Plan your dungeon crawl tactfully to gun through unique factions of enemies and strategically preserve loot after death.

games.name: Native Hunter
games.summary: Inspired by an existing indigenous tribe, where they live on an island called "North Sentinel Island". Native Hunter gives the player the possibility of living the experience in the body of an indigenous person completely isolated from society, just like the Sentinelese do.

games.name: The Complex: Expedition
games.summary: You play as one of MagWave's researchers, going on an expedition into the Complex. When that expedition goes horribly wrong, you're left alone and lost, wandering the infinite maze of hallways. Otherwise known as the Backrooms. Might there be something in there with you?

games.name: Geometry Arena 2
games.summary: Geometry Arena 2 is a free-form arena-shooter Roguelite game, dedicated to creating an exciting battle experience. Freely combine difficulty options, components, modules and upgrades to create the best gaming experience for yourself!

games.name: MeowGun: Hell Denizen
games.summary: Fast paced action first person shooter. Earth has been invaded by demons. The demon rulers have evil laws. They found out you're transgender and are now hunting you. Slaughter large masses of transphobic demons, zombies and other monsters in colorful environments. The game runs on FTEQW engine.

games.name: Ant Colony: Wild Forest
games.summary: You play as the queen of ants, managing an anthill. Ants cannot be controlled directly, but you can create the necessary types of ants; improve them; organize raids, build a dungeon! The goal of each level is to destroy all enemy bases.

games.name: New Heights
games.summary: New Heights is a physics-based climbing and bouldering game.

games.name: Skygard Arena
games.summary: Skygard Arena is a turn-based tactical RPG with a vibrant roster of MOBA-style Heroes. Assemble your squad, equip items and abilities, and outplay your opponents in fast-paced strategic battles. Discover the world of Skygard in a multi-campaign solo adventure, or fight in thrilling PvP matches!

games.name: Vaudeville
games.summary:
Vaudeville is a detective game in which the player plays the role of Detective Martini, a private detective who has come to the city of Vaudeville to solve the mystery of the murders of three people.

Vaudeville is an experimental whodunit game based on the latest AI technologies.
A tale of murder, suspense and absurdity that unfolds as you play, and you are the protagonist.

games.name: Nocturia The Game
games.summary: From a child's perspective, we will dare to cross in solitude the dark and vast spaces of a house haunted by an entity of ambivalent intentions that we will discover during our mission: to go to the bathroom in the middle of the night.

games.name: Yomi 2
games.summary: A fighting game in card form. Learn your character, practice combos, and read the opponent's tendencies. Strategic, turn-based card battling that lets you experience the nuances of fighting games like Street Fighter and Fantasy Strike by a lead designer who worked on both.

games.name: Desktop Explorer
games.summary:
Desktop Explorer is an exploration-puzzle game set in a retro-style operating system. Solve puzzles by interacting with built-in software features, immersing yourself into a realistic late 90’s computer experience.

The game follows a fairly innocent narrative as you progress through it’s puzzles. However it becomes clear to you that there is more than meets the eye with this machine, as you slowly see its familiar façade fade away in favor of a darker aesthetic..

games.name: Mars First Logistics
games.summary: Mars First Logistics is a physics-based open-world simulation game, where you design, build and control your own mechanical creations to deliver important cargo between colony stations on Mars. Earn credits, unlock new technology, upgrade your vehicle and tame the hostile Martian landscape.

games.name: Popologist: Camera Slinger
games.summary: You are on assignment of a newspaper company. “The POPOLOGIST”, on a mission to capture photo images of events, people & objects throughout the city within your cameras battery life & memory allotted. Overshoot & you cant complete all assignments. Will Your Pics make Front Page News?

games.name: Space Reign
games.summary: An indie space-sim and strategy game featuring ship and fleet combat mixed with management of a private space corporation. Claim sectors for your faction and raise its influence in the near-future, where resource exploiting corporations are in a state of constant conflict over territory control.

games.name: Break Them All
games.summary: The game type is A Roguelite barrage shooting game, Choose different upgrades after each level, and each upgrade can be integrated to form a unique gameplay. Every game is a brand-new experience. After each customs clearance, the difficulty increases and the playability is enhanced.

games.name: Carnage in Space: Crucible
games.summary: A fast-paced sci-fi action-platormer/beat-em-up with multiple characters and customization for replayability. Features both adjustable difficulty settings and intense post-game challenges for players of all skill levels.

games.name: Pile Up!
games.summary: "Pile Up!" is a strategic building game which you need to build houses, fulfill your people’s requests and manage your risky buildings in different ways on a small land. But don’t let your guard down in this chill environment, we only get you relaxed so you destroy everything you did.

games.name: Worldseekers
games.summary:
Worldseekers is a GPS exploration RPG. Discover rare cards, events, and unique characters as you delve into the expansive lands and deceptive dungeons of this world.

To help encourage mental and physical health, Worldseekers uses GPS mechanics and links to a phone app to help you get outside and walking. Of course, the Steam version allows you to play from your PC for hours while still rewarding you for taking an extra stroll. For all you streamers out there, we adjust / hide location by default.

games.name: Driftwood
games.summary: A game about downhill longboarding and a sloth named Eddy. Ride as fast as you can and watch out that you don't fly out of a curve!

games.name: Avian Knights
games.summary: Battle it out with your friends or compete for the title of Grand World Champion in Avian Knights, the crazy game of mounted mayhem combat! Featuring an 8-player competitive arena mode, a classic arcade co-op mode, and tons of weapons and power-ups, there’s plenty of ways to play!

games.name: NBF0
games.summary: A simple, fun, FPS where you must advance through waves of evil robots. Use your energy weapons to fight them and escape to freedom!

games.name: Cook Serve Forever
games.summary: Cook your way through the bustling solarpunk city of Helianthus as Nori Kaga, a food cart chef aspiring to make it big like her role model, the Culinary Queen herself, Chef Rhubarb.

games.name: Project Chameleon
games.summary: Project Chameleon is a stealth game where you must shape-shift into objects to go unnoticed by your enemies. Play as Siren, an elite spy executing missions around the globe. Manipulate your surroundings, set traps, and use powerful gadgets in each mission.

games.name: Occupy Mars: The Game
games.summary: Survive and colonize Mars in a highly technical, open-world sandbox game. Build and upgrade your base, discover new regions, conduct mining operations, retrieve water, generate oxygen, grow crops, and fix broken parts.

games.name: U4iA
games.summary:
You are heading to an exotic island (a large one with several cities/locations, not the beach and palms only type).
While on this island you run into quite a few girls.
You all have your own backstory to how you ended up there,
and there's a reason you're all there. u4ia tells the story of what's happening on that island,
the backstory to how you all got there, bonding with these people,
getting ready for something you don't even know will happen.
Try to befriend these girls and make the most of it.

games.name: Horde
games.summary: low poly fps where you have to survive unlimited waves of zombies

games.name: Escape From Zombie U: Reloaded
games.summary: If you thought the school system has reached its lowest levels... Think again!

games.name: Roguematch: The Extraplanar Invasion
games.summary: Roguematch is a Fantasy Turn based Rogue-like fused into a Match-3 layout, giving players many more ways to get out of challenging situations! With so much raw elemental magic at your command, theres even more to do than just smack and bash your way through creatures from the extraplanar realms!

games.name: Cosmo Knight Zion
games.summary: The project involves significant changes in the story to create an original plot, as well as improvements to the game engine, the addition of new elements and improvements to the controls, changes in the levels, characters and enemies, and modifications to the music. Although the project is still in its early stages of development, I hope to work on it until it becomes a completely new and complete game.

games.name: Shardpunk
games.summary: A mix of XCOM and Darkest Dungeon, based in a steampunk, rat-infested world.

games.name: Hunt the Night
games.summary: Plunge into a retro-style action-adventure game that combines a fast, skilled gameplay with dark fantasy and lore. Play as Vesper, a virtuous member of 'The Stalkers,' and explore the vast world of Medhram, filled with ruins and horrors.

games.name: Fear of Mine
games.summary: Fear of Mine - a visual novel in the genre of adventure and horror. This game will tell a linear but incredibly deep story in which the main characters fell under the influence of an alien mushroom creature. It seems to take over the whole world

games.name: HyperViolent
games.summary: An ancient evil has awoken in the depths of a remote mining asteroid, stirred from its slumber by man's lust for power. Unaware, you answer a distress call and become stranded, surrounded by monstrous foes. Unravel the mystery of this madness and stop its spread in this violent retro shooter!

games.name: Smalland: Survive the Wilds
games.summary: Experience a big adventure on a tiny scale! Enjoy multiplayer survival in a vast, hazardous world. Preparation is key when you're this small & at the bottom of the food chain. Craft weapons & armour, tame & ride creatures, build encampments & explore a strange new land.

games.name: Drakkar Crew
games.summary: Hey rookie, climb aboard! We're heading for adventure across the North Sea on our reliable Viking ship! Choose from one of the charismatic characters, hire some warriors and engage in bloody battles!

games.name: Story of the Olivia
games.summary: Welcome to the Wild West.Meet Olivia Carter.Fulfill missions.Earn money and uphold the law against thugs.

games.name: Dragon Chronicles: Black Tears
games.summary: Dragon Chronicles: Black Tears is a turn-based RPG where you use combinations of various heroes to clear dungeons. Train and utilize heroes to fight off those corrupted by the Black Tears and overcome difficult trials.

games.name: Ghosts of Tabor
games.summary: Ghosts of Tabor is a VR only FPS PVP and PVE survival game where you will use your wits, skills and resources to survive. Inspired by games such as Escape from Tarkov and DayZ, featuring different scenarios from scavenging to looting and crafting. Will you survive long enough to make it out alive?

games.name: Running Riot
games.summary: Pick a class and blast your way through rooms of cyber enemies in this roguelite twin-stick shooter! Choose your abilities and your path wisely, because you've only got one life to make it through the gauntlet. Rack up those points and spend them on even more ways to RIOT!

games.name: Desolation
games.summary: Unravel the mysteries of an abandoned city in Desolation, a multiplayer horror game. Your quest is to locate the source of a massive EMF output deep in the city. The shadows seem to be alive and stalking you as you progress deeper. What started as an investigation becomes a fight for survival.

games.name: Toy Tactics
games.summary: A physics-based RTS game with a unique control system. Lead legendary warriors from distant ages in their quest for glory! Command your troops by just drawing your formations on the battlefield. Surround, ambush, deceive.. faster than ever! Your imagination is the limit.

games.name: Mortal Sin
games.summary: An Action-Horror Roguelike unlike any other where you must strategically dismember horrific monsters to survive. Discover powerful weapons and magic as you explore beautifully detailed and haunting environments which are randomly generated on every playthrough.

games.name: Hell of an Office
games.summary: Hell Of An Office is an intense speedrunning first person vertical platformer where you run, dash and rocket-jump your way through the world’s most hellish office. But it won't be easy; the lava is always rising!

games.name: NTR'd By Clumsiness
