games.summary: A month after the death of his friend, Chris decides to invite his late friend's son—Jeff—to stay at his house for two weeks while he's in transition to go to college. On the eve of Jeff moving in, Chris decides to mention to his wife the danger that she's about to face; the boy is unusually clumsy.

games.name: Potion Tycoon
games.summary: Potion Tycoon is a management simulator with a witchy twist! Build and develop your very own magic shop. Manage resources, set up production lines, mix potions and sell them smartly to stay ahead of the competition. Welcome to the potion business!

games.name: Gung Beetle
games.summary: Gung Beetle is a satisfying twin-stick bullet heaven where you play as a dung beetle covering your ball in ridiculous weaponry. Upgrade your guns part by part to build out insane combos and lay waste to thousands of enemies. Become the Gung Beetle.

games.name: Big Ambitions
games.summary: Big Ambitions is a revolutionary role-playing business sim. Go from nothing to the biggest entrepreneur in New York by opening small businesses or slowly building huge corporations any way you like.

games.name: Xheres
games.summary: Either FPS or TPS, choose your play style and survive the apocalypse on your own or with your friends. But one must know for sure it ain't gonna be easy, there are hordes waiting for you. Not even considering tough ones... Nevertheless it's gonna be a fun experience.

games.name: Kingdom of Explorers
games.summary: Kingdom of Explorers is an adventure RPG game for up to 2 players. Each player needs to explore, collect, manage shared resources to unlock new terrains, upgrade weapons to defeat the enemies, Bosses and save the Dwarves Hidden Island!

games.name: Hellscreen
games.summary: "Hellscreen is a single player level based first-person shooter for PC, in the fast, frantic style of classic FPS games from the 1990s (such as Doom, Quake, Unreal etc)."

games.name: Haulin' Oats
games.summary: Haulin' Oats is a board game about truck driving, the US highways, and oatmeal. Four players compete to deliver their cargo then return to the warehouse while avoiding various dangers along the way. Take part in sabotage, races, curses, and more to get the upper-hand.

games.name: Relic Space
games.summary: Experience deeply simulated, hex-based space combat as an elite starship pilot. Explore a ruined solar system, upgrade your ship, and lead your faction to greatness in this tactical, space RPG with 4X elements.

games.name: Vivid/Stasis
games.summary: A hybrid rhythm-mystery game about uncovering the dark truth about a mysterious organization.

games.name: Sears: The Sky Frontier
games.summary: Sears: The Sky Frontier is a beautiful and epic real-time strategy game that puts you at the head of an army of little stone men against formidable invaders, smartly planning the battle and leading the defense in unique and atmospheric locations.

games.name: Ocean Man
games.summary: This is a role-playing turn-based game. In the game, you will play a captain and lead your team to explore the ocean and find the treasure! You need to sail in the ocean, explore different islands, sometimes encounter sea monsters. You will find new partners, expand your team and adventure with them.

games.name: Sky Strikers VR
games.summary: Sky Strikers merges sports excitement with immersive VR. Anticipate ball flight, boost with your rocket, and strike for the ultimate "moment" in sports gaming. Experience it for yourself!

games.name: The Magic Land
games.summary: The Magic Land is a massive online role-playing game where people live in a magical world of adventures, In an MMORPG people from all over the world meet on a virtual playground to explore areas, solve tricky riddles and undertake heroic exploits. Players are faced with the challenge of developing the skills of their selected characters, exploring a large variety of areas and dangerous dungeons and interacting with other players on a social and diplomatic level.

games.name: Star Survivor
games.summary: The last ship against the endless. Exterminate as many as you can, and gather points to upgrade your ship from a crafted deck of equipment and power-ups. Will your choices be enough to overcome the thousands hunting you? Survive the swarm in this rogue-lite + survivors + asteroids mashup.

games.name: Coreborn
games.summary: A social survival sandbox game set in the world of Ultracore, the game combines three major pillars: a survival sandbox (the world of Tormentosia), a social hub (Coreheim, the location of the Ultracore) and adventures (diverse action experiences).

games.name: Hyperspaced
games.summary: Hyperspaced is a chaotic co-op space action game for 1-4 players. Working as a team, you and your fellow Space Cadets must save the Multiverse from collapsing. Slide into the pilot’s seat, operate turrets, become a mechanic or even a janitor on your quest to find the culprit who disturbed the balance of the Multiverse.

games.name: Hightail
games.summary: How far can you survive? This game will give you a challenge to survive the wildlands and collect miles as you drift in unknown direction and try to avoid obstacles.

games.name: Dreadful River
games.summary: The realm is under attack. The king and his most loyal guards are trying to save the Eternal Crown. Floating down a vast river on a simple raft, you have to fight enemies, improve your gear, find allies and explore mysteries along the shores. Can you turn the tide?

games.name: Street Boss
games.summary: Become the boss of the streets. Take down anyone who stand against you.

games.name: Kings of Hell
games.summary: Kings of Hell is a 3D Beat Em Up with Stylized Cel Shaded Graphics in the gameplay style of 3D Beat Em Ups of the Early 2000's!

games.name: Voltaire: The Vegan Vampire
games.summary: An action-farming-roguelite, full of whimsical flora and mischievous creatures that really want to ruin your dark and mysterious plans of… Going vegan!

games.name: Touhou Hero of Ice Fairy
games.summary: Touhou Hero of Ice Fairy is a indie game developed by GAMEPULSE. You play as the Touhou famous character Cirno, become a hero, and embark on her journey to liberate the Gensoukyo and save her dear princess.

games.name: The Last Werewolf
games.summary: The Last Werewolf is a 2.5D supernatural mystery where you play as Lachie, a twenty-something lone werewolf, who's in search of more like her. Meet new people, explore the supernatural and learn more about Lachie's origins.

games.name: Super Cute Alien
games.summary: 1-4 players platformer about friendship, love and what it means to be human. Adventure, action and puzzles, contrasting cute and gore effects, also including RPG elements.

games.name: Sons of the Forest
games.summary: Sent to find a missing billionaire on a remote island, you find yourself in a cannibal-infested hellscape. Craft, build, and struggle to survive, alone or with friends, in this terrifying new open-world survival horror simulator.

games.name: Sky Traveler
games.summary: Simulator of life in the Japanese village. Building your own village. Use the portal to move around the islands and collect resources. Once you're ready - go to other worlds. There is work for you too. Relax and feel like a hero in this world.

games.name: Endless Dark
games.summary: An existential horror game in which you are tasked with keeping a sleeper colony ship intact. No enemies or NPCs share the ship with you - only creaking metal echoes and endless dark. Overcome random events, system failures, and the downward spiral of your sanity to see your mission through.

games.name: Research Story
games.summary: Set out to discover and record plants and creatures for the Violet Archive. Grow crops, tame animals, and build the perfect farm! Forge friendships along the way as you begin your life as a researcher!

games.name: The Hero We Need
games.summary: The Hero We Need is a tower defense with real-time strategy elements with a focus on narrative where players have the power to create their own custom towers by crafting and combining runes.

games.name: Shadow of the Night
games.summary: Build and survive inside the desolate forest.A struggle for survival in the north of Sweden.

games.name: SpaceBourne 2
games.summary: Embark on a journey to greatness. Get ready for adrenaline-fueled battles and a chance to claim your place in the galaxy. Grab the controls of your ship, gear up for the fight, and unleash your ambition to conquer and build a new empire in the vastness of space.

games.name: B.E.S.T
games.summary: B.E.S.T is an adult visual novel where romance, competition, and betrayal intertwine. 100 participants. $500,000 at stake: who will you trust? Make your choices, build your relationships, seduce or betray… and become the last one standing.

games.name: Stardust Exile
games.summary: Stardust Exile is an RTS set in the Milky Way galaxy, containing currently known stars and exoplanets with their real characteristics. The remaining star systems are procedurally generated. It has both online mode and single-player skirmish mode. The online server is persistent and single-shard.

games.name: Last Order
games.summary: Last Order is a 2D action game with pixel art style. To recover the "Last Order" in devastated world, you'll use a variety of wire actions.

games.name: Soul Taker
games.summary: Win your way out of Hell by Playing the CardGame SoulTaker. A Fun Card Game With a Strong Relaxing Atmosphere and Anime Like Visuals, combined with a Cute Card Dealer From Hell.

games.name: Horde Hunters
games.summary: Horde Hunters is a challenging horde survival rogue-lite that plays like a twin stick shooter. Explore procedurally generated maps to collect resources and use weapons, abilities, and items to slay thousands of monsters all in about 15 minutes.

games.name: Wild West Legacy
games.summary: Conquer the Wild West. Explore the open world of a fictitious American Midwest and survive the harsh environment. Convince other settlers to join you and manage your ever-growing settlements. Build a home, take care of your farm and become a legend in Wild West Legacy.

games.name: Hellcard
games.summary: Hellcard is a cooperative roguelike deckbuilder with Singleplayer and Multiplayer modes. Descend into the paper dungeons on your own, recruit computer-controlled companions or join other gamers in fast-paced tactical card battles against the armies of darkness and the Archdemon himself!

games.name: The Last Starship
games.summary: Introversion Software, the indie legends behind Prison Architect, Darwinia, DEFCON and Uplink, present to you the broken, unfinished and bug filled Alpha of The Last Starship. Pick a ship hull, kit her out with engines, life-support, sensors and rail guns and start your galactic adventure!

games.name: Plan B: Terraform
games.summary: Terraform a lifeless rock into a lush and habitable world. Build trucks, trains, and sprawling factories on an enormous hexagonal planet. Grow its population to millions. Enjoy a dynamic simulation of atmosphere, temperature, water, and forests.

games.name: Paranormal Cleanup
games.summary: Paranormal Cleanup is a 1-4 player online co-op survival horror game. This is no ordinary clean-up job. You are employees of a cleaning company tasked with cleaning up a haunted house. Take out the trash, but don't get caught by the ghosts that haunt the place!

games.name: Love & Country
games.summary: A World War I historical romance-spy thriller visual novel with meaningful choices.

games.name: Corpse Keeper
games.summary: Corpse Keeper is a very challenging action-strategy Dungeon Crawler. You'll need to lead a squad of three corpses to explore the grim and dark medieval world within limited time, build a powerful army of the living dead, and finally kill the demon lurking in the deep end of the cathedral.

games.name: Resistance Forces
games.summary: Save the areas seized by creatures. Complete all tasks and take over the area. Investigate the area and report the results.

games.name: Jam Scrapz Collection
games.summary: A collection of old Game Jam projects revamped, remastered, and rebooted for commercial and more playable value! More than two handfuls of games to play!

games.name: Paranoia Place
games.summary: Paranoia Place is a 2 player online co-op survival horror game. Together or alone, you will need to solve puzzles, find items and run from the bloodthirsty demonic killer.

games.name: The Farmer Was Replaced
games.summary: Program and optimize a drone to automate a farm and watch it do the work for you. Collect resources to unlock better technology and become the most efficient farmer in the world. Improve your problem solving and coding skills.

games.name: Hide and Seek
games.summary: This is a very fun, fast and simple game, it can be played by both adults and children. In this game there are two teams, one to hide and the other to search.

games.name: Scorchlands
games.summary: See your civilization grow in a relaxing city builder that you’ll play at your own pace. Terraform and colonize a new planet by the means of magic. Reshape entire regions, conduct research, and create wondrous constructions!

games.name: Running Robot Man 4
games.summary: Parasail over lava, shoot monsters with your laser, and explore procedurally generated dungeons with your friends. An action-adventure roguelike made in Unreal Engine.

games.name: Relic Dudes
games.summary: Defeat hordes of enemies, now with your friends! Work together or mess with them on this online multiplayer survivors style roguelike, where you create unique builds that can change the fate of your team.

games.name: Methods: The Canada Files
games.summary: Methods: The Canada Files is a mystery visual novel set three years before the events of Methods. In the last few stages of the Canadian detective competition, Detective Larika Downs is determined to discover the truth at all costs!

games.name: The Art of War: Card Game
games.summary: Lead one of four factions of your choice and defeat all your opponents in fierce card battles with real players from all around the world. Destroy your enemies, reinforce the power of your empire, and comprehend “The Art of War”!

games.name: Zenteni
games.summary: Build, conquer and collect puzzles.

games.name: Backrooms: Apprehension
games.summary: A terrifying and immersive multiplayer horror experience with social deduction elements. Survive as a scientist stuck in the Backrooms, just be very careful who you trust, someone is not what they seem!

games.name: Undisputed
games.summary: Become Undisputed in the most authentic boxing game to date! Featuring true-to-life visuals, bone-jarring action, and more licensed boxers than ever before, Undisputed gives you unprecedented control to master every inch of the ring.

games.name: StarStruck
games.summary: Embark on a thrilling journey through this highly engaging science fantasy visual novel with memorable characters and multiple endings. Journey through space, uncover the past and pull off a heist or two as you negotiate the pitfalls of friendship and a crumbling reality. Can you save the universe?

games.name: Inkulinati: Supporter Pack
games.summary:
The supporter pack contains a selection of goodies for Inkulinati, for all those who want to go the extra mile to support the developers of the game.

Contents:
Additional skin for the Tiny Inkulinati
Additional colour for the character creator
The Inkulinati Original Soundtrack
Printable colouring sheets
A selection of wallpapers
Digital Artbook - a look at medieval references and the visual development of Inkulinati

games.name: Inkulinati
games.summary: Inkulinati is an ink-based strategy straight from medieval manuscripts, where a rabbit’s bum can be deadlier than a dog's sword. Become a master of the Living Ink, build your own bestiary, defeat medieval superstars and collect perks to unleash hidden powers.

games.name: Paper Lily: Chapter 1
games.summary:
Something terrible has happened. You can’t bear to think about it - but you can’t live like this anymore. You stopped attending school, you haven’t left your house in months, you have no reason to get out of bed anymore. There are no choices left.

No choice except... that strange golden letter.

It’s time to get your life back together.

One last try.

games.name: Chaotic Era
games.summary: Chaotic Era is an intense and brutal strategy game inspired by classic science fiction, following a stranded human crew on an alien planet. Scavenge for resources and fight back against mysterious alien terrors in this frantic real-time strategy nightmare.

games.name: Ashes of War
games.summary: Thrown into a century long war between the Union and the Kingdoms, a lone starship Captain decides to rebel against his fate. Join him in his galactic journey and discover the various stories that can still bloom in the Ashes of War...And flirting. A lot of flirting.

games.name: Femdom Wife Game: Zoe
games.summary: "Femdom Wife Game - Zoe" is a relationship simulator. Zoe, your partner, has grown tired of your sex life and wants to try new things. Only she wants to be the one in charge. The game offers both authenticity and immersion. Start your new life with Zoe!

games.name: Wishbind
games.summary: A 2D platformer collect-a-thon in which you'll have to help someone collect a special kind of leaves to help them fulfill their project, while meeting interesting characters, overcoming tough platforming challenges and discovering secrets all throughout the world.

games.name: Tedram
games.summary: In Tedram you can drive a car or two trucks and choose your profession, your free to do what you want, driving the car or picking up trash in the city or even deliver some pizzas. The main goal for a player in this phase of creation its to make more money as possible.

games.name: Odyssey of Dremid'ir
games.summary: In the desolate realm of Dremid'ir, abandoned by god-like architects, a fragile world teeters on the edge of oblivion. Unearth secrets in ancient ruins, and navigate lost civilizations in this danger-fraught 2d RPG!

games.name: Your Average Old School Shmup
games.summary: An old school and simple shoot 'em up with an adaptative difficulty.

games.name: Survivor: Stay in the Light
games.summary: Stay in the light, hunt the dark. Create your own hero through the four dimensions of role, skill, talent, and blessing outside the battle. In the battle, choose the most suitable equipment and weapons strategically to improve your strength and continue to fight.

games.name: Horde of Viscount
games.summary:
Step into a land infested by the massive Horde of Viscount

Traverse through both classic-vania stages and regions with exploration where you use subweapons for your advanced movement. Be wary, you only have a limited amount of these subweapons. Instead, you must plan your actions wisely. Use the Dash Knife to attack your enemies from far away? -or perhaps use it to flee?

games.name: AlexanderBall: A Countryball Tale
games.summary: Ascend to the Macedonian throne as Alexander the Great and relive his conquests! Fighting alongside redoubtable and quirky commanders, recruit numerous types of balls for your army, construct countless cities named Alexandria, and build an empire that stretches to the ends of the known world!

games.name: Sis and Bro The Cyborg Siblings
games.summary: A visual novel RPG where you play as one of two adorable robots and do whatever you want, even if you wanna do nothing!

games.name: Reddish
games.summary: Reddish is a 3d action platformer with a lot of combat and exploration, each level has different enemies and secrets, also the world map is highly explorable and hides some surprises. Some gameplay aspects are influenced by snes platform classics, bringing then to the new generation.

games.name: You Are A Pilot
games.summary: You Are A Pilot is a 2D arcade simulator of a pilot who drives jet-powered flying car. The controls are based on physics. Deliver various goods, drive livestock on a farm, or defend the earth from alien invaders.

games.name: Ultra Fishing
games.summary: Fishing simulator in a realistic world

games.name: Surviving the Abyss
games.summary: Discover and mine resources for construction, light your way in the dark, explore and expand into your surroundings to advance your research. Capture the diverse, highly-adapted flora and fauna of the deep, but beware: the darkness hides unexpected horrors, with only the light keeping them at bay.

games.name: PocketCiv
games.summary: A solitaire civilization tabletop game. Plan your moves. Build your empire. Expand your civilization. Try to survive.

games.name: Elemental Raiders
games.summary: Assemble your team of Heroes, choose from hundreds of skills, and unleash them to defeat your opponents! Elemental Raiders is a fast-paced, strategic hero battler that will challenge your tactical prowess. Join the fight & save Runaria!

games.name: Let's Pet Pets
games.summary: Pet pets to gain Pet Points. Pet Points purchase Helping Hands. Helping Hands give you Pet Points every second. Each Helping Hand can be upgraded to give you more Pet Points. Pet Points buy Items. Items are unlocked by completing Quests. Items give you effects. Quests let you buy more pets.

games.name: A War of a Madman's Making
games.summary: You are subordinate to a deranged dictator and must plan his doomed invasion in this text-based RPG / Visual Novel. Navigate the shark-filled waters of the Great Leader's presidential cabinet, and try to save your family and survive the purges in a world of power-hungry leaders and nuclear warfare.

games.name: No One Survived
games.summary: This is a multiplayer cooperative open world construction survival sandbox game, where you and your friends must find supplies and build shelters in this world. You have to keep an eye on your character's needs state at all times, a bad state is likely to lead to death.

games.name: SimRail: The Railway Simulator
games.summary: SimRail is new, advanced railway simulator. Master high-speed long-distance EMU, heavy freight hauls and suburban trains. Travel 500 km of geodetic-data based real routes. Become train dispatcher and control the traffic according to the schedule or cooperate with other players on multiplayer mode.

games.name: Thelos
games.summary: Your main ability is to place two crystals on a viable surface and pull towards them. You can use dashing, jumping, running, and perform a special jump which is available after collecting rewards. Your opposition will be two types of sentries, dragons, mines, and traps who all want to keep you down.

games.name: Territory: Farming and Fighting
games.summary: From a small village of a dozen people to a small kingdom of thousands of people. Arrange for residents to work, gathering, fishing and hunting, farming and mining, processing and manufacturing. Trade, accumulate supplies, increase your strength, and fight evil forces and monsters.

games.name: Wander Hero
games.summary: This is the fantasy of a two-dimensional traverser in a different world. You can take a leisurely and strategically deep adventure. You can also collect beautiful girls without hurting your wallet, and form your own harem... ahem, mercenary group.

games.name: Ocean Punk
games.summary: A pixel ocean survival game. Ocean current disasters have submerged the land and devastated the planet. As survivors, you need to build survival bases and pick up things to help you handle all situations, like the changing climate and the invasion of enemies.

games.name: Ocean Current Punk
games.summary: "Ocean Current Punk" is a Marine survival sim that expands the living space by building complex and massive infrastructure systems and fortifications. On your quest to find the truth, you will meet different groups, encounter unexpected events, and strive to become the ruler of the sea.

games.name: Gravity League
games.summary:
In a world where gravity is no longer a limitation, the Gravity League has become the ultimate test of skill and endurance for athletes from all corners of the galaxy.

The rules are simple: 2 players, 1 ball, zero gravity - the first player to get 11 goals wins!

games.name: LEGO Hill Climb Adventures
games.summary:
Set off on a grand adventure as you brave the hills in LEGO Hill Climb Adventures, a single player exploration game combining the vast, unique worlds of LEGO and Hill Climb Racing!
Select from a variety of Hill Climb Racing and LEGO vehicles and climb the classic Climb Canyon hills! Using the familiar, fun gameplay of Hill Climb Racing, this brand new game adds twists and extra depth to the beloved gameplay formula with the addition of exploration, adventures and stories for you to discover!

games.name: Darkness Revenge
games.summary: Choose between a male or female character and take revenge on your killers as a vampire!

games.name: Gum Ball Run
games.summary: Gum Ball Run is a free to play fast paced 3D platformer with online multiplayer where Gum Balls race against each other through procedurally generated obstacle courses to become the #1 Gum Ball in the Gummieverse!

games.name: Queen's Brothel
games.summary: Join Queen as she travels into foreign land to start her own business, a brothel.

games.name: Locked In Mind
games.summary: In Locked in Mind, you are trapped in a virtual escape room full of puzzles. Use your wits to solve them at your own pace without the pressure of a time limit. Perfect for players of all skill levels. Start your adventure today!

games.name: Lucky Goal
games.summary: Lucky goal offers an experience of a soccer game through a third-person view. Create or participate in an online match and show who is a better soccer player. A singleplayer adventure is waiting for you to improve your gaming skills.

games.name: World of Sea Battle
games.summary: World of Sea Battle is an action-packed MMO game in which players can take control of a ship and immerse themselves in the age of sail. With a huge open world and more than fifty ships of the XVI-XIX centuries, from small schooners to giant ships of the line, with various PvE and PvP game modes, as well as massive guild battles for control over the many ports of the archipelago.

games.name: Heaven Studio
games.summary:
Heaven Studio is a tool to create playable Rhythm Heaven custom remixes, with many customization options.

This title was delisted from GitHub and Itch.io per a DMCA takedown.

games.name: MotorCubs RC
games.summary: MotorCubs RC is a savage offroad racing game set in a gorgeous rendition of Monument Valley. Single Player and Local Multiplayer using 4 classes of vehicles!

games.name: Holiday Haywire
games.summary: Battle increasingly difficult waves of holiday-themed enemies with up to 7 friends! Use points to purchase new weapons and unlock new areas which will help you in surviving as many waves as possible.

games.name: Coin Pusher Casino
games.summary: Coinpusher Casino is a game that brings the excitement of classic coin pusher machines to your computer. With realistic physics and colorful graphics, you'll feel like you're playing the real thing.

games.name: Quarterstaff
games.summary: Often outnumbered, never outmatched – carefully plan your moves to single-handedly save a besieged fantasy realm from the clutches of a sorcerous conqueror.

games.name: Last Eclipse
games.summary: Guardians and Gods fight for earth's balance.

games.name: Weirdlands
games.summary: A charmingly quirky RPG where you catch and fuse spirits you fight, and layer by layer reveal deep, intricate lore. This single-player, turn-based RPG has a deceptively simple exterior, but within lie complexity and depth. It's bright and it's dark, it's witty and it's silly, and it's one of a kind.

games.name: Rogue Frontiers
games.summary: A challenging game of adventure and survival for you and your friends, set in a beautifully hand-crafted world with a variety of locations, challenges, and creatures. Fight, craft, build, and survive through an adventure destined to be one of your favorites!

games.name: Riftcast
games.summary: A cyber companion for your desktop inspired by LCD virtual pets of old. Collect, train and fight all sorts of Reverians as you take on daring ventures, fun mini-games and fierce battles.

games.name: Depersonalization
games.summary:
Depersonalization is an COC like RPG game. TRPG! Dice! Cthulhu! Bad End! Multi-branch! A different world starting from zero!
The game consists of multiple modules, each of which has multiple endings and branch routes, striving to build a diverse, themed world.

games.name: Oddworld: Abe's Exoddus
games.summary: PS1 Emulation Port of "Oddworld: Abe's Exodus" for PS4/PS5

games.name: Super Psycho Baseball
games.summary: Welcome to Super Psycho Baseball, a sadistic home-run hitting roguelike in which you try to conquer a gang of pitch-slinging bosses, each more psychotic than the last. Come face five fully-realized pitchers, rack up powerups, and reach the top!

games.name: Devil's Liminal
games.summary: A demon's pact, a final summer. Yuri horror visual novel inspired by Azores folklore.

games.name: Let's Play Jigsaw Puzzles
games.summary: 'Tis the season for puzzles!

games.name: Movie Quest
games.summary: Remember the times at the movies? Maybe you've got friends all over the world or want to go on a virtual date? How will you get together to watch a movie? With Movie Quest you can! Settle down and watch a movie, quest, roleplay, challenge each other to get through a horror show!

games.name: Dwarven Realms
games.summary: Face massive hordes of mobs and unleash chaotic abilities that paint the screen with mayhem. Dive into the largest mob density of any 3D ARPG and slay them all. Wield epic powers, create your build, and shape a world of endless possibilities in the action-packed ARPG experience.

games.name: Chainmail Bikini
games.summary: Join Brandi the Red and her heroic companions as they hunt monsters for fun and profit in this RPG game!

games.name: Scholar of the Arcane Arts
games.summary: Scholar of the Arcane Arts is a Roguelike Action RPG where every spell you cast interacts with one another. Learn new spells, solve puzzles, unlock secret dungeons, and defeat monstrous beings to save the world invaded by five Planes of magic!

games.name: Nordic Ashes: Survivors of Ragnarok
games.summary:
Norse themed Roguelike enemy hell, where you’ll have to survive hordes of creatures that come your way. Unlock new weapons and abilities as you battle. Upgrade your character's stats with Constellation Ability Trees and slay your enemies before they surround you, or it may be too late…

Fight all sorts of beasts, from basic creatures to Elite monsters and Epic bosses with their own AI. Don’t be fooled, even minions can be pretty dangerous!

Unlock new weapons and abilities as you battle. Upgrade your characters’ stats with Constellation Ability Trees and slay your enemies before they surround you, or it may be too late…

After Ragnarok, Yggdrasil, the World Tree, lost almost all of its energy to sustain the Nine Realms. Only a few heroes survived the End of the World. In this Technical Demo you’ll play as Axeldör, a Norse berserker, Thyra a fierce hunter, and Hafgrim, a master of the elements. Wield a legendary sword, or maybe conjure ancient fire to slay all the enemies that have reached your realm to conquer its remains.

Design different builds and make each run different by using the Constellation Ability Trees to upgrade your damage, area, cooldown and many more stats during each run.

games.name: Starcom: Unknown Space
games.summary: Starcom: Unknown Space is an action RPG of space exploration and adventure. Build your own starship while discovering an epic story in a universe of strange mysteries, alien factions and uncharted worlds.

games.name: Frontier Hunter: Erza's Wheel of Fortune
games.summary: After the empire invented the airship, people finally became able to fly across float continents and islands. And thanks to that, the empire expands rapidly.The top hunter, Erza, leads an exploration team to explore the savage frontier where the empire can’t reach.

games.name: Bad-Draw
games.summary: This game is in the type of 2D platformer. It's about the revenge of a character made of drawings.

games.name: Memory Girl +
games.summary: A tragic love story of Memory and her search for the missing "him." Fully conscious but trapped in the data of a game someone abandoned, Memory searches for "him."

games.name: Football Coach: College Dynasty
games.summary: A true college football management game. Play as a coach or a school, recruit players, develop your team, and compete for national championships. Build a college football dynasty in a realistic and customizable league with up to 90 teams.

games.name: This is a Ghost
games.summary: This Is a Ghost is a horror game in which you embody a ghost hunter. This action game will immerse you in the heart of a paranormal investigation, in solo or multiplayer.

games.name: Geometric Hell
games.summary: Geometric Hell is an arcade bullet-hell shooter with minimalistic graphics. Survive waves of aggressive geometric shapes and upgrade to keep up with the progressive increase in difficulty. Many deaths are expected before you get a chance to fight the final boss.

games.name: Withering Flowers
games.summary: In a world of magic, Shira embarks on a journey to find a cure for her sick girlfriend, facing her enigmatic teacher and her fiery sister. With the aid of a fearful friend and a bold rival, she seeks answers and a chance to mend their bond after breaking up.

games.name: Zombie Cure Lab
games.summary: Construct a laboratory base full of machinery to cure zombies. Assign workers to gather and process resources, building up your economy. Defend against zombie attacks and convert them into your workforce. Research technologies to develop the final antidote and restore humanity.

games.name: Yi Xian: The Cultivation Card Game
games.summary: "Yixian" is an online card deck building game with a background of cultivating immortals. Every game is a deck building experience from scratch. Players will start to practice from the Qi refining period, gradually break through the realm, and obtain stronger cards. By changing cards, the deck will continue to grow and become stronger, with a powerful combination of routines, and finally defeat all opponents to win.

games.name: Pigromance
games.summary:
Pigromance is a love story of a female pig born with the fate of becoming a sausage.
It contains the adventure of a female pig heading to a sausage factory to achieve love.
A sausage factory that makes delicious sausages.
Pigs with cut lines are raised inside the fence.

When the pigs gain weight, they are slaughtered and turned into sausages.
Because this is a sausage factory.
The slaughterer who manages it works to slaughter pigs.
He catches the fat pigs and cuts them into pieces in the shape of a cutting line. And cut meat is used as a sausage ingredient.
The factory where sausages are made consists of a breeding room, a smoking room, a blood plasma room, a freezer, and a packing room.

One day, the story begins with a male pig appearing on the farm.
You play the young sow and progress through the game.
Numerous challenges await inside the factory. We hope you will overcome the difficulties by using the characteristics of the sow pig.
And please fulfill the love of the young pig.

games.name: Predecessor
games.summary:
Inspired by the legacy of Paragon, built with love by the community, and powered by Unreal Engine 5, Predecessor is the ultimate fusion of shooter action and MOBA strategy.

With more than 30 Heroes to choose from, each with unique and devastating abilities such as shooting through walls, turning invisible and raining down rockets from above, there's more than one way to take down your opponents! Hit your lane and push the enemy objective, taking down towers as you battle to destroy their core all while protecting your own. Predecessor plays like a traditional three lane MOBA, but with genre-redefining elements such as an immersive third-person perspective, high quality graphics and game-changing map verticality.

games.name: Doggo Estates
games.summary: Doggo Estates is a multiplayer third-person action game in which a dog has everything he needs to become a real estate mogul: his warm liquid gold! Compete with other neighborhood dogs and pee on as many houses as you can before they do.

games.name: Hellseed
games.summary: Hellseed is a first person horror adventure with puzzles and some action elements.

games.name: Call of Duty: Warzone Mobile
games.summary: Call of Duty: Warzone Mobile is ushering in the next era of Call of Duty franchise with the highest quality Battle Royale mobile game experience, featuring authentic Call of Duty: Warzone style combat, weapons, movement and vehicles.

games.name: Faul!
games.summary:
Faul! is a card game played online.. Just create a lobby to play the Faul! game with your friends. You can invite your friends by sharing the link of the lobby with them. Each team can have a maximum of 5 people.

The red team always starts the game first. In order to reach the set target score, the narrator tries to explain the words before him to his teammates without using the forbidden words. While a team is telling, a person from the other team can check the banned words.

The first team to reach the target score wins the game. It is easier to reach the target score as the red team is always the first narrator. Therefore, for the Blue team to win the game, it is sufficient to get 2 points less than the target score. To explain this with an example, if the game ends with 20 points, it is enough for the blue team to collect 18 points.

games.name: War Robots: Frontiers
games.summary: War Robots: Frontiers is an online multiplayer mech shooter that launches the War Robots universe into the stars. Build and customize your mechs, squad up, and unleash the destructive power of your machines in epic online battles.

games.name: Dysterra
games.summary: Dysterra is a large-scale multiplayer sci-fi survival shooter game available on Steam that embodies deep crafting systems such as construction and production, while offering players exciting conflicts and environmental calamities within the visual power of the Unreal Engine 4. It is developed by Reality MagiQ and published by Kakao Games.

games.name: In Woods
games.summary: In Woods is a roguelike survival game. Each battle require player to level up the character, collect different magic item, survive for a certain time and defeat the final boss.

games.name: Abyss Protection
games.summary: Abyss Protection - dynamic, endless Tower Defense. Fight off the attacks of the inhabitants of the abyss, expand your possessions. Build formidable weapons that will help repulse enemies. Defeat the main evil.

games.name: Odania Sports Arena
games.summary: Step into the Odania Sports Arena, where sci-fi sports and VR come together for a high-energy, immersive experience. With intuitive motion controls, every punch, swing, and throw in this futuristic arena feels like the real deal. Whether you’re boxing in zero gravity, swinging a club in space golf, or trying your hand at space ball, each mode brings its own exciting challenge.

games.name: Goat Simulator 3
games.summary: Pilgor’s baaack! Gather your herd and venture forth into Goat Simulator 3; a totally realistic, sandbox farmyard experience. Invite up to three friends in local or online co-op, create carnage together, or compete in mini-games and then not be friends.

games.name: Zero Sievert
games.summary: Zero Sievert is a tense top-down shooter that challenges you to scavenge a procedurally-generated wasteland, loot gear, and explore what’s left of a devastated world. When the odds are stacked against you, you’ll need to do more than just survive...

games.name: Sketch Crawler
games.summary: Sketch Crawler is a super-creative deck-building roguelike single player RPG game about the King of Cartoons who lost his kingdom in a wicked magic picture.

games.name: Beat Hazard 3
games.summary: Are you ready to explore your music collection mapped as a stunning galaxy of wonders? Experience your music collection as never before with this intense music driven twin stick shooter. Each of your songs will have its own unique ebb and flow based on the music.

games.name: Quatro!
games.summary: Make regrets and lose the rest of your friends in this terrifying card game

games.name: Vail
games.summary: VAIL is a multiplayer VR shooter delivering unparalleled combat.

games.name: City Bus Manager
games.summary: Build your own bus depot from scratch and create your personal bus routes in City Bus Manager. Play your own home town or any famous city in the world with real map data. Buy buses, maintain them, take care of your staff and lead your bus company to become the #1 in town!

games.name: Nightmare
games.summary: Nightmare is a single-player survival-horror game. Once in a bad dream, you will have to decide: find a way to wake up or stay in it forever.

games.name: Wild Forest
games.summary: Wild Forest, a mobile real-time strategy game with player-versus-player (PvP) battles and captivating card-collecting elements. Players can experience the feel of old-school RTS games while immersing themselves in fast-paced battles characterized by base building, macroeconomic resource management, and direct micro-control of individual units.

games.name: Godless
games.summary: Become the last god of a fantasy world to avenge your kind and eliminate mortals in turn-based matches with auto battler elements.

games.name: Soulstone Survivors
games.summary: Face the Lords of the Void and their endless minions, collect their Soulstones and become a god! In this Action Roguelite, unveil secret spells, craft mighty weapons, unlock multiple characters, discover game-breaking synergies and conquer the power of the void.

games.name: 150 Floors
games.summary: 150 Floors of Magic or 150 Floors for short, is a tile-based, real-time strategy RPG where you play as a mage with either a Fire, Ice or Electric element, with more to come. Each mage has a wish they want granted or goal they want to meet. The only similarities they share is each mage wants to reach and conquer the 150th floor, granting them any wish they desire... Or so the saying goes. Beware, the floors made of tiles have a durability limit. If you attack a monster, you're also attacking the tile as well and it may break, sending the monster one floor down. The same logic also applies to you. If you fall through, you drop to the previous floor. Defeat all monsters on a floor, and ascend to the next floor. How will you fare against the 150 Floors? Will you get your wish granted?

games.name: Cyberpoly
games.summary: Cyberpoly is an open-world, third person shooter, and RPG set in the Dark City — a dangerous city dominated by money, crimes, and illegal trades. You play as a mercenary who takes missions, works in secondary jobs, builds prestige, and unlock upgrades.

games.name: RoboCo
games.summary: RoboCo is a sandbox game about designing and building robots to serve the needs of squishy, hapless humans in the world of tomorrow!

games.name: Plot of the Druid
games.summary: Make earthquakes. Turn night into day. Transform into a small furry creature. No one can party like a druid. An adventure game with sarcastic British humor and classic, hand-drawn art.

games.name: Petrified
games.summary: Team up with your group of hunters to track down an invisible ghost and stop it from petrifying everyone or fall victim to the ghost's wrath.

games.name: Maskerade: The Deadpan Cry
games.summary: Maskerade is a first person narrative oriented Survival Horror game, where you incarnate a young girl who has been kidnapped and forced to work as a ballerina in a terrific and mysterious cabaret, from which she must find a way to escape from the clutches of the Madame who runs it.

games.name: Scarlet Tower
games.summary: Hunt during the day, be hunted during the NIGHT! Fight bizarre monsters that will terrify you at night! Strengthen your hero by collecting relics, familiars from around the world.

games.name: Castlevania: Aria of Sorrow - Reprise
games.summary: Reprise is a roguelike mod for Aria of Sorrow which allows for endless randomized gameplay, along with extensive rebalancing and new features! Rooms, enemies, items, and shop are randomized, along with custom content and modifications. Mod is still in development but is almost feature complete at this point.

games.name: Furcifer's Fungeon
games.summary: Furcifer’s Fungeon is a loot-based dungeon crawler action roguelike. Forge powerful character builds using common, rare and legendary items and upgrade your collection for following runs!

games.name: Communite
games.summary: Communite is a wholesome, cozy, multiplayer city builder based on kindness and co-operation. Restore life, unlock new tiles, and work together to rescue adorable creatures to join your world and make it grow!

games.name: The Last Craftsman
games.summary: Get settled into the town of Gear Springs! Craft items for the townsfolk, gather materials, go fishing, and fight in card battles in the facility below the ruins.

games.name: Clash II
games.summary: Clash II is a turn-based strategy game, where player will get the chance to immerse himself as a commander of one of quareled fractions.

games.name: Mars 2120
games.summary: MARS 2120 is a metroidvania with engaging melee combat inspired by classics like Super Metroid, Castlevania: Symphony of the Night, or Guacamelee! With the use of special abilities tied to elements like ice, fire, and electricity help Sgt. Anna “Thirteen” Charlotte navigate the colony and battle her way through the secrets of Mars

games.name: Soulslinger
games.summary: Soulslinger is a challenging, fast paced runner with roguelike elements, in which you must reap your way through the Underworld! Dodge obstacles, eat pies, and get blessings to defeat threatening foes with the help of your powerful Soulvolver.

games.name: Para Eyes
games.summary: Para Eyes is a spot the difference point and click horror game. You are tasked with the responsibility of monitoring live security cameras and reporting anomalies. Keep your eyes open, your sanity up, and survive the night!

games.name: Paranormal Observation
games.summary: Start your career as a ghost hunter with the latest technology. Use your computer to find out what type of ghost you are dealing with. Are you prepared to face the challenges of ghost hunting?

games.name: Super Company
games.summary: You will act as an entrepreneur in the 1990s, producing all kinds of goods that citizens need; Providing residential and educational services for citizens; Carry out international trade and upgrade industries. You should choose the right development strategy to grow the company.

games.name: Valkyrie of Phantasm
games.summary: Control characters from the Touhou Project series in this shooting action game featuring high-speed aerial versus combat! Danmaku battles faster than you've ever seen will unfold in the skies of Gensokyo as you use your mobility to dodge countless bullets flying at you with a variety of spells.

games.name: RPG Developer Bakin
games.summary: RPG Developer Bakin (the correct pronunciation is "BAH-keen") is a game development tool that allows anyone to enjoy creating RPGs with intuitive operation and advanced features without programming. It includes a map editor, camera tool, and other tools to help you create your game, as well as graphics and sound assets that you can make your game from the day you purchase it. Games created can be distributed royalty-free with or without compensation. Now, bring “your vision of the world” to life with Bakin!

games.name: Yerr Out
games.summary: A wacky & competitive baseball game! Choose from 30+ different animals to assemble your team, each with different attributes. Crush hits into the gap, throw nasty curveballs, make diving plays in the outfield, and bust out slides to breakup close plays.

games.name: Case #1472
games.summary: A mysterious woman is sitting in front of you. Who is she? And who are you? And why are you both there? Case #1472 is mystery thriller information digging interrogation game where there are more things going on than what meets the eye, but are you able to unravel what has happened?

games.name: Pixelmancer
games.summary: Pixelmancer is a casual roguelite game developed by a single developer. You play as a necromancer with pets that will aid on your journey, you can upgrade almost anything for your hero and your pets. You will die constantly but become stronger and better with every death. How far can you go?

games.name: Gnome Online
games.summary: Gnome Online is an innovative, Real-Time, fast-paced, PvP, Sandbox MMORPG.

games.name: Boxes and Cutouts
games.summary: Bad news: Noisebox, but no noise＞﹏＜ . Good news: The noise box can be deformed (~*▽ *) ~, all the gameplay becomes a beautiful clip art on the deformed box, (ps: cut art can be from your collection!) (❁´ v '❁))

games.name: Dungeon Looter
games.summary: Co-op Hack'n Slash through random-generated dungeons with rogue-lite elements. Steal from poor (?) monsters and take items back home!

games.name: Deadeye Deepfake Simulacrum
games.summary: Embody the ultimate cybernetic corporate agent. Master deadly gunplay, time manipulation, and supernatural abilities. Hack computers, people, even the individual bullets flying at you. Confront the future in this story rich immersive sim.

games.name: Infinity War Land
games.summary: "Infinity War Land" is a roguelite dungeon shooter.

games.name: A Hero's Rest: An RPG Town Simulator
games.summary: Build shops, craft items with hundreds of customization options, and manage your resources wisely to lead your Heroes to success. Immerse yourself as proprietor of a medieval fantasy town in a world abounding with Heroes and Monsters.

games.name: TimeMelters
games.summary: Prevent Doomsday AFTER it happened! Designed by the co-creator of Sang-Froid - Tales of Werewolves and featuring both a single-player and co-op campaign, TimeMelters is a strategy hero defense where you go back in time and fight alongside your past selves.

games.name: Path to Purge
games.summary: "Path to purge" is a game with simple operation and exciting combat. The game integrates three-dimensional high-precision scene models, distinctive cartoon-rendered characters, and a skill selection system full of changes, providing a tense and exciting combat experience in just a few minutes.

games.name: Priest Simulator: Vampire Show
games.summary: Imagine that you have divine powers. What do you do? Help people or take the piss out of them? That's a priest's life.

games.name: Sker Ritual
games.summary: The co-op survival FPS and spiritual successor to the award-winning occult horror, Maid of Sker. Play solo or up to 4 players to survive the supernatural onslaught of the Quiet Ones.

games.name: Azarine Heart
games.summary: What will you sacrifice; for the safety of your sister?

games.name: Overwatch
games.summary: Overwatch is a free-to-play, team-based action game set in the optimistic future, where every match is the ultimate 5v5 battlefield brawl. Play as a time-jumping freedom fighter, a beat-dropping battlefield DJ, or one of over 30 other unique heroes as you battle it out around the globe.

games.name: Lord of Rigel
games.summary: Lord of Rigel is a turn-based 4X space strategy game. In a galaxy divided by two elder races, unite with other species or forge your own path alone. Navigate galactic council politics and defeat grand menaces while utilizing espionage, research, and military force. How will you shape the galaxy?

games.name: Withering Rooms
games.summary: Withering Rooms is a 2.5D horror adventure set in a procedurally generated Victorian mansion that changes each night. Sneak through Mostyn House to gather weapons, distractions, magical artifacts, keys, and crafting materials.

games.name: Exotica: Petshop Simulator
games.summary: Exotica is a simulation game where you run an exotic pet shop in the city.

games.name: Pokémon Odyssey
games.summary:
Embark on a perilous journey into the Yggdrasil Labyrinth, a colossal desert maze on Talrega Island rumored to hold untold treasures or lost civilizations. As Nyx, a new guild recruit, your quest to unravel its depths takes a disastrous turn, transforming exploration into a desperate fight for survival and truth within the enigmatic roots of the world tree.

This story-driven Pokémon adventure ditches gyms and evil teams for pure dungeon crawling! Experience double battles, resource gathering, FOE evasion, and naval exploration. Enjoy deep customization: all Pokémon have perfect IVs, EVs are managed via items, and natures/abilities can be changed. Explore Gen 1-3 with new Etrian Variants, side quests, and a rebalanced, grind-free experience focused on strategic depth.

games.name: Sand: A Superfluous Game
games.summary: An open world, base-building, adventure survival game with quirky humor and Llamas!​

games.name: Moonbreaker
games.summary: Moonbreaker is a turn-based strategy, tabletop tactics game. Designed to be a true digital miniatures experience, set in an expansive sci-fi universe crafted by Brandon Sanderson. Direct Captain & Crew to determine the fate of the Reaches in gripping, ever changing competition & adventure.

games.name: LakeSide
games.summary: Build and manage a quiet town by the lake or expand it into a picturesque city state in this side-scrolling city builder featuring hybrid mechanics. Construct marvelous buildings, epic wonders and become the envy of the known world!

games.name: Zofia
games.summary: Zofia is a first person online and/or split screen cooperative RPG. Branded as a heretic and an outcast, you manage to escape the northern empire and take up work as a Seeker.

games.name: Terra Invicta
games.summary: From the creators of Long War, an alien invasion has fractured humanity into seven ideological factions each with a unique vision for the future. Lead your chosen faction to take control of Earth's nations, expand across the Solar System, and battle enemy fleets in tactical combat.

games.name: Lost In Fantaland
games.summary: Lost In Fantaland is a retro pixel-style roguelite game that blends deck building and turn-based strategies on a checkerboard.

games.name: Beneath the Mountain
games.summary: In Beneath the Mountain, you play as the King of a new Dwarven civilization seeking to find their fortune beneath the mountain. You dig your way through the mountain, encountering many dangerous foes along the way, all while defending your kingdom from periodic Orc invasions.

games.name: Slime Rancher 2
games.summary: Continue the adventures of Beatrix LeBeau as she journeys across the Slime Sea to Rainbow Island, a land brimming with ancient mysteries, and bursting with wiggly, new slimes to wrangle in this sequel to the smash-hit, Slime Rancher.

games.name: Salt 2: Shores of Gold
games.summary: Salt 2 is a pirate-themed open world adventure focused on exploration, crafting, and survival. Play solo or with up to 5 friends, sailing the sea with your ship as a mobile base. Discover islands full of quests, towns, caves, and secrets. Level up, craft gear, hunt, fish, and customize your ship.

games.name: Smutty Scrolls
games.summary: An erotic drag 'n drop puzzle adventure where you play three versions of yourself - at the same time! You're a sexy slime hero... Change the outcome of your story in real time! Explore the Smutty Scrolls, find legendary items and stay alive to date and pleasure all the girls!

games.name: Rogue: Genesia
games.summary: Walk upon a new world and slay foes endangering it. Rogue : Genesia is a rogue-lite deck building game, where you fight relentless hordes consisting of hundreds and thousands of monsters, carve your path through their ranks, defeat the boss and save one of the many worlds.

games.name: HellEscape
games.summary: HellEscape is a 2D bullet hell with auto-fire and roguelike elements.

games.name: Incision
games.summary: Slaughter your way through nightmarish industrial mazes, transformed cityscapes and surreal alien structures to cut down the Growth in this ultraviolent, fast-paced, and merciless retro-styled first person shooter.

games.name: 2089: Space Divided
games.summary: 2089: Space Divided is a classic science fiction real-time strategy game in which you collect resources, build up your base, raise troops and destroy your opponents with tactical finesse.

games.name: Garbanzo Quest
games.summary: Garbanzo Quest! The crazy bullet-heck platformer where your main weapon is your own spit! Help Garbanzo (and Pinto if you have a buddy) save their Friends from the evil Billi' Bones and his wacky world full of hand-crafted challenges, secrets, and branching paths!

games.name: Turbo Kid
games.summary: Turbo Kid is a BMX-powered pixel-art Metroidvania gore-fest based on the film of the same name.

games.name: The Wandering Village
games.summary: The Wandering Village is a city-building simulation game with survival and rogue-like elements. Build a village on the back of a giant, wandering creature, farm crops and forage resources to keep your villagers alive and form a symbiotic relationship with your giant host to survive together in a hostile, yet beautiful post-apocalyptic world.

games.name: Rainbow Six Mobile
games.summary: From the acclaimed Rainbow Six franchise, Rainbow Six Mobile is a competitive, multiplayer first-person shooter experience on your phone. Compete in Rainbow Six's classic Attack vs. Defense game modes. Play as an Attacker or Defender in fast-paced 5v5 matches and face intense close-quarter combat while making timely tactical decisions. Choose from a roster of highly trained Operators, each with their own unique abilities and gadgets. Experience this ultimate tactical shooter game, designed exclusively for mobile.

games.name: Zhōngguó Shì Fùháo
games.summary:
Developed by a two-person indie team, “Zhong Guo Shi Fu Hao” (Chinese Tycoon) is a 3D city-based simulation game centered around economics and modern life.
Experience a wide range of gameplay features including stock trading, car driving, shooting, city exploration, and the collection of money and story texts.

You can engage in real-time stock market fluctuations, buying and selling your way to sudden wealth; gather scattered banknotes around the city to trigger unique events and discover hidden narratives; or simply enjoy the sights of towns, beaches, and forests as you live the life of a modern tycoon.

games.name: Void Sols
games.summary: 2D top-down minimalist souls-like. Explore the jail you awaken inside of in this dark and atmospheric action game.

games.name: Shatterline
games.summary: Shatterline is an arena FPS with a roguelike co-op mode (Expedition) as well as several traditional PvP modes such as TDM, Conquest, Plant-the-Bomb, and Escort. Players can choose Operatives and an armory of weapons that can be customized via attachments. Set in the near future, where humanity faces a threat of cosmic proportions. Players take on the roles of the Immunes – bearers of an extremely rare genetic combination that allows their bodies to resist the alien plague.

games.name: Mega Fast Food
games.summary: Build and manage your own fast food store. Decide how your store will look like, hire the best staff, manage inventory, offer drive-thru, create your own custom food menu. Become the best and most popular fast food store in town!

games.name: Trenchpunk
games.summary: A dieselpunk Wolfenstein 3d inspired first person shooter.

games.name: Disney Dreamlight Valley
games.summary: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighbourhood alongside Disney and Pixar Heroes and Villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

games.name: Autos
games.summary: Autos is driving game contains five modes Racing, Car Park Drift, Truck Challenge, Rally and Transportation Open World Driving.

games.name: Tetra Tactics
games.summary: Strategize, collect, upgrade. Tetra Tactics is a roguelite deckbuilder inspired by Triple Triad, featuring deep meta-progression and endless replayability. Outwit opponents on a 4x4 tactical grid, traverse branching maps, augment your cards, and combine powerful abilities to build the ultimate deck.

games.name: Omi Oh My AI
games.summary: Go on a captchavating adventure with Omi, a friendly (if a bit quirky) artificial intelligence! Learn to see the world the way Omi does as you solve image, word, and number puzzles inspired by the CAPTCHAs we’ve all had to do to prove we’re not a robot. Go outside the game and explore websites chronicling Omi’s development and learn how to solve the game’s stranger puzzles in this game inspired by AI, I Love Bees, the 90’s, and the constant need to prove you’re not a robot.

games.name: Kitten Burst
games.summary: Kitten Burst is an Adventure/Racing Game about a Flying Cat set in the year 200X. Explore Sites on the Web, Race through Circuits, & Battle Bullet Hell Bosses to Save Cyberspace.

games.name: PunchBots
games.summary: PunchBots an fighting game with a different twist multiplayer up to 4 players. Learn when to jump and when to attack dominate your opponents with your strategy and agility in this robot fighting game.

games.name: MapleStory Worlds
games.summary: MapleStory Worlds is the next generation "Content Creation & Play Platform" where anyone can build and enjoy content. MapleStory Worlds welcomes you with an array of diverse Worlds, from content uniquely designed by myself to original series created by other MapleStory World Developers! With a roster of easy-peasy creation-paced avatars, communicating with your friends will double your experience in MapleStory Worlds!

games.name: Lootun
games.summary:
Lootun is a semi-idle RPG in which players assemble a party of adventurers and send them into dungeons automatically. While battles progress on their own, the core gameplay focuses on collecting, managing, and upgrading equipment.

Combat is primarily auto-battled. The player’s role centers on managing acquired gear, swapping equipment, and handling crafting and upgrades.

Although the game emphasizes idle and automated progression, strategic skill selection and party composition are key to effective character development.

games.name: Exodus Checkmate
games.summary:
You're trapped in school and monsters appeared... The only way out? Playing real-life and mortal chess! Explore complex Gameboards in this First Person Dungeon Crawler and raise the affection with your teammates to get closer to them!

You are the king. You are the school's only salvation!

games.name: Endure Island
games.summary: Survive on an ever-changing desert island! The goal of the player is to survive as long as possible on a deserted island, while keeping the changes under control. Keep the fight going by balancing the acquisition of weapons with keeping the changes on the deserted island in check.

games.name: Self Simulated
games.summary: Self Simulated is a fast-paced precision platformer for the Game Boy Color. Play as a robotic version of yourself and navigate over 100 handcrafted levels filled with enemies, hazards, and glitch-filled dangers. Uncover your past and master tight, responsive controls designed for fast retries and fluid movement.

games.name: Barely Working
games.summary: Try to get your work done while being the office slut.

games.name: Animal Simulator
games.summary: New unique open world survival game. Choose one of the animals and survive in the open world together with your group, or human friend. Each animal has its own style of play. You can choose a predator or a little rabbit. It’s up to you.

games.name: Ultimate Fishing Simulator 2
games.summary: The most comprehensive fishing game of all time! Immerse yourself in the virtual world of fishing and test yourself in the fishing technique of your choice! Feeder, fly fishing, spinning or classic float fishing - the choice is yours!

games.name: Hamster Playground
games.summary: Prepare for cuteness overload, relentless training, and fierce rivalry as you and your hamsters take on challenges while traversing the maze and riding a skateboard! Be the first ones to cross the finish line to earn rewards and yummy treats!

games.name: World of Jade Dynasty
games.summary: "World of Jade Dynasty" (Zhu Xian World) is a fairy-themed online game developed by Perfect World Games. It was launched for public beta on December 19, 2024. The game is developed using the UE5 engine, using various technologies such as physical rasterization and ray tracing rendering, dynamic shadow options, screen space and true 3D reflection.

games.name: Rally
games.summary: Gather together troops and weapons to fight through increasingly difficult armies in this rogue-like deck-building game. Establish synergies between your cards and treasures to create the strongest army!

games.name: Mobmania
games.summary: Defeat various bosses that get thrown at you using an arsenal of unique weapons, items, and character abilities. Can you survive the onslaught of monsters?

games.name: Monsters Loot Swag
games.summary: Top-down, twin-stick, power-up collectathon shooter.

games.name: Catizens
games.summary: Inspired by RimWorld and The Sims, Catizens is a colony management simulation game where you watch over unique cats with quirky personalities, as you help them build and grow their settlement while exploring new lands, facing off against wildlife and overcoming the challenges of each environment.

games.name: The World of Kungfu: Dragon and Eagle
games.summary: A nostalgic pixel RPG that tells a Wuxia fantasy set in ancient China. You will start as a no-name wayfarer in a world of Kungfu, acquaint yourself with journeymen from feuding clans and sects, learn different schools of martial arts, and eventually make your own name at the crossroads of times.

games.name: Between Two Worlds
games.summary:
What will you do when the boundary between fantasy and reality collapses?

You and your friends are playing a simple tabletop game, adventuring in the fantasy world of Euchora. But strange things start happening to you. An unknown woman is visiting you in the night. Your friends have started to behave in strange, unusual ways. What is going on?

games.name: Escape the Backrooms
games.summary: Explore the seemingly infinite expanse of eerily familiar levels in the backrooms based on the popular creepypasta lore. Each level features different ways to escape with danger along the way.

games.name: Fantome
games.summary: Fantôme is a multiplayer (5 vs 1) psychological - horror game where you play with friends to Escape or as a Grifter, betray your friends and offer them as a sacrifice, to win.

games.name: Farthest Frontier
games.summary: Protect and guide your people as you forge a town from untamed wilderness at the edge of the known world. Harvest raw materials, hunt, fish and farm to sustain your advancing town. Produce craft items for villagers to trade, consume, equip and fight with as you battle for your survival against the elements and outside threats.

games.name: Cloud Heart
games.summary: A turn-based RPG and adventure game. Travel around the world and face various stories.

games.name: Move That Box!
games.summary: Move that Box is a retro, arcade, top-down style action-puzzle game based on logical thinking, but also requiring reflexes. Move, push, throw, melt and even blow up items to reach the goal.

games.name: The Dark Heart of Balor
games.summary: Archdemon Balor has opened the Gate of Hell into the human realm and hordes of demons and monsters have flooded into your world destroying everything in their path. You must protect those who are still alive and ultimately destroy Balor to close the Gate.

games.name: Turbo Golf Racing
games.summary: Turbo Golf Racing is an arcade-style sports racing game for up to eight players online. Drive, boost, jump, flip and fly your Turbo-powered car. Slam into oversized golf balls. Race your friends in an explosive dash to the finish flag. This is Turbo Golf Racing.

games.name: Camp Canyonwood
games.summary: Build and manage the summer camp of your dreams in Camp Canyonwood. A life sim about the great outdoors, childhood memories, and the things that go bump in the night.

games.name: The Patagonians
games.summary: Help the protagonist of this adventure game find his missing daughter. Explore a variety of locations - from caves teeming with huge insects to a mysterious mansion. Uncover a terrible secret that marked the beginning of a series of unpredictable events.

games.name: Sovereign Syndicate
games.summary: Victorian steampunk RPG with tarot cards instead of dice. Investigate the disappearance of society’s most vulnerable to uncover a mysterious cult. Play as three characters, each with their own skills and motivations. Customize your characters with narrative choices to unlock new tarot cards.

games.name: Unnatural Investigations
games.summary: 4 player online coop game, investigate crime scenes, determine the cause, establish a plan, take on the boss

games.name: Tracery of Fate VR
games.summary: Tracery of Fate VR is a dark fantasy cooperative/solo VR game in magic post-apocalyptic world.

games.name: Mech Shuffle
games.summary: Mech Shuffle is a roguelite deck builder where you choose a pilot and a mech to build a unique deck. Earn new cards and card upgrades to improve your deck over a run. Scout the battlefield, secure the beachhead, and repel the invasion!

games.name: Alchemia: Creatio Ex Nihilo
games.summary: Alchemia is a turn-based strategy roguelike with a hint of puzzle. You'll collect alchemical reagents, building your own personalized combat satchel, and combine them into magical recipes, unique to each run, to battle against outlandish foes.

games.name: Ghost Watchers
games.summary: Ghost Watchers is a co-op online horror game. You will explore and hunt ghosts in abandoned houses

games.name: Sweet Transit
games.summary: Sweet Transit is a unique city builder where the railway is king and trains are the sole means of transportation. Quaint villages will expand to bustling cities, farms to industrious factories, and steam-powered rail to combustious diesel... and beyond in this interconnected, train-driven world.

games.name: Captain Bones
games.summary: Captain Bones is an open world game about an ordinary crew member becoming a great pirate captain. To achieve this, he must first survive with what he has collected from the environment. Then, he must find himself a ship and a crew.

games.name: Psychoscopy
games.summary: Psychoscopy is a 5 player co-op horror game that you try to gather evidences about paranormal activities in large areas. Make a team with your 4 friends, take your equipments and hunt down paranormal activities.

games.name: Alone: Shattered Tribes
games.summary: An isometric survival RPG without the survival. Collect resources and craft items and weapons. Build a settlement on your island. Hunt in the darkest forests, or slay the undead in the cursed crypts. Explore the islands, unite the shattered tribes, and become a Jarl worthy of the sagas.

games.name: MiniMania
games.summary: MiniMania is a social MMO designed for browsers and mobile devices, offering a seamless gaming experience on the go. Explore a vibrant virtual world where you can build, customize, and create your own unique spaces. Connect with players worldwide, embark on exciting adventures, and discover endless fun through creative interactions and activities. Dive into MiniMania and make the world your playground!

games.name: Incremental Epic Hero 2
games.summary: A mixture of incremental/idle and roleplaying game set in fantasy world filled with monsters and things to explore, where battling is constant, almost everything can be upgraded, and with wide array of various prestige mechanics to always keep things interesting and moving forward!

games.name: Duck Paradox
games.summary: Shoot bouncing bullets to kill corrupted versions of your Pet Duck. Slow down time to maneuver in a flashy way as you try to solve puzzles under pressure and chain explosions to rescue the original version of your Pet Duck!

games.name: MultiVersus
games.summary:
MultiVersus is a free-to-play platform fighter that brings the depth of iconic WB stars to life across the nearly endless possibilities of play.

MultiVersus was taken offline permanently and delisted from storefronts on May 30, 2025, while remaining playable through its offline modes.

games.name: Remnant Records
games.summary: Remnant Records is a horror investigation game for 1 to 4 players. As the newest recruit of an agency that deals with spirits trapped in the mortal world, explore places haunted by the dead to find clues that will help you reconstruct the tragedies that happened there and free their souls.

games.name: Escape from Mandrillia
games.summary: Local VR+PC horror: as a VR player, escape an underground facility full of giant alien monkeys. Up to 2 PC players can help you out controlling friendly drones... or crush you by playing as the enemy Mandrillians.

games.name: MOAR: Appeteaser
games.summary:
MOAR - Appeteaser is the sandbox version of Mayhem on a Rainbow - VR which will come in 2023 and is going to have an epic story campaign.
The Appeteser offers endless fun with wave and arena shooters spiced with mini games and an upcoming ingame level builder. Multiplayer is also among future plans.

You will fight a horde of various zombies with different kind of ranged and melee weapons.

You can collect points to unlock new guns, levels and power ups.

It is an easy going fun in which you can jump in any time and enjoy a bit of mayhem.

games.name: Lyssa
games.summary:
"Let us live, since we must die"

Lyssa Is an RPG developed by Vih. You will be playing as Alayss, a college student warped into the Soul World, a world full of demons and deceased spirits. Will she be able to find the person who kidnapped her while trying to regain the faith of her late best "friend"? Or will she fall into despair?

games.name: Westwood Shadows
games.summary: A police detective gets involved into a case about a missing couple. Soon he finds out that the husband was working at a mental asylum and he was conducting a research over a mysterious disappearance of patients. Among the files there is something he would never thought he would find.

games.name: A Mirror Puzzle
games.summary: "A Mirror Puzzle" is a puzzle game. Players will play as a water droplet spirit, through the use of various magic mirrors to control the symmetrical growth of plants or the position of certain scene elements change, overcome numerous difficulties, and finally reach the destination

games.name: Dinkum
games.summary: G’Day! Get ready to start a new fair Dinkum life and build your new home out in the bush. Explore tropical eucalyptus forests, scorching deserts and cool billabongs on an Island inspired by the wild Australian outback. Take care of giant wombats, play with friends and get ready for a ripper time!

games.name: Tower of Spirit
games.summary: Tower of Spirit is a fast turn-based RPG where your choices matter. Gather a group of unique characters, survive a serie of random encounters and battle your way to reach the enigmatic tower!

games.name: Capuchin
games.summary: This game has unique locomotion where you play as a capuchin and roam around alone or with friends. You can roam around, get eaten by Dave, explore the environment, learn new ways to move, What more would you need other then to be a capuchin?!

games.name: Elemgate
games.summary: Roll through 2.5-D stages while controlling your speed and switching elements to hit gates, activate ramps, enter portals or reverse and restore gravity with the correct element to get more time that converts into score that you will need to pass levels, earn stars and find a way to escape.

games.name: Fantasy Zoo
games.summary: Fantasy Zoo is a zoo builder where you build zoo for fantasy animals in fantasy world.

games.name: Sycamore
games.summary: Sycamore is a new 3D platformer under development based around quick, fast-paced movement where you will race to the end of a level to compete in leaderboard times with players from around the world.

games.name: Alaloth: Champions of the Four Kingdoms
games.summary: Set in a vibrant fantasy world, Alaloth – Champions of The Four Kingdoms offers fast paced action with a deep narrative, developed by a team of industry veterans. The game brings the aRPG dynamics to a new level with a skill based gameplay inspired by great classics such as Moonstone and modern masterpieces as Dark Souls in a gritty, dark, mature environment filled with blood and magic!

games.name: Fida Puti Samurai
games.summary: Fida Puti Samurai is a retro-FPS "virtual happy place" set inside a virtual simulated world, the simulation is jeopardized with a naughty bug. Traverse this action-oriented roguelite blasting waifus on procedural generated cities to uncover dirty secrets on someone's computer!

games.name: Rivalry warlord Sengoku
games.summary: A turn-based Sengoku simulation game that can be played by vassal!

games.name: Xiuzhen Idle
games.summary: This is a xiuzhen simulation placement game! From the refining of qi, building the foundation to the ascension of the celestial realm, crossed into the divine realm.

games.name: Bring It On!
games.summary: Bring It On! is a single-player auto-attacking 'monster'-hell shoot-em-up survival game. Take on massive hordes of monsters across several locations, earning experience points to level up and acquire new weapons and items.

games.name: Deep Space Survivor
games.summary: Survive massive amount of enemies in space in this top-down action auto-shooter.

games.name: Extraneum
games.summary: Fight your way through mutated fiends and stop their progress in this old school FPS

games.name: Dread Delusion
games.summary: Dread Delusion is an open world RPG brimming with strange places and dark perils. Carve your own path through the flying continents of a shattered land. Discover curious towns, unearth occult secrets, master powerful magic - and change the world through your choices.

games.name: Unbearable
games.summary: A story inspired by old school survival horror. Play alone or together on split screen. Delve into dark environments; hide or run; fight melee or with guns; climb and solve puzzles to discover the story of Unbearable.

games.name: Endless Waves Survival
games.summary: Rapture is a casual game with roguelike elements, gain experience, collect items, level up and try to survive thousands of enemies as long as you can.

games.name: DreadHaunt
games.summary: Join the hunts as 5 agents in this multiplayer Co-op & PVP about horror and deception. One of you will be possessed then become a ghost, and the others must survive the haunting!

games.name: No Way Up
games.summary: The only way up... Is down.

games.name: Project Warlock II
games.summary: Adrenaline-pumping gore retro funhouse that’s full of guns, magic, demons, vertical arenas, 3D visuals, 2D sprites, and heavy metal music.

games.name: Musical Range
games.summary: Musical Range is a VR rhythm game where you use firearms to play along to your favorite music! Shoot to the rhythm!

games.name: Rumia Throws!
games.summary: Throw! Kick! Ride!A 2D action game where Touhou's Rumia goes wild throwing things!

games.name: Sniper Elite 5
games.summary:
